name: Abhorrent Apparition
desc: You imbue a terrifying visage onto a gourd and toss it ahead of you to a spot of your choosing within range. cada criatura within 15 pés of that spot recebe 6d8 dano psíquico and becomes amedrontado of you for 1 minuto; a successful teste de resistência de Sabedoria halves o dano and negates the fright. A criatura amedrontado in this way repeats the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso.
higher_level: If you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 5th level or higher, o dano increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 4th.
material: a gourd with a face carved on it

name: Abrupt Hug
desc: You or the criatura taking the Attack action can immediately make an unarmed strike. In addition to dealing damage with the unarmed strike, the alvo can grapple the criatura it hit with the unarmed strike.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when you or a creature within 30 feet of you takes an Attack action

name: Absolute Command
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You can control a construct you have built with a challenge rating of 6 or less. You can manipulate objects with your construct as precisely as its construction allows, and you perceive its surroundings through its sensory inputs as if you inhabited its body. The construct uses the caster's proficiência bonus (modified by the construct's Força and Destreza scores). You can use the manipulators of the construct to perform any number of skill-based tasks, using the construct's Força and Destreza modifiers when using skills based on those particular abilities. Your body remains immobile, as if paralisado, for the duration of the spell. The construct must remain within 100 pés of you. If it moves beyond this distance, the spell immediately ends and the caster's mind returns to his or her body.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using higher-level espaços de magia, you may control a construct with a challenge rating 2 higher for each slot level you use above 4th. The construct's range also increases by 10 pés for each slot level.

name: Accelerando
desc:
You play a complex and quick up-tempo piece that gradually gets faster and more complex, instilling the alvos with its Deslocamento. You cannot cast another spell through your spellcasting focus while concentrating on this spell.

Until the spell ends, alvos gain cumulative benefits the longer you maintain Concentração on this spell (including the turn you cast it).

* **1 rodada:** Double Deslocamento.
* **2 rodadas:** +2 bonus to AC.
* **3 rodadas:** vantagem on Destreza saving throws.
* **4 rodadas:** An additional action each turn. This action can be used only to take the Attack (one weapon attack only), Dash, Disengage, Hide, or Use an Object action.

When the spell ends, a alvo can't move ou receber actions until after its next turn as the impact of their frenetic Deslocamento catches up to it.
higher_level: You may maintain Concentração on this spell for an additional 2 rodadas for each slot level above 4th.

name: Accelerate
desc: Choose up to three willing criaturas within range, which can include you. For the duration of the spell, each alvo’s andando Deslocamento is doubled. Each alvo can also use a ação bônus on cada um de seus turnos to take the Dash action, and it has vantagem on Destreza saving throws.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, you can affect one additional criatura for each slot level above 3rd.
material: a toy top

name: Acid Arrow
desc: A cintilante green flecha streaks toward um alvo dentro do alcance and bursts in a spray of acid. faça um ataque de magia à distância contra o alvo. em um acerto, o alvo takes 4d4 dano de ácido immediately and 2d4 dano de ácido at the end of its next turn. em um erro, the flecha splashes o alvo with acid for half as much of the initial dano and no dano at the end of its next turn.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 3° nível ou superior, the dano (both initial and later) increases by 1d4 for each nível do espaço above 2nd.
material: Powdered rhubarb leaf and an adder's stomach.

name: Acid Arrow
desc:
A jet of ácido streaks towards the alvo like a hissing, green arrow. Make a ranged ataque mágico.

On a hit the alvo recebe 4d4 dano de ácido and 2d4 ongoing dano de ácido for 1 rodada. On a miss the alvo recebe metade do dano.
higher_level: Increase this spell's initial and ongoing damage by 1d4 per slot level above 2nd.

name: Acid Gate
desc:
You create a portal of swirling, acidic green vapor in an unoccupied space you can see. This portal connects with a alvo destination within 100 milhas that you are personally familiar with and have seen with your own eyes, such as your wizard’s tower or an inn you have stayed at. You and up to three criaturas of your choice can enter the portal and pass through it, arriving at the alvo destination (or within 10 pés of it, if it is currently occupied). If the alvo destination doesn’t exist or is inaccessible, the spell automatically fails and the gate doesn’t form.

Any criatura that tries to move through the gate, other than those selected by you when the spell was cast, recebe 10d6 dano de ácido and is teleported 1d100 × 10 pés in a random, horizontal direction. If the criatura makes a successful teste de resistência de Inteligência, it can’t be teleported by this portal, but it still recebe dano de ácido when it enters the ácido-filled portal and every time it ends its turn in contact with it.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 8th level or higher, you can allow one additional criatura to use the gate for each slot level above 7th.
material: a vial of ácido and a polished silver mirror worth 125 gp

name: Acid Rain
desc: You unleash a storm of swirling ácido in a cylinder 20 pés wide and 30 pés high, centered on a point you can see. The area is heavily obscured by the driving acidfall. A criatura that starts its turn in the area or that enters the area for the first time on its turn recebe 6d6 dano de ácido, or half as much damage if it makes a successful teste de resistência de Destreza. A criatura recebe half as much damage from the ácido (as if it had made a successful teste de resistência) no início de its first turn after leaving the affected area.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 6th level or higher, o dano increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 5th.
material: a drop of ácido

name: Acid Splash
desc: Você lança a bubble of acid. Escolha one criatura dentro do alcance, or Escolha two criatura dentro do alcance that are within 1.5 metros of each other. um alvo deve ser bem-sucedido em um teste de resistência de Destreza or take 1d6 dano de ácido.
higher_level: This magia's dano increases by 1d6 when you reach 5th level (2d6), 11th level (3d6), and 17th level (4d6).

name: Acid Splash
desc: A stinking bubble of ácido is conjured out of thin air to fly at the alvos, dealing 1d6 dano de ácido.
higher_level: This spell's damage increases by 1d6 when you alcance 5th level (2d6), 11th level (3d6), and 17th level (4d6).

name: Adjust Position
desc: You adjust the location of an aliado to a better tactical position. You move one willing criatura within range 5 pés. This movement does not provoke opportunity attacks. The criatura moves bodily through the intervening space (as opposed to teleporting), so there can be no physical obstacle (such as a wall or a door) in the path.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 2nd level or higher, you can alvo an additional willing criatura for each slot level above 1st.

name: Afflict Line
desc:
You invoke the darkest curses upon your victim and his or her descendants. This spell does not require that you have a clear path to your alvo, only that your alvo is within range. The alvo deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar cursed until the magic is dispelled. While cursed, the victim has desvantagem on ability checks and saving throws made with the ability score that you used when you cast the spell. In addition, the alvo’s firstborn offspring is also targeted by the curse. That individual is allowed a teste de resistência of its own if it is currently alive, or it makes one upon its birth if it is not yet born when the spell is cast. If the alvo’s firstborn has already died, the curse passes to the alvo’s next oldest offspring.

**ritual Focus.** If you expend your ritual focus, the curse becomes hereditary, passing from firstborn to firstborn for the entire length of the family’s lineage until one of them successfully saves against the curse and throws off your dark magic.
material: a statuette carved in the likeness of the victim worth 1,250 gp

name: Agonizing Mark
desc: You choose a criatura you can see within range to mark as your prey, and a ray of black energy issues forth from you. Until the spell ends, each time you deal damage to the alvo it deve fazer a teste de resistência de Carisma. em uma falha no teste, it falls prostrado as its body is filled with torturous agony.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Ranger, Sorcerer, Wizard

name: Aid
desc: Your magia bolsters your aliados with toughness and resolve. Escolha up to three criatura dentro do alcance. cada alvo's máximo de pontos de vida and pontos de vida atuais increase by 5 for a duração.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 3° nível ou superior, um alvo's pontos de vida increase by an additional 5 for each nível do espaço above 2nd.
material: A tiny strip of white cloth.

name: Aid
desc: You draw upon divine power, imbuing the alvos with fortitude. Until the spell ends, each alvo increases its ponto de vida maximum and current pontos de vida by 5.
higher_level: The granted pontos de vida increase by an additional 5 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Air Wave
desc: Your deft weapon swing sends a wave of cutting air to assault a criatura within range. Make a ataque corpo a corpo com arma against the alvo. If you are wielding one weapon in each hand, your attack causa an additional 1d6 damage. Regardless of the weapon you are wielding, your attack causa dano cortante.
higher_level: The spell's range increases by 30 pés for each slot level above 1st.

name: Alarm
desc:
You set an alarm against unwanted intrusion. Escolha a door, a window, or an área dentro do alcance that is no larger than a 6 metros cubo. Until a magia termina, an alarm alerts you whenever a Tiny or larger criatura touches or enters the warded área. 

When you conjurar a magia, você pode designate criatura that won't set off the alarm. You also Escolha whether the alarm is mental or audible. A mental alarm alerts you with a ping in your mind if Você está within 2 km of the warded área. This ping awakens you if Você está sleeping. An audible alarm produces the sound of a hand bell for 10 seconds within 18 metros.
material: A tiny bell and a piece of fine silver wire.

name: Alarm
desc:
You set an alarm against unwanted intrusion that alerts you whenever a criatura of size Tiny or larger touches or enters the warded area. When you cast the spell, choose any number of criaturas. These criaturas don't set off the alarm.

Choose whether the alarm is silent or audible. The silent alarm is heard in your mind if you are within 1 milha of the warded area and it awakens you if you are sleeping. An audible alarm produces a loud noise of your choosing for 10 seconds within 60 pés.
higher_level:
You may create an additional alarm for each slot level above 1st. The spell's range increases to 600 pés, but you must be familiar with the locations you ward, and all alarms must be set within the same physical structure. Setting off one alarm does not activate the other alarms.

You may choose one of the following effects in place of creating an additional alarm. The effects apply to all alarms created during the spell's casting.

Increased Duration. The spell's duration increases to 24 horas.

Improved Audible Alarm. The audible alarm produces any sound you choose and can be heard up to 300 pés away.

Improved Mental Alarm. The mental alarm alerts you regardless of your location, even if you and the alarm are on different planes of existence.

name: Alchemical Form
material: a vial of ácido, veneno, or alchemist's fogo

name: Ale-dritch Blast
desc: A stream of ice-frio ale blasts from your outstretched hands toward a criatura or object within range. Make a ranged ataque mágico against the alvo. On a hit, it recebe 1d8 dano de frio and it deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Constituição ou ficar envenenado até o final de seu próximo turno. A targeted criatura has desvantagem on the teste de resistência if it has drunk any alcohol within the last hora.
higher_level: o dano increases when you alcance higher levels: 2d8 at 5th level, 3d8 at 11th level, and 4d8 at 17th level.

name: Ally Aegis
desc: When you see an aliado within range in imminent danger, you can use your reação to protect that criatura with a shield of mágico força. Until the start of your next turn, your aliado has a +5 bonus to AC and is immune to dano de força. In addition, if your aliado deve fazer a teste de resistência against an inimigo’s spell that causa damage, the aliado recebe half as much damage on a failed teste de resistência and no damage em um sucesso no teste. aliado aegis offers no protection, however, against dano psíquico from any source.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 7th level or higher, you can alvo one additional aliado for each slot level above 6th.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when your ally is hit by an attack or is targeted by a spell that deals damage other than psychic damage

name: Alone
desc: You cause a criatura within range to believe its aliados have been banished to a different realm. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Sabedoria, or it treats its aliados as if they were invisível and silenced. The affected criatura cannot alvo, perceive, or otherwise interact with its aliados for the duration of the spell. If one of its aliados hits it with a ataque corpo a corpo, the affected criatura can make another teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em um sucesso no teste, the spell ends.

name: Alter Arrow’s Fortune
desc: You clap your hands, setting off a chain of tiny events that culminate in throwing off an inimigo’s aim. When an inimigo makes a ataque à distância with a weapon or a spell that hits one of your aliados, this spell causes the inimigo to reroll the jogada de ataque unless the inimigo makes a successful teste de resistência de Carisma. The attack is resolved using the lower of the two rolls (effectively giving the inimigo desvantagem on the attack).
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when an enemy makes a ranged attack that hits
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Ranger, Sorcerer, Wizard

name: Alter Self
desc:
You assume a different form. When you conjurar a magia, Escolha one of the following options, the effects of which last for a duração of the magia. While the magia lasts, você pode end one option as an ação to gain the benefits of a different one.

**Aquatic Adaptation.** You adapt your corpo to an aquatic environment, sprouting gills and growing teia between your fingers. você pode breathe underwater and gain a velocidade de natação equal to your velocidade de caminhada.

**Change Appearance.** You transform your appearance. You decide what you look like, including your height, weight, facial features, sound of your voice, hair length, coloration, and distinguishing characteristics, se houver. você pode make yourself appear as a member of another race, though none of your statistics change. You also can't appear as uma criatura of a different size than you, and your basic shape stays the same; if you're bipedal, você pode't use this magia to become quadrupedal, Por exemplo. At any time for a duração of the magia, você pode use your ação to change your appearance in this way again.

**natural arma.** You grow claws, fangs, spines, horns, or a different natural arma of your choice. Your unarmed strikes deal 1d6 bludgeoning, piercing, or dano cortante, as appropriate to the natural arma you chose, and Você está proficient with your unarmed strikes. Finally, the natural arma is magia and você tem a +1 bonus to the attack and dano rolls você faz using it.

name: Alter Self
desc:
You use magic to mold yourself into a new form. Choose one of the options below. Until the spell ends, you can use an action to choose a different option.

* **Amphibian:** Your body recebe on aquatic adaptations. You can breathe underwater normally and gain a nadando Deslocamento equal to your base Deslocamento.
* **Altered State:** You decide what you look like.  
    
None of your gameplay statistics change but you can alter anything about your body's appearance, including but not limited to: your heritage, 1 pé of height, weight, clothing, tattoos, piercings, facial features, sound of your voice, hair style and length, skin and eye coloration, sex, and any other distinguishing features. You cannot become a criatura of a different size category, and your limb structure remains the same; for example if you're bipedal, you can't use this spell to become a quadruped. Until the spell ends, you can use an action to change your appearance.
* **Red in Tooth and Claw:** You grow mágico natural weapons of your choice with a +1 bonus to attack and damage. Your unarmed strikes deal 1d6 contundente, perfurante, or dano cortante of a type determined by the natural weapon you chose; for example a tentacle causa contundente, a horn causa perfurante, and claws deal cortante.
higher_level:
When using a espaço de magia of 5th-level, add the following to the list of forms you can adopt.

* **Greater Natural Weapons:** o dano dealt by your natural weapon increases to 2d6, and you gain a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls with your natural weapons.
* **Mask of the Grave:** You adopt the appearance of a skeleton or zombie (your choice). Your type changes to undead, and mindless undead criaturas ignore your presence, treating you as one of their own. You don't need to breathe and you become immune to veneno.
* **Wings:** A pair of wings sprouts from your back. The wings can appear bird-like, leathery like a bat or dragon's wings, or like the wings of an insect. You gain a fly Deslocamento equal to your base Deslocamento.

name: Altered Strike
desc:
You briefly transform your weapon or fist into another material and strike with it, making a ataque corpo a corpo com arma against a alvo within your alcance.

You use your spellcasting ability for your attack and damage rolls, and your ataque corpo a corpo com arma counts as if it were made with a different material for the purpose of overcoming resistance and immunity to ataques não mágicos and damage: either bone, bronze, frio iron, steel, stone, or wood.
higher_level:
When you alcance 5th level, you can choose silver or mithral as the material. When you alcance 11th level, if you have the Extra Attack feature you make two melee weapon attacks as part of the casting of this spell instead of one. In addition, you can choose adamantine as the material.

When you alcance 17th level, your attacks with this spell deal an extra 1d6 damage.

name: Althea’s Travel Tent
desc: You touch an ordinary, properly pitched canvas tent to create a space where you and a companion can sleep in comfort. From the outside, the tent appears normal, but inside it has a small foyer and a larger bedchamber. The foyer contains a writing desk with a chair; the bedchamber holds a soft bed large enough to sleep two, a small nightstand with a candle, and a small clothes rack. The floor of both rooms is a clean, dry, hard-packed version of the local ground. When the spell ends, the tent and the ground return to normal, and any criaturas inside the tent are expelled to the nearest unoccupied spaces.
higher_level: When the spell is cast using a 3rd-level slot, the foyer becomes a dining area with seats for six and enough floor space for six people to sleep, if they bring their own bedding. The sleeping room is unchanged. With a 4th-level slot, the temperature inside the tent is comfortable regardless of the outside temperature, and the dining area includes a small kitchen. With a 5th-level slot, an unseen servant is conjured to prepare and serve food (from your supplies). With a 6th-level slot, a third room is added that has three two-person beds. With a slot of 7th level or higher, the dining area and second sleeping area can each accommodate eight persons.
material: a canvas tent

name: Ambush
desc: The forest floor swirls and shifts around you to welcome you into its embrace. While in a forest, you have vantagem on Destreza (Furtividade) checks to Hide. While hidden in a forest, you have vantagem on your next Initiative check. The spell ends if you attack or cast a spell.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 2nd level or higher, you can affect one additional criatura for each slot level above 1st. The spell ends if you or any alvo of this spell attacks or casts a spell.

name: Ambush Chute
desc:
You touch a wooden, plaster, or stone surface and create a passage with two trapdoors. The first trapdoor appears where you touch the surface, and the other appears at a point you can see up to 30 pés away. The two trapdoors can be wooden with a metal ring handle, or they can match the surrounding surfaces, each with a small notch for opening the door. The two trapdoors are connected by an extradimensional passage that is up to 5 pés wide, up to 5 pés tall, and up to 30 pés long. The trapdoors don't need to be on the same surface, allowing the passage to connect two separated locations, such as the two sides of a chasm or river. The passage is always straight and level for criaturas inside it, and the criaturas exit the tunnel in such a way that allows them to maintain the same orientation as when they entered the passage. No more than five criaturas can transit the passage at the same time.
  When the spell ends and the trapdoors disappear, any criaturas or objects still in the passage created by the spell are safely ejected to an unoccupied space nearest the end of the passage closest to them.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, the length of the passage and the distance you can place the second trapdoor increases by 10 pés for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Amplify Gravity
desc: This spell intensifies gravity in a 50-pé-radius area within range. Inside the area, damage from falling is quadrupled (2d6 per 5 pés fallen) and maximum damage from falling is 40d6. Any criatura on the ground in the area when the spell is cast deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Força ou ficar knocked prostrado; the same applies to a criatura that enters the area or ends its turn in the area. A prostrado criatura in the area deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Força to stand up. A criatura on the ground in the area moves at half Deslocamento and has desvantagem on Destreza checks and ataque à distância rolls.
material: a piece of lead

name: Amplify Ley Field
desc: You create a faintly shimmering field of charged energy around yourself. Within that area, the intensity of ley lines you're able to draw on increases from weak to strong, or from strong to titanic. If no ley lines are near enough for you to draw on, you can treat the area of the spell itself as an unlocked, weak ley line.

name: Analyze Device
desc: You discover all mechanical properties, mechanisms, and functions of a single construct or clockwork device, including how to activate or deactivate those functions, if appropriate.
material: a set of clockworker’s tools

name: Ancestor’s Strength
desc: Choose a willing criatura you can see and touch. Its muscles bulge and become invigorated. For the duration, the alvo is considered one size category larger for determining its carrying capacity, the maximum weight it can lift, push, or pull, and its ability to break objects. It also has vantagem on Força checks.

name: Anchoring Rope
desc: You create a spectral lanyard. One end is tied around your waist, and the other end is magically anchored in the air at a point you select within range. You can choose to make the rope from 5 to 30 pés long, and it can support up to 800 pounds. The point where the end of the rope is anchored in midair can’t be moved after the spell is cast. If this spell is cast as a reação while you are falling, you stop at a point of your choosing in midair and take no falling damage. You can dismiss the rope as a ação bônus.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, you can create one additional rope for every two slot levels above 1st. Each rope must be attached to a different criatura.
casting_time: 1 action, or 1 reaction that you take while falling

name: Ancient Shade
desc:
You grant the semblance of life and Inteligência to a pile of bones (or even bone dust) of your choice within range, allowing the ancient spirit to answer the questions you pose. These remains can be the remnants of undead, including animated but unintelligent undead, such as skeletons and zombies. (Intelligent undead are not affected.) Though it can have died centuries ago, the older the spirit called, the less it remembers of its mortal life.

Until the spell ends, you can ask the ancient spirit up to five questions if it died within the past year, four questions if it died within ten years, three within one hundred years, two within one thousand years, and but a single question for spirits more than one thousand years dead. The ancient shade knows only what it knew in life, including languages. Answers are usually brief, cryptic, or repetitive, and the corpse is under no compulsion to offer a truthful answer if you are hostile to it or it recognizes you as an inimigo. This spell doesn’t return the criatura’s soul to its body, only its animating spirit. Thus, the corpse can’t learn new information, doesn’t comprehend anything that has happened since it died, and can’t speculate about future events.
material: burning candles of planar origin worth 500 gp

name: Angel Paradox
desc: The alvo is bombarded with a fraction of energy stolen from some slumbering, deific source, immediately taking 40 dano radiante. This spell ignores resistances but does not ignore immunities. A criatura killed by this spell does not decay and cannot become undead for the spell's duration. dias spent under the influence of this spell don't count against the time limit of spells such as _raise dead_. This effect ends early if the corpse recebe dano necrótico.
higher_level: o dano and duration increase to 45 dano radiante and 1 year when using an 8th-level espaço de magia, or 50 damage and until dispelled when using a 9th-level espaço de magia.

name: Angelic Guardian
desc:
You conjure a minor Celestial manifestation to protect a criatura you can see within range. A faintly glowing image resembling a human head and shoulders hovers within 5 pés of the alvo for the duration. The manifestation moves to interpose itself between the alvo and any incoming attacks, granting the alvo a +2 bonus to AC.

Also, the first time the alvo gets a failure on a teste de resistência de Destreza while the spell is active, it can use its reação to reroll the save. The spell then ends.

name: Animal Friendship
desc: This magia lets you convince a besta that you mean it no harm. Escolha a besta that você pode ver dentro do alcance. It must see and hear you. If the besta's Inteligência is 4 or higher, the magia fails. Caso contrário, the besta deve ser bem-sucedido em um teste de resistência de Sabedoria or be enfeitiçado by you for the magia's duration. If you or one of your companions harms o alvo, the magias ends.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 2° nível ou superior, você pode affect one additional besta for each nível do espaço above 1st.
material: A morsel of food.

name: Animal Friendship
desc: You allow your inner beauty to shine through in song and dance whether to call a bird from its tree or a badger from its sett. Until the spell ends or one of your companions harms it (whichever is sooner), the alvo is enfeitiçado by you.
higher_level: Choose one additional alvo for each slot level above 1st.

name: Animal Messenger
desc:
By means of this magia, Você usa an animal to deliver a message. Escolha a Tiny besta você pode ver dentro do alcance, such as a squirrel, a blue jay, or a bat. You specify a location, which você deve have visited, and a recipient who matches a general description, such as "a man or woman dressed in the uniform of the town guard" or "a red-haired dwarf wearing a pointed hat." You also speak a message of up to twenty-five words. o alvo besta travels for a duração of the magia toward the specified location, covering about 80 km per 24 hours for a voando messenger, or 40 km for other animals. 

When the messenger arrives, it delivers your message to a criatura that you described, replicating the sound of your voice. The messenger speaks only to uma criatura matching the description you gave. If the messenger doesn't reach its destination before a magia termina, the message is lost, and the besta makes its way back to where Você conjura esta magia.
higher_level: Se você conjurar esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 3nd nível ou superior, a duração of the magia increases by 48 hours for each nível do espaço above 2nd.
material: A morsel of food.

name: Animal Messenger
desc:
You call a Tiny beast to you, whisper a message to it, and then give it directions to the message's recipient. It is now your messenger.

Specify a location you have previously visited and a recipient who matches a general description, such as "a person wearing a pointed red hat in Barter Town" or "a half-Orc in a wheelchair at the Striped Lion Inn." Speak a message of up to 25 words. For the duration of the spell, the messenger travels towards the location at a rate of 50 milhas per dia for a messenger with a voando Deslocamento, or else 25 milhas without.

When the messenger arrives, it delivers your message to the first criatura matching your description, replicating the sound of your voice exactly. If the messenger can't find the recipient or alcance its destination before the spell ends, the message is lost, and the beast makes its way back to where you cast this spell.
higher_level: The duration of the spell increases by 48 horas for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Animal Shapes
desc:
Your magia turns others into besta. Escolha any number of criaturas voluntárias that você pode ver dentro do alcance. You transform cada alvo into the form of a Large or smaller besta with a nível de desafio of 4 or lower. On subsequent turns, você pode use your ação to transform affected criatura into new forms. 

The transformation lasts for a duração for cada alvo, or until o alvo drops to 0 pontos de vida or morre. você pode Escolha a different form for cada alvo. um alvo's game statistics are replaced by the statistics of the chosen besta, though o alvo retains its alignment and Inteligência, Sabedoria, and valor de Carismas. o alvo assumes the pontos de vida of its new form, and when it reverts to its normal form, it returns to the number of pontos de vida it had before it transformed. If it reverts Como resultado of dropping to 0 pontos de vida, any excess dano carries over to its normal form. enquanto the excess dano doesn't reduce a criatura's normal form to 0 pontos de vida, it isn't derrubar inconsciente. a criatura is limited in the ações it can perform by the nature of its new form, and it can't speak or cast magias. 

o alvo's gear melds into the new form. o alvo can't activate, wield, or Caso contrário benefit from any of its equipment.

name: Animal Shapes
desc:
You transform the bodies of criaturas into beasts without altering their minds. Each alvo transforms into a Large or smaller beast with a Challenge Rating of 4 or lower. Each alvo may have the same or a different form than other alvos.

On subsequent turns, you can use your action to transform alvos into new forms, gaining new pontos de vida when they do so.

Until the spell ends or it is dropped to 0 pontos de vida, the alvo's game statistics (including its pontos de vida) are replaced by the statistics of the chosen beast excepting its Inteligência, Sabedoria, and Carisma scores. The alvo is limited to actions that it is physically capable of doing, and it can't speak or cast spells. The alvo's gear melds into the new form. Equipment that merges with a alvo's form has no effect until it leaves the form.

When the alvo reverts to its normal form, it returns to the number of pontos de vida it had before it transformed. If the spell's effect on the alvo end early from dropping to 0 pontos de vida, any excess damage carries over to its normal form and knocks it inconsciente if o dano reduces it to 0 pontos de vida.

name: Animate Construct
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork This spell animates a carefully prepared construct of Tiny size. The object acts immediately, on your turn, and can attack your opponents to the best of its ability. You can direct it not to attack, to attack particular inimigos, or to perform other actions. You choose the object to animate, and you can change that choice each time you cast the spell. The cost of the body to be animated is 10 gp x its pontos de vida. The body can be reused any number of times, provided it isn't severely damaged or destroyed. If no prepared construct body is available, you can animate a mass of loose metal or stone instead. Before casting, the loose objects must be arranged in a suitable shape (taking up to a minuto), and the construct's pontos de vida are halved. An animated construct has a Constituição of 10, Inteligência and Sabedoria 3, and Carisma 1. Other characteristics are determined by the construct's size as follows. Size HP AC Attack STR DEX espaço de magia Tiny 15 12 +3, 1d4+4 4 16 1st Small 25 13 +4, 1d8+2 6 14 2nd Medium 40 14 +5, 2d6+1 10 12 3rd Large 50 15 +6, 2d10+2 14 10 4th Huge 80 16 +8, 2d12+4 18 8 5th Gargantuan 100 17 +10, 4d8+6 20 6 6th
higher_level: Casting this spell using higher level espaços de magia allows you to increase the size of the construct animated, as shown on the table.

name: Animate Dead
desc:
This magia creates an morto-vivo servant. Escolha a pile of bones or a cadáver of a Medium or Small humanoide dentro do alcance. Your magia imbues o alvo with a foul mimicry of life, raising it as an morto-vivo criatura. o alvo becomes a skeleton if you chose bones or a zombie if you chose a cadáver (the DM has a criatura's game statistics). 

On cada um de seus turnos, você pode use a ação bônus to mentally command any criatura you made with this magia if a criatura is a até 18 metros de you (if you control multiple criatura, você pode command any or all of them at the same time, issuing the same command to each one). You decide what ação a criatura will take and where it will move during its next turn, or você pode issue a general command, such as to guard a particular chamber or corridor. If you issue no commands, a criatura only defends itself against criaturas hostis. Once given an order, a criatura continues to follow it until its task is complete. 

a criatura is under your control por 24 horas, after which it stops obeying any command you've given it. To maintain control of a criatura for another 24 hours, você deve conjurar esta magia on a criatura again before the current 24-hour period ends. This use of the magia reasserts your control over up to four criatura você tem animated with this magia, rather than animating a new one.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 4° nível ou superior, you animate or reassert control over two additional morto-vivo criatura for each nível do espaço above 3rd. Each of the criatura must come from a different cadáver or pile of bones.
material: A drop of blood, a piece of flesh, and a pinch of bone dust.

name: Animate Dead
desc:
You animate a mortal's remains to become your undead servant.

If the spell is cast upon bones you create a skeleton, and if cast upon a corpse you choose to create a skeleton or a zombie. The Narrator has the undead's statistics.

While it is within 60 pés you can use a ação bônus to mentally command the undead. When you command multiple undead using this spell, you must give them all the same command. You may decide the action the undead recebe and where it moves during its next turn, or you can issue a general command, such as guarding an area. If not given a command, the undead only defends itself. The undead continues to follow a command until its task is complete.

The undead is under your control for 24 horas, after which it stops obeying any commands. You must cast this spell on the undead before the spell ends to maintain control of it for another 24 horas.

Casting the spell in this way reasserts control over up to 4 of your previously-animated undead instead of animating a new one.
higher_level: You create or reassert control over 2 additional undead for each slot level above 3rd. When commanding more than 3 undead they make group attack rolls (see page 454 in Chapter 8: Combat).

name: Animate Ghoul
desc: You raise one Medium or Small humanoid corpse as a ghoul under your control. Any class levels or abilities the criatura had in life are gone, replaced by the standard ghoul stat block.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a 3rd-level espaço de magia, it can be used on the corpse of a Large humanoid to create a Large ghoul. When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, this spell creates a ghast, but the componente material changes to an onyx gemstone worth at least 200 gp.
material: piece of rotting flesh and an onyx gemstone worth 100 gp

name: Animate Greater Undead
desc:
**Animate greater undead** creates an undead servant from a pile of bones or from the corpse of a Large or Huge humanoid within range. The spell imbues the alvo with a foul mimicry of life, raising it as an undead skeleton or zombie. A skeleton uses the stat block of a minotaur skeleton, or a zombie uses the stat block of an ogre zombie, unless a more appropriate stat block is available.

The criatura is under your control for 24 horas, after which it stops obeying your commands. To maintain control of the criatura for another 24 horas, you must cast this spell on it again while you have it controlled. Casting the spell for this purpose reasserts your control over up to four criaturas you have previously animated rather than animating a new one.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 7th level or higher, you can reanimate one additional criatura for each slot level above 6th.
material: a pint of blood, a pound of flesh, and an ounce of bone dust, all of which the spell consumes

name: Animate Objects
desc:
objeto come to life at your command. Escolha up to ten não mágico objeto dentro do alcance that are not being worn or carried. Medium alvo count as two objeto, Large alvo count as four objeto, Huge alvo count as eight objeto. você pode't animate any objeto larger than Huge. cada alvo animates and becomes uma criatura under your control until a magia termina or until reduced to 0 pontos de vida. 
As a ação bônus, você pode mentally command any criatura you made with this magia if a criatura is a até 150 metros de you (if you control multiple criatura, você pode command any or all of them at the same time, issuing the same command to each one). You decide what ação a criatura will take and where it will move during its next turn, or você pode issue a general command, such as to guard a particular chamber or corridor. If you issue no commands, a criatura only defends itself against criaturas hostis. Once given an order, a criatura continues to follow it until its task is complete.
### Animated objeto Statistics 
| Size | PV | CA | Attack | Str | Dex |
|--------|----|----|----------------------------|-----|-----|
| Tiny | 20 | 18 | +8 to hit, 1d4 + 4 dano | 4 | 18 |
| Small | 25 | 16 | +6 to hit, 1d8 + 2 dano | 6 | 14 |
| Medium | 40 | 13 | +5 to hit, 2d6 + 1 dano | 10 | 12 |
| Large | 50 | 10 | +6 to hit, 2d10 + 2 dano | 14 | 10 |
| Huge | 80 | 10 | +8 to hit, 2d12 + 4 dano | 18 | 6 | 

An animated objeto is a constructo with CA, pontos de vida, attacks, Força, and Destreza determined by its size. Its Constituição is 10 and its Inteligência and Sabedoria are 3, and its Carisma is 1. Its velocidade is 9 metros; if the objeto lacks legs or other appendages it can use for locomotion, it Em vez disso has a velocidade de voo of 9 metros and can hover. If the objeto is securely attached to a superfície or a larger objeto, such as a chain bolted to a parede, its velocidade is 0. It has visão às cegas with a raio of 9 metros and is blind beyond that distance. When the animated objeto drops to 0 pontos de vida, it reverts to its original objeto form, and any remaining dano carries over to its original objeto form. If you command an objeto to attack, it can make a single ataque corpo a corpo against uma criatura within 1.5 metros of it. It makes a slam attack with an attack bonus and dano de concussão determined by its size. The DM might rule that a specific objeto inflicts slashing or dano perfurante based on its form.
higher_level: Se você conjurar esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 6° nível ou superior, você pode animate two additional objeto for each nível do espaço above 5th.

name: Animate Objects
desc:
Objects come to life at your command just like you dreamt of when you were an apprentice! Choose up to 6 unattended não mágico Small or Tiny objects. You may also choose larger objects; treat Medium objects as 2 objects, Large objects as 3 objects, and Huge objects as 6 objects. You can't animate objects larger than Huge.

Until the spell ends or a alvo is reduced to 0 pontos de vida, you animate the alvos and turn them into constructs under your control.

Each construct has Constituição 10, Inteligência 3, Sabedoria 3, and Carisma 1, as well as a voando Deslocamento of 30 pés and the ability to hover (if securely fastened to something larger, it has a Deslocamento of 0), and visão cega to a range of 30 pés (blind beyond that distance). Otherwise a construct's statistics are determined by its size.

If you animate 4 or more Small or Tiny objects, instead of controlling each construct individually they function as a construct swarm. Add together all swarm's total pontos de vida. Attacks against a construct swarm deal metade do dano. The construct swarm reverts to individual constructs when it is reduced to 15 pontos de vida or less.

You can use a ação bônus to mentally command any construct made with this spell while it is within 500 pés. When you command multiple constructs using this spell, you may simultaneously give them all the same command. You decide the action the construct recebe and where it moves during its next turn, or you can issue a general command, such as guarding an area. Without commands the construct only defends itself. The construct continues to follow a command until its task is complete.

When you command a construct to attack, it makes a single slam ataque corpo a corpo against a criatura within 5 pés of it. On a hit the construct causa contundente, perfurante, or dano cortante appropriate to its shape.

When the construct drops to 0 pontos de vida, any excess damage carries over to its normal object form.
higher_level: You can animate 2 additional Small or Tiny objects for each slot level above 5th.

name: Animated Scroll
desc: The paper or parchment must be folded into the shape of an animal before casting the spell. It then becomes an animated paper animal of the kind the folded paper most closely resembles. The criatura uses the stat block of any beast that has a challenge rating of 0. It is made of paper, not flesh and bone, but it can do anything the real criatura can do: a paper owl can fly and attack with its talons, a paper frog can swim without disintegrating in water, and so forth. It follows your commands to the best of its ability, including carrying messages to a recipient whose location you know.
higher_level: The duration increases by 24 horas at 5th level (48 horas), 11th level (72 horas), and 17th level (96 horas).
material: intricately folded paper or parchment

name: Anomalous Object
desc: Deep Magic: temporal By touching an object, you retrieve another version of the object from elsewhere in time. If the object is attended, you deve ter sucesso em a melee ataque mágico roll against the criatura holding or controlling the object. Any effect that affects the original object also affects the duplicate (charges spent, damage taken, etc.) and any effect that affects the duplicate also affects the original object. If either object is destroyed, both are destroyed. This spell does not affect sentient items or unique artifacts.

name: Anticipate Arcana
desc: Your foresight gives you an instant to ready your defenses against a mágico attack. When you cast **anticipate Arcanismo**, you have vantagem on saving throws against spells and other mágico effects until the start of your next turn.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when an enemy you can see casts a spell

name: Anticipate Attack
desc: In a flash of foreknowledge, you spot an oncoming attack with enough time to avoid it. Upon casting this spell, you can move up to half your Deslocamento without provoking opportunity attacks. The oncoming attack still occurs but misses automatically if you are no longer within the attack’s range, are in a space that's impossible for the attack para acertar, or can’t be targeted by that attack in your new position. If none of those circumstances apply but the situation has changed—you have moved into a position where you have cover, for example—then the attack is made after taking the new situation into account.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when you are attacked but before the attack roll is made
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Wizard

name: Anticipate Weakness
desc: With a quick glance into the future, you pinpoint where a gap is about to open in your foe’s defense, and then you strike. After casting **anticipate weakness**, you have vantagem on attack rolls until the end of your turn.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Antilife Shell
desc: A cintilante barrier extends out from you in a 3 metros raio and moves with you, remaining centered on you and hedging out criatura other than morto-vivo and constructo. The barrier lasts for a duração. The barrier prevents an affected criatura from passing or reaching through. An affected criatura can cast magias or make attacks with ranged or reach arma through the barrier. If Você se move so that an affected criatura is forced to pass through the barrier, a magia termina.

name: Antilife Shell
desc:
A barrier that glimmers with an oily rainbow hue pops into existence around you. The barrier moves with you and prevents criaturas other than undead and constructs from passing or reaching through its surface.

The barrier does not prevent spells or attacks with ranged or alcance weapons from passing through the barrier.

The spell ends if you move so that a Tiny or larger living criatura is forced to pass through the barrier.

name: Antimagic Field
desc:
A 3 metros invisível esfera of antimagic surrounds you. This área is divorced from the mágico energy that suffuses the multiverse. Within the esfera, magias can't be cast, invocar criatura disappear, and even itens mágicos become mundane. Until a magia termina, the esfera moves with you, centered on you. magias and other mágico effects, except those created by an artifact or a deity, are suprimido in the esfera and can't protrude into it. A slot expended to cast a suprimido magia is consumed. While an effect is suprimido, it doesn't function, but the time it spends suprimido counts against its duration.

**Targeted Effects.** magias and other mágico effects, such as magia missile and enfeitiçar person, that alvo uma criatura or an objeto in the esfera have no effect on that alvo.

**Areas of magia.** The área of another magia or mágico effect, such as fireball, can't extend into the esfera. If the esfera overlaps an área of magia, the part of the área that is covered by the esfera is suprimido. Por exemplo, the flames created by a parede of fire are suprimido within the esfera, creating a gap in the parede if the overlap is large enough.

**magias.** Any active magia or other mágico effect on uma criatura or an objeto in the esfera is suprimido while a criatura or objeto is in it.

**itens mágicos.** The properties and powers of itens mágicos are suprimido in the esfera. Por exemplo, a +1 longsword in the esfera functions as a não mágico longsword. A magia arma's properties and powers are suprimido if it is used against um alvo in the esfera or wielded by an attacker in the esfera. If a magia arma or a piece of magia ammunition fully leaves the esfera (Por exemplo, if you fire a magia flecha or throw a magia lança at um alvo outside the esfera), the magia of the item ceases to be suprimido as soon as it exits.

**mágico Travel.** teletransporte and planar travel fail to work in the esfera, whether the esfera is the destination or the departure point for such mágico travel. A portal to another location, world, or plano of existence, também as an opening to an extradimensional space such as that created by the rope trick magia, temporarily closes while in the esfera.

**criatura and objeto.** uma criatura or objeto invocar or created by magia temporarily winks out of existence in the esfera. Such uma criatura instantly reappears once the space a criatura occupied is no longer within the esfera.

**dissipar magia.** magias and mágico effects such as dissipar magia have no effect on the esfera. Likewise, the spheres created by different antimagic field magias don't nullify each other.
material: A pinch of powdered iron or iron filings.

name: Antimagic Field
desc:
An invisível sphere of antimagic forms around you, moving with you and suppressing all mágico effects within it. At the Narrator's discretion, sufficiently powerful artifacts and deities may be able to ignore the sphere's effects.

* **Area Suppression:** When a mágico effect protrudes into the sphere, that part of the effect's area is suppressed. For example, the ice created by a wall of ice is suppressed within the sphere, creating a gap in the wall if the overlap is large enough.
* **criaturas and Objects:** While within the sphere, any criaturas or objects created or conjured by magic temporarily wink out of existence, reappearing immediately once the space they occupied is no longer within the sphere.
* **Dispel Magic:** The sphere is immune to dispel magic and similar mágico effects, including other antimagic field spells.
* **Magic Items:** While within the sphere, magic items function as if they were mundane objects. Magic weapons and munição cease to be suppressed when they fully leave the sphere.
* **mágico Travel:** Whether the sphere includes a destination or departure point, any planar travel or teleportation within it automatically fails. Until the spell ends or the sphere moves, mágico portals and extradimensional spaces (such as that created by a bag of holding) within the sphere are closed.
* **Spells:** Any spell cast within the sphere or at a alvo within the sphere is suppressed and the espaço de magia is consumed. Active spells and mágico effects are also suppressed within the sphere. If a spell or mágico effect has a duration, time spent suppressed counts against it.

name: Antipathy/Sympathy
desc:
This magia attracts or repels criatura of your choice. Você mira something dentro do alcance, either a Huge or smaller objeto or criatura or an área that is no larger than a 60 metros cubo. Then specify a kind of intelligent criatura, such as red dragons, goblins, or vampires. You invest o alvo with an aura that either attracts or repels the specified criatura for a duração. Escolha antipathy or sympathy as the aura's effect.

**Antipathy.** The encantamento causes criatura of the kind you designated to feel an intense urge to leave the área and avoid o alvo. When such uma criatura pode ver o alvo or comes a até 18 metros de it, a criatura deve ser bem-sucedido em um teste de resistência de Sabedoria or become amedrontado. a criatura remains amedrontado while it pode ver o alvo or is a até 18 metros de it. While amedrontado by o alvo, a criatura must use its movimento to move to the nearest safe spot from which it can't see o alvo. If a criatura moves more than 18 metros from o alvo and can't see it, a criatura is no longer amedrontado, but a criatura becomes amedrontado again if it regains Vista of o alvo or moves a até 18 metros de it.

 **Sympathy.** The encantamento causes the specified criatura to feel an intense urge to approach o alvo while a até 18 metros de it or able to see it. When such uma criatura pode ver o alvo or comes a até 18 metros de it, a criatura deve ser bem-sucedido em um teste de resistência de Sabedoria or use its movimento on cada um de seus turnos to enter the área or move within reach of o alvo. When a criatura has done so, it can't willingly move away from o alvo. If o alvo damages or Caso contrário harms an affected criatura, the affected criatura can faz um teste de resistência de Sabedoria to end the effect, as described below.

**Ending the Effect.** If an affected criatura ends its turn while not a até 18 metros de o alvo or able to see it, a criatura faz um teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em um sucesso no teste, a criatura is no longer affected by o alvo and recognizes the feeling of repugnance or attraction as mágico. Além disso, uma criatura affected by the magia is allowed another Sabedoria teste de resistência every 24 hours while the magia persists. uma criatura that successfully saves against this effect is imune a it por 1 minuto, after which time it can be affected again.
material: Either a lump of alum soaked in vinegar for the antipathy effect or a drop of honey for the sympathy effect.

name: Antipathy/Sympathy
desc:
You mystically impart great love or hatred for a place, thing, or criatura. Designate a kind of intelligent criatura, such as dragons, goblins, or vampires.

The alvo now causes either antipathy or sympathy for the specified criaturas for the duration of the spell. When a designated criatura successfully saves against the effects of this spell, it immediately entende it was under a mágico effect and is immune to this spell's effects for 1 minuto.

* **Antipathy:** When a designated criatura can see the alvo or comes within 60 pés of it, the criatura makes a teste de resistência de Sabedoria or becomes amedrontado. While amedrontado the criatura must use its movement to move away from the alvo to the nearest safe spot from which it can no longer see the alvo. If the criatura moves more than 60 pés from the alvo and can no longer see it, the criatura is no longer amedrontado, but the criatura becomes amedrontado again if it regains sight of the alvo or moves within 60 pés of it.
* **Sympathy:** When a designated criatura can see the alvo or comes within 60 pés of it, the criatura deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em uma falha, the criatura uses its movement on cada um de seus turnos to enter the area or move within alcance of the alvo, and is unwilling to move away from the alvo.  
If the alvo damages or otherwise harms an affected criatura, the affected criatura can make a teste de resistência de Sabedoria to end the effect. An affected criatura can also make a teste de resistência once every 24 horas while within the area of the spell, and whenever it ends its turn more than 60 pés from the alvo and is unable to see the alvo.

name: Arcane Eye
desc: você cria an invisível, mágico eye dentro do alcance that hovers in the air for a duração. You mentally receive visual information from the eye, which has normal vision and visão no escuro out to 9 metros. The eye can look in every direction. As an ação, você pode move the eye up to 9 metros in any direction. There is no limit to how far away from you the eye can move, but it can't enter another plano of existence. A solid barrier blocks the eye's movimento, but the eye can pass through an opening as small as 1 inch in diameter.
material: A bit of bat fur.

name: Arcane Eye
desc:
Until the spell ends, you create an invisível, floating mágico eye that hovers in the air and sends you visual information. The eye has normal vision, visão no escuro to a range of 30 pés, and it can look in every direction.

You can use an action to move the eye up to 30 pés in any direction as long as it remains on the same plane of existence. The eye can pass through openings as small as 1 inch across but otherwise its movement is blocked by solid barriers.

name: Arcane Hand
desc:
você cria a Large hand of cintilante, translucent force in an espaço desocupado that você pode ver dentro do alcance. The hand lasts for the magia's duration, and it moves at your command, mimicking the movements of your own hand. The hand is an objeto that has CA 20 and pontos de vida igual a your máximo de pontos de vida. If it drops to 0 pontos de vida, a magia termina. It has a Força of 26 (+8) and a Destreza of 10 (+0). The hand doesn't fill its space. When you conjurar a magia and as a ação bônus on your subsequent turns, você pode move the hand up to 18 metros and then cause one of the following effects with it.

**Clenched Fist.** The hand strikes one criatura or objeto within 1.5 metros of it. faça um ataque de magia corpo a corpo for the hand using your game statistics. em um acerto, o alvo takes 4d8 dano de força.

**Forceful Hand.** The hand attempts to empurrá uma criatura within 1.5 metros of it in a direction você escolhe. Make a check with the hand's Força contested by the Força (Athletics) check of o alvo. If o alvo is Medium or smaller, você tem vantagem on the check. If you succeed, the hand pushes o alvo up to 1.5 metros plus a number of feet equal to five times your modificador de conjuração. The hand moves with o alvo to remain within 1.5 metros of it.

**Grasping Hand.** The hand attempts to agarrar a Huge or smaller criatura within 1.5 metros of it. Você usa the hand's valor de Força to resolve the agarrar. If o alvo is Medium or smaller, você tem vantagem on the check. While the hand is agarrando o alvo, você pode use a ação bônus to have the hand crush it. When you do so, o alvo takes dano de concussão equal to 2d6 + your modificador de conjuração

 **Interposing Hand.** The hand interposes itself between you and uma criatura você escolhe until you give the hand a different command. The hand moves to stay between you and o alvo, providing you with half cover against o alvo. o alvo can't move through the hand's space if its valor de Força is less than or equal to the hand's valor de Força. If its valor de Força is higher than the hand's valor de Força, o alvo can move toward you through the hand's space, but that space is terreno difícil for o alvo.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 6° nível ou superior, the dano from the clenched fist option increases by 2d8 and the dano from the grasping hand increases by 2d6 for each nível do espaço above 5th.
material: An eggshell and a snakeskin luvas.

name: Arcane Hand
desc:
You create a Large hand of shimmering, translucent força that mimics the appearance and movements of your own hand.

The hand doesn't fill its space and has AC 20, Força 26 (+8), Destreza 10 (+0), maneuver CD 18, and pontos de vida equal to your ponto de vida maximum. The spell ends early if it is dropped to 0 pontos de vida.

When you cast the spell and as a ação bônus on subsequent turns, you can move the hand up to 60 pés and then choose one of the following.

* **_Shove:_** The hand makes a teste de resistência de Força against the maneuver CD of a criatura within 5 pés of it, with vantagem if the criatura is Medium or smaller. em um sucesso, the hand pushes the criatura in a direction of your choosing for up to 5 pés plus a number of pés equal to 5 times your spellcasting ability modifier, and remains within 5 pés of it.
* **_Smash:_** Make a melee ataque mágico against a criatura or object within 5 pés of the hand. On a hit, the hand causa 4d8 dano de força.
* **_Snatch:_** The hand makes a teste de resistência de Força against the maneuver CD of a criatura within 5 pés of it, with vantagem if the criatura is Medium or smaller. em um sucesso, the criatura is agarrado by the hand. You can use a ação bônus to crush a criatura agarrado by the hand, dealing dano contundente equal to 2d6 + your spellcasting ability modifier.
* **_Stop:_** Until the hand is given another command it moves to stay between you and a criatura of your choice, providing you with three-quarters cover against the chosen criatura. A criatura with a Força score of 26 or less cannot move through the hand's space, and stronger criaturas treat the hand as difficult terrain.
higher_level: o dano from Smash increases by 2d8 and o dano from Snatch increases by 2d6 for each slot level above 5th.

name: Arcane Lock
desc: Você toca a closed door, window, portal, chest, or other entryway, and it becomes locked for a duração. You and the criatura you designate quando você conjura esta magia can open the objeto normally. você pode also set a password that, when spoken within 1.5 metros of the objeto, suppresses this magia por 1 minuto. Caso contrário, it is impassable until it is broken or the magia is dissipar or suprimido. Casting derrubar on the objeto suppresses arcane lock por 10 minutos. While affected by this magia, the objeto is more difficult to break or force open; the DC to break it or pick any locks on it increases by 10.
material: Gold dust worth at least 25gp, which the magia consumes.

name: Arcane Lock
desc: The alvo is sealed to todas as criaturas except those you designate (who can open the object normally). Alternatively, you may choose a password that suppresses this spell for 1 minuto when it is spoken within 5 pés of the alvo. The spell can also be suppressed for 10 minutos by casting _knock_ on the alvo. Otherwise, the alvo cannot be opened normally and it is more difficult to break or força open, increasing the CD to break it or pick any locks on it by 10 (minimum CD 20).
higher_level: Increase the CD to força open the object or pick any locks on the object by an additional 2 for each slot level above 2nd. Only a knock spell cast at a slot level equal to or greater than your arcane lock suppresses it.

name: Arcane Muscles
desc: Your muscles swell with arcane power. They're too clumsy to effectively wield weapons but certainly strong enough for a powerful punch. Until the spell ends, you can choose to use your spellcasting ability score for Atletismo checks, and for the attack and damage rolls of unarmed strikes. In addition, your unarmed strikes deal 1d6 dano contundente and count as mágico for the purpose of overcoming resistance and immunity to ataques não mágicos and damage.

name: Arcane Riposte
desc: You respond to an incoming attack with a magically-infused attack of your own. Make a melee ataque mágico against the criatura that attacked you. If you hit, the criatura recebe 3d6 ácido, frio, fogo, relâmpago, veneno, or dano de trovão.
higher_level: The spell causa an extra 1d6 damage for each slot level above 1st. When using a 4th-level espaço de magia, you may choose to deal psíquico, radiante, or dano necrótico. When using a 6th-level espaço de magia, you may choose to deal dano de força.

name: Arcane Sight
desc: The recipient of this spell gains the benefits of both [true seeing](https://api.open5e.com/spells/true-seeing) and [detect magic](https://api.open5e.com/spells/detect-magic) until the spell ends, and also knows the name and effect of every spell he or she witnesses during the spell’s duration.
material: a piece of clear quartz

name: Arcane Sword
desc: você cria a espada-shaped plano of force that hovers dentro do alcance. It lasts for a duração. When the espada appears, you faça um ataque de magia corpo a corpo against um alvo of your choice within 1.5 metros of the espada. em um acerto, o alvo takes 3d10 dano de força. Until a magia termina, você pode use a ação bônus on cada um de seus turnos to move the espada up to 6 metros to a spot você pode ver and repeat this attack against the same alvo or a different one.
material: A miniature platinum espada with a grip and pommel of copper and zinc, worth 250 gp.

name: Arcane Sword
desc:
You summon an insubstantial yet deadly sword to do your bidding.

Make a melee ataque mágico against a alvo of your choice within 5 pés of the sword, dealing 3d10 dano de força on a hit.

Until the spell ends, you can use a ação bônus on subsequent turns to move the sword up to 20 pés to a space you can see and make an identical melee ataque mágico against a alvo.

name: Arcanist's Magic Aura
desc:
You place an ilusão on uma criatura or an objeto Você toca so that adivinhação magias reveal false information about it. o alvo can be a criatura voluntária or an objeto that isn't being carried or worn by another criatura. When you conjurar a magia, Escolha one or both of the following effects. The effect lasts for a duração. If Você conjura esta magia on the same criatura or objeto every day for 30 days, placing the same effect on it each time, the ilusão lasts until it is dissipar.

**False Aura.** You change the way o alvo appears to magias and mágico effects, such as detectar magia, that detectar mágico auras. você pode make a não mágico objeto appear mágico, a mágico objeto appear não mágico, or change the objeto's mágico aura so that it appears to belong to a specific school of magia that você escolhe. When Você usa this effect on an objeto, você pode make the false magia apparent to any criatura that handles the item.

**Mask.** You change the way o alvo appears to magias and mágico effects that detectar criatura types, such as a Paladino's Divine Sense or the trigger of a symbol magia. você escolhe uma criatura type and other magias and mágico effects treat o alvo as if it were uma criatura of that type or of that alignment.
material: A small quadrado of silk.

name: Arcanist's Magic Aura
desc:
You craft an illusion to deceive others about the alvo's true mágico properties.

Choose one or both of the following effects. When cast upon the same alvo with the same effect for 30 successive dias, it lasts until it is dispelled.

* **False Aura:** A mágico alvo appears não mágico, a não mágico alvo appears mágico, or you change a alvo's mágico aura so that it appears to belong to a school of magic of your choosing. Additionally, you can choose to make the false magic apparent to any criatura that handles the item.
* **Masking Effect:** Choose a criatura type. Spells and mágico effects that detect criatura types (such as a herald's Divine Sense or the trigger of a symbol spell) treat the alvo as if it were a criatura of that type. Additionally, you can choose to mask the alvo's alignment trait (if it has one).
higher_level: When cast using a 6th-level espaço de magia or higher the effects last until dispelled with a ação bônus.

name: Armored Formation
desc:
You bolster the defenses of those nearby. Choose up to twelve willing criaturas in range. When an affected criatura is within 5 pés of at least one other affected criatura, they create a formation. The formation must be a contiguous grouping of affected criaturas, and each affected criatura must be within 5 pés of at least one other affected criatura within the formation. If the formation ever has less than two affected criaturas, it ends, and an affected criatura that moves further than 5 pés from other criaturas in formation is no longer in that formation. Affected criaturas don't have to all be in the same formation, and they can create or end as many formations of various sizes as they want for the duration of the spell. cada criatura in a formation gains a bonus depending on how many affected criaturas are in that formation.
  ***Two or More criaturas.*** cada criatura gains a +2 bonus to AC.
  ***Four or More criaturas.*** cada criatura gains a +2 bonus to AC, and when it hits with any weapon, it causa an extra 1d6 damage of the weapon's type.
  ***Six or More criaturas.*** cada criatura gains a +3 bonus to AC, and when it hits with any weapon, it causa an extra 2d6 damage of the weapon's type.

name: Armored Heart
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork The targeted criatura gains resistance to contundente, cortante, and dano perfurante. This resistance can be overcome with adamantine or mágico weapons.

name: Armored Shell
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork This spell creates a suit of mágico studded leather armor (AC 12). It does not grant you proficiência in its use. Casters without the appropriate armor proficiência suffer desvantagem on any teste de habilidade, teste de resistência, or jogada de ataque that involves Força or Destreza and cannot cast spells.
higher_level: Casting armored shell using a higher-level espaço de magia creates stronger armor: a chain shirt (AC 13) at level 2, scale mail (AC 14) at level 3, chain mail (AC 16) at level 4, and plate armor (AC 18) at level 5.

name: As You Were
desc:
When cast on a dead or undead body, **as you were** returns that criatura to the appearance it had in life while it was healthy and uninjured. The alvo must have a physical body; the spell fails if the alvo is normally noncorporeal.

If as you were is cast on a corpse, its effect is identical to that of [gentle repose](https://api.open5e.com/spells/gentle-repose), except that the corpse’s appearance is restored to that of a healthy, uninjured (albeit dead) person.

If the alvo is an undead criatura, it also is restored to the appearance it had in life, even if it died from disease or from severe wounds, or centuries ago. The alvo looks, smells, and sounds (if it can speak) as it did in life. Friends and family can tell something is wrong only with a successful Sabedoria (Intuição) check against your CD de resistência à magia, and only if they have reason to be suspicious. (Knowing that the person should be dead is sufficient reason.) Spells and abilities that detect undead are also fooled, but the criatura remains susceptible to Turn Undead as normal.

This spell doesn’t confer the ability to speak on undead that normally can’t speak. The criatura eats, drinks, and breathes as a living criatura does; it can mimic sleep, but it has no more need for it than it had before.

The effect lasts for a number of horas equal to your caster level. You can use an action to end the spell early. Any amount of radiante or dano necrótico dealt to the criatura, or any effect that reduces its Constituição, also ends the spell.

If this spell is cast on an undead criatura that isn’t your aliado or under your control, it makes a teste de resistência de Carisma to resist the effect.
material: a piece of flesh from a criatura of the alvo’s race

name: Ashen Memories
desc: You touch the ashes, embers, or soot left behind by a fogo and receive a vision of one significant event that occurred in the area while the fogo was burning. For example, if you were to touch the frio embers of a campfire, you might witness a snippet of a conversation that occurred around the fogo. Similarly, touching the ashes of a burned letter might grant you a vision of the person who destroyed the letter or the contents of the letter. You have no control over what information the spell reveals, but your vision usually is tied to the most meaningful event related to the fogo. The GM determines the details of what is revealed.

name: Aspect of the Dragon
desc:
This spell draws out the ancient Natureza within your blood, allowing you to assume the form of any dragon-type criatura of challenge 10 or less.

You assume the pontos de vida and Hit Dice of the new form. When you revert to your normal form, you return to the number of pontos de vida you had before you transformed. If you revert as a result of dropping to 0 pontos de vida, any excess damage carries over to your normal form. As long as the excess damage doesn’t reduce your normal form to 0 pontos de vida, you aren’t knocked inconsciente.

You retain the benefits of any features from your class, race, or other source and can use them, provided that your new form is physically capable of doing so. You can speak only if the dragon can normally speak.

When you transform, you choose whether your equipment falls to the ground, merges into the new form, or is worn by it. Worn equipment functions normally, but equipment doesn’t change shape or size to match the new form. Any equipment that the new form can’t wear must either fall to the ground or merge into the new form. The GM has final say on whether the new form can wear or use a particular piece of equipment. Equipment that merges has no effect in that state.
material: a dragon scale

name: Aspect of the Moon
desc: You throw your head back and howl like a beast, embracing your most basic impulses. Until the spell ends your hair grows, your features become more feral, and sharp claws grow on your fingers. You gain a +1 bonus to AC, your Deslocamento increases by 10 pés, you have vantagem on Percepção checks, and your unarmed strikes deal 1d8 dano cortante. You may use your Força or Destreza for attack and damage rolls with unarmed strikes, and treat your unarmed strikes as weapons with the acuidade property. You gain an additional action on your turn, which may only be used to make a ataque corpo a corpo with your unarmed strike. If you are hit by a silvered weapon, you have desvantagem on your teste de resistência de Constituição to maintain Concentração.

name: Aspect of the Serpent
desc:
A criatura you touch recebe on snakelike aspects for the duration of the spell. Its tongue becomes long and forked, its canine teeth become fangs with venom sacs, and its pupils become sharply vertical. The alvo gains visão no escuro with a range of 60 pés and visão cega with a range of 30 pés. As a ação bônus when you cast the spell, the alvo can make a ataque à distância com arma with a normal range of 60 pés that causa 2d6 dano de veneno on a hit.

As an action, the alvo can make a bite attack using either Força or Destreza (ataque corpo a corpo com arma: range 5 ft., uma criatura; Hit: 2d6 dano perfurante), and the criatura deve fazer a successful CD 14 teste de resistência de Constituição ou ficar paralisado for 1 minuto. A criatura paralisado in this way repeats the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso).
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, both the ataque à distância and bite attack damage increase by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd.
material: a dried snakeskin

name: Astral Projection
desc: You and up to eight criaturas voluntárias dentro do alcance project your astral bodies into the Astral plano (the magia fails and the casting is wasted if Você está already on that plano). The material corpo you leave behind is inconsciente and in a state of suspended animation; it doesn't need food or air and doesn't age. Your astral corpo resembles your mortal form in almost every way, replicating your game statistics and possessions. The principal difference is the addition of a silvery cord that extends from between your shoulder blades and trails behind you, fading to invisibilidade after 0 metros. This cord is your tether to your material corpo. enquanto the tether remains intact, você pode find your way home. If the cord is cut-something that can happen only when an effect specifically states that it does-your alma and corpo are separated, killing you instantly. Your astral form can freely travel through the Astral plano and can pass through portals there leading to any other plano. If Você entra a new plano or return to the plano you were on when conjurando esta magia, your corpo and possessions are transported along the silver cord, allowing you to re-enter your corpo as Você entra the new plano. Your astral form is a separate incarnation. Any dano or other effects that apply to it have no effect on your physical corpo, nor do they persist when you return to it. a magia termina for you and your companions when Você usa your ação to dismiss it. When a magia termina, the affected criatura returns to its physical corpo, and it awakens. The magia might also end early for you or one of your companions. A successful dissipar magia magia used against an astral or physical corpo ends the magia for that criatura. If uma criatura's original corpo or its astral form drops to 0 pontos de vida, a magia termina for that criatura. If a magia termina and the silver cord is intact, the cord pulls a criatura's astral form back to its corpo, ending its state of suspended animation. If Você está returned to your corpo prematurely, your companions remain in their astral forms and must find their own way back to their bodies, usually by dropping to 0 pontos de vida.
material: For cada criatura you affect with this magia, você deve provide one jacinth worth at least 1,000gp and one ornately carved bar of silver worth at least 100gp, all of which the magia consumes.

name: Astral Projection
desc:
Until the spell ends, the alvos leave their material bodies (inconsciente and in a state of suspended animation, not aging or requiring food or air) and project astral forms that resemble their mortal forms in nearly all ways, keeping their game statistics and possessions.

While in this astral form you trail a tether, a silvery-white cord that sprouts from between your shoulder blades and fades into immateriality a pé behind you. As long as the tether remains intact you can find your way back to your material body. When it is cut—which requires an effect specifically stating that it cuts your tether —your soul and body are separated and you immediately die. Damage against and other effects on your astral form have no effect on your material body either during this spell or after its duration ends. Your astral form travels freely through the Astral Plane and can pass through interplanar portals on the Astral Plane leading to any other plane. When you enter a new plane or return to the plane you were on when casting this spell, your material body and possessions are transported along the tether, allowing you to return fully intact with all your gear as you enter the new plane.

The spell ends for all alvos when you use an action to dismiss it, for an individual alvo when a successful dispel magic is cast upon its astral form or material body, or when either its material body or its astral form drops to 0 pontos de vida. When the spell ends for a alvo and the tether is intact, the tether pulls the alvo's astral form back to its material body, ending the suspended animation.

If the spell ends for you prematurely, other alvos remain in their astral forms and must find their own way back to their bodies (usually by dropping to 0 pontos de vida).

name: Augury
desc:
