By casting gema-inlaid sticks, rolling dragão bones, laying out ornate cards, or employing some other divining tool, you receive an omen from an otherworldly entity about the results of a specific course of ação that you plan to take within the next 30 minutes. The DM chooses from the following possible omens: 
- Weal, for good results 
- Woe, for bad results 
- Weal and woe, for both good and bad results 
- Nothing, for results that aren't especially good or bad The magia doesn't take into account any possible circumstances that might change the outcome, such as the casting of additional magias or the loss or gain of a companion. If you conjurar a magia two or more times before completing your próximo descanso longo, there is a cumulative 25 percent chance for each casting after the first that you get a random reading. The DM makes this roll in secret.
material: Specially marked sticks, bones, or similar tokens worth at least 25gp.

name: Augury
desc:
With the aid of a divining tool, you receive an omen from beyond the Material Plane about the results of a specific course of action that you intend to take within the next 30 minutos. The Narrator chooses from the following:

* Fortunate omen (good results)
* Calamity omen (bad results)
* Ambivalence omen (both good and bad results)
* No omen (results that aren't especially good or bad)

This omen does not account for possible circumstances that could change the outcome, such as making additional preparations.

When you cast this spell again before finishing a descanso longo, the chance of getting a random reading from the above options increases. The Narrator makes the following roll in secret: second casting—25%, third casting—50%, fourth casting—75%, fifth casting—100%.

name: Aura of Protection or Destruction
desc: When you cast this spell, you radiate an otherworldly energy that warps the fate of todas as criaturas within 30 pés of you. Decide whether to call upon either a Celestial or a fiend for aid. Choosing a Celestial charges a 30-pé-radius around you with an aura of nonviolence; until the start of your next turn, every jogada de ataque made by or against a criatura inside the aura is treated as a natural 1. Choosing a fiend charges the area with an aura of violence; until the start of your next turn, every jogada de ataque made by or against a criatura inside the aura, including you, is treated as a natural 20.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, you can extend the duration by 1 rodada for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Auspicious Warning
desc: Just in time, you call out a fortunate warning to a criatura within range. The alvo rolls a d4 and adds the number rolled to an jogada de ataque, teste de habilidade, or teste de resistência that it has just made and uses the new result for determining success or failure.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when an ally makes an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw

name: Avert Evil Eye
desc: The evil eye recebe many forms. Any incident of bad luck can be blamed on it, especially if a character recently displayed arrogance or selfishness. When avert evil eye is cast, the recipient has a small degree of protection against the evil eye for up to 1 hora. While the spell lasts, the alvo of the spell has vantagem on saving throws against being cego, enfeitiçado, cursed, and amedrontado. During the spell's duration, the alvo can also cancel desvantagem on one d20 roll the alvo is about to make, but doing so ends the spell's effect.

name: Avoid Grievous Injury
desc: You cast this spell when a foe strikes you with a critical hit but before damage dice are rolled. The critical hit against you becomes a normal hit.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when you are struck by a critical hit
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Avronin’s Astral Assembly
desc:
You alert a number of criaturas that you are familiar with, up to your spellcasting ability modifier (minimum of 1), of your intent to communicate with them through spiritual projection. The invitation can extend any distance and even cross to other planes of existence. Once notified, the criaturas can choose to accept this communication at any time during the duration of the spell.

When a criatura accepts, its spirit is projected into one of the gems used in casting the spell. The material body it leaves behind falls inconsciente and doesn't need food or air. The criatura's consciousness is present in the room with you, and its normal form appears as an astral projection within 5 pés of the gem its spirit occupies. You can see and hear all the criaturas who have joined in the assembly, and they can see and hear you and each other as if they were present (which they are, astrally). They can't interact with anything physically.

A criatura can end the spell's effect on itself voluntarily at any time, as can you. When the effect ends or the duration expires, a criatura's spirit returns to its body and it regains consciousness. A criatura that withdraws voluntarily from the assembly can't rejoin it even if the spell is still active. If a gem is broken while occupied by a criatura's astral self, the spirit in the gem returns to its body and the criatura suffers two levels of exaustão.
material: a spool of fine copper wire and a gem worth at least 100 gp for each alvo

name: Awaken
desc: After spending the casting time tracing mágico pathways within a precious gema, Você toca a Huge or smaller besta or planta. o alvo must have either no valor de Inteligência or an Inteligência of 3 or less. o alvo gains an Inteligência of 10. o alvo also gains the ability to speak one language Você sabe. If o alvo is a planta, it gains the ability to move its limbs, roots, vines, creepers, and so forth, and it gains sentidos similar to a human's. Your DM chooses statistics appropriate for the awakened planta, such as the statistics for the awakened shrub or the awakened tree. The awakened besta or planta is enfeitiçado by you for 30 days or until you or your companions do anything harmful to it. When the enfeitiçado condition ends, the awakened criatura chooses whether to remain friendly to you, based on how you treated it while it was enfeitiçado.
material: An agate worth at least 1,000 gp, which the magia consumes.

name: Awaken
desc:
You impart sentience in the alvo, granting it an Inteligência of 10 and proficiência in a language you know. A plant targeted by this spell gains the ability to move, as well as senses identical to those of a human. The Narrator assigns awakened plant statistics (such as an awakened shrub or awakened tree).

The alvo is enfeitiçado by you for 30 dias or until you or your companions harm it. Depending on how you treated the alvo while it was enfeitiçado, when the condition ends the awakened criatura may choose to remain friendly to you.
higher_level: alvo an additional criatura for each slot level above 5th. Each alvo requires its own componente material.

name: Awaken Object
desc:
After spending the casting time enchanting a ruby along with a Large or smaller não mágico object in humanoid form, you touch the ruby to the object. The ruby dissolves into the object, which becomes a living construct imbued with sentience. If the object has no face, a humanoid face appears on it in an appropriate location. The awakened object's statistics are determined by its size, as shown on the table below. An awakened object can use an action to make a ataque corpo a corpo com arma against a alvo within 5 pés of it. It has free will, acts independently, and speaks one language you know. It is initially friendly to anyone who assisted in its creation.

An awakened object's Deslocamento is 30 pés. If it has no apparent legs or other means of moving, it gains a voando Deslocamento of 30 pés and it can hover. Its sight and hearing are equivalent to a typical human's senses. Inteligência, Sabedoria, and Carisma can be adjusted up or down by the GM to fit unusual circumstances. A beautiful statue might awaken with increased Carisma, for example, or the bust of a great philosopher could have surprisingly high Sabedoria.

An awakened object needs no air, food, water, or sleep. Damage to an awakened object can be healed or mechanically repaired.

| Size | HP | AC | Attack | Str | Dex | Con | Int | Wis | Cha |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| T | 20 | 18 | +8 para acertar, 1d4 + 4 damage | 4 | 18 | 10 | 2d6 | 2d6 | 2d6 |
| S | 25 | 16 | +6 para acertar, 1d8 + 2 damage | 6 | 14 | 10  | 3d6 | 2d6 | 2d6 |
| M | 40 | 13 | +5 para acertar, 2d6 + 1 damage | 10 | 12  | 10 | 3d6 | 3d6 | 2d6 |
| L | 50 | 10 | +6 para acertar, 2d10 + 2 damage | 14 | 10 | 10 | 3d6 | 3d6 | 2d6 + 2 |
material: a ruby worth at least 1,000 gp, which the spell consumes

name: Babble
desc:
This spell causes the speech of affected criaturas to sound like nonsense. cada criatura in a 30-pé-radius sphere centered on a point you choose within range deve ter sucesso em an teste de resistência de Inteligência when you cast this spell ou ficar affected by it.
  An affected criatura cannot communicate in any spoken language that it knows. When it speaks, the words come out as gibberish. Spells with verbal components cannot be cast. The spell does not affect telepathic communication, nonverbal communication, or sounds emitted by any criatura that does not have a spoken language. As an action, a criatura under the effect of this spell can attempt another teste de resistência de Inteligência against the effect. em um sucesso no teste, the spell ends.

name: Bad Timing
desc: You point toward a criatura that you can see and twist strands of chaotic energy around its fate. If the alvo gets a failure on a teste de resistência de Carisma, the next jogada de ataque or teste de habilidade the criatura attempts within 10 minutos is made with desvantagem.

name: Bane
desc: Up to three criatura of your choice that você pode ver dentro do alcance must make Carisma teste de resistências. Whenever um alvo that fails this teste de resistência makes an rolagem de ataque or a teste de resistência before a magia termina, o alvo must roll a d4 and subtract the number rolled from the rolagem de ataque or teste de resistência.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 2° nível ou superior, você pode alvo one additional criatura for each nível do espaço above 1st.
material: A drop of blood.

name: Bane
desc: The senses of the alvos are filled with phantom energies that make them more vulnerable and less capable. Until the spell ends, a d4 is subtracted from attack rolls and saving throws made by a alvo.
higher_level: You alvo an additional criatura for each slot level above 1st.

name: Banishment
desc: Você tenta to send one criatura that você pode ver dentro do alcance to another plano of existence. o alvo deve ser bem-sucedido em um teste de resistência de Carisma or be banished. If o alvo is native to the plano of existence you're on, you banish o alvo to a harmless demiplane. While there, o alvo is incapacitado. o alvo remains there until a magia termina, at which point o alvo reappears in the space it left or in the nearest espaço desocupado if that space is occupied. If o alvo is native to a different plano of existence than the one you're on, o alvo is banished with a faint popping noise, returning to its home plano. If a magia termina before 1 minute has passed, o alvo reappears in the space it left or in the nearest espaço desocupado if that space is occupied. Caso contrário, o alvo doesn't return.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 5° nível ou superior, você pode alvo one additional criatura for each nível do espaço above 4th.
material: An item distasteful to o alvo.

name: Banishment
desc:
You employ sheer força of will to make reality question the existence of a nearby criatura, causing them to warp visibly in front of you.

Until the spell ends, a alvo native to your current plane is banished to a harmless demiplane and incapacitado. no final de the duration the alvo reappears in the space it left (or the nearest unoccupied space). A alvo native to a different plane is instead banished to its native plane.

no final de cada um de seus turnos, a banished criatura can repeat the teste de resistência with a -1 penalty for each rodada it has spent banished, returning em um sucesso. If the spell ends before its maximum duration, the alvo reappears in the space it left (or the nearest unoccupied space) but otherwise a alvo native to a different plane doesn't return.
higher_level: The duration of banishment increases by 1 rodada for each slot level above 4th.

name: Banshee Wail
desc: You emit a soul-shattering wail. Every criatura within a 30-pé cone who hears the wail deve fazer a teste de resistência de Sabedoria. Those that fail take 6d10 dano psíquico and become amedrontado of you; a amedrontado criatura repeats the teste de resistência no final de its turn, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso. Those that succeed take 3d10 dano psíquico and aren't amedrontado. This spell has no effect on constructs and undead.

name: Bardo
desc: You capture some of the fading life essence of the triggering criatura, drawing on the energy of the tenuous moment between life and death. You can then use this essence to immediately harm or help a different criatura you can see within range. If you choose to harm, the alvo deve fazer a teste de resistência de Sabedoria. The alvo recebe dano psíquico equal to 6d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one. If you choose to help, the alvo regains pontos de vida equal to 3d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier. This spell can't be triggered by the death of a construct or an undead criatura, and it can't restore pontos de vida to constructs or undead.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when you see a creature within 30 feet of you die

name: Barkskin
desc: Você toca a criatura voluntária. Until a magia termina, o alvo's skin has a rough, bark-like appearance, and o alvo's CA can't be less than 16, regardless of what kind of armadura it is wearing.
material: A handful of oak bark.

name: Barkskin
desc: The alvo's skin recebe on the texture and appearance of bark, increasing its AC to 16 (unless its AC is already higher).
higher_level: The alvo's AC increases by +1 for every two slot levels above 2nd.

name: Batsense
desc: For the duration of the spell, a criatura you touch can produce and interpret squeaking sounds used for echolocation, giving it visão cega out to a range of 60 pés. The alvo cannot use its visão cega while surdo, and its visão cega doesn't penetrate areas of mágico silence. While using visão cega, the alvo has desvantagem on Destreza (Furtividade) checks that rely on being silent. Additionally, the alvo has vantagem on Sabedoria (Percepção) checks that rely on hearing.
material: a bit of fur from a bat’s ear

name: Battle Chant
desc: You bless up all allied criaturas of your choice within range. Whenever a alvo lands a successful hit before the spell ends, the alvo can add 1 to the jogada de dano. When cast by multiple casters chanting in unison, the same increases to 2 points added to the jogada de dano.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, you can extend the range by 10 pés for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Battle Mind
desc:
You gain a preternatural sense of the surrounding area, allowing you insights you can share with comrades to provide them with an edge in combat. You gain vantagem on Sabedoria (Percepção) checks made when determining surprise at the beginning of a combat encounter. If you are not surprised, then neither are your aliados. When you are engaged in combat while the spell is active, you can use a ação bônus on your turn to produce one of the following effects (aliados must be able to see or hear you in order to benefit):
* One aliado gains vantagem on its next jogada de ataque, teste de resistência, or teste de habilidade.
* An inimigo has desvantagem on the next jogada de ataque it makes against you or an aliado.
* You divine the location of an invisível or hidden criatura and impart that knowledge to any aliados who can see or hear you. This knowledge does not negate any advantages the criatura has, it only allows your aliados to be aware of its location at the time. If the criatura moves after being detected, its new location is not imparted to your aliados.
* Three aliados who can see and hear you on your turn are given the benefit of a *bless*, *guidance*, or *resistance spell* on their turns; you choose the benefit individually for each aliado. An aliado must use the benefit on its turn, or the benefit is lost.

name: Battlecry Ballad
desc:
You fill your aliados with a thirst for glory and battle using your triumphant rallying cry. Expend and roll a Bardic Inspiration die to determine the number of rodadas you can maintain Concentração on this spell (minimum 1 rodada). Each alvo gains a bonus to attack and damage rolls equal to the number of rodadas you have maintained Concentração on this spell (maximum +4).

You cannot cast another spell through your spellcasting focus while concentrating on this spell.
higher_level: You can maintain Concentração on this spell for an additional rodada for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Beacon of Hope
desc: This magia bestows hope and vitality. Escolha any number of criatura dentro do alcance. For a duração, cada alvo tem vantagem em Sabedoria teste de resistências and morte teste de resistências, and regains the maximum number of pontos de vida possible from any healing.

name: Beacon of Hope
desc:
The alvos are filled with hope and vitality.

Until the spell ends, each alvo gains vantagem on Sabedoria saving throws and death saving throws, and when a alvo receives healing it regains the maximum number of pontos de vida possible.

name: Beast Within
desc: You imbue a willing criatura with a touch of lycanthropy. The alvo gains a few bestial qualities appropriate to the type of lycanthrope you choose, such as tufts of fur, elongated claws, a fang-lined maw or tusks, and similar features. For the duration, the alvo has resistance to contundente, perfurante, and dano cortante from ataques não mágicos that aren't silvered. In addition, the alvo has vantagem on Sabedoria (Percepção) checks that rely on hearing or smell. Finally, the criatura can use its new claws and jaw or tusks to make unarmed strikes. The claws deal dano cortante equal to 1d4 + the alvo's Força modifier on a hit. The bite causa dano perfurante equal to 1d6 + the alvo's Força modifier on a hit. The alvo's bite doesn't inflict lycanthropy.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 5th level or higher, you can alvo one additional criatura for each espaço de magia above 4th.

name: Become Nightwing
desc:
This spell imbues you with wings of shadow. For the duration of the spell, you gain a voando Deslocamento of 60 pés and a new attack action: Nightwing Breath.

***Nightwing Breath (Recharge 4–6).*** You exhale shadow‐substance in a 30-pé cone. cada criatura in the area recebe 5d6 dano necrótico, or half o dano with a successful teste de resistência de Destreza.
material: a crow’s eye

name: Beguiling Bet
desc:
You issue a challenge against uma criatura you can see within range, which deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Sabedoria or become enfeitiçado. em uma falha no teste, you can make an teste de habilidade as a ação bônus. For example, you could make a Força (Atletismo) check to climb a difficult surface or to jump as high as possible; you could make a Destreza (Acrobacia) check to perform a backflip; or you could make a Carisma (Atuação) check to sing a high note or to extemporize a clever rhyme. You can choose to use your spellcasting ability modifier in place of the usual ability modifier for this check, and you add your proficiência bonus if you're proficiente in the skill being used.

The enfeitiçado criatura must use its next action (which can be a legendary action) to make the same teste de habilidade in a contest against your check. Even if the criatura can't perform the action—it may not be close enough to a wall to climb it, or it might not have appendages suitable for strumming a lute—it must still attempt the action to the best of its capability. If you win the contest, the spell (and the contest) continues, with you making a new teste de habilidade as a ação bônus on your turn. The spell ends when it expires or when the criatura wins the contest.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, you can alvo one additional criatura for every two slot levels above 2nd. cada criatura must be within 30 pés of another criatura when you cast the spell.

name: Beguiling Gift
desc: Deep Magic: hieroglyph You implant a powerful suggestion into an item as you hand it to someone. If the person you hand it to accepts it willingly, they deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Sabedoria or use the object as it's meant to be used at their first opportunity: writing with a pen, consuming food or drink, wearing clothing, drawing a weapon, etc. After the first use, they're under no compulsion to continue using the object or even to keep it.
dnd_class: Wizard, Warlock, Sorceror, Druid, Cleric, Bard

name: Benediction
desc: You call down a blessing in the name of an angel of protection. A criatura you can see within range shimmers with a faint white leve. The next time the criatura recebe damage, it rolls a d4 and reduces o dano by the result. The spell then ends.

name: Bestial Fury
desc:
You instill primal fury into a criatura you can see within range. The alvo deve fazer a teste de resistência de Carisma; a criatura can choose to fail this teste de resistência. em uma falha, the alvo must use its action to attack its nearest inimigo it can see with unarmed strikes or natural weapons. For the duration, the alvo’s attacks deal an extra 1d6 damage of the same type dealt by its weapon, and the alvo can’t be enfeitiçado or amedrontado. If there are no inimigos within alcance, the alvo can use its action to repeat the teste de resistência, ending the effect em um sucesso.

This spell has no effect on undead or constructs.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, you can alvo one additional criatura for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Bestow Curse
desc:
Você toca uma criatura, and that criatura deve ser bem-sucedido em um teste de resistência de Sabedoria or become cursed for a duração of the magia. quando você conjura esta magia, Escolha the nature of the curse from the following options: 
- Escolha one ability score. While cursed, o alvo has desvantagem verificação de ons and teste de resistências made with that ability score. 
- While cursed, o alvo tem desvantagem em rolagem de ataques against you. 
- While cursed, o alvo deve fazer um teste de resistência de Sabedoria no início de cada um de seus turnos. If it fails, it wastes its ação that turn doing nothing. 
- While o alvo is cursed, your attacks and magias deal an extra 1d8 dano necrótico to o alvo. A remove curse magia ends this effect. At the DM's option, you may Escolha an alternative curse effect, but it should be no more powerful than those described above. The DM has final say on such a curse's effect.
higher_level: Se você conjurar esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 4° nível ou superior, a duração is Concentração, até 10 minutes. If Você usa um espaço de magia of 5th level or higher, a duração is 8 hours. If Você usa um espaço de magia of 7th level or higher, a duração is 24 hours. If Você usa a 9th level espaços de magia, the magia lasts until it is dissipar. Using um espaço de magia of 5th level or higher grants a duration that doesn't require concentração.

name: Bestow Curse
desc:
Choose one of the following:

* Select one ability score; the alvo has desvantagem on ability checks and saving throws using that ability score.
* The alvo makes attack rolls against you with desvantagem.
* Each turn, the alvo loses its action unless it succeeds a teste de resistência de Sabedoria no início de its turn.
* Your attacks and spells deal an additional 1d8 dano necrótico against the alvo.

A curse lasts until the spell ends. At the Narrator's discretion you may create a different curse effect with this spell so long as it is weaker than the options above.

A _remove curse_ spell ends the effect if the espaço de magia used to cast it is equal to or greater than the espaço de magia used to cast _bestow curse_.
higher_level: When using a 4th-level espaço de magia the duration increases to 10 minutos. When using a 5th-level espaço de magia the duration increases to 8 horas and it no longer requires your Concentração. When using a 7th-level espaço de magia the duration is 24 horas.

name: Betraying Bauble
desc:
When you cast this spell, you touch a pair of objects. Each object must be small enough to fit in one hand. While holding one of the objects, you can sense the direction to the other object's location.
  If the paired object is in motion, you know the direction and relative Deslocamento of its movement (andando, running, galloping, or similar). When the two objects are within 30 pés of each other, they vibrate faintly unless they are touching. If you aren't holding either item and the spell hasn't ended, you can sense the direction of the closest of the two objects within 1,000 pés of you, and you can sense if it is in motion. If neither object is within 1,000 pés of you, you sense the closest object as soon as you come within 1,000 pés of one of them. If an inch or more of lead blocks a direct path between you and an affected object, you can't sense that object.

name: Binding Oath
desc:
You seal an agreement between two or more willing criaturas with an oath in the name of the god of justice, using ceremonial blessings during which both the oath and the consequences of breaking it are set: if any of the sworn break this vow, they are struck by a curse. For each individual that does so, you choose one of the options given in the [bestow curse](https://api.open5e.com/spells/bestow-curse) spell. When the oath is broken, all participants are immediately aware that this has occurred, but they know no other details.

The curse effect of binding oath can’t be dismissed by [dispel magic](https://api.open5e.com/spells/dispel-magic), but it can be removed with [dispel evil and good](https://api.open5e.com/spells/dispel-evil-and-good)[remove curse](https://api.open5e.com/remove-curse), or [wish](https://api.open5e.com/spells/wish). Remove curse functions only if the espaço de magia used to cast it is equal to or higher than the espaço de magia used to cast **binding oath**. Depending on the Natureza of the oath, uma criatura’s breaking it may or may not invalidate the oath for the other alvos. If the oath is completely broken, the spell ends for every affected criatura, but curse effects already bestowed remain until dispelled.

name: Biting Arrow
desc:
As part of the action used to cast this spell, you make a ataque à distância com arma with a bow, a crossbow, or a arremesso weapon. The effect is limited to a range of 120 pés despite the weapon’s range, and the attack is made with desvantagem if the alvo is in the weapon’s long range.

If the weapon attack hits, it causa damage as usual. In addition, the alvo becomes coated in thin frost until the start of your next turn. If the alvo uses its reação before the start of your next turn, it immediately recebe 1d6 dano de frio and the spell ends.
higher_level: The spell’s damage, for both the ataque à distância and the dano de frio, increases by 1d6 when you alcance 5th level (+1d6 and 2d6), 11th level (+2d6 and 3d6), and 17th level (+3d6 and 4d6).
material: an arrow or a arremesso weapon

name: Bitter Chains
desc:
The spiked ring in your hand expands into a long, barbed chain to ensnare a criatura you touch. Make a melee ataque mágico against the alvo. On a hit, the alvo is bound in metal chains for the duration. While bound, the alvo can move only at half Deslocamento and has desvantagem on attack rolls, saving throws, and Destreza checks. If it moves more than 5 pés during a turn, it recebe 3d6 dano perfurante from the barbs.

The criatura can escape from the chains by using an action and making a successful Força or teste de Destreza against your CD de resistência à magia, or if the chains are destroyed. The chains have AC 18 and 20 pontos de vida.
material: a spiked metal ring

name: Black Goat’s Blessing
desc: You raise your hand with fingers splayed and utter an incantation of the Black Goat with a Thousand Young. Your magic is blessed with the eldritch virility of the All‑Mother. The alvo has desvantagem on saving throws against spells you cast until the end of your next turn.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Black Hand
desc: You gather the powers of darkness into your fist and fling dark, paralyzing flame at a alvo within 30 pés. If you make a successful ranged ataque mágico, this spell siphons vitality from the alvo into you. For the duration, the alvo has desvantagem (and you have vantagem) on attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws made with Força, Destreza, or Constituição. An affected alvo makes a teste de resistência de Constituição (with desvantagem) no final de its turn, ending the effect em um sucesso.

name: Black Ribbons
desc: You pull pieces of the plane of shadow into your own reality, causing a 20-pé cube to fill with inky ribbons that turn the area into difficult terrain and wrap around nearby criaturas. Any criatura that ends its turn in the area becomes imobilizado by the ribbons até o final de seu próximo turno, unless it makes a successful teste de resistência de Destreza. Once a criatura succeeds on this teste de resistência, it can’t be imobilizado again by the ribbons, but it’s still affected by the difficult terrain.
material: a piece of ribbon

name: Black Sunshine
desc:
You hold up a flawed pearl and it disappears, leaving behind a magic orb in your hand that pulses with dim purple leve. aliados that you designate become invisível if they're within 60 pés of you and if leve from the orb can alcance the space they occupy. An invisível criatura still casts a faint, purple shadow.

The orb can be used as a arremesso weapon to attack an inimigo. On a hit, the orb explodes in a flash of leve and the spell ends. The targeted inimigo and cada criatura within 10 pés of it deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Destreza ou ficar cego for 1 minuto. A criatura cego in this way repeats the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso.
material: a discolored pearl, which the spell consumes

name: Black Swan Storm
desc: You call forth a whirlwind of black feathers that fills a 5-pé cube within range. The feathers deal 2d8 dano de força to criaturas in the cube’s area and radiate darkness, causing the illumination level within 20 pés of the cube to drop by one step (from bright leve to dim leve, and from dim leve to darkness). criaturas that make a successful teste de resistência de Destreza take half o dano and are still affected by the change in leve.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, the feathers deal an extra 1d8 dano de força for each slot level above 2nd.
material: a feather from a black swan

name: Black Tentacles
desc: Squirming, ebony tentacles fill a 6 metros quadrado on ground that você pode ver dentro do alcance. For a duração, these tentacles turn the ground in the área into terreno difícil. When uma criatura enters the affected área for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, a criatura deve ser bem-sucedido em um teste de resistência de Destreza or take 3d6 dano de concussão and be imobilizado by the tentacles until a magia termina. uma criatura that starts its turn in the área and is already imobilizado by the tentacles takes 3d6 dano de concussão. uma criatura imobilizado by the tentacles can use its ação to make a Força or Destreza check (its choice) against your CD da magia. On a success, it frees itself.
material: A piece of tentacle from a gigante octopus or a gigante squid

name: Black Tentacles
desc:
Writhing black tentacles fill the ground within the area turning it into difficult terrain. When a criatura starts its turn in the area or enters the area for the first time on its turn, it recebe 3d6 dano contundente and is imobilizado by the tentacles unless it succeeds on a teste de resistência de Destreza. A criatura that starts its turn imobilizado by the tentacles recebe 3d6 dano contundente.

A imobilizado criatura can use its action to make an Acrobacia or Atletismo check against the CD de resistência à magia, freeing itself em um sucesso.
higher_level: o dano increases by 1d6 for every 2 slot levels above 4th.

name: Black Well
desc: You summon a seething sphere of dark energy 5 pés in diameter at a point within range. The sphere pulls criaturas toward it and devours the life força of those it envelops. Every criatura other than you that starts its turn within 90 pés of the black well deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Força ou ficar pulled 50 pés toward the well. A criatura pulled into the well recebe 6d8 dano necrótico and is atordoado; a successful teste de resistência de Constituição halves o dano and causes the criatura to become incapacitado. A criatura that starts its turn inside the well also makes a teste de resistência de Constituição; the criatura is atordoado em uma falha no teste or incapacitado em um sucesso. An incapacitado criatura that leaves the well recovers immediately and can take actions and reactions on that turn. A criatura recebe damage only upon entering the well—it recebe no additional damage for remaining there—but if it leaves the well and is pulled back in again, it recebe damage again. A total of nine Medium criaturas, three Large criaturas, or one Huge criatura can be inside the well’s otherdimensional space at one time. When the spell’s duration ends, todas as criaturas inside it tumble out in a heap, landing prostrado.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 7th level or higher, o dano dealt by the well increases by 1d8—and the well pulls criaturas an additional 5 pés—for each slot level above 6th.

name: Blade Barrier
desc: você cria a vertical parede of whirling, razor-sharp blades made of mágico energy. The parede appears dentro do alcance and lasts for a duração. você pode make a straight parede up to 30 metros long, 6 metros high, and 1.5 metros thick, or a ringed parede up to 18 metros in diameter, 6 metros high, and 1.5 metros thick. The parede provides three-quarters cover to criatura behind it, and its space is terreno difícil. When uma criatura enters the parede's área for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, a criatura deve fazer um teste de resistência de Destreza. em uma falha no teste, a criatura takes 6d10 dano cortante. em um sucesso no teste, a criatura takes half as much dano.

name: Blade Barrier
desc:
You create a wall of cortante blades. The wall can be up to 20 pés high and 5 pés thick, and can either be a straight wall up to 100 pés long or a ringed wall of up to 60 pés in diameter. The wall provides three-quarters cover and its area is difficult terrain.

When a criatura starts its turn within the wall's area or enters the wall's area for the first time on a turn, it makes a teste de resistência de Destreza, taking 6d10 dano cortante em uma falha no teste, or half as much em um sucesso no teste.
higher_level: o dano increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 6th.

name: Blade of Wrath
desc:
You create a sword of pure white fogo in your free hand. The blade is similar in size and shape to a longsword, and it lasts for the duration. The blade disappears if you let go of it, but you can call it forth again as a ação bônus.

You can use your action to make a melee ataque mágico with the blade. On a hit, the alvo recebe 2d8 dano de fogo and 2d8 dano radiante. An aberration, fey, fiend, or undead criatura damaged by the blade deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar amedrontado until the start of your next turn.

The blade sheds bright leve in a 20-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 20 pés.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, either the dano de fogo or the dano radiante (your choice) increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 3rd.
material: a rebuke of evil, written in Celestial

name: Blade of my Brother
desc:
You touch a melee weapon that was used by an aliado who is now dead, and it leaps into the air and flies to another aliado (chosen by you) within 15 pés of you. The weapon enters that aliado’s space and moves when the aliado moves. If the weapon or the aliado is forced to move more than 5 pés from the other, the spell ends.

The weapon acts on your turn by making an attack if a alvo presents itself. Its attack modifier equals your spellcasting level + the weapon’s inherent mágico bonus, if any; it receives only its own inherent mágico bonus to damage. The weapon fights for up to 4 rodadas or until your Concentração is broken, after which the spell ends and it falls to the ground.
material: melee weapon owned by a dead aliado of the alvo

name: Blazing Chariot
desc:
Calling upon the might of the angels, you conjure a flaming chariot made of gold and mithral in an unoccupied 10-pé‐square space you can see within range. Two horses made of fogo and leve pull the chariot. You and up to three other Medium or smaller criaturas you designate can board the chariot (at the cost of 5 pés of movement) and are unharmed by the flames. Any other criatura that touches the chariot or hits it (or a criatura riding in it) with a ataque corpo a corpo while within 5 pés of the chariot recebe 3d6 dano de fogo and 3d6 dano radiante. The chariot has AC 18 and 50 pontos de vida, is immune to fogo, veneno, psíquico, and dano radiante, and has resistance to all other não mágico damage. The horses are not separate criaturas but are part of the chariot. The chariot vanishes if it is reduced to 0 pontos de vida, and any criatura riding it falls out. The chariot has a Deslocamento of 50 pés and a voando Deslocamento of 40 pés.

On your turn, you can guide the chariot in place of your own movement. You can use a ação bônus to direct it to take the Dash, Disengage, or Dodge action. As an action, you can use the chariot to overrun criaturas in its path. On this turn, the chariot can enter a hostile criatura’s space. The criatura recebe damage as if it had touched the chariot, is shunted to the nearest unoccupied space that it can occupy, and deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Força or fall prostrado in that space.
material: a small golden wheel worth 250 gp

name: Bleating Call
desc:
You create a sound on a point within range. The sound’s volume can range from a whisper to a scream, and it can be any sound you choose. The sound continues unabated throughout the duration, or you can make discrete sounds at different times before the spell ends.

cada criatura that starts its turn within 30 pés of the sound and can hear it deve fazer a teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em uma falha no teste, the alvo must take the Dash or Disengage action and move toward the sound by the safest available route on cada um de seus turnos. When it arrives to the source of the sound, the alvo must use its action to examine the sound. Once it has examined the sound, the alvo determines the sound is illusory and can no longer hear it, ending the spell’s effects on that alvo and preventing the alvo from being affected by the sound again for the duration of the spell. If a alvo recebe damage from you or a criatura friendly to you, it is no longer under the effects of this spell.

criaturas that can’t be enfeitiçado are immune to this spell.
material: a bit of fur or hair from a young beast or humanoid

name: Bleed
desc:
Crackling energy coats the blade of one weapon you are carrying that causa dano cortante. Until the spell ends, when you hit a criatura with the weapon, the weapon causa an extra 1d4 dano necrótico and the criatura deve fazer a teste de resistência de Constituição. em uma falha no teste, the criatura suffers a bleeding wound. Each time you hit a criatura with this weapon while it suffers from a bleeding wound, your weapon causa an extra 1 dano necrótico for each time you have previously hit the criatura with this weapon (to a maximum of 10 dano necrótico).

Any criatura can take an action to stanch the bleeding wound by succeeding on a Sabedoria (Medicina) check against your CD de resistência à magia. The wound also closes if the alvo receives mágico healing. This spell has no effect on undead or constructs.
material: a drop of blood

name: Bless
desc: You bless up to three criatura of your choice dentro do alcance. Whenever um alvo makes an rolagem de ataque or a teste de resistência before a magia termina, o alvo can roll a d4 and add the number rolled to the rolagem de ataque or teste de resistência.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 2° nível ou superior, você pode alvo one additional criatura for each nível do espaço above 1st.
material: A sprinkling of holy water.

name: Bless
desc: The blessing you bestow upon the alvos makes them more durable and competent. Until the spell ends, a d4 is added to attack rolls and saving throws made by a alvo.
higher_level: You alvo one additional criatura for each slot level above 1st.

name: Bless the Dead
desc: You grant a blessing to one deceased criatura, enabling it to cross over to the realm of the dead in peace. A criatura that benefits from **bless the dead** can’t become undead. The spell has no effect on living criaturas or the undead.

name: Blessed Halo
desc:
A nimbus of golden leve surrounds your head for the duration. The halo sheds bright leve in a 20-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 20 pés.

This spell grants you a pool of 10 points of healing. When you cast the spell and as an action on subsequent turns during the spell’s duration, you can expend points from this pool to restore an equal number of pontos de vida to uma criatura within 20 pés that you can see.

Additionally, you have vantagem on Carisma checks made against good criaturas within 20 pés.

If any of the leve created by this spell overlaps an area of mágico darkness created by a spell of 2nd level or lower, the spell that created the darkness is dispelled.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, the spell’s pool of healing points increases by 5 for each espaço de magia above 2nd, and the spell dispels mágico darkness created by a spell of a level equal to the slot used to cast this spell.

name: Blight
desc: Necromantic energy washes over uma criatura of your choice that você pode ver dentro do alcance, draining moisture and vitality from it. o alvo deve fazer um teste de resistência de Constituição. o alvo takes 8d8 dano necrótico em uma falha no teste, or half as much dano on a successful one. The magia has no effect on morto-vivo or constructo. If Você mira a planta criatura or a mágico planta, it makes the teste de resistência with desvantagem, and the magia deals maximum dano to it. If Você mira a não mágico planta that isn't uma criatura, such as a tree or shrub, it doesn't make a teste de resistência; it simply withers and morre.
higher_level: quando você conjura esta magia using um espaço de magia of 5th level of higher, the dano increases by 1d8 for each nível do espaço above 4th.

name: Blight
desc:
necrótico energies drain moisture and vitality from the alvo, dealing 8d8 dano necrótico. Undead and constructs are immune to this spell.

A plant criatura or mágico plant has desvantagem on its teste de resistência and recebe the maximum damage possible from this spell. A não mágico plant that isn't a criatura receives no teste de resistência and instead withers until dead.
higher_level: o dano increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 4th.

name: Blindness/Deafness
desc: você pode blind or deafen a inimigo. Escolha one criatura that você pode ver dentro do alcance to faz um teste de resistência de Constituição. If it fails, o alvo is either cego or ensurdecido (your choice) for a duração. no final de cada um de seus turnos, o alvo can faz um teste de resistência de Constituição. On a success, a magia termina.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 3° nível ou superior, você pode alvo one additional criatura for each nível do espaço above 2nd.

name: Blindness/Deafness
desc: Until the spell ends, the alvo is cego or surdo (your choice). no final de cada um de seus turnos the alvo can repeat its teste de resistência, ending the spell em um sucesso.
higher_level: You alvo one additional criatura for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Blink
desc: Roll a d20 at the end of cada um de seus turnos for a duração of the magia. On a roll of 11 or higher, you vanish from your current plano of existence and appear in the Ethereal plano (the magia fails and the casting is wasted if you were already on that plano). At the start of your next turn, and when a magia termina if Você está on the Ethereal plano, you return to an espaço desocupado of your choice that você pode ver a até 3 metros de the space you vanished from. If no espaço desocupado is available within that range, you appear in the nearest espaço desocupado (chosen at random if more than one space is equally near). você pode dismiss this magia as an ação. While on the Ethereal plano, você pode ver and hear the plano you originated from, which is cast in shades of gray, and você pode't see anything there more than 18 metros away. você pode only affect and be affected by outras criaturas on the Ethereal plano. criatura that aren't there can't perceive you or interact with you, unless they have the ability to do so.

name: Blink
desc:
Until the spell ends, roll 1d20 no final de each of your turns. When you roll an 11 or higher you disappear and reappear in the Ethereal Plane (if you are already on the Ethereal Plane, the spell fails and the espaço de magia is wasted). no início de your next turn you return to an unoccupied space that you can see within 10 pés of where you disappeared from. If no unoccupied space is available within range, you reappear in the nearest unoccupied space (determined randomly when there are multiple nearest choices). As an action, you can dismiss this spell.

While on the Ethereal Plane, you can see and hear into the plane you were originally on out to a range of 60 pés, but everything is obscured by mist and in shades of gray. You can only alvo and be targeted by other criaturas on the Ethereal Plane.

criaturas on your original plane cannot perceive or interact with you, unless they are able to interact with the Ethereal Plane.

name: Blizzard
desc: A howling storm of thick snow and ice crystals appears in a cylinder 40 pés high and 40 pés in diameter within range. The area is heavily obscured by the swirling snow. When the storm appears, cada criatura in the area recebe 8d8 dano de frio, or half as much damage with a successful teste de resistência de Constituição. A criatura also makes this teste de resistência and recebe damage when it enters the area for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there. In addition, a criatura that recebe dano de frio from this spell has desvantagem on Constituição saving throws to maintain Concentração until the start of its next turn.

name: Blood Armor
desc:
When you strike a foe with a ataque corpo a corpo com arma, you can immediately cast **blood armor** as a ação bônus. The foe you struck must contain blood; if the alvo doesn’t bleed, the spell ends without effect. The blood flowing from your foe magically increases in volume and forms a suit of armor around you, granting you an Classe de Armadura of 18 + your Destreza modifier for the spell’s duration. This armor has no Força requirement, doesn’t hinder spellcasting, and doesn’t incur desvantagem on Destreza (Furtividade) checks.

If the criatura you struck was a Celestial, **blood armor** also grants you vantagem on Carisma saving throws for the duration of the spell.
material: you must have just struck a foe with a melee weapon

name: Blood Lure
desc:
You point at any location (a jar, a bowl, even a puddle) within range that contains at least a pint of blood. cada criatura that feeds on blood and is within 60 pés of that location deve fazer a teste de resistência de Carisma. (This includes undead, such as vampires.) A criatura that has Keen Smell or any similar scent-boosting ability has desvantagem on the teste de resistência, while undead have vantagem on the teste de resistência. em uma falha no teste, the criatura is attracted to the blood and must move toward it unless impeded.

Once an affected criatura reaches the blood, it tries to consume it, foregoing all other actions while the blood is present. A successful attack against an affected criatura ends the effect, as does the consumption of the blood, which requires an action by an affected criatura.
material: a container or pool of blood

name: Blood Offering
desc: You touch the corpse of a criatura that isn’t undead or a construct and consume its life força. You must have dealt damage to the criatura before it died, and it must have been dead for no more than 1 hora. You regain a number of pontos de vida equal to 1d4 × the criatura's challenge rating (minimum of 1d4). The criatura can be restored to life only by means of a [true resurrection](https://api.open5e.com/spells/true-resurrection) or a [wish](https://api.open5e.com/spells/wish) spell.

name: Blood Puppet
desc: With a sample of its blood, you are able to magically control a criatura’s actions, like a marionette on mágico strings. Choose a criatura you can see within range whose blood you hold. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Constituição, or you gain control over its physical activity (as long as you interact with the blood componente material each rodada). As a ação bônus on your turn, you can direct the criatura to perform various activities. You can specify a simple and general course of action, such as, “Attack that criatura,” “Run over there,” or, “Fetch that object.” If the criatura completes the order and doesn’t receive further direction from you, it defends and preserves itself to the best of its ability. The alvo is aware of being controlled. no final de cada um de seus turnos, the alvo can make another teste de resistência de Constituição. em um sucesso, the spell ends.
material: a drop of blood from the alvo

name: Blood Scarab
desc: Your blood is absorbed into the beetle’s exoskeleton to form a beautiful, rubylike scarab that flies toward a criatura of your choice within range. The alvo deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Constituição ou receber 1d6 dano necrótico. You gain temporary pontos de vida equal to the dano necrótico dealt.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 2nd level or higher, the number of scarabs increases by one for each slot level above 1st. You can direct the scarabs at the same alvo or at different alvos. Each alvo makes a single teste de resistência, regardless of the number of scarabs targeting it.
material: a drop of the caster’s blood, and the exoskeleton of a scarab beetle

name: Blood Spoor
desc:
By touching a drop of your quarry’s blood (spilled or drawn within the past hora), you can follow the criatura’s trail unerringly across any surface or under water, no matter how fast you are moving. If your quarry recebe flight, you can follow its trail along the ground—or through the air, if you have the means to fly.

If your quarry moves magically (such as by way of a [dimension door](https://api.open5e.com/spells/dimension-door) or a [teleport](https://api.open5e.com/spells/teleport) spell), you sense its trail as a straight path leading from where the mágico movement started to where it ended. Such a route might lead through lethal or impassable barriers. This spell even reveals the route of a criatura using [pass without trace](https://api.open5e.com/spells/pass-without-trace), but it fails to locate a criatura protected by [nondetection](https://api.open5e.com/spells/nondetection) or by other effects that prevent [scrying](https://api.open5e.com/spells/scrying) spells or cause [divination](https://api.open5e.com/spells/divination) spells to fail. If your quarry moves to another plane, its trail ends without trace, but **blood spoor** picks up the trail again if the caster moves to the same plane as the quarry before the spell’s duration expires.
material: a drop of the quarry’s blood

name: Blood Strike
desc: By performing this ritual, you can cast a spell on one nearby criatura and have it affect a different, more distant criatura. Both alvos must be related by blood (no more distantly than first cousins). Neither of them needs to be a willing alvo. The blood strike ritual is completed first, taking 10 minutos to cast on yourself. Then the spell to be transferred is immediately cast by you on the initial alvo, which must be close enough to touch no matter what the spell's normal range is. The secondary alvo must be within 1 milha and on the same plane of existence as you. If the second spell allows a teste de resistência, it's made by the secondary alvo, not the initial alvo. If the teste de resistência succeeds, any portion of the spell that's avoided or negated by the secondary alvo affects the initial alvo instead. A criatura can be the secondary alvo of blood strike only once every 24 horas; subsequent attempts during that time take full effect against the initial alvo with no chance to affect the secondary alvo. Only spells that have a single alvo can be transferred via blood stike. For example, a lesser restoration) currently affecting the initial criatura and transfer it to the secondary criatura, which then makes any applicable teste de resistência against the effect. If the teste de resistência fails or there is no teste de resistência, the affliction transfers completely and no longer affects the initial alvo. If the teste de resistência succeeds, the initial criatura is still afflicted and also suffers anew any damage or conditions associated with first exposure to the affliction.

name: Blood Tide
desc:
When you cast this spell, a criatura you designate within range deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Constituição or bleed from its nose, eyes, ears, and mouth. This bleeding causa no damage but imposes a –2 penalty on the criatura’s Inteligência, Carisma, and Sabedoria checks. **Blood tide** has no effect on undead or constructs.

A bleeding criatura might attract the attention of criaturas such as stirges, sharks, or Gigante mosquitoes, depending on the circumstances.

A [cure wounds](https://api.open5e.com/spells/cure-wounds) spell stops the bleeding before the duration of blood tide expires, as does a successful CD 10 Sabedoria (Medicina) check.
higher_level: The spell’s duration increases to 2 minutos when you alcance 5th level, to 10 minutos when you alcance 11th level, and to 1 hora when you alcance 17th level.

name: Blood and Steel
desc:
When you cast this spell, you cut your hand and take 1d4 dano cortante that can’t be healed until you take a descanso longo. You then touch a construct; it deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Constituição ou ficar enfeitiçado by you for the duration. If you or your aliados are fighting the construct, it has vantagem on the teste de resistência. Even constructs that are immune to charm effects can be affected by this spell.

While the construct is enfeitiçado, you have a telepathic link with it as long as the two of you are on the same plane of existence. You can use this telepathic link to issue commands to the criatura while you are conscious (no action required), which it does its best to obey. You can specify a simple and general course of action, such as, “Attack the ghouls,” “Block the bridge,” or, “Fetch that bucket.” If the construct completes the order and doesn’t receive further direction from you, it defends itself.

You can use your action to take total and precise control of the alvo. Until the end of your next turn, the construct recebe only the actions you specify and does nothing you haven’t ordered it to do. During this time, you can also cause the construct to use a reação, but doing this requires you to use your own reação as well.

Each time the construct recebe damage, it makes a new teste de resistência de Constituição against the spell. If the teste de resistência succeeds, the spell ends.

If the construct is already under your control when the spell is cast, it gains an Inteligência of 10 (unless its own Inteligência is higher, in which case it retains the higher score) for 4 horas. The construct is capable of acting independently, though it remains loyal to you for the spell’s duration. You can also grant the alvo a bonus equal to your Inteligência modifier on one skill in which you have proficiência.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a 5th‑level espaço de magia, the duration is Concentração, up to 10 minutos. When you use a 6th-level espaço de magia, the duration is Concentração, up to 1 hora. When you use a espaço de magia of 7th level or higher, the duration is Concentração, up to 8 horas.

name: Blood to Acid
desc:
When you cast this spell, you designate a criatura within range and convert its blood into virulent ácido. The alvo deve fazer a teste de resistência de Constituição. em uma falha no teste, it recebe 10d12 dano de ácido and is atordoado by the pain for 1d4 rodadas. em um sucesso no teste, it recebe half o dano and isn’t atordoado.

criaturas without blood, such as constructs and plants, are not affected by this spell. If **blood to ácido** is cast on a criatura composed mainly of blood, such as a [blood elemental](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/blood-elemental) or a [blood zombie](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/blood-zombie), the criatura is slain by the spell if its teste de resistência fails.

name: Blood-Writ Bargain
desc:
This spell creates a pact which is enforced by Celestial or fiendish forces. You and another willing criatura commit to a mutual agreement, clearly declaring your parts of the agreement during the casting.

Until the spell ends, if for any reason either participant breaks the agreement or fails to uphold their part of the bargain, beings of Celestial or fiendish origin appear within unoccupied spaces as close as possible to the participant who broke the bargain. The beings are hostile to the deal-breaking participant and attempt to kill them, as well as any criaturas that defend them. When the dealbreaking participant is killed, or the spell's duration ends, the beings disappear in a flash of smoke.

The spellcaster chooses whether the beings are Celestial or fiendish while casting the spell, and the Narrator chooses the exact criaturas summoned (such as a couatl or 5 imps). There may be any number of beings, but their combined Challenge Rating can't exceed 5.
higher_level: The combined Challenge Rating of summoned beings increases by 2 and the duration increases by 13 dias for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Bloodhound
desc: You touch a willing criatura to grant it an enhanced sense of smell. For the duration, that criatura has vantagem on Sabedoria (Percepção) checks that rely on smell and Sabedoria (Sobrevivência) checks to follow tracks.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a 3rd-level espaço de magia, you also grant the alvo visão cega out to a range of 30 pés for the duration.
material: a drop of ammonia

name: Bloodlust
desc: You imbue a willing criatura that you can see within range with vitality and fury. The alvo gains 1d6 temporary pontos de vida, has vantagem on Força checks, and causa an extra 1d6 damage when it hits with a weapon attack. When the spell ends, the alvo suffers one level of exaustão for 1 minuto.

name: Bloodshot
desc: You launch a jet of boiling blood from your eyes at a criatura within range. You take 1d6 dano necrótico and make a ranged ataque mágico against the alvo. If the attack hits, the alvo recebe 2d10 dano de fogo plus 2d8 dano psíquico.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, the dano de fogo increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Bloody Hands
desc:
You cause the hands (or other appropriate body parts, such as claws or tentacles) of a criatura within range to bleed profusely. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Constituição ou receber 1 dano necrótico each rodada and suffer desvantagem on all melee and ataque à distância rolls that require the use of its hands for the spell’s duration.

Casting any spell that has somatic or material components while under the influence of this spell requires a CD 10 teste de resistência de Constituição. em uma falha no teste, the spell is not cast but it is not lost; the casting can be attempted again in the next rodada.

name: Bloody Smite
desc: The next time during the spell’s duration that you hit a criatura with a ataque corpo a corpo com arma, your weapon pulses with a dull red leve, and the attack causa an extra 1d6 dano necrótico to the alvo. Until the spell ends, the alvo deve fazer a teste de resistência de Constituição no início de cada um de seus turnos. em uma falha no teste, it recebe 1d6 dano necrótico, it bleeds profusely from the mouth, and it can’t speak intelligibly or cast spells that have a componente verbal. em um sucesso no teste, the spell ends. If the alvo or an aliado within 5 pés of it uses an action to tend the wound and makes a successful Sabedoria (Medicina) check against your CD de resistência à magia, or if the alvo receives mágico healing, the spell ends.

name: Bloom
desc:
You plant a silver acorn in solid ground and spend an hora chanting a litany of praises to the natural world, after which the land within 1 milha of the acorn becomes extremely fertile, regardless of its previous state. Any seeds planted in the area grow at twice the natural rate. Food harvested regrows within a week. After one year, the land slowly reverts to its normal fertility, unable to stave off the march of Natureza.

Choose one of the following effects, which appears and grows immediately:
* A field planted with vegetables of your choice, ready for harvest.
* A thick forest of stout trees and ample undergrowth.
* A grassland with wildflowers and fodder for grazing.
* An orchard of fruit trees of your choice, growing in orderly rows and ready for harvest.
Living criaturas that take a descanso curto within the area of a bloom spell receive the maximum pontos de vida for Hit Dice expended. **Bloom** counters the effects of a [desolation](https://api.open5e.com/spells/desolation) spell.

***ritual Focus.*** If you expend your ritual focus, the duration becomes permanent.
material: a silver acorn worth 500 gp, which is consumed in the casting

name: Blunted Edge
desc: Choose a criatura that you can see within range. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Sabedoria or have desvantagem on weapon attack rolls. In addition, when an affected criatura rolls damage dice for a successful attack, it must roll the weapon's damage dice twice and use the lower total. no final de cada um de seus turnos, the alvo can make another teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em um sucesso, the spell ends on the alvo.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, you can alvo one additional criatura for each slot level above 3rd. The criaturas must be within 30 pés of each other when you alvo them.

name: Blur
desc: Your corpo becomes blurred, shifting and wavering to all who pode ver you. For a duração, any criatura tem desvantagem em rolagem de ataques against you. An attacker is imune a this effect if it doesn't rely on Vista, as with visão às cegas, or pode ver through illusions, as with visão verdadeira.

name: Blur
desc: Until the spell ends, you are shrouded in distortion and your image is blurred. criaturas make attack rolls against you with desvantagem unless they have senses that allow them to perceive without sight or to see through illusions (like visão cega or visão verdadeira).
higher_level: You may alvo an additional willing criatura you can see within range for each slot level above 2nd. Whenever an affected criatura other than you is hit by an attack, the spell ends for that criatura. When using a higher level espaço de magia, increase the spell's range to 30 pés.

name: Boiling Blood
desc: You cause the blood within a criatura’s body to boil with supernatural heat. Choose uma criatura that you can see within range that isn’t a construct or an undead. The alvo deve fazer a teste de resistência de Constituição. em um sucesso no teste, it recebe 2d6 dano de fogo and the spell ends. em uma falha no teste, the criatura recebe 4d6 dano de fogo and is cego. no final de cada um de seus turnos, the alvo can make another teste de resistência de Constituição. em um sucesso, the spell ends. em uma falha, the criatura recebe an additional 2d6 dano de fogo and remains cego.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 5th level or higher, you can alvo one additional criatura for each slot level above 4th. The criaturas must be within 30 pés of each other when you alvo them.
material: a vial of blood

name: Boiling Oil
desc: You conjure a shallow, 15-pé-radius pool of boiling oil centered on a point within range. The pool is difficult terrain, and any criatura that enters the pool or starts its turn there deve fazer a teste de resistência de Destreza. em uma falha no teste, the criatura recebe 3d8 dano de fogo and falls prostrado. em um sucesso no teste, a criatura recebe half as much damage and doesn’t fall prostrado.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, o dano increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 2nd.
material: a vial of oil

name: Bolster Fortifications
desc:
You create a ward that bolsters a structure or a collection of structures that occupy up to 2,500 square pés of floor space. The bolstered structures can be up to 20 pés tall and shaped as you desire. You can ward several small buildings in a stronghold by dividing the area among them, as long as you can walk into each contiguous area while you are casting the spell. For the purpose of this spell, “structures” include walls, such as the palisade that might surround a small fort, provided the wall is no more than 20 pés tall.
  For the duration, each structure you bolstered has a damage threshold of 5. If a structure already has a damage threshold, that threshold increases by 5.
  This spell protects only the walls, support beams, roofs, and similar that make up the core components of the structure. It doesn't bolster objects within the structures, such as furniture.
  The protected structure or structures radiate magic. A *dispel magic* cast on a structure removes the bolstering from only that structure. You can create a permanently bolstered structure or collection of structures by casting this spell there every dia for one year.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, the square pés of floor space you can bolster increases by 500 and o dano threshold increases by 2 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Bolster Undead
desc:
You suffuse an area with negative energy to increase the difficulty of harming or affecting undead criaturas.

Choose up to three undead criaturas within range. When a targeted criatura makes a teste de resistência against being turned or against spells or effects that deal dano radiante, the alvo has vantagem on the teste de resistência.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 2nd level or higher, you can affect one additional undead criatura for each slot level above 1st.
material: a sprinkle of unholy water

name: Bombardment of Stings
desc: cada criatura in a 30-pé cone deve fazer a teste de resistência de Destreza. em uma falha no teste, a criatura recebe 4d6 dano perfurante and is envenenado for 1 minuto. em um sucesso no teste, a criatura recebe half as much damage and isn't envenenado. no final de cada um de seus turnos, a envenenado alvo can make a teste de resistência de Constituição. em um sucesso, the condition ends on the alvo.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, o dano increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Booster Shot
desc:
You imbue a duas mãos ranged weapon (typically a shortbow, longbow, leve crossbow, or pesada crossbow) that you touch with a random mágico benefit. While the spell lasts, a projectile fired from the weapon has an effect that occurs on a hit in addition to its normal damage. Roll a d6 to determine the additional effect for each casting of this spell.

| D6 | EFFECT |
|---|---|
| 1 | 2d10 dano de ácido to todas as criaturas within 10 pés of the alvo |
| 2 | 2d10 dano de relâmpago to the alvo and 1d10 dano de relâmpago to todas as criaturas in a 5-pé-wide line between the weapon and the alvo |
| 3 | 2d10 dano necrótico to the alvo, and the alvo has desvantagem on its first jogada de ataque before the start of the weapon user’s next turn |
| 4 | 2d10 dano de frio to the alvo and 1d10 dano de frio to all other criaturas in a 60-pé cone in front of the weapon |
| 5 | 2d10 dano de força to the alvo, and the alvo is pushed 20 pés |
| 6 | 2d10 dano psíquico to the alvo, and the alvo is atordoado until the start of the weapon user’s next turn |
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, all damage increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Boreas’s Breath
desc:
You freeze standing water in a 20-pé cube or running water in a 10-pé cube centered on you. The water turns to solid ice. The surface becomes difficult terrain, and any criatura that ends its turn on the ice deve fazer a successful CD 10 teste de resistência de Destreza or fall prostrado.

criaturas that are partially submerged in the water when it freezes become imobilizado. While imobilizado in this way, a criatura recebe 1d6 dano de frio no final de its turn. It can break free by using an action to make a successful teste de Força against your CD de resistência à magia.

criaturas that are fully submerged in the water when it freezes become incapacitado and cannot breathe. While incapacitado in this way, a criatura recebe 2d6 dano de frio no final de its turn. A trapped criatura makes a CD 20 teste de resistência de Força after taking this damage no final de its turn, breaking free from the ice em um sucesso.

The ice has AC 10 and 15 pontos de vida. It is vulnerable to dano de fogo, has resistance to não mágico cortante and dano perfurante, and is immune to frio, necrótico, veneno, psíquico, and dano de trovão.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, the size of the cube increases by 10 pés for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Borrowing
desc: By touching a alvo, you gain one sense, movement type and Deslocamento, feat, language, immunity, or extraordinary ability of the alvo for the duration of the spell. The alvo also retains the use of the borrowed ability. An unwilling alvo prevents the effect with a successful teste de resistência de Constituição. The alvo can be a living criatura or one that's been dead no longer than 1 minuto; a corpse makes no teste de resistência. You can possess only one borrowed power at a time.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 5th level, its duration increases to 1 hora. Additionally, the alvo loses the stolen power for the duration of the spell.

name: Bottled Arcana
desc:
By touching an empty, stoppered glass container such as a vial or flask, you magically enable it to hold a single spell. To be captured, the spell must be cast within 1 rodada of casting **bottled Arcanismo** and it must be intentionally cast into the container. The container can hold one spell of 3rd level or lower. The spell can be held in the container for as much as 24 horas, after which the container reverts to a mundane vessel and any magic inside it dissipates harmlessly.

As an action, any criatura can unstop the container, thereby releasing the spell. If the spell has a range of self, the criatura opening the container is affected; otherwise, the criatura opening the container designates the alvo according to the captured spell’s description. If a criatura opens the container unwittingly (not knowing that the container holds a spell), the spell alvos the criatura opening the container or is centered on its space instead (whichever is more appropriate). [Dispel magic](https://api.open5e.com/spells/dispel-magic) cast on the container alvos **bottled Arcanismo**, not the spell inside. If **bottled Arcanismo** is dispelled, the container becomes mundane and the spell inside dissipates harmlessly.

Until the spell in the container is released, its caster can’t regain the espaço de magia used to cast that spell. Once the spell is released, its caster regains the use of that slot normally.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 6th level or higher, the level of the spell the container can hold increases by one for every slot level above 5th.
material: an empty glass container

name: Bottomless Stomach
desc:
When you cast this spell, you gain the ability to consume dangerous substances and contain them in an extradimensional reservoir in your stomach. The spell allows you to swallow most liquids, such as acids, alcohol, veneno, and even quicksilver, and hold them safely in your stomach. You are unaffected by swallowing the substance, but the spell doesn’t give you resistance or immunity to the substance in general; for example, you could safely drink a bucket of a black dragon’s acidic spittle, but you’d still be burned if you were caught in the dragon’s breath attack or if that bucket of ácido were dumped over your head.

The spell allows you to store up to 10 gallons of liquid at one time. The liquid doesn’t need to all be of the same type, and different types don’t mix while in your stomach. Any liquid in excess of 10 gallons has its normal effect when you try to swallow it.

At any time before you stop concentrating on the spell, you can regurgitate up to 1 gallon of liquid stored in your stomach as a ação bônus. The liquid is vomited into an adjacent 5-pé square. A alvo in that square deve ter sucesso em a CD 15 teste de resistência de Destreza ou ficar affected by the liquid. The GM determines the exact effect based on the type of liquid regurgitated, using 1d6 damage of the appropriate type as the baseline.

When you stop concentrating on the spell, its duration expires, or it’s dispelled, the extradimensional reservoir and the liquid it contains cease to exist.

name: Bound Haze
desc:
You cause a swirling gyre of dust, small rocks, and wind to encircle a criatura you can see within range. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Destreza or have desvantagem on attack rolls and on Sabedoria (Percepção) checks. no final de cada um de seus turnos, the alvo can make a teste de resistência de Destreza. em um sucesso, the spell ends.
  In addition, if the alvo is within a cloud or gas, such as the area of a *fog cloud* spell or a dretch's Fetid Cloud, the affected alvo has desvantagem on this spell's saving throws and on any saving throws associated with being in the cloud or gas, such as the teste de resistência to reduce the dano de veneno the alvo might take from starting its turn in the area of a *cloudkill* spell.
higher_level: If you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, the duration is 1 minuto, and the spell doesn't require Concentração.

name: Branding Smite
desc: The next time you hit uma criatura with a arma attack before this magia ends, the arma gleams with astral radiance as you strike. The attack deals an extra 2d6 dano radiante to o alvo, which becomes visible if it's invisível, and o alvo sheds luz fraca in a 5-­--foot raio and can't become invisível until a magia termina.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 3° nível ou superior, the extra dano increases by 1d6 for each nível do espaço above 2nd.

name: Breathtaking Wind
desc: You alvo a criatura with a blast of wintry air. That criatura deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Constituição or become unable to speak or cast spells with a vocal component for the duration of the spell.

name: Breeze Compass
desc: When you cast **breeze compass**, you must clearly imagine or mentally describe a location. It doesn’t need to be a location you’ve been to as long as you know it exists on the Material Plane. Within moments, a gentle breeze arises and blows along the most efficient path toward that destination. Only you can sense this breeze, and whenever it brings you to a decision point (a fork in a passageway, for example), you deve fazer a successful CD 8 Inteligência (Arcanismo) check to deduce which way the breeze indicates you should go. On a failed check, the spell ends. The breeze guides you around cliffs, lava pools, and other natural obstacles, but it doesn’t avoid inimigos or hostile criaturas.
material: a magnetized needle

name: Brimstone Infusion
desc: You infuse an ordinary flask of alchemist's fogo with mágico brimstone. While so enchanted, the alchemist's fogo can be arremesso 40 pés instead of 20, and it does 2d6 dano de fogo instead of 1d4. The teste de resistência de Destreza to extinguish the flames uses your CD de resistência à magia instead of CD 10. Infused alchemist's fogo returns to its normal properties after 24 horas.
material: a flask of alchemist's fogo and 5 gp worth of brimstone

name: Brittling
desc: This spell uses biting frio to make a metal or stone object you touch become brittle and more easily shattered. The object’s pontos de vida are reduced by a number equal to your level as a spellcaster, and Força checks to shatter or break the object are made with vantagem if they occur within 1 minuto of the spell’s casting. If the object isn’t shattered during this time, it reverts to the state it was in before the spell was cast.
material: an icicle

name: Broken Charge
desc: When an inimigo that you can see moves to within 5 pés of you, you utter a perplexing word that alters the foe’s course. The inimigo deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou receber 2d4 dano psíquico and use the remainder of its Deslocamento to move in a direction of your choosing.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 2nd level or higher, the alvo recebe an additional 2d4 dano psíquico for each slot level above 1st.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when an enemy approaches to within 5 feet of you

name: Burning Hands
