The summoned criaturas are friendly to you and your companions and take their turns immediately after yours. They obey your verbal commands. When you command multiple minor elementals using this spell, you must give them all the same command.

Without such commands, a minor elemental only defends itself.

The summoned criatura disappears when reduced to 0 pontos de vida. If your Concentração is broken before the spell ends, you lose control of any summoned criaturas, which become hostile and might attack you and your companions. An uncontrolled criatura disappears no final de the spell's maximum duration.
higher_level: Use the higher espaço de magia level wherever the spell's level appears in the stat block.

name: Conjure Minor Voidborn
desc:
You summon fiends or aberrations that appear in unoccupied spaces you can see within range. You choose one of the following options:
* uma criatura of challenge rating 2 or lower
* Two criaturas of challenge rating 1 or lower
* Four criaturas of challenge rating 1/2 or lower
* Eight criaturas of challenge rating 1/4 or lower
Summoned criaturas disappear when they drop to 0 pontos de vida or when the spell ends.

The summoned criaturas do not directly attack you or your companions. Roll initiative for the summoned criaturas as a group; they take their own turns on their initiative result. They attack your inimigos and try to stay within 90 pés of you, but they control their own actions. The summoned criaturas despise being bound, so they might harm or impede you and your companions with secondary effects (but not direct attacks) if the opportunity arises. At the beginning of the criaturas’ turn, you can use your reação to verbally command them. They obey your commands on that turn, and you take 1d6 dano psíquico no final de the turn.

If your Concentração is broken, the spell ends but the criaturas don’t disappear. Instead, you can no longer command them, and they become hostile to you and your companions. They will attack you and your aliados if they believe they have a chance to win the fight or to inflict meaningful harm, but they won’t fight if they fear it would mean their own death. You can’t dismiss the criaturas, but they disappear 1 hora after being summoned.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a 7th‑or 9th-level espaço de magia, you choose one of the summoning options above, and more criaturas appear­—twice as many with a 7th-level espaço de magia and three times as many with a 9th-level espaço de magia.

name: Conjure Scarab Swarm
desc:
You summon swarms of scarab beetles to attack your foes. Two swarms of insects (beetles) appear in unoccupied spaces that you can see within range.

Each swarm disappears when it drops to 0 pontos de vida or when the spell ends. The swarms are friendly to you and your aliados. Make one initiative roll for both swarms, which have their own turns. They obey verbal commands that you issue to them (no action required by you). If you don’t issue any commands to them, they defend themselves from hostile criaturas but otherwise take no actions.
material: a beetle carapace

name: Conjure Shadow Titan
desc:
You summon a shadow titan, which appears in an unoccupied space that you can see within range. The shadow titan’s statistics are identical to a [stone Gigante’s](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/stone-Gigante), with two differences: its camouflage ability works in dim leve instead of rocky terrain, and the “rocks” it hurls are composed of shadow-stuff and cause dano de frio.

The shadow titan is friendly to you and your companions. Roll initiative for the shadow titan; it acts on its own turn. It obeys verbal or telepathic commands that you issue to it (giving a command recebe no action on your part). If you don’t issue any commands to the shadow titan, it defends itself from hostile criaturas but otherwise recebe no actions.

The shadow titan disappears when it drops to 0 pontos de vida or when the spell ends.

name: Conjure Spectral Allies
desc:
You sprinkle some graveyard dirt before you and call forth vengeful spirits. The spirits erupt from the ground at a point you choose within range and sweep outward. cada criatura in a 30-pé-radius sphere centered on that point deve fazer a teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em uma falha no teste, a criatura recebe 6d10 dano necrótico and becomes amedrontado for 1 minuto. em um sucesso no teste, the criatura recebe half as much damage and isn't amedrontado.
  no final de cada um de seus turnos, a criatura amedrontado by this spell can make another teste de resistência. em um sucesso, this spell ends on the criatura.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 8th level or higher, o dano increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 7th.

name: Conjure Spectral Dead
desc: You summon a [shroud](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/shroud) to do your bidding. The criatura appears in an unoccupied space that you can see within range. The criatura is friendly to you and your aliados for the duration. Roll initiative for the criatura, which has its own turns. It obeys any verbal commands that you issue to it (no action required by you). If you don't issue any commands to the criatura, it defends itself from hostile criaturas but otherwise recebe no actions. The criatura disappears when it drops to 0 pontos de vida or when the spell ends.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a 3rd-level espaço de magia, you can choose to summon two [shrouds](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/shroud) or one [specter](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/specter). When you cast this spell with a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, you can choose to summon four [shrouds](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/shroud) or one [will-o’-wisp](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/will-o-wisp).
material: a handful of bone dust, a crystal prism, and a silver coin

name: Conjure Undead
desc: You summon a [shadow](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/shadow) to do your bidding. The criatura appears in an unoccupied space that you can see within range. The criatura is friendly to you and your aliados for the duration. Roll initiative for the shadow, which has its own turns. It obeys any verbal commands that you issue to it (no action required by you). If you don’t issue any commands to the criatura, it defends itself from hostile criaturas but otherwise recebe no actions. The shadow disappears when the spell ends.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a 4th-level espaço de magia, you can choose to summon a [wight](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/wight) or a [shadow](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/shadow). When you cast this spell with a espaço de magia of 5th level or higher, you can choose to summon a [ghost](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/ghost), a [shadow](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/shadow), or a [wight](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/wight).
material: a humanoid skull

name: Conjure Voidborn
desc:
You summon a fiend or aberration of challenge rating 6 or lower, which appears in an unoccupied space that you can see within range. The criatura disappears when it drops to 0 pontos de vida or when the spell ends.

Roll initiative for the criatura, which recebe its own turns. It attacks the nearest criatura on its turn. no início de the fiend’s turn, you can use your reação to command the criatura by speaking in Void Speech. It obeys your verbal command, and you take 2d6 dano psíquico no final de the criatura’s turn.

If your Concentração is broken, the spell ends but the criatura doesn’t disappear. Instead, you can no longer issue commands to the fiend, and it becomes hostile to you and your companions. It will attack you and your aliados if it believes it has a chance to win the fight or to inflict meaningful harm, but it won’t fight if it fears doing so would mean its own death. You can’t dismiss the criatura, but it disappears 1 hora after you summoned it.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 8th level or higher, the challenge rating increases by 1 for each slot level above 7th.

name: Conjure Woodland Beings
desc:
você invoca fada criatura that appear in espaços desocupados that você pode ver dentro do alcance. Escolha one of the following options for what appears: 
- One fada criatura of nível de desafio 2 or lower 
- Two fada criatura of nível de desafio 1 or lower 
- Four fada criatura of nível de desafio 1/2 or lower 
- Eight fada criatura of nível de desafio 1/4 or lower A invocar criatura disappears when it drops to 0 pontos de vida or when a magia termina. The invocar criatura are friendly to you and your companions. Roll iniciativa for the invocar criatura as a group, which have their own turns. They obey any verbal commands that you issue to them (no ação required by you). If you don't issue any commands to them, they defend themselves from criaturas hostis, but Caso contrário take no ações. The DM has the criatura' statistics.
higher_level: quando você conjura esta magia using certain higher-level espaços de magia, você escolhe one of the invocar options above, and more criatura appear: twice as many with a 6th-level slot and three times as many with an 8th-level slot.
material: One holly berry per criatura invocar.

name: Conjure Woodland Beings
desc:
You summon up to 3 criaturas from The Dreaming. These criaturas use the statistics of a woodland being (detailed below) with certain traits determined by your choice of its type: blink dog, satyr, or sprite. If you summon only 2 criaturas with this spell, increase its effective slot level by 1 when determining the minor woodland being's statistics, and if you summon a single criatura with this spell its effective slot level is increased by 2 instead.

The summoned criaturas are friendly to you and your companions and take their turns immediately after yours. They obey your verbal commands. When you command multiple woodland beings using this spell, you must give them all the same command.

Without such commands, a summoned criatura only defends itself.

The summoned criatura disappears when reduced to 0 pontos de vida. If your Concentração is broken before the spell ends, you lose control of any summoned criaturas, which become hostile and might attack you and your companions. An uncontrolled criatura disappears no final de the spell's maximum duration.
higher_level: Use the higher espaço de magia level wherever the spell's level appears in the stat block.

name: Consult the Storm
desc:
You ask a question of an entity connected to storms, such as an elemental, a deity, or a primal spirit, and the entity replies with destructive fury.

As part of the casting of the spell, you must speak a question consisting of fifteen words or fewer. Choose a point within range. A short, truthful answer to your question booms from that point. It can be heard clearly by any criatura within 600 pés. cada criatura within 15 pés of the point recebe 7d6 dano de trovão, or half as much damage with a successful teste de resistência de Constituição.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 5th level or higher, o dano increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 4th.

name: Contact Other Plane
desc: You mentally contact a demigod, the espírito of a long-morto sage, or some other mysterious entity from another plano. Contacting this extraplanar Inteligência can strain or even break your mind. quando você conjura esta magia, make a DC 15 Inteligência teste de resistência. On a failure, Você sofre 6d6 dano psíquico and are insane until you finish a descanso longo. While insane, você pode't take ações, can't understand what outras criaturas say, can't read, and speak only in gibberish. A greater restoration magia cast on you ends this effect. em um sucesso no teste, você pode ask the entity up to five questions. você deve ask your questions before a magia termina. The DM answers each question with one word, such as "yes," "no," "maybe," "never," "irrelevant," or "unclear" (if the entity doesn't know the answer to the question). If a one-word answer would be misleading, the DM might Em vez disso offer a short phrase as an answer.

name: Contact Other Plane
desc:
You consult an otherworldly entity, risking your very mind in the process. Make a CD 15 teste de resistência de Inteligência. em uma falha, you take 6d6 dano psíquico and suffer four levels of strife until you finish a descanso longo. A _greater restoration_ spell ends this effect.

em um sucesso no teste, you can ask the entity up to 5 questions before the spell ends. When possible the entity responds with one-word answers: yes, no, maybe, never, irrelevant, or unclear. At the Narrator's discretion, it may instead provide a brief but truthful answer when necessary.

name: Contagion
desc:
Your Toque inflicts disease. faça um ataque de magia corpo a corpo against uma criatura within your reach. em um acerto, you afflict a criatura with a disease of your choice from any of the ones described below. At the end of each of o alvo's turns, it deve fazer um teste de resistência de Constituição. After failing three of these teste de resistências, the disease's effects last for a duração, and a criatura stops making these saves. After succeeding on three of these teste de resistências, a criatura recovers from the disease, and a magia termina. Since this magia induces a natural disease in its alvo, any effect that removes a disease or Caso contrário ameliorates a disease's effects apply to it.

**Blinding Sickness.** Pain grips a criatura's mind, and its eyes turn milky white. a criatura tem desvantagem em Sabedoria checks and Sabedoria teste de resistências and is cego.

**Filth Fever.** A raging fever sweeps through a criatura's corpo. a criatura tem desvantagem em Força checks, Força teste de resistências, and rolagem de ataques that use Força.

**Flesh Rot.** a criatura's flesh decays. a criatura tem desvantagem em Carisma checks and vulnerabilidade a all dano.

**Mindfire.** a criatura's mind becomes feverish. a criatura tem desvantagem em Inteligência checks and Inteligência teste de resistências, and a criatura behaves as if under the effects of the confusion magia during combat.

**Seizure.** a criatura is overcome with shaking. a criatura tem desvantagem em Destreza checks, Destreza teste de resistências, and rolagem de ataques that use Destreza.

**Slimy Doom.** a criatura begins to bleed uncontrollably. a criatura tem desvantagem em Constituição checks and Constituição teste de resistências. Além disso, whenever a criatura sofre dano, it is atordoado até o final de seu próximo turno.

name: Contagion
desc:
Your touch inflicts a hideous disease. Make a melee ataque mágico. On a hit, you afflict the alvo with a disease chosen from the list below.

The alvo deve fazer a teste de resistência de Constituição no final de cada um de seus turnos. After three failed saves, the disease lasts for the duration and the criatura stops making saves, or after three successful saves, the criatura recovers and the spell ends. A greater restoration spell or similar effect also ends the disease.

* **Blinding Sickness:** The alvo's eyes turn milky white. It is cego and has desvantagem on Sabedoria checks and saving throws.
* **Filth Fever:** The alvo is wracked by fever. It has desvantagem when using Força for an teste de habilidade, jogada de ataque, or teste de resistência.
* **Flesh Rot:** The alvo's flesh rots. It has desvantagem on Carisma ability checks and becomes vulnerable to all damage.
* **Mindfire:** The alvo hallucinates. During combat it is confused, and it has desvantagem when using Inteligência for an teste de habilidade or teste de resistência.
* **Rattling Cough:** The alvo becomes discombobulated as it hacks with body-wracking coughs. It is rattled and has desvantagem when using Destreza for an teste de habilidade, jogada de ataque, or teste de resistência.
* **Slimy Doom:** The alvo bleeds uncontrollably. It has desvantagem when using Constituição for an teste de habilidade or teste de resistência. Whenever it recebe damage, the alvo is atordoado até o final de seu próximo turno.

name: Contingency
desc: Escolha a magia of 5th level or lower that você pode cast, that has a casting time of 1 ação, and that can alvo you. You cast that magia-called the contingent magia-as part of casting contingency, expending espaços de magia for both, but the contingent magia doesn't come into effect. Em vez disso, it takes effect when a certain circumstance occurs. You describe that circumstance when you cast the two magias. Por exemplo, a contingency cast with water breathing might stipulate that water breathing comes into effect when Você está engulfed in water or a similar liquid. The contingent magia takes effect immediately after the circumstance is met for the first time, whether or not you want it to. and then contingency ends. The contingent magia takes effect only on you, even if it can normally alvo others. você pode use only one contingency magia at a time. If Você conjura esta magia again, the effect of another contingency magia on you ends. Also, contingency ends on you if its material componente is ever not on your person.
material: A statuette of yourself carved from ivory and decorated with gema worth at least 1,500 gp.

name: Contingency
desc:
As part of this spell, cast a spell of 5th-level or lower that has a casting time of 1 action, expending espaços de magia for both. The second spell must alvo you, and doesn't alvo others even if it normally would.

Describe the circumstances under which the second spell should be cast. It is automatically triggered the first time these circumstances are met. This spell ends when the second spell is triggered, when you cast _contingency_ again, or if the componente material for it is not on your person. For example, when you cast _contingency_ with _blur_ as a second spell you might make the trigger be when you see a criatura alvo you with a weapon attack, or you might make it be when you make a weapon attack against a criatura, or you could choose for it to be when you see an aliado make a weapon attack against a criatura.

name: Continual Flame
desc: A flame, equivalent in brightness to a torch, springs forth from an objeto that Você toca. The effect looks like a regular flame, but it creates no heat and doesn't use oxygen. A continual flame can be covered or hidden but not smothered or quenched.
material: Ruby dust worth 50 gp, which the magia consumes.

name: Continual Flame
desc: A mágico torch-like flame springs forth from the alvo. The flame creates no heat, doesn't consume oxygen, and can't be extinguished, but it can be covered.

name: Control Water
desc:
Until a magia termina, you control any freestanding water inside an área você escolhe that is a cubo up to 30 metros on a side. você pode Escolha from any of the following effects quando você conjura esta magia. As an ação on your turn, você pode repeat the same effect or Escolha a different one.

**Flood.** Você causa the water level of all standing water in the área to rise by as much as 6 metros. If the área includes a shore, the flooding water spills over onto dry land. Em vez disso create a 6 metros tall wave that travels from one side of the área to the other and then crashes down. Any Huge or smaller vehicles in the wave's path are carried with it to the other side. Any Huge or smaller vehicles struck by the wave have a 25 percent chance of capsizing. The water level remains elevated until a magia termina or você escolhe a different effect. If this effect produced a wave, the wave repeats on the start of your next turn while the flood effect lasts

 **Part Water.** Você causa water in the área to move apart and create a trench. The trench extends across the magia's área, and the separated water forms a parede to either side. The trench remains until a magia termina or você escolhe a different effect. The water then slowly fills in the trench over the course of the next round until the normal water level is restored.

**Redirect Flow.** Você causa flowing water in the área to move in a direction você escolhe, even if the water has to flow over obstacles, up walls, or in other unlikely directions. The water in the área moves as you direct it, but once it moves beyond the magia's área, it resumes its flow based on the terrain conditions. The water continues to move in the direction you chose until a magia termina or você escolhe a different effect.

**Whirlpool.** This effect requires a corpo of water at least 15 metros quadrado and 7.5 metros deep. Você causa a whirlpool to form in the center of the área. The whirlpool forms a vortex that is 1.5 metros wide at the base, up to 15 metros wide at the top, and 7.5 metros tall. Any criatura or objeto in the water and within 7.5 metros of the vortex is pulled 3 metros toward it. uma criatura can nadar away from the vortex by making a Força (Athletics) check against your CD da magia. When uma criatura enters the vortex for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it deve fazer um teste de resistência de Força. em uma falha no teste, a criatura takes 2d8 dano de concussão and is caught in the vortex until a magia termina. em um sucesso no teste, a criatura takes half dano, and isn't caught in the vortex. uma criatura caught in the vortex can use its ação to try to nadar away from the vortex as described above, but tem desvantagem em the Força (Athletics) check to do so. The first time each turn that an objeto enters the vortex, the objeto takes 2d8 dano de concussão; this dano occurs each round it remains in the vortex.
material: A drop of water and a pinch of dust.

name: Control Water
desc:
Water inside the area is yours to command. On the rodada you cast it, and as an action on subsequent turns until the spell ends, you can choose one of the following effects. When you choose a different effect, the current one ends.

* **Flood:** The standing water level rises by up to 20 pés. The flood water spills onto land if the area includes a shore, but when the area is in a large body of water you instead create a 20-foottall wave. The wave travels across the area and crashes down, carrying Huge or smaller vehicles to the other side, each of which has a 25% chance of capsizing. The wave repeats on the start of your next turn while this effect continues.
* **Part Water:** You create a 20-pé wide trench spanning the area with walls of water to either side. When this effect ends, the trench slowly refills over the course of the next rodada.
Redirect Flow: Flowing water in the area moves in a direction you choose, including up. Once the water moves beyond the spell's area, it resumes its regular flow based on the terrain.
* **Whirlpool:** If the affected body of water is at least 50 pés square and 25 pés deep, a whirlpool forms within the area in a 50-pé wide cone that is 25 pés long. criaturas and objects that are in the area and within 25 pés of the whirlpool make an Atletismo check against your CD de resistência à magia or are pulled 10 pés toward it. Once within the whirlpool, checks made to swim out of it have desvantagem. When a criatura first enters the whirlpool on a turn or starts its turn there, it makes a teste de resistência de Força or recebe 2d8 dano contundente and is pulled into the center of the whirlpool. em um sucesso no teste, the criatura recebe metade do dano and isn't pulled.

name: Control Weather
desc: Você sofre control of the weather within 8 km of you for a duração. você deve be outdoors to conjurar esta magia. Moving to a place where you don't have a clear path to the sky ends the magia early. When you conjurar a magia, you change the current weather conditions, which are determined by the DM based on the climate and season. você pode change precipitation, temperature, and wind. It takes 1d4 x 10 minutes for the new conditions to take effect. Once they do so, você pode change the conditions again. When a magia termina, the weather gradually returns to normal. When you change the weather conditions, find a current condition on the following tables and change its stage by one, up or down. When changing the wind, você pode change its direction.
material: ardente incense and bits of earth and wood mixed in water.

name: Control Weather
desc:
You must be outdoors to cast this spell, and it ends early if you don't have a clear path to the sky.

Until the spell ends, you change the weather conditions in the area from what is normal for the current climate and season. Choose to increase or decrease each weather condition (precipitation, temperature, and wind) up or down by one stage on the following tables. Whenever you change the wind, you can also change its direction. The new conditions take effect after 1d4 × 10 minutos, at which point you can change the conditions again. The weather gradually returns to normal when the spell ends.

name: Converse With Dragon
desc:
You gain limited telepatia, allowing you to communicate with any criatura within 120 pés of you that has the dragon type, regardless of the criatura’s languages. A dragon can choose to make a teste de resistência de Carisma to prevent telepathic contact with itself.

This spell doesn’t change a dragon’s disposition toward you or your aliados, it only opens a channel of communication. In some cases, unwanted telepathic contact can worsen the dragon’s attitude toward you.

name: Convey Inner Peace
desc: You imbue yourself and up to five willing criaturas within range with the ability to enter a meditative trance like an elf. Once before the spell ends, an affected criatura can complete a descanso longo in 4 horas, meditating as an elf does while in trance. After resting in this way, cada criatura gains the same benefit it would normally gain from 8 horas of rest.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Sorceror, Warlock, Wizard

name: Corpse Explosion
desc: A corpse explodes in a poisonous cloud. cada criatura in a 10-pé radius of the corpse deve fazer a teste de resistência de Constituição. A criatura recebe 3d6 dano de trovão and is envenenado for 1 minuto em uma falha no teste, or it recebe half as much damage and is not envenenado on a successful one. A envenenado criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect for itself em um sucesso.
higher_level: You alvo an additional corpse for every 2 slot levels above 1st.

name: Cosmic Alignment
desc: Deep Magic: illumination You arrange the forces of the cosmos to your benefit. Choose a cosmic event from the Comprehension of the Starry Sky ability that affects spellcasting (conjunction, eclipse, or nova; listed after the spell). You cast spells as if under the effect of the cosmic event until the next sunrise or 24 horas have passed. When the ability requires you to expend your Intuição, you expend your ritual focus instead. This spell must be cast outdoors, and the casting of this spell is obvious to everyone within 100 milhas of its casting when an appropriate symbol, such as a flaming comet, appears in the sky above your location while you are casting the spell. Conjunction: Planetary conjunctions destabilize minds and emotions. You can give uma criatura you can see desvantagem on a teste de resistência against one enchantment or illusion spell cast by you. Eclipse: Eclipses plunge the world into darkness and strengthen connections to the shadow plane. When you cast a spell of 5th level or lower that causes dano necrótico, you can reroll a number of damage dice up to your Inteligência modifier (minimum of one). You must use the new rolls. Nova: The nova is a powerful aid to divination spells. You can treat one divination spell you cast as though you had used a espaço de magia one level higher than the slot actually used.

name: Costly Victory
desc:
You select up to ten inimigos you can see that are within range. Each alvo deve fazer a teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em uma falha no teste, that criatura is cursed to burst into flame if it reduces one of your aliados to 0 pontos de vida before this spell’s duration expires. The affected criatura recebe 6d8 dano de fogo and 6d8 dano radiante when it bursts into flame.

If the affected criatura is wearing flammable material (or is made of flammable material, such as a plant criatura), it catches on fogo and continues burning; the criatura recebe dano de fogo equal to your spellcasting ability modifier no final de cada um de seus turnos until the criatura or one of its aliados within 5 pés of it uses an action to extinguish the fogo.

name: Counterspell
desc: Você tenta to interrupt uma criatura in the process of casting a magia. If a criatura is casting a magia of 3rd level or lower, its magia fails and has no effect. If it is casting a magia of 4th level or higher, make uma verificação de ability using your conjuração ability. The DC equals 10 + the magia's level. On a success, a criatura's magia fails and has no effect.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 4° nível ou superior, the interrupted magia has no effect if its level is less than or equal to the level of the espaços de magia you used.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when you see a creature within 60 feet of you casting a spell

name: Counterspell
desc:
You attempt to interrupt a criatura in the process of casting a spell. If the criatura is casting a spell of 2nd-level or lower, its spell fails and has no effect.

If it is casting a spell of 3rd-level or higher, make an teste de habilidade using your spellcasting ability (CD 10 + the spell's level). em um sucesso, the criatura's spell fails and has no effect, but the criatura can use its reação to reshape the fraying magic and cast another spell with the same casting time as the original spell.

This new spell must be cast at a espaço de magia level equal to or less than half the original espaço de magia.
higher_level: The interrupted spell has no effect if its level is less than the level of the espaço de magia used to cast this spell, or if both spells use the same level espaço de magia an opposed spellcasting teste de habilidade is made.

name: Create Food and Water
desc: você cria 20 kg of food and 30 gallons of water on the ground or in containers dentro do alcance, enough to sustain up to fifteen humanoide or five steeds por 24 horas. The food is bland but nourishing, and spoils if uneaten after 24 hours. The water is clean and doesn't go bad.

name: Create Food and Water
desc: Your magic turns one serving of food or water into 3 Supply. The food is nourishing but bland, and the water is clean. After 24 horas uneaten food spoils and water affected or created by this spell goes bad.
higher_level: You create an additional 2 Supply for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Create Ring Servant
desc:
You touch two metal rings and infuse them with life, creating a short-lived but sentient construct known as a [ring servant](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/ring-servant). The ring servant appears adjacent to you. It reverts form, changing back into the rings used to cast the spell, when it drops to 0 pontos de vida or when the spell ends.

The ring servant is friendly to you and your companions for the duration. Roll initiative for the ring servant, which acts on its own turns. It obeys any verbal commands that you issue to it (no action required by you). If you don’t issue any commands to the ring servant, it defends itself and you from hostile criaturas but otherwise recebe no actions.
material: two metal rings

name: Create Thunderstaff
desc:
After you cast **create thunderstaff** on a normal quarterstaff, the staff must then be mounted in a noisy location, such as a busy marketplace, and left there for 60 dias. During that time, the staff gradually absorbs ambient sound.

After 60 dias, the staff is fully charged and can’t absorb any more sound. At that point, it becomes a **thunderstaff**, a +1 quarterstaff that has 10 charges. When you hit on a ataque corpo a corpo with the staff and expend 1 charge, the alvo recebe an extra 1d8 dano de trovão. You can cast a [thunderwave](https://api.open5e.com/spells/thunderwave) spell from the staff as a ação bônus by expending 2 charges. The staff cannot be recharged.

If the final charge is not expended within 60 dias, the staff becomes não mágico again.
material: a quarterstaff

name: Create Undead
desc: você pode conjurar esta magia only at night. Escolha up to three cadáver of Medium or Small humanoide dentro do alcance. Each cadáver becomes a ghoul under your control. (The DM has game statistics for these criatura.) As a ação bônus on cada um de seus turnos, você pode mentally command any criatura you animated with this magia if a criatura is a até 36 metros de you (if you control multiple criatura, você pode command any or all of them at the same time, issuing the same command to each one). You decide what ação a criatura will take and where it will move during its next turn, or você pode issue a general command, such as to guard a particular chamber or corridor. If you issue no commands, a criatura only defends itself against criaturas hostis. Once given an order, a criatura continues to follow it until its task is complete. a criatura is under your control por 24 horas, after which it stops obeying any command você tem given it. To maintain control of a criatura for another 24 hours, você deve conjurar esta magia on a criatura before the current 24-hour period ends. This use of the magia reasserts your control over up to three criatura você tem animated with this magia, rather than animating new ones.
higher_level: quando você conjura esta magia using a 7th-level espaços de magia, você pode animate or reassert control over four ghouls. quando você conjura esta magia using an 8th-level espaços de magia, você pode animate or reassert control over five ghouls or two ghasts or wights. quando você conjura esta magia using a 9th-level espaços de magia, você pode animate or reassert control over six ghouls, three ghasts or wights, or two mummies.
material: One clay pot filled with grave dirt, one clay pot filled with brackish water, and one 150 gp black onyx stone for each cadáver.

name: Create Undead
desc:
This spell cannot be cast in sunlight. You reanimate the alvos as undead and transform them into ghouls under your control.

While it is within 120 pés you can use a ação bônus to mentally command the undead. When you command multiple undead using this spell, you must give them all the same command. You may decide the action the undead recebe and where it moves during its next turn, or you can issue a general command, such as guarding an area. If not given a command, the undead only defends itself. The undead continues to follow a command until its task is complete.

The undead is under your control for 24 horas, after which it stops obeying any commands. You must cast this spell on the undead before the spell ends to maintain control of it for another 24 horas. Casting the spell in this way reasserts control over up to 3 undead you have animated with this spell, rather than animating a new one.
higher_level: You create or reassert control over one additional ghoul for each slot level above 6th. Alternatively, when using an 8th-level espaço de magia you create or reassert control over 2 ghasts or wights, or when using a 9th-level espaço de magia you create or reassert control over 3 ghasts or wights, or 2 mummies. When commanding more than 3 undead they make group attack rolls (see page 454 in Chapter 8: Combat).

name: Create or Destroy Water
desc:
You either create or destroy water.

**Create Water.** você cria up to 10 gallons of clean water dentro do alcance in an open container. Alternatively, the water falls as rain in a 9 metros cubo dentro do alcance

 **Destroy Water.** You destroy up to 10 gallons of water in an open container dentro do alcance. Alternatively, you destroy fog in a 9 metros cubo dentro do alcance.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 2° nível ou superior, você cria or destroy 10 additional gallons of water, or the size of the cubo increases by 1.5 metros, for each nível do espaço above 1st.
material: A drop of water if creating water, or a few grains of sand if destroying it.

name: Create or Destroy Water
desc:
Choose one of the following.

* **Create Water:** You fill the alvo with up to 10 gallons of nonpotable water or 1 Supply of clean water. Alternatively, the water falls as rain that extinguishes exposed flames in the area.
* **Destroy Water:** You destroy up to 10 gallons of water in the alvo. Alternatively, you destroy fog in the area.
higher_level: For each slot level above 1st, you either create or destroy 10 additional gallons of water, or the size of the cube increases by 5 pés.

name: Creation
desc:
You pull wisps of sombra material from the Shadowfell to create a nonliving objeto of vegetable matter within 'range': soft goods, rope, wood, or something similar. você pode also use this magia to create mineral objeto such as stone, cristal, or metal. The objeto created must be no larger than a 1.5 metros cubo, and the objeto must be of a form and material that você tem seen before. a duração depends on the objeto's material. If the objeto is composed of multiple materials, use the shortest duration

 **Vegetable matter** 1 day **Stone or cristal** 12 hours **Precious metals** 1 hour **gema** 10 minutes **Adamantine or mithral** 1 minute Using any material created by this magia as another magia's material componente causes that magia to fail.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 6° nível ou superior, the cubo increases by 1.5 metros for each nível do espaço above 5th.
material: A tiny piece of matter of the same type of the item you plan to create.

name: Creation
desc:
You weave raw magic into a mundane physical object no larger than a 5-pé cube. The object must be of a form and material you have seen before. Using the object as a componente material for another spell causes that spell to fail.

The spell's duration is determined by the object's material. An object composed of multiple materials uses the shortest duration.
higher_level: The size of the cube increases by 5 pés for each slot level above 5th.

name: Creeping Ice
desc:
You create a sheet of ice that covers a 5-pé square within range and lasts for the spell’s duration. The iced area is difficult terrain.

A criatura in the area where you cast the spell deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Força ou ficar imobilizado by ice that rapidly encases it. A criatura imobilizado by the ice recebe 2d6 dano de frio no início de its turn. A imobilizado criatura can use an action to make a teste de Força against your CD de resistência à magia, freeing itself em um sucesso, but it has desvantagem on this check. The criatura can also be freed (and the spell ended) by dealing at least 20 damage to the ice. The imobilizado criatura recebe half o dano from any attacks against the ice.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th to 6th level, the area increases to a 10-pé square, the ice causa 4d6 dano de frio, and 40 damage is needed to melt each 5-pé square. When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 7th level or higher, the area increases to a 20-pé square, the ice causa 6d6 dano de frio, and 60 damage is needed to melt each 5-pé square.

name: Crown of Thorns
desc: You create a psíquico binding on the mind of a criatura within range. Until this spell ends, the criatura deve fazer a teste de resistência de Carisma each time it casts a spell. em uma falha no teste, it recebe 2d6 dano psíquico, and it fails to cast the spell. It doesn't expend a espaço de magia if it fails to cast the spell.

name: Cruor of Visions
desc: You prick your finger with a bone needle as you cast this spell, taking 1 dano necrótico. This drop of blood must be caught in a container such as a platter or a bowl, where it grows into a pool 1 pé in diameter. This pool acts as a crystal ball for the purpose of scrying. If you place a drop (or dried flakes) of another criatura's blood in the cruor of visions, the criatura has desvantagem on any teste de resistência de Sabedoria to resist scrying. Additionally, you can treat the pool of blood as a crystal ball of telepatia (see the crystal ball description in the Fifth Edition rules). I When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 7th level or higher, the pool of blood acts as either a crystal ball of mind reading or a crystal ball of true seeing (your choice when the spell is cast).

name: Crushing Curse
desc: You speak a word of Void Speech. Choose a criatura you can see within range. If the alvo can hear you, it deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou receber 1d6 dano psíquico and be surdo for 1 minuto, except that it can still hear Void Speech. A criatura surdo in this way can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect em um sucesso.
higher_level: This spell’s damage increases by 1d6 when you alcance 5th level (2d6), 11th level (3d6), and 17th level (4d6).

name: Crushing Haymaker
desc: Your fist reverberates with destructive energy, and woe betide whatever it strikes. As part of casting the spell, make a melee ataque mágico against a criatura or object within 5 pés. If you hit, the alvo of your attack recebe 7d6 dano de trovão, and deve fazer a teste de resistência de Constituição ou ficar knocked prostrado and atordoado até o final de seu próximo turno. This spell's damage is doubled against objects and structures.
higher_level: The spell causa an extra 1d6 of dano de trovão for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Crushing Trample
desc:
Upon casting this spell, you are filled with a desire to overrun your foes. You immediately move up to twice your Deslocamento in a straight line, trampling every foe in your path that is of your size category or smaller. If you try to move through the space of an inimigo whose size is larger than yours, your movement (and the spell) ends. Each inimigo whose space you move through deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Força ou ficar knocked prostrado and take 4d6 dano contundente. If you have hooves, add your Força modifier (minimum of +1) to o dano.

You move through the spaces of foes whether or not they succeed on their Força saving throws. You do not provoke opportunity attacks while moving under the effect of **crushing trample**.

name: Cure Beast
desc: A beast of your choice that you can see within range regains a number of pontos de vida equal to 1d6 + your spellcasting modifier.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 2nd level or higher, the healing increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Cure Wounds
desc: uma criatura Você toca regains a number of pontos de vida igual a 1d8 + your modificador de conjuração. This magia has no effect on morto-vivo or constructo.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 2° nível ou superior, the healing increases by 1d8 for each nível do espaço above 1st.

name: Cure Wounds
desc: The alvo regains pontos de vida equal to 1d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier.
higher_level: The pontos de vida regained increase by 1d8 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Curse Ring
desc: You lay a curse upon a ring you touch that isn’t being worn or carried. When you cast this spell, select one of the possible effects of [bestow curse](https://api.open5e.com/spells/bestow-curse). The next criatura that willingly wears the ring suffers the chosen effect with no teste de resistência. The curse transfers from the ring to the wearer once the ring is put on; the ring becomes a mundane ring that can be taken off, but the curse remains on the criatura that wore the ring until the curse is removed or dispelled. An [identify](https://api.open5e.com/spells/identify) spell cast on the cursed ring reveals the fact that it is cursed.
material: 250 gp worth of diamond dust, which the spell consumes

name: Curse of Boreas
desc: You designate a criatura within range that you can see. If the alvo fails a teste de resistência de Carisma, it and its equipment are frozen solid, becoming an inert statue of ice. The criatura is effectively paralisado, but mental activity does not cease, and signs of life are detectable; the criatura still breathes and its heart continues to beat, though both acts are almost imperceptible. If the ice statue is broken or damaged while frozen, the criatura will have matching damage or injury when returned to its original state. [Dispel magic](https://api.open5e.com/spells/dispel-magic) can’t end this spell, but it can allow the alvo to speak (but not move or cast spells) for a number of rodadas equal to the espaço de magia used. [Greater restoration](https://api.open5e.com/spells/greater-restoration) or more potent magic is needed to free a criatura from the ice.

name: Curse of Dust
desc: You cast a curse on a criatura within range that you’re familiar with, causing it to be unsatiated by food no matter how much it eats. This effect isn’t merely an issue of Percepção; the alvo physically can’t draw sustenance from food. Within minutos after the spell is cast, the alvo feels constant hunger no matter how much food it consumes. The alvo deve fazer a teste de resistência de Constituição 24 horas after the spell is cast and every 24 horas thereafter. em uma falha no teste, the alvo gains one level of exaustão. The effect ends when the duration expires or when the alvo makes two consecutive successful saves.
material: a piece of spoiled food

name: Curse of Formlessness
desc: A criatura you touch deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Constituição ou ficar cursed with a shifting, amorphous form. Spells that change the alvo criatura's shape (such as polymorph) do not end the curse, but they do hold the criatura in a stable form, temporarily mitigating it until the end of that particular spell's duration; shapechange and stoneskin have similar effects. While under the effect of the curse of formlessness, the alvo criatura is resistant to cortante and dano perfurante and ignores the additional damage done by critical hits, but it can neither hold nor use any item, nor can it cast spells or activate magic items. Its movement is halved, and winged flight becomes impossible. Any armor, clothing, helmet, or ring becomes useless. Large items that are carried or worn, such as armor, backpacks, or clothing, become hindrances, so the alvo has desvantagem on Destreza checks and saving throws while such items are in place. A criatura under the effect of a curse of formlessness can try to hold itself together through força of will. The afflicted criatura uses its action to repeat the teste de resistência; if it succeeds, the afflicted criatura negates the penalties from the spell until the start of its next turn.

name: Curse of Incompetence
desc:
By making mocking gestures toward uma criatura within
range that can see you, you leave the criatura incapable of
performing at its best. If the alvo fails on an Inteligência
teste de resistência, roll a d4 and refer to the following table to
determine what the alvo does on its turn. An affected
alvo repeats the teste de resistência no final de each of its
turns, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso or applying
the result of another roll on the table em uma falha.

| D4 | RESULT |
|---|---|
| 1 | alvo spends its turn shouting mocking words at caster and recebe a -5 penalty to its initiative roll. |
| 2 | alvo stands transfixed and blinking, recebe no action. |
| 3 | alvo flees or fights (50 percent chance of each). |
| 4 | alvo charges directly at caster, enraged. |

name: Curse of Yig
desc:
This spell transforms a Small, Medium, or Large criatura that you can see within range into a [servant of Yig](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/servant-of-yig). An unwilling criatura can attempt a teste de resistência de Sabedoria, negating the effect with a success. A willing criatura is automatically affected and remains so for as long as you maintain Concentração on the spell.

The transformation lasts for the duration or until the alvo drops to 0 pontos de vida or dies. The alvo’s statistics, including mental ability scores, are replaced by the statistics of a servant of Yig. The transformed criatura’s alignment becomes neutral evil, and it is both friendly to you and reverent toward the Father of Serpents. Its equipment is unchanged. If the transformed criatura was unwilling, it makes a teste de resistência de Sabedoria no final de cada um de seus turnos. em um sucesso no teste, the spell ends, the criatura’s alignment and personality return to normal, and it regains its former attitude toward you and toward Yig.

When it reverts to its normal form, the criatura has the number of pontos de vida it had before it transformed. If it reverts as a result of dropping to 0 pontos de vida, any excess damage carries over to its normal form.
material: a drop of snake venom
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Curse of the Grave
desc:
You tap your connection to death to curse a humanoid, making the grim pull of the grave stronger on that criatura’s soul.

Choose one humanoid you can see within range. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Constituição or become cursed. A [remove curse](https://api.open5e.com/spells/remove-curse) spell or similar magic ends this curse. While cursed in this way, the alvo suffers the following effects:

* The alvo fails death saving throws on any roll but a 20.
* If the alvo dies while cursed, it rises 1 rodada later as a vampire spawn under your control and is no longer cursed.
* The alvo, as a vampire spawn, seeks you out in an attempt to serve its new master. You can have only one vampire spawn under your control at a time through this spell. If you create another, the existing one turns to dust. If you or your companions do anything harmful to the alvo, it can make a teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em um sucesso, it is no longer under your control.
material: a pinch of dirt from a freshly dug grave

name: Cursed Gift
desc: **Cursed gift** imbues an object with a harmful mágico effect that you or another criatura in physical contact with you is currently suffering from. If you give this object to a criatura that freely accepts it during the duration of the spell, the recipient deve fazer a teste de resistência de Carisma. em uma falha no teste, the harmful effect is transferred to the recipient for the duration of the spell (or until the effect ends). Returning the object to you, destroying it, or giving it to someone else has no effect. Remove curse and comparable magic can relieve the individual who received the item, but the harmful effect still returns to the previous victim when this spell ends if the effect’s duration has not expired.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 5th level or higher, the duration increases by 24 horas for each slot level above 4th.
material: an object worth at least 75 gp

name: Cynophobia
desc: Choose a criatura that you can see within range. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Sabedoria or develop an overriding fear of canids, such as dogs, wolves, foxes, and worgs. For the duration, the first time the alvo sees a canid, the alvo deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Sabedoria or become amedrontado of that canid até o final de seu próximo turno. Each time the alvo sees a different canid, it deve fazer the teste de resistência. In addition, the alvo has desvantagem on ability checks and attack rolls while a canid is within 10 pés of it.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a 5th-level espaço de magia, the duration is 24 horas. When you use a 7th-level espaço de magia, the duration is 1 month. When you use a espaço de magia of 8th or 9th level, the spell lasts until it is dispelled.
material: a dog’s tooth

name: Daggerhawk
desc: When **daggerhawk** is cast on a não mágico dagger, a ghostly hawk appears around the weapon. The hawk and dagger fly into the air and make a ataque corpo a corpo against uma criatura you select within 60 pés, using your ataque mágico modifier and dealing dano perfurante equal to 1d4 + your Inteligência modifier on a hit. On your subsequent turns, you can use an action to cause the daggerhawk to attack the same alvo. The daggerhawk has AC 14 and, although it’s invulnerable to all damage, a successful attack against it that causa contundente, força, or dano cortante sends the daggerhawk tumbling, so it can’t attack again until after your next turn.
material: a dagger

name: Damaging Intel
desc: You study a criatura you can see within range, learning its weaknesses. The criatura deve fazer a teste de resistência de Carisma. If it fails, you learn its damage vulnerabilities, damage resistances, and damage immunities, and the next attack one of your aliados in range makes against the alvo before the end of your next turn has vantagem.

name: Dancing Lights
desc: você cria up to four torch-sized lights dentro do alcance, making them appear as torches, lanterns, or brilhante orbs that hover in the air for a duração. você pode also combine the four lights into one brilhante vaguely humanoide form of Medium size. Whichever form você escolhe, each light sheds luz fraca in a 3 metros raio. As a ação bônus on your turn, você pode move the lights up to 18 metros to a new spot dentro do alcance. A light must be a até 6 metros de another light created by this magia, and a light winks out if it exceeds the alcance da magia.
material: A bit of phosphorus or wychwood, or a glowworm.

name: Dancing Lights
desc:
You create up to four hovering lights which appear as torches, lanterns, or glowing orbs that can be combined into a glowing Medium-sized humanoid form. Each sheds dim leve in a 10-pé radius.

You can use a ação bônus to move the lights up to 60 pés so long as each remains within 20 pés of another leve created by this spell. A dancing leve winks out when it exceeds the spell's range.

name: Dark Dementing
desc: A dark shadow creeps across the alvo’s mind and leaves a small bit of shadow essence behind, triggering a profound fear of the dark. A criatura you designate within range deve fazer a teste de resistência de Carisma. If it fails, the alvo becomes amedrontado of you for the duration. A amedrontado criatura can repeat the teste de resistência each time it recebe damage, ending the effect em um sucesso. While amedrontado in this way, the criatura will not willingly enter or attack into a space that isn’t brightly lit. If it’s in dim leve or darkness, the criatura must either move toward bright leve or create its own (by lighting a lantern, casting a [leve](https://api.open5e.com/spells/leve) spell, or the like).
material: a moonstone

name: Dark Heraldry
desc:
Dark entities herald your entry into combat, instilling an existential dread in your inimigos. Designate a number of criaturas up to your spellcasting ability modifier (minimum of one) that you can see within range and that have an alignment different from yours. Each of those criaturas recebe 5d8 dano psíquico and becomes amedrontado of you; a criatura that makes a successful teste de resistência de Sabedoria recebe half as much damage and is not amedrontado.

A criatura amedrontado in this way repeats the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso. The criatura makes this teste de resistência with desvantagem if you can see it.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, you can alvo one additional criatura for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Dark Maw
desc:
Thick, penumbral ichor drips from your shadow-stained mouth, filling your mouth with Gigante shadow fangs. Make a melee ataque mágico against the alvo. On a hit, the alvo recebe 1d8 dano necrótico as your shadowy fangs sink into it. If you have a bite attack (such as from a racial trait or a spell like [alter self](https://api.open5e.com/spells/after-self)), you can add your spellcasting ability modifier to the jogada de dano but not to your temporary pontos de vida.

If you hit a humanoid alvo, you gain 1d4 temporary pontos de vida until the start of your next turn.
higher_level: This spell’s damage increases by 1d8 when you alcance 5th level (2d8), 11th level (3d8), and 17th level (4d8).

name: Dark Path
desc: You conjure a shadowy road between two points within range to create a bridge or path. This effect can bridge a chasm or create a smooth path through difficult terrain. The dark path is 10 pés wide and up to 50 pés long. It can support up to 500 pounds of weight at one time. A criatura that adds more weight than the path can support sinks through the path as if it didn’t exist.
material: a lodestone

name: Darkbolt
desc: You utter a quick invocation to create a black nimbus around your hand, then hurl three rays of darkness at one or more alvos in range. The rays can be divided between alvos however you like. Make a ranged ataque mágico for each alvo (not each ray); each ray that hits causa 1d10 dano de frio. A alvo that was hit by one or more rays deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Constituição ou ficar unable to use reactions until the start of its next turn.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, you create one additional ray for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Darklight
desc: You create an enchanted flame that surrounds your hand and produces no heat, but sheds bright leve in a 20-pé radius around you and dim leve for an additional 20 pés. Only you and up to 6 criaturas of your choice can see this leve.

name: Darkness
desc: mágico escuridão spreads from a point você escolhe dentro do alcance to fill a 4.5 metros esfera for a duração. The escuridão spreads around corners. uma criatura with visão no escuro can't ver através de this escuridão, and não mágico light can't illuminate it. If the point você escolhe is on an objeto Você está holding or one that isn't being worn or carried, the escuridão emanates from the objeto and moves with it. Completely covering the source of the escuridão with an opaque objeto, such as a bowl or a helm, blocks the escuridão. se houver of this magia's área overlaps with an área of light created by a magia of 2nd level or lower, the magia that created the light is dissipar.
material: Bat fur and a drop of pitch or piece of coal.

name: Darkness
desc:
mágico darkness heavily obscures visão no escuro and blocks não mágico leve in the area. The darkness spreads around corners. If any of the area overlaps with mágico leve created by a spell of 2nd-level or lower, the spell that created the leve is dispelled.

When cast on an object that is in your possession or unattended, the darkness emanates from it and moves with it. Completely covering the object with something that is not transparent blocks the darkness.

name: Darkvision
desc: Você toca a criatura voluntária to grant it the ability to see in the dark. For a duração, that criatura has visão no escuro out to a range of 18 metros.
material: Either a pinch of dried carrot or an agate.

name: Darkvision
desc: The alvo gains visão no escuro out to a range of 60 pés.
higher_level: The range of the alvo's visão no escuro increases to 120 pés. In addition, for each slot level above 3rd you may choose an additional alvo.

name: Daylight
desc: A 18 metros esfera of light spreads out from a point você escolhe dentro do alcance. The esfera is luz intensa and sheds luz fraca for an additional 18 metros. If you chose a point on an objeto Você está holding or one that isn't being worn or carried, the light shines from the objeto and moves with it. Completely covering the affected objeto with an opaque objeto, such as a bowl or a helm, blocks the light. se houver of this magia's área overlaps with an área of escuridão created by a magia of 3rd level or lower, the magia that created the escuridão is dissipar.

name: Daylight
desc:
mágico leve fills the area. The area is brightly lit and sheds dim leve for an additional 60 pés. If any of the area overlaps with mágico darkness created by a spell of 3rd-level or lower, the spell that created the darkness is dispelled.

When cast on an object that is in your possession or unattended, the leve shines from it and moves with it. Completely covering the object with something that is not transparent blocks the leve.

name: Dead Walking
desc: As part of the casting of this spell, you place a copper piece under your tongue. This spell makes up to six willing criaturas you can see within range invisível to undead for the duration. Anything a alvo is wearing or carrying is invisível as long as it is on the alvo's person. The spell ends for all alvos if um alvo attacks or casts a spell.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a 3rd-level espaço de magia, it lasts for 1 hora without requiring your Concentração. When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, the duration increases by 1 hora for each slot level above 3rd.
material: a copper piece

name: Deadly Salvo
desc: When you cast this spell, the munição flies from your hand with a loud bang, targeting up to five criaturas or objects you can see within range. You can launch the bullets at um alvo or several. Make a ranged ataque mágico for each bullet. On a hit, the alvo recebe 3d6 dano perfurante. This damage can experience a burst, as described in the gunpowder weapon property (see the Adventuring Gear chapter), but this spell counts as a single effect for the purposes of determining how many times o dano can burst, regardless of the number of alvos affected.

name: Deadly Sting
desc: You grow a 10-pé-long tail as supple as a whip, tipped with a horrible stinger. During the spell’s duration, you can use the stinger to make a melee ataque mágico with a alcance of 10 pés. On a hit, the alvo recebe 1d4 dano perfurante plus 4d10 dano de veneno, and a criatura deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Constituição or become vulnerable to dano de veneno for the duration of the spell.
material: a thorn

name: Deadweight
desc:
The alvo object's weight is greatly increased. Any criatura holding the object deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Força or drop it. A criatura which doesn't drop the object has desvantagem on attack rolls until the start of your next turn as it figures out the object's new balance.

criaturas that attempt to push, drag, or lift the object deve ter sucesso em a teste de Força against your CD de resistência à magia to do so.

name: Death God’s Touch
desc: This spell allows you to shred the life força of a criatura you touch. You become invisível and make a melee ataque mágico against the alvo. On a hit, the alvo recebe 10d10 dano necrótico. If this damage reduces the alvo to 0 pontos de vida, the alvo dies. Whether the attack hits or misses, you remain invisível until the start of your next turn.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 8th level or higher, o dano increases by 2d10 for each slot level above 7th.

name: Death Ward
desc: Você toca uma criatura and grant it a measure of protection from morte. The first time o alvo would drop to 0 pontos de vida Como resultado of taking dano, o alvo Em vez disso drops to 1 ponto de vida, and a magia termina. If the magia is still in effect when o alvo is subjected to an effect that would matar it instantaneously without dealing dano, that effect is Em vez disso negated against o alvo, and a magia termina.

name: Death Ward
desc: The first time damage would reduce the alvo to 0 pontos de vida, it instead drops to 1 ponto de vida. If the alvo is subjected to an effect that would kill it instantaneously without dealing damage, that effect is negated. The spell ends immediately after either of these conditions occur.

name: Decay
desc: Make a melee ataque mágico against a criatura you touch. On a hit, the alvo recebe 1d10 dano necrótico. If the alvo is a Tiny or Small não mágico object that isn’t being worn or carried by a criatura, it automatically recebe maximum damage from the spell.
higher_level: This spell's damage increases by 1d10 when you alcance 5th level (2d10), 11th level (3d10), and 17th level (4d10).
material: a handful of ash

name: Decelerate
desc: You slow the flow of time around a criatura within range that you can see. The criatura deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Sabedoria, or its andando Deslocamento is halved (rodada up to the nearest 5-pé increment). The criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect em um sucesso. Until the spell ends, em uma falha no teste the alvo’s Deslocamento is halved again no início de each of your turns. For example, if a criatura with a Deslocamento of 30 pés fails its initial teste de resistência, its Deslocamento drops to 15 pés. no início de your next turn, the criatura’s Deslocamento drops to 10 pés em uma falha no teste, then to 5 pés on the following rodada on another failed save. **Decelerate** can’t reduce a criatura’s Deslocamento to less than 5 pés.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, you can affect an additional criatura for each slot level above 2nd.
material: a toy top
dnd_class: Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Deep Breath
desc: The recipient of this spell can breathe and function normally in thin atmosphere, suffering no ill effect at altitudes of up to 20,000 pés. If more than uma criatura is touched during the casting, the duration is divided evenly among todas as criaturas touched.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 2nd level or higher, the duration increases by 2 horas for each slot level above 1st.

name: Defile Healing
desc: You attempt to reverse the energy of a healing spell so that it causa damage instead of healing. If the healing spell is being cast with a espaço de magia of 5th level or lower, the slot is expended but the spell restores no pontos de vida. In addition, cada criatura that was targeted by the healing spell recebe dano necrótico equal to the healing it would have received, or half as much damage with a successful teste de resistência de Constituição.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 8th level, it can reverse a healing spell being cast using a espaço de magia of 6th level or lower. If you use a 9th-level espaço de magia, it can reverse a healing spell being cast using a espaço de magia of 7th level or lower.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when you see a creature cast a healing spell

name: Delay Passing
desc: You draw forth the ebbing life força of a criatura and question it. Upon casting this spell, you must touch a criatura that dropped to 0 pontos de vida since your last turn. If it fails a teste de resistência de Sabedoria, you temporarily prevent its spirit from passing into the next realm. You are able to hear the spirit, though the spirit doesn't appear to any criatura without the ability to see invisível criaturas. The spirit communicates directly with your psyche and cannot see or hear anything but what you tell it. You can ask the spirit a number of questions equal to your proficiência bonus. Questions must be asked directly; a delay of more than 10 seconds between the spirit answering one question and you asking another allows the spirit to escape into the afterlife. The corpse's knowledge is limited to what it knew during life, including the languages it spoke. The spirit cannot lie to you, but it can refuse to answer a question that would harm its living family or friends, or truthfully answer that it doesn't know. Once the spirit answers your allotment of questions, it passes on.

name: Delay Potion
desc:
Upon casting this spell, you delay the next potion you consume from taking effect for up to 1 hora. You must consume the potion within 1 rodada of casting **delay potion**; otherwise the spell has no effect. At any point during **delay potion’s** duration, you can use a ação bônus to cause the potion to go into effect. When the potion is activated, it works as if you had just drunk it. While the potion is delayed, it has no effect at all and you can consume and benefit from other potions normally.

You can delay only one potion at a time. If you try to delay the effect of a second potion, the spell fails, the first potion has no effect, and the second potion has its normal effect when you drink it.

name: Delayed Blast Fireball
desc: A beam of yellow light flashes from your pointing finger, then condenses to linger at a chosen point dentro do alcance as a brilhante bead for a duração. When a magia termina, either because your concentração is broken or because you decide to end it, the bead blossoms with a low roar into an explosão of flame that spreads around corners. cada criatura in a 6 metros esfera centered on that point deve fazer um teste de resistência de Destreza. uma criatura takes dano de fogo equal to the total accumulated dano em uma falha no teste, or half as much dano on a successful one. The magia's base dano is 12d6. If no final do seu turno the bead has not yet detonated, the dano increases by 1d6. If the brilhante bead is touched before the interval has expired, a criatura touching it deve fazer um teste de resistência de Destreza. em uma falha no teste, a magia termina immediately, causing the bead to erupt in flame. em um sucesso no teste, a criatura can throw the bead up to 12 metros. When it strikes uma criatura or a solid objeto, a magia termina, and the bead explodes. The fire damages objeto in the área and ignites flammable objeto that aren't being worn or carried.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 8° nível ou superior, the base dano increases by 1d6 for each nível do espaço above 7th.
material: A tiny ball of bat guano and sulfur.

name: Delayed Blast Fireball
desc:
A glowing bead of yellow leve flies from your finger and lingers at a point at the center of the area until you end the spell—either because your Concentração is broken or because you choose to end it—and the bead detonates. cada criatura in the area recebe 12d6 dano de fogo. If no final de your turn the bead has not yet detonated, o dano increases by 1d6.

If touched before the spell ends, the criatura touching the bead makes a teste de resistência de Destreza or the bead detonates. em um sucesso no teste, the criatura can use an action to throw the bead up to 40 pés, moving the area with it. If the bead strikes a criatura or solid object, the bead detonates.

The fogo spreads around corners, and it damages and ignites any flammable unattended objects in the area.
higher_level: o dano increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 7th.

name: Delayed Healing
desc: Touch a living criatura (not a construct or undead) as you cast the spell. The next time that criatura recebe damage, it immediately regains pontos de vida equal to 1d4 + your spellcasting ability modifier (minimum of 1).
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, the healing increases by 1d4 for each slot level above 3rd.
material: a bloodstone worth 100 gp, which the spell consumes

name: Demiplane
desc: você cria a shadowy door on a flat solid superfície that você pode ver dentro do alcance. The door is large enough to allow Medium criatura to pass through unhindered. When opened, the door leads to a demiplane that appears to be an empty room 9 metros in each dimension, made of wood or stone. When a magia termina, the door disappears, and any criatura or objeto inside the demiplane remain trapped there, as the door also disappears from the other side. Each time Você conjura esta magia, você pode create a new demiplane, or have the shadowy door connect to a demiplane you created with a previous casting of this magia. Additionally, if Você sabe the nature and contents of a demiplane created by a casting of this magia by another criatura, você pode have the shadowy door connect to its demiplane Em vez disso.

name: Demiplane
desc:
You create a shadowy door on the alvo. The door is large enough for Medium criaturas to pass through. The door leads to a demiplane that appears as an empty, 30-pé-cube chamber made of wood or stone. When the spell ends, the door disappears from both sides, trapping any criaturas or objects inside the demiplane.

Each time you cast this spell, you can either create a new demiplane, conjure the door to a demiplane you have previously created, or make a door leading to a demiplane whose Natureza or contents you are familiar with.

name: Demon Within
desc:
One humanoid of your choice within range becomes a gateway for a demon to enter the plane of existence you are on. You choose the demon’s type from among those of challenge rating of 4 or lower. The alvo deve fazer a teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em um sucesso, the gateway fails to open, and the spell has no effect. em uma falha no teste, the alvo recebe 4d6 dano de força from the demon’s attempt to claw its way through the gate. For the spell’s duration, you can use a ação bônus to further agitate the demon, dealing an additional 2d6 dano de força to the alvo each time.

If the alvo drops to 0 pontos de vida while affected by this spell, the demon tears through the body and appears in the same space as its now incapacitado or dead victim. You do not control this demon; it is free to either attack or leave the area as it chooses. The demon disappears after 24 horas or when it drops to 0 pontos de vida.
material: a vial of blood from a humanoid killed within the previous 24 horas

name: Desiccating Breath
desc: You spew forth a cloud of black dust that draws all moisture from a 30-pé cone. Each animal in the cone recebe 4d10 dano necrótico, or half as much damage if it makes a successful teste de resistência de Constituição. o dano is 6d10 for plants and plant criaturas, also halved on a successful teste de resistência de Constituição.
material: a clump of dried clay

name: Desolation
desc:
You plant an obsidian acorn in solid ground and spend an hora chanting a litany of curses to the natural world, after which the land within 1 milha of the acorn becomes infertile, regardless of its previous state. Nothing will grow there, and all plant life in the area dies over the course of a dia. Plant criaturas are not affected. Spells that summon plants, such as [entangle](https://api.open5e.com/spells/entangle), require an teste de habilidade using the caster’s spellcasting ability against your CD de resistência à magia. On a successful check, the spell functions normally; if the check fails, the spell is countered by **desolation**.

After one year, the land slowly reverts to its normal fertility, unable to stave off the march of Natureza.

A living criatura that finishes a descanso curto within the area of a **desolation** spell halves the result of any Hit Dice it expends. Desolation counters the effects of a [bloom](https://api.open5e.com/spells/bloom) spell.

***ritual Focus.*** If you expend your ritual focus, the duration becomes permanent.
material: an obsidian acorn worth 500 gp, which is consumed in the casting

name: Destructive Resonance
desc: You shout a scathing string of Void Speech that assaults the minds of those before you. cada criatura in a 15-pé cone that can hear you recebe 4d6 dano psíquico, or half that damage with a successful teste de resistência de Sabedoria. A criatura damaged by this spell can’t take reactions until the start of its next turn.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, o dano increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Detect Dragons
desc: You can detect the presence of dragons and other Dracônico criaturas within your line of sight and 120 pés, regardless of disguises, illusions, and alteration magic such as polymorph. The information you uncover depends on the number of consecutive rodadas you spend an action studying a subject or area. On the first rodada of examination, you detect whether any Dracônico criaturas are present, but not their number, location, identity, or type. On the second rodada, you learn the number of such criaturas as well as the general condition of the most powerful one. On the third and subsequent rodadas, you make a CD 15 Inteligência (Arcanismo) check; if it succeeds, you learn the age, type, and location of one Dracônico criatura. Note that the spell provides no information on the turn in which it is cast, unless you have the means to take a second action that turn.

name: Detect Evil and Good
desc: For a duração, Você sabe if there is an aberração, celestial, elemental, fada, demônio, or morto-vivo a até 9 metros de you, também as where a criatura is located. Similarly, Você sabe if there is a place or objeto a até 9 metros de you that has been magically consecrated or desecrated. The magia can penetrate most barriers, but it is blocked by 0 metros of stone, 1 inch of common metal, a thin sheet of lead, or 1.5 metros of wood or dirt.

name: Detect Evil and Good
desc:
You attempt to sense the presence of otherworldly forces. You automatically know if there is a place or object within range that has been magically consecrated or desecrated. In addition, on the rodada you cast it and as an action on subsequent turns until the spell ends, you may make a Sabedoria (Religião) check against the passive Enganação score of any aberration, Celestial, elemental, fey, fiend, or undead criatura within range. em um sucesso, you sense the criatura's presence, as well as where the criatura is located.

The spell penetrates most barriers but is blocked by 3 pés of wood or dirt, 1 pé of stone, 1 inch of Comum metal, or a thin sheet of lead.

name: Detect Magic
desc: For a duração, you sense the presence of magia a até 9 metros de you. If you sense magia in this way, você pode use your ação to see a faint aura around any visible criatura or objeto in the área that bears magia, and Você aprende its school of magia, se houver. The magia can penetrate most barriers, but it is blocked by 0 metros of stone, 1 inch of common metal, a thin sheet of lead, or 1.5 metros of wood or dirt.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Ritual Caster, Sorcerer, Wizard

name: Detect Magic
desc:
Until the spell ends, you automatically sense the presence of magic within range, and you can use an action to study the aura of a magic effect to learn its schools of magic (if any).

The spell penetrates most barriers but is blocked by 3 pés of wood or dirt, 1 pé of stone, 1 inch of Comum metal, or a thin sheet of lead.
higher_level: When using a 2nd-level espaço de magia or higher, the spell no longer requires your Concentração. When using a 3rd-level espaço de magia or higher, the duration increases to 1 hora. When using a 4th-level espaço de magia or higher, the duration increases to 8 horas.
dnd_class: Artificer, Bard, Cleric, Druid, Herald, Sorcerer, Wizard

name: Detect Poison and Disease
desc: For a duração, você pode sense the presence and location of poisons, venenoso criatura, and diseases a até 9 metros de you. You also identify the kind of poison, venenoso criatura, or disease in each case. The magia can penetrate most barriers, but it is blocked by 0 metros of stone, 1 inch of common metal, a thin sheet of lead, or 1.5 metros of wood or dirt.
material: A yew leaf.
dnd_class: Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Ritual Caster

name: Detect Poison and Disease
desc:
