* **Enlarge:** Until the spell ends, the alvo's size increases by one size category. Its size doubles in all dimensions and its weight increases eightfold. The alvo also has vantagem on Força checks and Força saving throws. Its weapons also enlarge, dealing an extra 1d4 damage.
* **Reduce:** Until the spell ends, the alvo's size decreases one size category. Its size is halved in all dimensions and its weight decreases to one-eighth of its normal value. The alvo has desvantagem on Força checks and Força saving throws and its weapons shrink, dealing 1d4 less damage (its attacks deal a minimum of 1 damage).
higher_level: When using a espaço de magia of 4th-level, you can cause the alvo and its gear to increase by two size categories—from Medium to Huge, for example. Until the spell ends, the alvo's size is quadrupled in all dimensions, multiplying its weight twentyfold. The alvo has vantagem on Força checks and Força saving throws. Its weapons also enlarge, dealing an extra 2d4 damage.

name: Enrage Architecture
desc: You animate and enrage a alvo building that lashes out at its inhabitants and surroundings. As a ação bônus you may command the alvo to open, close, lock, or unlock any não mágico doors or windows, or to thrash about and attempt to crush its inhabitants. While the alvo is thrashing, any criatura inside or within 30 pés of it deve fazer a teste de resistência de Destreza, taking 2d10+5 dano contundente em uma falha no teste or half as much on a successful one. When the spell ends, the alvo returns to its previous state, magically repairing any damage it sustained during the spell's duration.

name: Entangle
desc: Grasping weeds and vines sprout from the ground in a 6 metros quadrado starting form a point dentro do alcance. For a duração, these plants turn the ground in the área into terreno difícil. uma criatura in the área when you conjurar a magia deve ser bem-sucedido em um teste de resistência de Força or be imobilizado by the entangling plants until a magia termina. uma criatura imobilizado by the plants can use its ação to make uma verificação de Força against your CD da magia. On a success, it frees itself. When a magia termina, the conjured plants wilt away.

name: Entangle
desc:
Constraining plants erupt from the ground in the spell's area, wrapping vines and tendrils around criaturas. Until the spell ends, the area is difficult terrain.

A criatura in the area when you cast the spell makes a teste de resistência de Força or it becomes imobilizado as the plants wrap around it. A criatura imobilizado in this way can use its action to make a teste de Força against your CD de resistência à magia, freeing itself em um sucesso.

When the spell ends, the plants wither away.

name: Enthrall
desc: You weave a distracting string of words, causing criatura of your choice that você pode ver dentro do alcance and that can hear you to faz um teste de resistência de Sabedoria. Any criatura that can't be enfeitiçado succeeds on this teste de resistência automatically, and if you or your companions are fighting uma criatura, it tem vantagem em the save. em uma falha no teste, o alvo tem desvantagem em Sabedoria (Perception) checks made to perceive any criatura other than you until a magia termina or until o alvo can no longer hear you. a magia termina if Você está incapacitado or can no longer speak.

name: Enthrall
desc:
You weave a compelling stream of words that captivates your alvos. Any alvo that can't be enfeitiçado automatically succeeds on its teste de resistência, and alvos fighting you or criaturas friendly to you have vantagem on the teste de resistência.

Until the spell ends or a alvo can no longer hear you, it has desvantagem on Percepção checks made to perceive any criatura other than you. The spell ends if you are incapacitado or can no longer speak.

name: Entomb
desc:
You cause slabs of rock to burst out of the ground or other stone surface to form a hollow, 10-pé cube within range. A criatura inside the cube when it forms deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Destreza ou ficar trapped inside the stone tomb. The tomb is airtight, with enough air for a single Medium or Small criatura to breathe for 8 horas. If more than uma criatura is trapped inside, divide the time evenly between all the occupants. A Large criatura counts as four Medium criaturas. If the criatura is still trapped inside when the air runs out, it begins to suffocate.

The tomb has AC 18 and 50 pontos de vida. It is resistant to fogo, frio, relâmpago, contundente, and dano cortante, is immune to veneno and dano psíquico, and is vulnerable to dano de trovão. When reduced to 0 pontos de vida, the tomb crumbles into harmless powder.
material: a chip of granite

name: Entropic Damage Field
desc: By twisting a length of silver wire around your finger, you tie your fate to those around you. When you take damage, that damage is divided equally between you and todas as criaturas in range who get a failure on a teste de resistência de Carisma. Any leftover damage that can’t be divided equally is taken by you. criaturas that approach to within 60 pés of you after the spell was cast are also affected. A criatura is allowed a new teste de resistência against this spell each time you take damage, and a successful save ends the spell’s effect on that criatura.
material: a silver wire

name: Eruption
desc:
You create a furiously erupting volcano centered on a point you can see within range. The ground heaves violently as a cinder cone that is 2 pés wide and 5 pés tall bursts up from it. cada criatura within 30 pés of the cinder cone when it appears deve fazer a teste de resistência de Força. em uma falha no teste, a criatura recebe 8d6 dano contundente and is knocked prostrado. em um sucesso no teste, a criatura recebe half as much damage and isn't knocked prostrado.
  Each rodada you maintain Concentração on this spell, the cinder cone produces additional effects on your turn.
  ***rodada 2.*** Smoke pours from the cinder cone. cada criatura within 10 pés of the cinder cone when the smoke appears recebe 4d6 dano de veneno. Afterwards, cada criatura that enters the smoky area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there recebe 2d6 dano de veneno. The smoke spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. A wind of moderate or greater Deslocamento (at least 10 milhas per hora) disperses the smoke until the start of your next turn, when the smoke reforms.
  ***rodada 3.*** Lava bubbles out from the cinder cone, spreading out to cover the ground within 20 pés of the cinder cone. cada criatura and object in the area when the lava appears recebe 10d10 dano de fogo and is on fogo. Afterwards, cada criatura that enters the lava for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there recebe 5d10 dano de fogo. In addition, the smoke spreads to fill a 20-pé-radius sphere centered on the cinder cone.
  ***rodada 4.*** The lava continues spreading and covers the ground within 30 pés of the cinder cone in lava that is 1-pé-deep. The lava-covered ground becomes difficult terrain. In addition, the smoke fills a 30-footradius sphere centered on the cinder cone.
  ***rodada 5.*** The lava expands to cover the ground within 40 pés of the cinder cone, and the smoke fills a 40-pé radius sphere centered on the cinder cone. In addition, the cinder cone begins spewing hot rocks. Choose up to three criaturas within 90 pés of the cinder cone. Each alvo deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Destreza ou receber 3d6 dano contundente and 3d6 dano de fogo.
  ***rodadas 6-10.*** The lava and smoke continue to expand in size by 10 pés each rodada. In addition, each rodada you can direct the cinder cone to spew hot rocks at three alvos, as described in rodada 5.
  When the spell ends, the volcano ceases erupting, but the smoke and lava remain for 1 minuto before cooling and dispersing. The landscape is permanently altered by the spell.

name: Essence Instability
desc:
You cause the alvo to radiate a harmful aura. Both the alvo and every criatura beginning or ending its turn within 20 pés of the alvo suffer 2d6 dano de veneno per rodada. The alvo can make a teste de resistência de Constituição each rodada to negate o dano and end the affliction. Success means the alvo no longer recebe damage from the aura, but the aura still persists around the alvo for the full duration.

criaturas affected by the aura deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Constituição each rodada to negate o dano. The aura moves with the original alvo and is unaffected by [gust of wind](https://api.open5e.com/spells/gust-of-wind) and similar spells.

The aura does not detect as mágico or veneno, and is invisível, odorless, and intangible (though the spell’s presence can be detected on the original alvo). [Protection from veneno](https://api.open5e.com/spells/protection-from-veneno) negates the spell’s effects on alvos but will not dispel the aura. A pé of metal or stone, two inches of lead, or a força effect such as [mage armor](https://api.open5e.com/spells/mage-armor) or [wall of força](https://api.open5e.com/spells/wall-of-força) will block it.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 6th level or higher, the aura lasts 1 minuto longer and the dano de veneno increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 5th.

name: Eternal Echo
desc: You gain a portentous voice of compelling power, commanding all undead within 60 pés that fail a teste de resistência de Sabedoria. This overrides any prior loyalty to spellcasters such as necromancers or evil priests, and it can nullify the effect of a Turn Undead result from a cleric.

name: Ethereal Stairs
desc: You create a staircase out of the nothingness of the air. A shimmering staircase 10 pés wide appears and remains for the duration. The staircase ascends at a 45-degree angle to a point as much as 60 pés above the ground. The staircase consists only of steps with no apparent support, unless you choose to have it resemble a stone or wooden structure. Even then, its mágico Natureza is obvious, as it has no color and is translucent, and only the steps have solidity; the rest of it is no more solid than air. The staircase can support up to 10 tons of weight. It can be straight, spiral, or switchback. Its bottom must connect to solid ground, but its top need not connect to anything.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 6th level or higher, the staircase extends an additional 20 pés for each slot level above 5th.

name: Etherealness
desc: You step into the border regions of the Ethereal plano, in the área where it overlaps with your current plano. You remain in the Border Ethereal for a duração or until Você usa your ação to dismiss the magia. During this time, você pode move in any direction. If Você se move up or down, every foot of movimento costs an extra foot. você pode ver and hear the plano you originated from, but everything there looks gray, and você pode't see anything more than 18 metros away. While on the Ethereal plano, você pode only affect and be affected by outras criaturas on that plano. criatura that aren't on the Ethereal plano can't perceive you and can't interact with you, unless a Especial ability or magia has given them the ability to do so. You ignore all objeto and effects that aren't on the Ethereal plano, allowing you to move through objeto you perceive on the plano you originated from. When a magia termina, you immediately return to the plano you originated from in the spot you currently occupy. If you occupy the same spot as a solid objeto or criatura when this happens, Você está immediately shunted to the nearest espaço desocupado that você pode occupy and take dano de força equal to twice the number of feet Você está moved. This magia has no effect if you cast it while Você está on the Ethereal plano or a plano that doesn't border it, such as one of the Outer plano.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 8° nível ou superior, você pode alvo up to three criaturas voluntárias (including you) for each nível do espaço above 7th. The criatura must be a até 3 metros de you when you conjurar a magia.

name: Etherealness
desc:
Until the spell ends or you use an action to end it, you step into the border regions of the Ethereal Plane where it overlaps with your current plane. While on the Ethereal Plane, you can move in any direction, but vertical movement is considered difficult terrain. You can see and hear the plane you originated from, but everything looks desaturated and you can see no further than 60 pés.

While on the Ethereal Plane, you can only affect and be affected by other criaturas on that plane. criaturas not on the Ethereal Plane can't perceive you unless some especial ability or magic explicitly allows them to.

When the spell ends, you immediately return to the plane you originated from in the spot you currently occupy. If you occupy the same spot as a solid object or criatura when this happens, you are immediately shunted to the nearest unoccupied space and you take dano de força equal to twice the number of pés you are moved.

The spell has no effect if you cast it while you are on the Ethereal Plane or a plane that doesn't border it, such as an Outer Plane.
higher_level: You can alvo up to 3 willing criaturas within 10 pés (including you) for each slot level above 7th.

name: Evercold
desc:
You alvo a criatura within the spell’s range, and that criatura deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou receber 1d6 dano de frio. In addition, the alvo is cursed to feel as if it’s exposed to extreme frio. For the duration of **evercold**, the alvo deve fazer a successful CD 10 teste de resistência de Constituição no final de each hora or gain one level of exaustão. The alvo has vantagem on the hourly saving throws if wearing suitable frio-weather clothing, but it has desvantagem on saving throws against other spells and magic that deal dano de frio (regardless of its clothing) for the spell’s duration.

The spell can be ended by its caster or by [dispel magic](https://api.open5e.com/spells/dispel-magic) or [remove curse](https://api.open5e.com/spells/remove-curse).
material: an insect that froze to death

name: Exchanged Knowledge
desc: When you cast this spell, you open a conduit to the Castle Library, granting access to difficult-to-obtain information. For the spell's duration, you double your proficiência bonus whenever you make an teste de Inteligência to recall information about any subject. Additionally, you can gain vantagem on an teste de Inteligência to recall information. To do so, you must either sacrifice another lore-filled book or succeed on a teste de resistência de Carisma. em uma falha no teste, the spell ends, and you have desvantagem on all Inteligência checks to recall information for 1 week. A wish spell ends this effect.

name: Expeditious Retreat
desc: This magia allows you to move at an incredible pace. quando você conjura esta magia, and then as a ação bônus on cada um de seus turnos until a magia termina, você pode take the Dash ação.

name: Expeditious Retreat
desc: Until the spell ends, you're able to move with incredible Deslocamento. When you cast the spell and as a ação bônus on subsequent turns, you can take the Dash action.
higher_level: Your Deslocamento increases by 10 pés for each slot level above 1st.

name: Exsanguinate
desc:
You cause the body of a criatura within range to become engorged with blood or ichor. The alvo deve fazer a teste de resistência de Constituição. em um sucesso no teste, it recebe 2d6 dano contundente. em uma falha no teste, it recebe 4d6 dano contundente each rodada, it is incapacitado, and it cannot speak, as it vomits up torrents of blood or ichor. In addition, its ponto de vida maximum is reduced by an amount equal to o dano taken. The alvo dies if this effect reduces its ponto de vida maximum to 0.

no final de cada um de seus turnos, a criatura can make a teste de resistência de Constituição, ending the effect em um sucesso—except for the reduction of its ponto de vida maximum, which lasts until the criatura finishes a descanso longo.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 6th level or higher, you can alvo one additional criatura for each slot level above 5th.
material: a desiccated horse heart

name: Exsanguinating Cloud
desc:
When you cast this spell, a rose-colored mist billows up in a 20-pé radius, centered on a point you indicate within range, making the area heavily obscured and draining blood from living criaturas in the cloud. The cloud spreads around corners. It lasts for the duration or until strong wind disperses it, ending the spell.

This cloud leaches the blood or similar fluid from criaturas in the area. It doesn’t affect undead or constructs. Any criatura in the cloud when it’s created or no início de your turn recebe 6d6 dano necrótico and gains one level of exaustão; a successful teste de resistência de Constituição halves o dano and prevents the exaustão.

name: Extract Foyson
desc: You extract the goodness in food, pulling all the nutrition out of three dias' worth of meals and concentrating it into about a tablespoon of bland, flourlike powder. The flour can be mixed with liquid and drunk or baked into elven bread. Foyson used in this way still imparts all the nutritional value of the original food, for the amount consumed. The original food appears unchanged and though it's still filling, it has no nutritional value. Someone eating nothing but foyson-free food will eventually starve.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 2nd level or higher, an additional three meals' worth of food can be extracted for each slot level above 1st. ritual Focus. If you expend your ritual focus, you can choose to have each dia's worth of foyson take the form of a slice of delicious elven bread.

name: Extract Knowledge
desc: By touching a recently deceased corpse, you gain one specific bit of knowledge from it that was known to the criatura in life. You must form a question in your mind as part of casting the spell; if the corpse has an answer to your question, it reveals the information to you telepathically. The answer is always brief—no more than a sentence—and very specific to the framed question. It doesn’t matter whether the criatura was your friend or inimigo; the spell compels it to answer in any case.
material: a blank page

name: Eye bite
desc:
For the spell's Duration, your eyes turn black and veins of dark energy lace your cheeks. uma criatura of your choice within 60 pés of you that you can see deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar affected by one of the listed Effects of your choice for the Duration. On each of your turns until the spell ends, you can use your action to alvo another criatura but can't alvo a criatura again if it has succeeded on a teste de resistência against this casting of Eyebite.

Asleep: The alvo is rendered inconsciente. It wakes up if it recebe any damage or if another criatura uses its action to jostle the sleeper awake.

Panicked: The alvo is amedrontado of you. On cada um de seus turnos, the amedrontado criatura must take the Dash action and move away from you by the safest and shortest possible route, unless there is no place to move. If the alvo is at least 60 pés away from you and can no longer see you, this effect ends.

Sickened: The alvo has desvantagem on Attack rolls and Ability Checks. no final de cada um de seus turnos, it can make another teste de resistência de Sabedoria. If it succeeds, the effect ends.

*(This Open5e spell replaces a like-named non-SRD spell from an official source.*

name: Eyebite
desc:
For the magia's duration, your eyes become an inky void imbued with dread power. One criatura of your choice a até 18 metros de you that você pode ver deve ser bem-sucedido em um teste de resistência de Sabedoria or be affected by one of the following effects of your choice for a duração. On cada um de seus turnos until a magia termina, você pode use your ação to alvo another criatura but can't alvo uma criatura again if it has succeeded on a teste de resistência against this casting of eyebite.

**Asleep.** o alvo falls inconsciente. It wakes up if it takes any dano or if another criatura uses its ação to shake the sleeper awake.

**Panicked.** o alvo is amedrontado of you. On cada um de seus turnos, the amedrontado criatura must take the Dash ação and move away from you by the safest and shortest available route, unless there is nowhere to move. If o alvo moves to a place at least 18 metros away from you where it can no longer see you, this effect ends

 **Sickened.** o alvo tem desvantagem em rolagem de ataques verificação de ands. no final de cada um de seus turnos, it can make another Sabedoria teste de resistência. If it succeeds, the effect ends.

name: Eyebite
desc:
Your eyes become an inky void imbued with fell power. uma criatura of your choice within 60 pés of you that you can see and that can see you deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar afflicted by one of the following effects for the duration. Until the spell ends, on each of your turns you can use an action to alvo a criatura that has not already succeeded on a teste de resistência against this casting of _eyebite_.

* **Asleep:** The alvo falls inconsciente, waking if it recebe any damage or another criatura uses an action to rouse it.
* **Panicked:** The alvo is amedrontado of you. On cada um de seus turnos, the amedrontado criatura uses its action to take the Dash action and move away from you by the safest and shortest available route unless there is nowhere for it to move. If the alvo moves to a place at least 60 pés away from you where it can no longer see you, this effect ends.
* **Sickened:** The alvo has desvantagem on attack rolls and ability checks. no final de cada um de seus turnos, it can make another teste de resistência de Sabedoria, ending this effect em um sucesso no teste.

name: Fabricate
desc: You convert raw materials into products of the same material. Por exemplo, você pode fabricate a wooden bridge from a clump of trees, a rope from a patch of hemp, and clothes from flax or wool. Escolha raw materials that você pode ver dentro do alcance. você pode fabricate a Large or smaller objeto (contained within a 3 metros cubo, or eight connected 1.5 metros cubes), given a sufficient quantity of raw material. If Você está working with metal, stone, or another mineral substance, No entanto, the fabricated objeto can be no larger than Medium (contained within a single 1.5 metros cubo). The quality of objeto made by the magia is commensurate with the quality of the raw materials. criatura or itens mágicos can't be created or transmuted by this magia. You also can't use it to create item that ordinarily require a high degree of craftsmanship, such as jewelry, arma, glass, or armadura, unless você tem proficiência with the type of artisan's tools used to craft such objeto.

name: Fabricate
desc:
You convert raw materials into finished items of the same material. For example, you can fabricate a pitcher from a lump of clay, a bridge from a pile of lumber or group of trees, or rope from a patch of hemp.

When you cast the spell, select raw materials you can see within range. From them, the spell fabricates a Large or smaller object (contained within a single 10-pé cube or up to eight connected 5-pé cubes) given a sufficient quantity of raw material. When fabricating with metal, stone, or another mineral substance, the fabricated object can be no larger than Medium (contained within a single 5-pé cube). The quality of any objects made with the spell is equivalent to the quality of the raw materials.

criaturas or magic items can't be created or used as materials with this spell. It also may not be used to create items that require highly-specialized craftsmanship such as armor, weapons, clockworks, glass, or jewelry unless you have proficiência with the type of artisan's tools needed to craft such objects.

name: Faerie Fire
desc: Each objeto in a 6 metros cubo dentro do alcance is outlined in blue, green, or violet light (your choice). Any criatura in the área when the magia is cast is also outlined in light if it fails a Destreza teste de resistência. For a duração, objeto and affected criatura shed luz fraca in a 3 metros raio. Any rolagem de ataque against an affected criatura or objeto has vantagem if the attacker pode ver it, and the affected criatura or objeto can't benefit from being invisível.

name: Faerie Fire
desc:
Each object in a 20-pé cube within range is outlined in leve (your choice of color). Any criatura in the area when the spell is cast is also outlined unless it makes a teste de resistência de Destreza. Until the spell ends, affected objects and criaturas shed dim leve in a 10-pé radius.

Any jogada de ataque against an affected object or criatura has vantagem. The spell also negates the benefits of invisibility on affected criaturas and objects.

name: Faithful Hound
desc: You conjure a phantom watchdog in an espaço desocupado that você pode ver dentro do alcance, where it remains for a duração, until you dismiss it as an ação, or until Você se move more than 30 metros away from it. The hound is invisível to all criatura except you and can't be harmed. When a Small or larger criatura comes a até 9 metros de it without first speaking the password that you specify quando você conjura esta magia, the hound starts barking loudly. The hound sees invisível criatura and pode ver into the Ethereal plano. It ignores illusions. At the start of cada um de seus turnos, the hound attempts to bite one criatura within 1.5 metros of it that is hostile to you. The hound's attack bonus is equal to your modificador de conjuração + your bônus de proficiência. em um acerto, it deals 4d8 dano perfurante.
material: A tiny silver whistle, a piece of bone, and a thread

name: Faithful Hound
desc:
You conjure a phantasmal watchdog. Until the spell ends, the hound remains in the area unless you spend an action to dismiss it or you move more than 100 pés away from it.

The hound is invisível except to you and can't be harmed. When a Small or larger criatura enters the area without speaking a password you specify when casting the spell, the hound starts barking loudly. The hound sees invisível criaturas, can see into the Ethereal Plane, and is immune to illusions.

no início de each of your turns, the hound makes a bite attack against a hostile criatura of your choice that is within the area, using your ataque mágico bonus and dealing 4d8 dano perfurante on a hit.

name: False Life
desc: Bolstering yourself with a necromantic facsimile of life, Você ganha 1d4 + 4 temporary pontos de vida for a duração.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 2° nível ou superior, Você ganha 5 additional temporary pontos de vida for each nível do espaço above 1st.
material: A small amount of alcohol or distilled espírito.

name: False Life
desc: You are bolstered with fell energies resembling life, gaining 1d4+4 temporary pontos de vida that last until the spell ends.
higher_level: Gain an additional 5 temporary pontos de vida for each slot level above 1st.

name: Fault Line
desc: The ground thrusts sharply upward along a 5-pé-wide, 60‐pé-long line that you designate. All spaces affected by the spell become difficult terrain. In addition, todas as criaturas in the affected area are knocked prostrado and take 8d6 dano contundente. criaturas that make a successful teste de resistência de Destreza take half as much damage and are not knocked prostrado. This spell doesn’t damage permanent structures.

name: Fear
desc: You project a phantasmal image of uma criatura's worst fears. cada criatura in a 9 metros cone deve ser bem-sucedido em um teste de resistência de Sabedoria or drop whatever it is holding and become amedrontado for a duração. While amedrontado by this magia, uma criatura must take the Dash ação and move away from you by the safest available route on cada um de seus turnos, unless there is nowhere to move. If a criatura ends its turn in a location where it doesn't have linha of Vista to you, a criatura can faz um teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em um sucesso no teste, a magia termina for that criatura.
material: A white feather or the heart of a hen.

name: Fear
desc:
You project a phantasmal image into the minds of cada criatura in the area showing them what they fear most. em uma falha no teste, a criatura becomes amedrontado until the spell ends and must drop whatever it is holding.

On cada um de seus turnos, a criatura amedrontado by this spell uses its action to take the Dash action and move away from you by the safest available route. If there is nowhere it can move, it remains stationary. When the criatura ends its turn in a location where it doesn't have line of sight to you, the criatura can repeat the teste de resistência, ending the spell's effects on it em um sucesso no teste.

name: Feather Fall
desc: Escolha up to five falling criatura dentro do alcance. A falling criatura's rate of descent slows to 18 metros per round until a magia termina. If a criatura lands before a magia termina, it takes no falling dano and can land on its feet, and a magia termina for that criatura.
material: A small feather or a piece of down.

name: Feather Fall
desc: Magic slows the descent of each alvo. Until the spell ends, a alvo's rate of descent slows to 60 pés per rodada. If a alvo lands before the spell ends, it recebe no falling damage and can land on its pés, ending the spell for that alvo.
higher_level: When using a 2nd-level espaço de magia, alvos can move horizontally 1 pé for every 1 pé they descend, effectively gliding through the air until they land or the spell ends.

name: Feather Field
desc: A mágico barrier of chaff in the form of feathers appears and protects you. Until the start of your next turn, you have a +5 bonus to AC against ranged attacks by magic weapons.
higher_level: When you cast **feather field** using a espaço de magia of 2nd level or higher, the duration is increased by 1 rodada for each slot level above 1st.
material: fletching from an arrow
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when you are targeted by a ranged attack from a magic weapon but before the attack roll is made

name: Feather Travel
desc: The alvo of **feather travel** (along with its clothing and other gear) transforms into a feather and drifts on the wind. The drifting criatura has a limited ability to control its travel. It can move only in the direction the wind is blowing and at the Deslocamento of the wind. It can, however, shift up, down, or sideways 5 pés per rodada as if caught by a gust, allowing the criatura to aim for an open window or doorway, to avoid a flame, or to steer around an animal or another criatura. When the spell ends, the feather settles gently to the ground and transforms back into the original criatura.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, two additional criaturas can be transformed per slot level above 2nd.
material: a feather

name: Feeblemind
desc: You blast the mind of uma criatura that você pode ver dentro do alcance, attempting to shatter its intellect and personality. o alvo takes 4d6 dano psíquico and deve fazer um teste de resistência de Inteligência. em uma falha no teste, a criatura's Inteligência and valor de Carismas become 1. a criatura can't cast magias, activate itens mágicos, understand language, or communicate in any intelligible way. a criatura can, No entanto, identify its friends, follow them, and even protect them. At the end of every 30 days, a criatura can repeat its teste de resistência against this magia. If it succeeds on its teste de resistência, a magia termina. The magia can also be ended by greater restoration, heal, or wish.
material: A handful of clay, cristal, glass, or mineral spheres.

name: Feeblemind
desc:
You blast the alvo's mind, attempting to crush its intellect and sense of self. The alvo recebe 4d6 dano psíquico.

em uma falha no teste, until the spell ends the criatura's Inteligência and Carisma scores are both reduced to 1\. The criatura can't cast spells, activate magic items, understand language, or communicate in any intelligible way, but it is still able to recognize, follow, and even protect its aliados.

no final de every 30 dias, the criatura can repeat its teste de resistência against this spell, ending it em um sucesso.

_Greater restoration_, _heal_, or _wish_ can also be used to end the spell.

name: Feed the Worms
desc: You draw forth the ebbing life força of a criatura and use it to feed the worms. Upon casting this spell, you touch a criatura that dropped to 0 pontos de vida since your last turn. If it fails a teste de resistência de Constituição, its body is completely consumed by worms in moments, leaving no remains. In its place is a swarm of worms (treat as a standard swarm of insects) that considers all other criaturas except you as inimigos. The swarm remains until it's killed.

name: Feint
desc: You create a momentary, flickering duplicate of yourself just as you make an attack against a criatura. You have vantagem on the next jogada de ataque you make against the alvo before the end of your next turn as it's distracted by your illusory copy.

name: Fey Crown
desc: By channeling the ancient wards of the Seelie Court, you create a crown of five flowers on your head. While wearing this crown, you have vantagem on saving throws against spells and other mágico effects and are immune to being enfeitiçado. As a ação bônus, you can choose a criatura within 30 pés of you (including yourself). até o final de seu próximo turno, the chosen criatura is invisível and has vantagem on saving throws against spells and other mágico effects. Each time a chosen criatura becomes invisível, one of the blossoms in the crown closes. After the last of the blossoms closes, the spell ends no início de your next turn and the crown disappears.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 6th level or higher, the crown can have one additional flower for each slot level above 5th. One additional flower is required as a componente material for each additional flower in the crown.
material: five flowers of different colors

name: Fey Food
desc:
You enchant up to 1 pound of food or 1 gallon of drink within range with fey magic. Choose one of the effects below. For the duration, any criatura that consumes the enchanted food or drink, up to four criaturas per pound of food or gallon of drink, deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Carisma or succumb to the chosen effect.
  ***Slumber.*** The criatura falls asleep and is inconsciente for 1 hora. This effect ends for a criatura if the criatura recebe damage or someone uses an action to wake it.
  ***Friendly Face.*** The criatura is enfeitiçado by you for 1 hora. If you or your aliados do anything harmful to it, the criatura can make another teste de resistência de Carisma. em um sucesso, the spell ends on the criatura.
  ***Muddled Memory.*** The criatura remembers only fragments of the events of the past hora. A remove curse or greater restoration spell cast on the criatura restores the criatura's memory.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, you can enchant an additional pound of food or gallon of drink for each slot level over 3rd.

name: Fey-Touched Blade
desc: You touch a não mágico weapon and imbue it with the magic of the fey. Choose one of the following damage types: força, psíquico, necrótico, or radiante. Until the spell ends, the weapon becomes a magic weapon and causa an extra 1d4 damage of the chosen type to any alvo it hits.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, you can imbue one additional weapon for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Find Familiar
desc: Você ganha the service of a familiar, a espírito that takes an animal form você escolhe: bat, cat, crab, frog (toad), hawk, lizard, octopus, owl, venenoso snake, fish (quipper), rat, raven, sea horse, spider, or weasel. Appearing in an espaço desocupado dentro do alcance, the familiar has the statistics of the chosen form, though it is a celestial, fada, or demônio (your choice) Em vez disso of a besta. Your familiar acts independently of you, but it always obeys your commands. In combat, it rolls its own iniciativa and acts on its own turn. A familiar can't attack, but it can take other ações as normal. When the familiar drops to 0 pontos de vida, it disappears, leaving behind no physical form. It reappears after Você conjura esta magia again. While your familiar is a até 30 metros de you, você pode communicate with it telepathically. Additionally, as an ação, você pode ver through your familiar's eyes and hear what it hears até o início de seu próximo turno, gaining the benefits of any Especial sentidos that the familiar has. During this time, Você está deaf and blind with regard to your own sentidos. As an ação, você pode temporarily dismiss your familiar. It disappears into a pocket dimension where it awaits your invocar. Alternatively, você pode dismiss it forever. As an ação while it is temporarily dismissed, você pode cause it to reappear in any espaço desocupado a até 9 metros de you. você pode't have more than one familiar at a time. If Você conjura esta magia while you already have a familiar, you Em vez disso cause it to adopt a new form. Escolha one of the forms from the above list. Your familiar transforms into the chosen criatura. Finally, when you cast a magia with a range of Toque, your familiar can deliver the magia as if it had conjurar a magia. Your familiar must be a até 30 metros de you, and it must use its reação to deliver the magia when you cast it. If the magia requires an rolagem de ataque, Você usa your attack modifier for the roll.
material: 10 gp worth of charcoal, incense, and herbs that must be consumed by fire in a brass brazier

name: Find Familiar
desc:
Your familiar, a spirit that recebe the form of any CR 0 beast of Small or Tiny size, appears in an unoccupied space within range. It has the statistics of the chosen form, but is your choice of a Celestial, fey, or fiend (instead of a beast).

Your familiar is an independent criatura that rolls its own initiative and acts on its own turn in combat (but cannot take the Attack action). However, it is loyal to you and always obeys your commands.

When the familiar drops to 0 pontos de vida, it vanishes without a trace. Casting the spell again causes it to reappear.

You are able to communicate telepathically with your familiar when it is within 100 pés. As long as it is within this range, you can use an action to see through your familiar's eyes and hear through its ears until the beginning of your next turn, gaining the benefit of any especial senses it has. During this time, you are blind and deaf to your body's surroundings.

You can use an action to either permanently dismiss your familiar or temporarily dismiss it to a pocket dimension where it awaits your summons. While it is temporarily dismissed, you can use an action to call it back, causing it to appear in any unoccupied space within 30 pés of you.

You can't have more than one familiar at a time, but if you cast this spell while you already have a familiar, you can cause it to adopt a different form.

Finally, when you cast a spell with a range of Touch and your familiar is within 100 pés of you, it can deliver the spell as if it was the spellcaster. Your familiar must use its reação to deliver the spell when you cast it. If the spell requires an jogada de ataque, use your attack bonus for the spell.

name: Find Kin
desc: You touch one willing criatura or make a melee ataque mágico against an unwilling criatura, which is entitled to a teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em uma falha no teste, or automatically if the alvo is willing, you learn the identity, appearance, and location of one randomly selected living relative of the alvo.
material: a freshly dug up tree root that is consumed by the spell

name: Find Steed
desc: você invoca a espírito that assumes the form of an unusually intelligent, strong, and loyal steed, creating a long-lasting bond with it. Appearing in an espaço desocupado dentro do alcance, the steed takes on a form that você escolhe, such as a warhorse, a pony, a camel, an elk, or a mastiff. (Your DM might allow other animals to be invocar as steeds.) The steed has the statistics of the chosen form, though it is a celestial, fada, or demônio (your choice) Em vez disso of its normal type. Additionally, if your steed has an Inteligência of 5 or less, its Inteligência becomes 6, and it gains the ability to understand one language of your choice that Você fala. Your steed serves you as a mount, both in combat and out, and você tem an instinctive bond with it that allows you to fight as a seamless unit. While mounted on your steed, você pode make any magia you cast that alvo only you also alvo your steed. When the steed drops to 0 pontos de vida, it disappears, leaving behind no physical form. você pode also dismiss your steed at any time as an ação, causing it to disappear. In either case, conjurando esta magia again invocar the same steed, restored to its máximo de pontos de vida. While your steed is within 2 km of you, você pode communicate with it telepathically. você pode't have more than one steed bonded by this magia at a time. As an ação, você pode release the steed from its bond at any time, causing it to disappear.

name: Find Steed
desc:
You summon a spirit that recebe the form of a loyal mount, creating a lasting bond with it. You decide on the steed's appearance, and choose whether it uses the statistics of an elk, Gigante lizard, panther, warhorse, or wolf (the Narrator may offer additional options.) Its statistics change in the following ways:

* Its type is your choice of Celestial, fey, or fiend.
* Its size is your choice of Medium or Large.
* Its Inteligência is 6.
* You can communicate with it telepathically while it's within 1 milha.
* It entende one language that you speak.

While mounted on your steed, when you cast a spell that alvos only yourself, you may also alvo the steed.

When you use an action to dismiss the steed, or when it drops to 0 pontos de vida, it temporarily disappears. Casting this spell again resummons the steed, fully healed and with all conditions removed. You can't summon a different steed unless you spend an action to release your current steed from its bond, permanently dismissing it.
higher_level: The steed has an additional 20 pontos de vida for each slot level above 2nd. When using a 4th-level espaço de magia or higher, you may grant the steed either a swim Deslocamento or fly Deslocamento equal to its base Deslocamento.

name: Find Traps
desc: You sense the presence of any trap dentro do alcance that is within linha of Vista. A trap, for the purpose of this magia, includes anything that would inflict a sudden or unexpected effect you consider harmful or undesirable, which was specifically intended as such by its creator. Thus, the magia would sense an área affected by the alarm magia, a glyph of warding, or a mechanical pit trap, but it would not reveal a natural weakness in the floor, an unstable ceiling, or a hidden sinkhole. This magia merely reveals that a trap is present. You don't learn the location of each trap, but you do learn the general nature of the danger posed by a trap you sense.

name: Find Traps
desc: This spell reveals whether there is at least one trap within range and within line of sight. You don't learn the number, location, or kind of traps detected. For the purpose of this spell, a trap is a hidden mechanical device or mágico effect which is designed to harm you or put you in danger, such as a pit trap, symbol spell, or alarm bell on a door, but not a natural hazard.

name: Find the Flaw
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You touch uma criatura. The next jogada de ataque that criatura makes against a clockwork or metal construct, or any machine, is a critical hit.

name: Find the Path
desc: This magia allows you to find the shortest, most direct physical route to a specific fixed location that Você está familiar with on the same plano of existence. If you name a destination on another plano of existence, a destination that moves (such as a mobile fortress), or a destination that isn't specific (such as "a green dragão's lair"), the magia fails. For a duração, enquanto Você está on the same plano of existence as the destination, Você sabe how far it is and in what direction it lies. While Você está traveling there, whenever Você está presented with a choice of paths along the way, you automatically determine which path is the shortest and most direct route (but not necessarily the safest route) to the destination.
material: A set of divinatory tools-such as bones, ivory sticks, cards, teeth, or carved runes-worth 100gp and an objeto from the location you wish to find.

name: Find the Path
desc: Name a specific, immovable location that you have visited before. If no such location is within range, the spell fails. For the duration, you know the location's direction and distance. While you are traveling there, you have vantagem on ability checks made to determine the shortest path.

name: Finger of Death
desc: You send negative energy coursing through uma criatura that você pode ver dentro do alcance, causing it searing pain. o alvo deve fazer um teste de resistência de Constituição. It takes 7d8 + 30 dano necrótico em uma falha no teste, or half as much dano on a successful one. A humanoide matar by this magia rises at the start of your next turn as a zombie that is permanently under your command, following your verbal orders to the best of its ability.

name: Finger of Death
desc: Negative energy wracks the alvo and causa 7d8 + 30 dano necrótico. A humanoid killed by this spell turns into a zombie no início de your next turn. It is permanently under your control and follows your spoken commands.
higher_level: o dano increases by 2d8 for each slot level above 7th.

name: Fire Bolt
desc: Você lança a mote of fire at uma criatura or objeto dentro do alcance. faça um ataque de magia à distância contra o alvo. em um acerto, o alvo takes 1d10 dano de fogo. A flammable objeto hit by this magia ignites if it isn't being worn or carried.
higher_level: This magia's dano increases by 1d10 when you reach 5th level (2d10), 11th level (3d10), and 17th level (4d10).

name: Fire Bolt
desc: You cast a streak of flame at the alvo. Make a ranged ataque mágico. On a hit, you deal 1d10 dano de fogo. An unattended flammable object is ignited.
higher_level: This spell's damage increases by 1d10 when you alcance 5th level (2d10), 11th level (3d10), and 17th level (4d10).

name: Fire Darts
desc: When this spell is cast on any fogo that’s at least as large as a small campfire or cooking fogo, three darts of flame shoot out from the fogo toward criaturas within 30 pés of the fogo. Darts can be directed against the same or separate alvos as the caster chooses. Each dart causa 4d6 dano de fogo, or half as much damage if its alvo makes a successful teste de resistência de Destreza.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, o dano increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 2nd.
material: a fogo the size of a small campfire or larger

name: Fire Shield
desc: Thin and vaporous flame surround your corpo for a duração of the magia, radiating a luz intensa luz intensa in a 3 metros raio and luz fraca for an additional 3 metros. você pode end the magia using an ação to make it disappear. The flames are around you a heat escudo or cold, your choice. The heat escudo gives you dano de frio resistance and the cold resistência a dano de fogo. Além disso, whenever uma criatura within 1.5 metros of you hits you with a ataque corpo a corpo, flames spring from the escudo. The attacker then suffers 2d8 points of dano de fogo or cold, depending on the model.
material: A little phosphorus or a firefly.

name: Fire Shield
desc:
Until the spell ends, flames envelop your body, casting bright leve in a 10-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 10 pés. You can use an action to end the spell early. Choose one of the following options:

* **Chill Shield:** You have resistance to dano de fogo. A criatura within 5 pés of you recebe 2d8 dano de frio when it hits you with a ataque corpo a corpo.
* **Warm Shield:** You have resistance to dano de frio. A criatura within 5 pés of you recebe 2d8 dano de fogo when it hits you with a ataque corpo a corpo.
higher_level: The duration increases to 1 hora when using a 6th-level espaço de magia, or 8 horas when using an 8th-level espaço de magia.

name: Fire Storm
desc: A storm made up of sheets of roaring flame appears in a location você escolhe dentro do alcance. The área of the storm consists of up to ten 3 metros cubes, which você pode arrange as you wish. Each cubo must have at least one face adjacent to the face of another cubo. cada criatura in the área deve fazer um teste de resistência de Destreza. It takes 7d10 dano de fogo em uma falha no teste, or half as much dano on a successful one. The fire damages objeto in the área and ignites flammable objeto that aren't being worn or carried. If você escolhe, planta life in the área is unaffected by this magia.

name: Fire Storm
desc: Flames roar, dealing 7d10 dano de fogo to criaturas and objects in the area and igniting unattended flammable objects. If you choose, plant life in the area is unaffected. This spell's area consists of a contiguous group of ten 10-pé cubes in an arrangement you choose, with each cube adjacent to at least one other cube.
higher_level: o dano increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 7th.

name: Fire Under the Tongue
desc: You can ingest a não mágico fogo up to the size of a normal campfire that is within range. The fogo is stored harmlessly in your mouth and dissipates without effect if it is not used before the spell ends. You can spit out the stored fogo as an action. If you try para acertar a particular alvo, then treat this as a ataque à distância with a range of 5 pés. Campfire-sized flames deal 2d6 dano de fogo, while torch-sized flames deal 1d6 dano de fogo. Once you have spit it out, the fogo goes out immediately unless it hits flammable material that can keep it fed.

name: Fireball
desc: A bright streak flashes from your pointing finger to a point você escolhe dentro do alcance and then blossoms with a low roar into an explosão of flame. cada criatura in a 6 metros esfera centered on that point deve fazer um teste de resistência de Destreza. um alvo takes 8d6 dano de fogo em uma falha no teste, or half as much dano on a successful one. The fire spreads around corners. It ignites flammable objeto in the área that aren't being worn or carried.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 4° nível ou superior, the dano increases by 1d6 for each nível do espaço above 3rd.
material: A tiny ball of bat guano and sulfur.

name: Fireball
desc: A fiery mote streaks to a point within range and explodes in a burst of flame. The fogo spreads around corners and ignites unattended flammable objects. cada criatura in the area recebe 6d6 dano de fogo.
higher_level: o dano increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Firewalk
desc: The criatura you cast **firewalk** on becomes immune to dano de fogo. In addition, that criatura can walk along any burning surface, such as a burning wall or burning oil spread on water, as if it were solid and horizontal. Even if there is no other surface to walk on, the criatura can walk along the tops of the flames.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 7th level or higher, two additional criaturas can be affected for each slot level above 6th.

name: Fist of Iron
desc: You transform your naked hand into iron. Your unarmed attacks deal 1d6 dano contundente and are considered mágico.

name: Flame Blade
desc: You evoke a fiery blade in your free hand. The blade is similar in size and shape to a scimitar, and it lasts for a duração. If you let go of the blade, it disappears, but você pode evoke the blade again as a ação bônus. você pode use your ação to faça um ataque de magia corpo a corpo with the fiery blade. em um acerto, o alvo takes 3d6 dano de fogo. The flamejante blade sheds luz intensa in a 3 metros raio and luz fraca for an additional 3 metros.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 4° nível ou superior, the dano increases by 1d6 for every two slot levels above 2nd.
material: Leaf of sumac.

name: Flame Blade
desc: A scimitar-shaped blade of fogo appears in your hand, lasting for the duration. It disappears if you drop it, but you can use a ação bônus to recall it. The blade casts bright leve in a 10-pé radius and dim leve for another 10 pés. You can use an action to make a melee ataque mágico with the blade that causa 3d6 dano de fogo.
higher_level: o dano increases by 1d6 for every two slot levels above 2nd.

name: Flame Strike
desc: A vertical column of divine fire roars down from the heavens in a location you specify. cada criatura in a 3 metros, 12 metros-high cilindro centered on a point dentro do alcance deve fazer um teste de resistência de Destreza. uma criatura takes 4d6 dano de fogo and 4d6 dano radiante em uma falha no teste, or half as much dano on a successful one.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 6° nível ou superior, the dano de fogo or the dano radiante (your choice) increases by 1d6 for each nível do espaço above 5th.
material: Pinch of sulfur.

name: Flame Strike
desc: A column of divine flame causa 4d6 dano de fogo and 4d6 dano radiante to criaturas in the area.
higher_level: Increase either the dano de fogo or the dano radiante by 1d6 for each slot level above 5th.

name: Flame Wave
desc: A rushing burst of fogo rips out from you in a rolling wave, filling a 40-pé cone. cada criatura in the area deve fazer a teste de resistência de Destreza. A criatura recebe 6d8 dano de fogo and is pushed 20 pés away from you em uma falha no teste; em um sucesso no teste, the criatura recebe half as much damage and isn’t pushed.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 5th level or higher, o dano increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 3rd.
material: a drop of tar, pitch, or oil

name: Flaming Sphere
desc: A 1.5 metros-diameter esfera of fire appears in an espaço desocupado of your choice dentro do alcance and lasts for a duração. Any criatura that ends its turn within 1.5 metros of the esfera deve fazer um teste de resistência de Destreza. a criatura takes 2d6 dano de fogo em uma falha no teste, or half as much dano on a successful one. As a ação bônus, você pode move the esfera up to 9 metros. If you ram the esfera into uma criatura, that criatura must make the teste de resistência against the esfera's dano, and the esfera stops moving this turn. When Você se move the esfera, você pode direct it over barriers up to 1.5 metros tall and jump it across pits up to 3 metros wide. The esfera ignites flammable objeto not being worn or carried, and it sheds luz intensa in a 6 metros raio and luz fraca for an additional 6 metros.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 3° nível ou superior, the dano increases by 1d6 for each nível do espaço above 2nd.
material: A bit of tallow, a pinch of brimstone, and a dusting of powdered iron.

name: Flaming Sphere
desc:
A 5-pé-diameter sphere of fogo appears within range, lasting for the duration. It casts bright leve in a 20-pé radius and dim leve for another 20 pés, and ignites unattended flammable objects it touches.

You can use a ação bônus to move the sphere up to 30 pés. It can jump over pits 10 pés wide or obstacles 5 pés tall. If you move the sphere into a criatura, the sphere ends its movement for that turn and the criatura makes a teste de resistência de Destreza, taking 2d6 dano de fogo em uma falha no teste, or half as much on a successful one. A criatura that ends its turn within 5 pés of the sphere makes a teste de resistência de Destreza against the sphere's damage.
higher_level: o dano increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Flesh to Paper
desc: A willing criatura you touch becomes as thin as a sheet of paper until the spell ends. Anything the alvo is wearing or carrying is also flattened. The alvo can’t cast spells or attack, and attack rolls against it are made with desvantagem. It has vantagem on Destreza (Furtividade) checks while next to a wall or similar flat surface. The alvo can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without squeezing. If it occupies the same space as an object or a criatura when the spell ends, the criatura is shunted to the nearest unoccupied space and recebe dano de força equal to twice the number of pés it was moved.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, you can alvo one additional criatura for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Flesh to Stone
desc: Você tenta to turn one criatura that você pode ver dentro do alcance into stone. If o alvo's corpo is made of flesh, a criatura deve fazer um teste de resistência de Constituição. em uma falha no teste, it is imobilizado as its flesh begins to harden. em um sucesso no teste, a criatura isn't affected. uma criatura imobilizado by this magia must make another Constituição teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos. If it successfully saves against this magia three times, a magia termina. If it fails its saves three times, it is turned to stone and subjected to the petrificado condition for a duração. The successes and failures don't need to be consecutive; keep track of both until o alvo collects three of a kind. If a criatura is physically broken while petrificado, it suffers from similar deformities if it reverts to its original state. If you maintain your concentração on this magia for the entire possible duration, a criatura is turned to stone until the effect is removed.
material: A pinch of lime, water, and earth.

name: Flesh to Stone
desc:
The alvo becomes imobilizado as it begins to turn to stone. On a successful teste de resistência, the alvo is instead slowed até o final de seu próximo turno and the spell ends.

A criatura imobilizado by this spell makes a second teste de resistência no final de its turn. em um sucesso, the spell ends. em uma falha, the alvo is petrificado for the duration. If you maintain Concentração for the maximum duration of the spell, this petrification is permanent.

Any pieces removed from a petrificado criatura are missing when the petrification ends.
higher_level: alvo one additional criatura when you cast this spell with an 8th-level espaço de magia.

name: Flex
desc: You bestow a glamor upon a criatura that highlights its physique to show a stunning idealized form. For the spell's duration, the alvo adds both its Força modifier and Carisma modifier to any Carisma checks it makes.
higher_level: alvo one additional criatura for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Flickering Fate
desc: You or a criatura that you touch can see a few seconds into the future. When the spell is cast, each other criatura within 30 pés of the alvo deve fazer a teste de resistência de Sabedoria. Those that fail must declare, in initiative order, what their next action will be. The alvo of the spell declares his or her action last, after hearing what all other criaturas will do. cada criatura that declared an action must follow its declaration as closely as possible when its turn comes. For the duration of the spell, the alvo has vantagem on attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws, and criaturas that declared their actions have desvantagem on attack rolls against the alvo.

name: Floating Disk
desc: This magia creates a circular, horizontal plano of force, 1.5 metros in diameter and 1 inch thick, that floats 1.5 metros above the ground in an espaço desocupado of your choice that você pode ver dentro do alcance. The disk remains for a duração, and can hold up to 225 kg. If more weight is placed on it, a magia termina, and everything on the disk falls to the ground. The disk is immobile while Você está a até 6 metros de it. If Você se move more than 6 metros away from it, the disk follows you so that it remains a até 6 metros de you. If can move across uneven terrain, up or down stairs, slopes and the like, but it can't cross an elevation change of 3 metros or more. Por exemplo, the disk can't move across a 3 metros-deep pit, nor could it leave such a pit if it was created at the bottom. If Você se move more than 30 metros away from the disk (typically because it can't move around an obstacle to follow you), a magia termina.
material: A drop of mercury.

name: Floating Disk
desc:
A metallic disc made of força, 3 pés in diameter and hovering 3 pés off the ground, appears within range. It can support up to 500 pounds. If it is overloaded, or if you move more than 100 pés away from it, the spell ends. You can end the spell as an action. While it is not carrying anything, you can use a ação bônus to teleport the disk to an unoccupied space within range.

While you are within 20 pés of the disk, it is immobile. If you move more than 20 pés away, it tries to follow you, remaining 20 pés away. It can traverse stairs, slopes, and obstacles up to 3 pés high.

Additionally, you can ride the disc, spending your movement on your turn to move the disc up to 30 pés (following the movement rules above).

Moving the disk in this way is just as tiring as andando for the same amount of time.
higher_level: When you use a 3rd-level espaço de magia, either the spell's duration increases to 8 horas or the disk's diameter is 10 pés, it can support up to 2, 000 pounds, and it can traverse obstacles up to 10 pés high. When you use a 6th-level espaço de magia, the disk's diameter is 20 pés, it can support up to 16, 000 pounds, and it can traverse obstacles up to 20 pés high.

name: Fluctuating Alignment
desc:
You channel the força of chaos to taint your alvo’s mind. A alvo that gets a failure on a teste de resistência de Sabedoria must roll 1d20 and consult the Alignment Fluctuation table to find its new alignment, and it must roll again after every minuto of the spell’s duration. The alvo’s alignment stops fluctuating and returns to normal when the spell ends. These changes do not make the affected criatura friendly or hostile toward the caster, but they can cause criaturas to behave in unpredictable ways.
 ## Alignment Fluctuation 
| D20 | Alignment |
|---|---|
| 1-2 | Chaotic good |
| 3-4 | Chaotic neutral |
| 5-7 | Chaotic evil |
| 8-9 | Neutral evil |
| 10-11 | Lawful evil |
| 12-14 | Lawful good |
| 15-16 | Lawful neutral |
| 17-18 | Neutral good |
| 19-20 | Neutral |

name: Flurry
desc: A flurry of snow surrounds you and extends to a 5-pé radius around you. While it lasts, anyone trying to see into, out of, or through the affected area (including you) has desvantagem on Sabedoria (Percepção) checks and attack rolls.
material: a fleck of quartz

name: Fly
desc: Você toca a criatura voluntária. o alvo gains a velocidade de voo of 18 metros for a duração. When a magia termina, o alvo falls if it is still aloft, unless it can stop the fall.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 4° nível ou superior, você pode alvo one additional criatura for each nível do espaço above 3rd.
material: A wing feather from any bird.

name: Fly
desc: The alvo gains a voando Deslocamento of 60 pés. When the spell ends, the alvo falls if it is off the ground.
higher_level: alvo one additional criatura for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Fog Cloud
desc: você cria a 6 metros esfera of fog centered on a point dentro do alcance. The esfera spreads around corners, and its área is heavily obscured. It lasts for a duração or until a wind of moderate or greater velocidade (at least 16 km per hour) disperses it.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 2° nível ou superior, the raio of the fog increases by 6 metros for each nível do espaço above 1st.

name: Fog Cloud
desc: You create a heavily obscured area of fog. The fog spreads around corners and can be dispersed by a moderate wind (at least 10 milhas per hora).
higher_level: The spell's radius increases by 20 pés for each slot level above 1st.

name: Forbiddance
desc: você cria a ward against mágico travel that protects up to 40,000 quadrado feet of floor space to a height of 9 metros above the floor. For a duração, criatura can't teletransporte into the área or use portals, such as those created by the portal magia, to enter the área. The magia proofs the área against planar travel, and Portanto prevents criatura from accessing the área by way of the Astral plano, Ethereal plano, Feywild, Shadowfell, or the plano shift magia. Além disso, the magia damages types of criatura that você escolhe when you cast it. Escolha one or more of the following: celestials, elemental, fada, demônio, and morto-vivo. When a chosen criatura enters the magia's área for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, a criatura takes 5d10 radiant or dano necrótico (your choice quando você conjura esta magia). quando você conjura esta magia, você pode designate a password. uma criatura that speaks the password as it enters the área takes no dano from the magia. The magia's área can't overlap with the área of another forbiddance magia. If you cast forbiddance every day for 30 days in the same location, the magia lasts until it is dissipar, and the material componente are consumed on the last casting.
material: A sprinkling of holy water, rare incense, and powdered ruby worth at least 1,000 gp.

name: Forbiddance
desc:
You protect the alvo area against mágico travel. criaturas can't teleport into the area, use a mágico portal to enter it, or travel into it from another plane of existence, such as the Astral or Ethereal Plane. The spell's area can't overlap with another _forbiddance_ spell.

The spell damages specific types of trespassing criaturas. Choose one or more of celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead. When a chosen criatura first enters the area on a turn or starts its turn there, it recebe 5d10 radiante or dano necrótico (your choice when you cast the spell). You may designate a password. A criatura speaking this password as it enters recebe no damage from the spell.

After casting this spell on the same area for 30 consecutive dias it becomes permanent until dispelled. This final casting to make the spell permanent consumes its material components.

name: Force Punch
desc: Make a melee ataque mágico. On a hit, the alvo recebe 3d8 dano de força.
higher_level: o dano increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Force of Will
desc: Your iron resolve allows you to withstand an attack. o dano you take from the triggering attack is reduced by 2d10 + your spellcasting ability modifier.
higher_level: o dano is reduced by an additional 1d10 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Forcecage
desc: An immobile, invisível, cubo-shaped prison composed of mágico force springs into existence around an área você escolhe dentro do alcance. The prison can be a cage or a solid box, as você escolhe. A prison in the shape of a cage can be up to 6 metros on a side and is made from 1/2-inch diameter bars spaced 1/2 inch apart. A prison in the shape of a box can be up to 3 metros on a side, creating a solid barrier that prevents any matter from passing through it and blocking any magias cast into or out from the área. When you conjurar a magia, any criatura that is completely inside the cage's área is trapped. criatura only partially within the área, or those too large to fit inside the área, are empurrá away from the center of the área until they are completely outside the área. uma criatura inside the cage can't leave it by não mágico means. If a criatura tries to use teletransporte or interplanar travel to leave the cage, it must first faz um teste de resistência de Carisma. On a success, a criatura can use that magia to exit the cage. On a failure, a criatura can't exit the cage and wastes the use of the magia or effect. The cage also extends into the Ethereal plano, blocking ethereal travel. This magia can't be dissipar by dissipar magia.
material: Ruby dust worth 1,500 gp.

name: Forcecage
desc:
An opaque cube of banded força surrounds the area, preventing any matter or spells from passing through it, though criaturas can breathe inside it. criaturas that make a teste de resistência de Destreza and criaturas that are only partially inside the area are pushed out of the area. Any other criatura is trapped and can't leave by não mágico means. The cage also traps criaturas on the Ethereal Plane, and can only be destroyed by being dealt at least 25 dano de força at once or by a _dispel magic_ spell cast using an 8th-level or higher espaço de magia.

If a trapped criatura tries to teleport or travel to another plane, it makes a teste de resistência de Carisma. em uma falha, the attempt fails and the spell or effect is wasted.
higher_level: The spell's area increases to a 20-pé cube when using a 9th-level espaço de magia.

name: Forced Reposition
desc: uma criatura of your choice that you can see within range is teleported to an unoccupied space you can see up to 60 pés above you. The space can be open air or a balcony, ledge, or other surface above you. An unwilling criatura that succeeds on a teste de resistência de Constituição is unaffected. A criatura teleported to open air immediately falls, taking falling damage as normal, unless it can fly or it has some other method of catching itself or preventing a fall. A criatura can't be teleported into a solid object.
higher_level: If you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 5th level or higher, you can alvo one additional criatura for each slot level above 4th. The alvos must be within 30 pés of each other when you alvo them, but they don't need to be teleported to the same locations.

name: Foresight
desc: Você toca a criatura voluntária and bestow a limited ability to see into the immediate future. For a duração, o alvo can't be surpreendido and tem vantagem em rolagem de ataques, ability checks, and teste de resistências. Additionally, outras criaturas têm desvantagem em rolagem de ataques against o alvo for a duração. This magia immediately ends if you cast it again before its duration ends.
material: A hummingbird feather.

name: Foresight
desc: You impart the ability to see flashes of the immediate future. The alvo can't be surprised and has vantagem on ability checks, attack rolls, and saving throws. Other criaturas have desvantagem on attack rolls against the alvo.

name: Forest Army
desc:
While casting and concentrating on this spell, you enter a deep trance and awaken an army of trees and plants within range. These plants rise up under your control as a grove swarm and act on your initiative. Although you are in a trance and deaf and blind with regard to your own senses, you see and hear through your grove swarm's senses. You can command your grove swarm telepathically, ordering it to advance, attack, or retreat. If the grove swarm enters your space, you can order it to carry you.

If you take any action other than continuing to concentrate on this spell, the spell ends and the trees and plants set down roots wherever they are currently located.

name: Forest Native
desc: While in a forest, you touch a willing criatura and infuse it with the forest’s energy, creating a bond between the criatura and the environment. For the duration of the spell, as long as the criatura remains within the forest, its movement is not hindered by difficult terrain composed of natural vegetation. In addition, the criatura has vantagem on saving throws against environmental effects such as excessive heat or frio or high altitude.
material: a clump of soil from a forest

name: Forest Sanctuary
desc:
While in a forest, you create a protective, 200-pé cube centered on a point you can see within range. The atmosphere inside the cube has the lighting, temperature, and moisture that is most ideal for the forest, regardless of the lighting or weather outside the area. The cube is transparent, and criaturas and objects can move freely through it. The cube protects the area inside it from storms, strong winds, and floods, including those created by magic such as [control weather](https://api.open5e.com/spells/control-weather)[control water](https://api.open5e.com/spells/control-water), or [meteor swarm](https://api.open5e.com/spells/meteor-swarm). Such spells can’t be cast while the spellcaster is in the cube.

You can create a permanently protected area by casting this spell at the same location every dia for one year.
material: a bowl of fresh rainwater and a tree branch

name: Foretell Distraction
desc: Thanks to your foreknowledge, you know exactly when your foe will take his or her eyes off you. Casting this spell has the same effect as making a successful Destreza (Furtividade) check, provided cover or concealment is available within 10 pés of you. It doesn’t matter whether inimigos can see you when you cast the spell; they glance away at just the right moment. You can move up to 10 pés as part of casting the spell, provided you’re able to move (not imobilizado or agarrado or reduced to a Deslocamento of less than 10 pés for any other reason). This move doesn’t count as part of your normal movement. After the spell is cast, you must be in a position where you can remain hidden: a lightly obscured space, for example, or a space where you have total cover. Otherwise, inimigos see you again immediately and you’re not hidden.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Form of the Gods
desc:
By drawing on the energy of the gods, you can temporarily assume the form of your patron’s avatar. Form of the gods transforms you into an entirely new shape and brings about the following changes (summarized below and in the [avatar form](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/avatar-form) stat block).
* Your size becomes Large, unless you were already at least that big.
* You gain resistance to não mágico contundente, perfurante, and dano cortante and to one other damage type of your choice.
* You gain a Ataque Múltiplo action option, allowing you to make two slam attacks and a bite.
* Your ability scores change to reflect your new form, as shown in the stat block.

You remain in this form until you stop concentrating on the spell or until you drop to 0 pontos de vida, at which time you revert to your natural form.
material: a holy symbol

name: Freedom of Movement
desc: Você toca a criatura voluntária. For a duração, o alvo's movimento is unaffected by terreno difícil, and magias and other mágico effects can neither reduce o alvo's velocidade nor cause o alvo to be paralisado or imobilizado. o alvo can also spend 1.5 metros of movimento to automatically escape from não mágico restraints, such as manacles or uma criatura that has it agarrado. Finally, being underwater imposes no penalties on o alvo's movimento or attacks.
material: A leather strap, bound around the arm or a similar appendage.

name: Freedom of Movement
desc: The alvo ignores difficult terrain. Spells and mágico effects can't reduce its Deslocamento or cause it to be paralisado or imobilizado. It can spend 5 pés of movement to escape from não mágico restraints or grapples. The alvo's movement and attacks aren't penalized from being underwater.
higher_level: When using a 6th-level espaço de magia the duration is 8 horas. When using an 8th-level espaço de magia the duration is 24 horas.

name: Freeze Blood
desc:
When you cast **freeze blood** as a successful melee ataque mágico against a living criatura with a circulatory system, the criatura’s blood freezes. For the spell’s duration, the affected criatura’s Deslocamento is halved and it recebe 2d6 dano de frio no início de cada um de seus turnos. If the criatura recebe dano contundente from a critical hit, the attack’s damage dice are rolled three times instead of twice. no final de cada um de seus turnos, the criatura can make a teste de resistência de Constituição, ending the effect em um sucesso.

NOTE: This was previously a 5th-level spell that did 4d10 dano de frio.

name: Freeze Potion
desc: A blue spark flies from your hand and strikes a potion vial, drinking horn, waterskin, or similar container, instantly freezing the contents. The substance melts normally thereafter and is not otherwise harmed, but it can’t be consumed while it’s frozen.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 2nd level or higher, the range increases by 5 pés for each slot level above 1st.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when you see a creature within range about to consume a liquid

name: Freezing Fog
desc: The spell creates a 20-pé-radius sphere of mist similar to a [fog cloud](https://api.open5e.com/spells/fog-cloud) spell centered on a point you can see within range. The cloud spreads around corners, and the area it occupies is heavily obscured. A wind of moderate or greater velocity (at least 10 milhas per hora) disperses it in 1 rodada. The fog is freezing frio; any criatura that ends its turn in the area deve fazer a teste de resistência de Constituição. It recebe 2d6 dano de frio and gains one level of exaustão em uma falha no teste, or recebe half as much damage and no exaustão on a successful one.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, o dano increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Freezing Sphere
desc: A frigid globe of cold energy streaks from your fingertips to a point of your choice dentro do alcance, where it explodes in a 18 metros esfera. cada criatura within the área deve fazer um teste de resistência de Constituição. em uma falha no teste, uma criatura takes 10d6 dano de frio. em um sucesso no teste, it takes half as much dano. If the globe strikes a corpo of water or a liquid that is principally water (not including water-based criatura), it freezes the liquid to a depth of 6 inches over an área 9 metros quadrado. This ice lasts por 1 minuto. criatura that were nadar on the superfície of frozen water are trapped in the ice. A trapped criatura can use an ação to make uma verificação de Força against your CD da magia to break free. você pode refrain from firing the globe after completing the magia, if you wish. A small globe about the size of a funda stone, cool to the Toque, appears in your hand. At any time, you or uma criatura you give the globe to can throw the globe (to a range of 12 metros) or hurl it with a funda (to the funda's normal range). It shatters on impact, with the same effect as the normal casting of the magia. você pode also set the globe down without shattering it. After 1 minute, if the globe hasn't already shattered, it explodes.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 7° nível ou superior, the dano increases by 1d6 for each nível do espaço above 6th.
material: A small cristal esfera.

name: Freezing Sphere
desc:
A freezing globe streaks to a point within range and explodes, dealing 10d6 dano de frio to criaturas in the area. Liquid in the area is frozen to a depth of 6 inches for 1 minuto.
