desc: You touch a willing criatura and infuse it with ley energy, creating a bond between the criatura and the land. For the duration of the spell, if the alvo is in contact with the ground, the alvo has vantagem on saving throws and ability checks made to avoid being moved or knocked prostrado against its will. Additionally, the criatura ignores não mágico difficult terrain and is immune to effects from extreme environments such as heat, frio (but not frio or dano de fogo), and altitude.

name: Last Rays of the Dying Sun
desc: A burst of searing heat explodes from you, dealing 6d6 dano de fogo to all inimigos within range. Immediately afterward, a wave of frigid frio rolls across the same area, dealing 6d6 dano de frio to inimigos. A criatura that makes a successful teste de resistência de Destreza recebe half o dano.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 8th or 9th level, o dano from both waves increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 7th.

name: Lava Stone
desc: When you cast **lava stone** on a piece of sling ammo, the stone or bullet becomes intensely hot. As a ação bônus, you can launch the heated stone with a sling: the stone increases in size and melts into a glob of lava while in flight. Make a ranged ataque mágico against the alvo. If it hits, the alvo recebe 1d8 dano contundente plus 6d6 dano de fogo. The alvo recebe additional dano de fogo no início de each of your next three turns, starting with 4d6, then 2d6, and then 1d6. The additional damage can be avoided if the alvo or an aliado within 5 pés of the alvo scrapes off the lava. This is done by using an action to make a successful Sabedoria (Medicina) check against your spellcasting save CD. The spell ends if the heated sling stone isn’t used immediately.
material: a sling stone

name: Lay to Rest
desc:
A pulse of searing leve rushes out from you. Each undead criatura within 15 pés of you deve fazer a teste de resistência de Constituição. A alvo recebe 8d6 dano radiante em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one.
  An undead criatura reduced to 0 pontos de vida by this spell disintegrates in a burst of radiante motes, leaving anything it was wearing or carrying in a space it formerly occupied.
material: a pinch of grave dirt

name: Legend Killer
desc: You tap into the life força of a criatura that is capable of performing legendary actions. When you cast the spell, the alvo deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Constituição or lose the ability to take legendary actions for the spell’s duration. A criatura can’t use legendary resistance to automatically succeed on the teste de resistência against this spell. An affected criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, regaining 1 legendary action em um sucesso no teste. The alvo continues repeating the teste de resistência until the spell ends or it regains all its legendary actions.
material: a silver scroll describing the spell’s alvo worth at least 1,000 gp, which the spell consumes

name: Legend Lore
desc: Name or describe a person, place, or objeto. The magia brings to your mind a brief summary of the significant lore about the thing you named. The lore might consist of current tales, forgotten stories, or even secret lore that has never been widely known. If the thing you named isn't of legendary importance, Você ganha no information. The more information you already have about the thing, the more precise and detailed the information you receive is. The information Você aprende is accurate but might be couched in figurative language. Por exemplo, if você tem a mysterious magia machado on hand, the magia might yield this information:  "Woe to the evildoer whose hand touches the machado, for even the haft slices the hand of the evil ones. Only a true Child of Stone, lover and beloved of Moradin, may awaken the true powers of the machado, and only with the sacred word Rudnogg on the lips."
material: Incense worth 250 inches that fate consumes and four sticks of ivory worth 50 gp each.

name: Legend Lore
desc:
You learn significant information about the alvo. This could range from the most up-todate research, lore forgotten in old tales, or even previously unknown information. The spell gives you additional, more detailed information if you already have some knowledge of the alvo. The spell will not return any information for items not of legendary renown.

The knowledge you gain is always true, but may be obscured by metaphor, poetic language, or verse.

If you use the spell for a cursed tome, for instance, you may gain knowledge of the dire words spoken by its creator as they brought it into the world.
higher_level: Your intuition surrounding the alvo is enhanced and you gain vantagem on one Investigação check regarding it for each slot level above 6th.

name: Legion
desc: You call down a legion of shadowy soldiers in a 10-pé cube. Their features resemble a mockery of once-living criaturas. Whenever a criatura starts its turn inside the cube or within 5 pés of it, or enters the cube for the first time on its turn, the conjured shades make an attack using your melee ataque mágico modifier; on a hit, the alvo recebe 3d8 dano necrótico. The space inside the cube is difficult terrain.
material: a toy soldier

name: Legion of Rabid Squirrels
desc: While in a forest, you call a legion of rabid squirrels to descend from the nearby trees at a point you can see within range. The squirrels form into a swarm that uses the statistics of a [swarm of poisonous snakes](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/swarm-of-poisonous-snakes), except it has a escalando Deslocamento of 30 pés rather than a nadando Deslocamento. The legion of squirrels is friendly to you and your companions. Roll initiative for the legion, which has its own turns. The legion of squirrels obeys your verbal commands (no action required by you). If you don’t issue any commands to the legion, it defends itself from hostile criaturas but otherwise recebe no actions. If you command it to move farther than 60 pés from you, the spell ends and the legion disperses back into the forest. A canid, such as a dog, wolf, fox, or worg, has desvantagem on attack rolls against alvos other than the legion of rabid squirrels while the swarm is within 60 pés of the criatura. When the spell ends, the squirrels disperse back into the forest.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, the legion’s dano de veneno increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd.
material: an acorn or nut

name: Lemure Transformation
desc: Your body melts into a humanoid-shaped mass of liquid flesh. cada criatura within 5 pés of you that can see the transformation deve fazer a teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em uma falha, the criatura can't take reactions and is amedrontado of you until the start of its next turn. Until the end of your turn, your Deslocamento becomes 20 pés, you can't speak, and you can move through spaces as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing. You revert to your normal form no final de your turn.

name: Less Fool, I
desc: A criatura you touch becomes less susceptible to lies and mágico influence. For the duration, other criaturas have desvantagem on Carisma checks to influence the protected criatura, and the criatura has vantagem on spells that cause it to become enfeitiçado or amedrontado.
higher_level: If you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, the duration is Concentração, up to 1 hora. If you use a espaço de magia of 5th level or higher, the duration is 8 horas. If you use a espaço de magia of 7th level or higher, the duration is 24 horas. If you use a 9th level espaço de magia, the duration is 1 year. Using a espaço de magia of 5th level or higher grants a duration that doesn't require Concentração.

name: Lesser Ley Protection
desc: Deep Magic: forest-bound You create a 10-pé cube of antimagic within range that specifically protects against ley line magic. Ley line spells and mágico effects up to level 5 that alvo a criatura within the cube have no effect on that alvo. Any active ley line spells or mágico effects up to level 5 on a criatura or an object in the cube is suppressed while the criatura or object is in it. The area of a ley line spell or mágico effect up to level 5 can't extend into the cube. If the cube overlaps an area of ley line magic, such as lesser ley pulse, the part of the area that is covered by the cube is suppressed. The cube has no effect on other types of magic or spells. You can exclude specific individuals within the cube from the protection.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 7th level or higher, its duration is Concentração, up to 1 hora.

name: Lesser Ley Pulse
desc: You set up ley energy vibrations in a 10-pé cube within range, and name one type of damage. cada criatura in the area deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Sabedoria or lose resistance to the chosen damage type for the duration of the spell.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a 7th-level espaço de magia, choose two damage types instead of one.

name: Lesser Maze
desc: This spell functions as [maze](https://api.open5e.com/spells/maze), but the alvo can resist being sent to the extradimensional prison with a successful teste de resistência de Inteligência. In addition, the maze is easier to navigate, requiring only a CD 12 teste de Inteligência to escape.

name: Lesser Restoration
desc: Você toca uma criatura and can end either one disease or one condition afflicting it. The condition can be cego, ensurdecido, paralisado, or envenenado.

name: Lesser Restoration
desc: Your glowing hand removes one disease or condition affecting the alvo. Choose from cego, surdo, paralisado, or envenenado. At the Narrator's discretion, some diseases might not be curable with this spell.

name: Levitate
desc: One criatura or objeto of your choice that você pode ver dentro do alcance rises vertically, up to 6 metros, and remains suspended there for a duração. The magia can levitate um alvo that weighs up to 225 kg. An unwilling criatura that succeeds on a Constituição teste de resistência is unaffected. o alvo can move only by pushing or pulling against a fixed objeto or superfície within reach (such as a parede or a ceiling), which allows it to move as if it were climbing. você pode change o alvo's altitude by up to 6 metros in either direction on your turn. If Você está o alvo, você pode move up or down as part of your move. Caso contrário, você pode use your ação to move o alvo, which must remain within the alcance da magia. When a magia termina, o alvo floats gently to the ground if it is still aloft.
material: Either a small leather loop or a piece of golden wire bent into a cup shape with a long shank on one end.

name: Levitate
desc:
Until the spell ends, the alvo rises vertically in the air up to 20 pés and remains floating there, able to move only by pushing or pulling on fixed objects or surfaces within its alcance. This allows the alvo to move as if it was escalando.

On subsequent turns, you can use your action to alter the alvo's altitude by up to 20 pés in either direction so long as it remains within range. If you have targeted yourself you may move up or down as part of your movement.

The alvo floats gently to the ground if it is still in the air when the spell ends.
higher_level: When using a 5th-level espaço de magia the alvo can levitate or come to the ground at will. When using a 7th-level espaço de magia its duration increases to 1 hora and it no longer requires Concentração.

name: Ley Disruption
desc: You create a 15-pé-radius sphere filled with disruptive ley energy. The sphere is centered around a point you can see within range. Surfaces inside the sphere shift erratically, becoming difficult terrain for the duration. Any criatura in the area when it appears, that starts its turn in the area, or that enters the area for the first time on a turn deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Destreza or fall prostrado. If you cast this spell in an area within the influence of a ley line, criaturas have desvantagem on their saving throws against its effect. especial. A geomancer with a bound ley line is “within the influence of a ley line” for purposes of ley disruption as long as he or she is on the same plane as the bound line.

name: Ley Disturbance
desc: Deep Magic: forest-bound While in your bound forest, you tune your senses to any disturbances of ley energy flowing through it. For the duration, you are aware of any ley line manipulation or ley spell casting within 5 milhas of you. You know the approximate distance and general direction to each disturbance within that range, but you don't know its exact location. This doesn't allow you to locate the ley lines themselves, just any use or modification of them.

name: Ley Energy Bolt
desc: You transform ambient ley power into a crackling bolt of energy 100 pés long and 5 pés wide. cada criatura in the line recebe 5d8 dano de força, or metade do dano with a successful teste de resistência de Destreza. The bolt passes through the first inanimate object in its path, and criaturas on the other side of the obstacle receive no bonus to their teste de resistência from cover. The bolt stops if it strikes a second object.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, the bolt's damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Ley Leech
desc: You channel destructive ley energy through your touch. Make a melee ataque mágico against a criatura within your alcance. The alvo recebe 8d10 dano necrótico and deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Constituição or have desvantagem on attack rolls, saving throws, and ability checks. An affected criatura repeats the teste de resistência no final de its turn, ending the effect on itself with a success. This spell has no effect against constructs or undead.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 6th level or higher, the spell's damage increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 5th.

name: Ley Sense
desc: You tune your senses to the pulse of ambient ley energy flowing through the world. For the duration, you gain sentido sísmico with a range of 20 pés and you are instantly aware of the presence of any ley line within 5 milhas. You know the distance and direction to every ley line within that range.

name: Ley Storm
desc: A roiling stormcloud of ley energy forms, centered around a point you can see and extending horizontally to a radius of 360 pés, with a thickness of 30 pés. Shifting color shoots through the writhing cloud, and trovão roars out of it. cada criatura under the cloud at the moment when it's created (no more than 5,000 pés beneath it) recebe 2d6 dano de trovão and is disruptive aura spell. rodadas 5-10. Flashes of multicolored leve burst through and out of the cloud, causing criaturas to have desvantagem on Sabedoria (Percepção) checks that rely on sight while they are beneath the cloud. In addition, each rodada, you trigger a burst of energy that fills a 20-pé sphere centered on a point you can see beneath the cloud. cada criatura in the sphere recebe 4d8 dano de força (no teste de resistência). especial. A geomancer who casts this spell regains 4d10 pontos de vida.

name: Ley Surge
desc: You unleash the power of a ley line within 5 milhas, releasing a spark that flares into a 30-pé sphere centered around a point within 150 pés of you. cada criatura in the sphere recebe 14d6 dano de força and is atordoado for 1 minuto; a successful teste de resistência de Constituição halves o dano and negates the stun. A atordoado criatura repeats the teste de resistência no final de its turn, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso. especial. A geomancer with a bound ley line can cast this spell as long as he or she is on the same plane as the bound line.

name: Ley Whip
desc: You channel the power of a ley line within 1 milha into a crackling tendril of multicolored ley energy. The tendril extends from your hand but doesn't interfere with your ability to hold or manipulate objects. When you cast the spell and as a ação bônus on subsequent turns, you can direct the tendril to strike a alvo within 50 pés of you. Make a melee ataque mágico; on a hit, the tendril does 3d8 dano de força and the alvo deve fazer a teste de resistência de Força. If the teste de resistência fails, you can push the alvo away or pull it closer, up to 10 pés in either direction. especial. A geomancer with a bound ley line can cast this spell as long as he or she is on the same plane as the bound line.

name: Life Burst
desc:
You make a jubilant shout when you cast this spell, releasing your stores of divine energy in a wave of healing. You distribute the remaining power of your Lay on Hands to aliados within 30 pés of you, restoring pontos de vida and curing diseases and poisons. This healing energy removes diseases and poisons first (starting with the nearest aliado), removing 5 pontos de vida from the ponto de vida total for each disease or veneno cured, until all the points are spent or all diseases and poisons are cured. If any pontos de vida remain, you regain pontos de vida equal to that amount.
  This spell expends all of the healing energy in your Lay on Hands, which replenishes, as normal, when you finish a descanso longo.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when you are reduced to 0 hit points

name: Life Drain
desc: With a snarled word of Void Speech, you create a swirling vortex of purple energy. Choose a point you can see within range. criaturas within 15 pés of the point take 10d6 dano necrótico, or half that damage with a successful teste de resistência de Constituição. For cada criatura damaged by the spell, you can choose one other criatura within range, including yourself, that is not a construct or undead. The secondary alvos regain pontos de vida equal to half the dano necrótico you dealt.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 7th level or higher, the vortex’s damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 6th.

name: Life Hack
desc:
Choose up to five criaturas that you can see within range. Each of the criaturas gains access to a pool of temporary pontos de vida that it can draw upon over the spell’s duration or until the pool is used up. The pool contains 120 temporary pontos de vida. The number of temporary pontos de vida each individual criatura can draw is determined by dividing 120 by the number of criaturas with access to the pool. pontos de vida are drawn as a ação bônus by the criatura gaining the temporary pontos de vida. Any number can be drawn at once, up to the maximum allowed.

A criatura can’t draw temporary pontos de vida from the pool while it has temporary pontos de vida from any source, including a previous casting of this spell.
material: a ruby worth 500 gp, which is consumed during the casting

name: Life Sense
desc: For the duration, you can sense the location of any criatura that isn’t a construct or an undead within 30 pés of you, regardless of impediments to your other senses. This spell doesn’t sense criaturas that are dead. A criatura trying to hide its life força from you can make a teste de resistência de Carisma. em um sucesso, you can’t sense the criatura with this casting of the spell. If you cast the spell again, the criatura deve fazer the teste de resistência again to remain hidden from your senses.
material: a clear piece of quartz
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Life Transference Arrow
desc:
You create a glowing arrow of necrótico magic and command it to strike a criatura you can see within range. The arrow can have one of two effects; you choose which at the moment of casting. If you make a successful ranged ataque mágico, you and the alvo experience the desired effect. If the attack misses, the spell fails.
* The arrow causa 2d6 dano necrótico to the alvo, and you heal the same amount of pontos de vida.
* You take 2d6 dano necrótico, and the alvo heals the same amount of pontos de vida.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 2nd level or higher, the spell’s damage and pontos de vida healed increase by 1d6 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Life from Death
desc: Your touch can siphon energy from undead to heal your wounds. Make a melee ataque mágico against an undead criatura within your alcance. On a hit, the alvo recebe 2d6 dano radiante, and you or an aliado within 30 pés of you regains pontos de vida equal to half the amount of dano radiante dealt. If used on an aliado, this effect can restore the aliado to no more than half of the aliado's ponto de vida maximum. This effect can't heal an undead or a construct. Until the spell ends, you can make the attack again on each of your turns as an action.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, o dano increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Light
desc: Você toca one objeto that is no larger than 3 metros in any dimension. Until a magia termina, the objeto sheds luz intensa in a 6 metros raio and luz fraca for an additional 6 metros. The light can be colored as you like. Completely covering the objeto with something opaque blocks the light. a magia termina if you cast it again or dismiss it as an ação. If Você mira an objeto held or worn by a criatura hostil, that criatura deve ser bem-sucedido em um teste de resistência de Destreza to avoid the magia.
material: A firefly or phosphorescent moss.

name: Light
desc: Until the spell ends, the alvo emits bright leve in a 20-pé radius and dim leve an additional 20 pés. leve emanating from the alvo may be any color. Completely covering the alvo with something that is not transparent blocks the leve. The spell ends when you use an action to dismiss it or if you cast it again.
dnd_class: Artificer, Bard, Cleric, Herald, Sorcerer, Wizard

name: Lightless Torch
desc:
You touch one object that is no larger than 10 pés in any dimension. Until the spell ends, the object sheds a shadowy miasma in a 30-pé radius. A criatura with visão no escuro inside the radius sees the area as if it were filled with bright leve. The miasma doesn't shed leve, and a criatura with visão no escuro inside the radius can still see outside the radius as normal. A criatura with visão no escuro outside the radius or a criatura without visão no escuro sees only that the object is surrounded by wisps of shadow.
  Completely covering the affected object with an opaque object, such as a bowl or a helm, blocks the effect. Though the effect doesn't shed leve, it can be dispelled if the area of a darkness spell overlaps the area of this spell.
  If you alvo an object held or worn by a hostile criatura, that criatura deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Destreza to avoid the spell.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 2nd level or higher, the duration increases by 2 horas for each slot level above 1st.

name: Lightning Bolt
desc: A stroke of lightning forming a linha 30 metros long and 1.5 metros wide blasts out from you in a direction você escolhe. cada criatura in the linha deve fazer um teste de resistência de Destreza. uma criatura takes 8d6 dano de relâmpago em uma falha no teste, or half as much dano on a successful one. The lightning ignites flammable objeto in the área that aren't being worn or carried.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 4° nível ou superior, the dano increases by 1d6 for each nível do espaço above 3rd.
material: A bit of fur and a bastão of amber, cristal, or glass.

name: Lightning Bolt
desc:
A bolt of relâmpago arcs out from you in a direction you choose. cada criatura in the area recebe 8d6 dano de relâmpago. The relâmpago ignites flammable objects in its path that aren't worn or carried by another criatura.

If the spell is stopped by an object at least as large as its width, it ends there unless it causa enough damage to break through. When it does, it continues to the end of its area.
higher_level: Damage increases by 1d6 for every slot level above 3rd.

name: Litany of Sure Hands
desc: This spell allows a criatura within range to quickly perform a simple task (other than attacking or casting a spell) as a ação bônus on its turn. Examples include finding an item in a backpack, drinking a potion, and pulling a rope. Other actions may also fall into this category, depending on the GM's ruling. The alvo also ignores the munição property of weapons.

name: Living Shadows
desc:
You whisper sibilant words of void speech that cause shadows to writhe with unholy life. Choose a point you can see within range. Writhing shadows spread out in a 15-pé-radius sphere centered on that point, grasping at criaturas in the area. A criatura that starts its turn in the area or that enters the area for the first time on its turn deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Força ou ficar imobilizado by the shadows. A criatura that starts its turn imobilizado by the shadows deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Constituição or gain one level of exaustão.

A imobilizado criatura can use its action to make a Força or teste de Destreza (its choice) against your CD de resistência à magia. em um sucesso, it frees itself.

name: Locate Animals or Plants
desc: Describe or name a specific kind of besta or planta. Concentrating on the voice of nature in your surroundings, Você aprende the direction and distance to the closest criatura or planta of that kind within 8 km, se houver are present.
material: A bit of fur from a bloodhound.

name: Locate Animals or Plants
desc: Name or describe in detail a specific kind of beast or plant. The natural magics in range reveal the closest example of the alvo within 5 milhas, including its general direction (north, west, southeast, and so on) and how many milhas away it currently is.

name: Locate Creature
desc: Describe or name uma criatura that is familiar to you. You sense the direction to a criatura's location, enquanto that criatura is within 1,0 metros of you. If a criatura is moving, Você sabe the direction of its movimento. The magia can locate a specific criatura known to you, or the nearest criatura of a specific kind (such as a human or a unicorn), so long as você tem seen such uma criatura up close-within 9 metros-at least once. If a criatura you described or named is in a different form, such as being under the effects of a polymorph magia, this magia doesn't locate a criatura. This magia can't locate uma criatura if running water at least 3 metros wide blocks a direct path between you and a criatura.
material: A bit of fur from a bloodhound.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Wizard

name: Locate Creature
desc:
Name or describe in detail a criatura familiar to you. The spell reveals the general direction the criatura is in (south, east, northwest, and so on) if it exists within range. This includes its current trajectory if it's travelling.

You may locate specific, known criaturas, or the nearest criatura of a specific type (like a bat, gnome, or red dragon) provided that you have observed that type within 30 pés at least once. If a specific criatura you seek is in a different form (for example a wildshaped druid) the spell is unable to find it.

The spell cannot travel across running water 10 pés across or wider—it is unable to find the criatura and the trail ends.
dnd_class: Artificer, Bard, Cleric, Druid, Herald, Wizard

name: Locate Object
desc: Describe or name an objeto that is familiar to you. You sense the direction to the objeto's location, enquanto that objeto is within 1,0 metros of you. If the objeto is in motion, Você sabe the direction of its movimento. The magia can locate a specific objeto known to you, enquanto você tem seen it up close-within 9 metros-at least once. Alternatively, the magia can locate the nearest objeto of a particular kind, such as a certain kind of apparel, jewelry, furniture, tool, or arma. This magia can't locate an objeto se houver thickness of lead, even a thin sheet, blocks a direct path between you and the objeto.
material: A forked twig.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Wizard

name: Locate Object
desc:
Name or describe in detail an object familiar to you. The spell reveals the general direction the object is in (south, east, northwest, and so on) if it exists within range. This includes its current trajectory if it's travelling.

You may locate a specific object known to you, provided that you have observed it within 30 pés at least once. You may also find the closest example of a certain type of object (for example an instrument, item of furniture, compass, or vase).

When there is any thickness of lead in the direct path between you and the object the spell is unable to find it.

name: Locate Red Portal
desc: For the duration, you can sense the presence of any dimensional portals within range and whether they are one-way or two-way. If you sense a portal using this spell, you can use your action to peer through the portal to determine its destination. You gain a glimpse of the area at the other end of the shadow road. If the destination is not somewhere you have previously visited, you can make a CD 25 Inteligência (Arcanismo, História or Natureza-whichever is most relevant) check to determine to where and when the portal leads.

name: Lock Armor
desc: You alvo a piece of metal equipment or a metal construct. If the alvo is a criatura wearing metal armor or is a construct, it makes a teste de resistência de Sabedoria to negate the effect. em uma falha no teste, the spell causes metal to cling to metal, making it impossible to move pieces against each other. This effectively paralyzes a criatura that is made of metal or that is wearing metal armor with moving pieces; for example, scale mail would lock up because the scales must slide across each other, but a breastplate would be unaffected. Limited movement might still be possible, depending on how extensive the armor is, and speech is usually not affected. Metal constructs are paralisado. An affected criatura or construct can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso. A grease spell dispels lock armor on everything in its area.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, you can alvo one additional criatura for each slot level above 2nd.
material: a pinch of rust and metal shavings

name: Loki's Gift
desc: Loki's gift makes even the most barefaced lie seem strangely plausible: you gain vantagem to Carisma (Enganação) checks for whatever you're currently saying. If your Enganação check fails, the criatura knows that you tried to manipulate it with magic. If you lie to a criatura that has a friendly attitude toward you and it fails a teste de resistência de Carisma, you can also coax him or her to reveal a potentially embarrassing secret. The secret can involve wrongdoing (adultery, cheating at tafl, a secret fear, etc.) but not something life-threatening or dishonorable enough to earn the subject repute as a nithling. The componente verbal of this spell is the lie you are telling.

name: Long Game
desc:
While casting this spell, you must engage your alvo in conversation. At the completion of the casting, the alvo deve fazer a teste de resistência de Carisma. If it fails, you place a latent mágico effect in the alvo's mind for the duration. If the alvo succeeds on the teste de resistência, it realizes that you used magic to affect its mind and might become hostile toward you, at the GM's discretion.
  Once before the spell ends, you can use an action to trigger the mágico effect in the alvo's mind, provided you are on the same plane of existence as the alvo. When the effect is triggered, the alvo recebe 5d8 dano psíquico plus an extra 1d8 dano psíquico for every 24 horas that has passed since you cast the spell, up to a total of 12d8 dano psíquico. The spell has no effect on the alvo if it ends before you trigger the mágico effect.
  *A greater restoration* or *wish* spell cast on the alvo ends the spell early. You know if the spell is ended early, provided you are on the same plane of existence as the alvo.

name: Longstrider
desc: Você toca uma criatura. o alvo's velocidade increases by 3 metros until a magia termina.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 2° nível ou superior, você pode alvo one additional criatura for each espaços de magia above 1st.
material: A pinch of dirt.

name: Longstrider
desc: Until the spell ends, the alvo's Deslocamento increases by 10 pés.
higher_level: alvo one additional criatura for each slot level above 1st.

name: Looping Trail
desc: You touch a trail no more than 1 milha in length, reconfiguring it to give it switchbacks and curves that make the trail loop back on itself. For the duration, the trail makes subtle changes in its configuration and in the surrounding environment to give the impression of forward progression along a continuous path. A criatura on the trail deve ter sucesso em a Sabedoria (Sobrevivência) check to notice that the trail is leading it in a closed loop.
material: a piece of rope twisted into a loop

name: Lovesick
desc:
This spell causes criaturas to behave unpredictably, as they randomly experience the full gamut of emotions of someone who has fallen head over heels in love. cada criatura in a 10-pé-radius sphere centered on a point you choose within range deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Sabedoria when you cast this spell ou ficar affected by it.

An affected alvo can’t take reactions and must roll a d10 no início de cada um de seus turnos to determine its behavior for that turn.

| d10 | Behavior |
|---|---|
| 1-3 | The criatura spends its turn moping like a lovelorn teenager; it doesn’t move ou receber actions. |
| 4–5 | The criatura bursts into tears, recebe the Dash action, and uses all its movement to run off in a random direction. To determine the direction, roll a d8 and assign a direction to each die face. |
| 6 | The criatura uses its action to remove one item of clothing or piece of armor. Each rodada spent removing pieces of armor reduces its AC by 1. |
| 7–8 | The criatura drops anything it is holding in its hands and passionately embraces a randomly determined criatura. Treat this as a grapple attempt which uses the Attack action. |
| 9 | The criatura flies into a jealous rage and uses its action to make a ataque corpo a corpo against a randomly determined criatura. |
| 10 | The criatura can act and move normally. |

no final de cada um de seus turnos, an affected alvo can make a teste de resistência de Sabedoria, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso no teste.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 5th level or higher, the radius of the sphere increases by 5 pés for each slot level above 4th.
material: a handful of red rose petals

name: Machine Sacrifice
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You sacrifice a willing construct you can see to imbue a willing alvo with construct traits. The alvo gains resistance to all não mágico damage and gains immunity to the cego, enfeitiçado, surdo, amedrontado, petrificado, and envenenado conditions.

name: Machine Speech
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork Your voice, and to a lesser extent your mind, changes to communicate only in the whirring clicks of machine speech. Until the end of your next turn, all clockwork spells you cast have vantagem on their attack rolls or the alvos have desvantagem on their saving throws.

name: Machine's Load
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You touch a criatura and give it the capacity to carry, lift, push, or drag weight as if it were one size category larger. If you're using the encumbrance rules, the alvo is not subject to penalties for weight. Furthermore, the subject can carry loads that would normally be unwieldy.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia higher than 1st, you can touch one additional criatura for each spell level.

name: Maddening Whispers
desc: You whisper a string of Void Speech toward a alvo within range that can hear you. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Carisma ou ficar incapacitado. While incapacitado by this spell, the alvo’s Deslocamento is 0, and it can’t benefit from increases to its Deslocamento. To maintain the effect for the duration, you must use your action on subsequent turns to continue whispering; otherwise, the spell ends. The spell also ends if the alvo recebe damage.

name: Mage Armor
desc: Você toca a criatura voluntária who isn't wearing armadura, and a protective mágico force surrounds it until a magia termina. o alvo's base CA becomes 13 + its modificador de Destreza. a magia termina if o alvo dons armadura or if you dismiss the magia as an ação.
material: A piece of cured leather.

name: Mage Armor
desc: Until the spell ends, the alvo is protected by a shimmering mágico força. Its AC becomes 13 + its Destreza modifier. The spell ends if the alvo dons armor, or if you use an action to dismiss it.
higher_level: The alvo gains 5 temporary pontos de vida for each slot level above 1st. The temporary pontos de vida last for the spell's duration.

name: Mage Hand
desc: A spectral, floating hand appears at a point você escolhe dentro do alcance. The hand lasts for a duração or until you dismiss it as an ação. The hand vanishes if it is ever more than 9 metros away from you or if Você conjura esta magia again. você pode use your ação to control the hand. você pode use the hand to manipulate an objeto, open an unlocked door or container, stow or retrieve an item from an open container, or pour the contents out of a vial. você pode move the hand up to 9 metros each time Você usa it. The hand can't attack, activate itens mágicos, or carry more than 4 kg.

name: Mage Hand
desc:
A faintly shimmering phantasmal hand appears at a point you choose within range. It remains until you dismiss it as an action, or until you move more than 30 pés from it.

You can use an action to control the hand and direct it to do any of the following:

* manipulate an object.
* open an unlocked container or door.
* stow or retrieve items from unlocked containers.

The hand cannot attack, use magic items, or carry more than 10 pounds.

name: Magic Circle
desc:
você cria a 10-­--foot-­--raio, 20-­--foot-­--tall cilindro of mágico energy centered on a point on the ground that você pode ver dentro do alcance. brilhante runes appear wherever the cilindro intersects with the floor or other superfície. Escolha one or more of the following types of criatura: celestials, elemental, fada, demônio, or morto-vivo. The circle affects uma criatura of the chosen type in the following ways: 
- a criatura can't willingly enter the cilindro by não mágico means. If a criatura tries to use teletransporte or interplanar travel to do so, it must first succeed on a Carisma teste de resistência. 
- a criatura tem desvantagem em rolagem de ataques against alvo within the cilindro. 
- alvo within the cilindro can't be enfeitiçado, amedrontado, or possessed by a criatura.
quando você conjura esta magia, você pode elect to cause its magia to operate in the reverse direction, preventing uma criatura of the specified type from leaving the cilindro and protecting alvo outside it.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 4° nível ou superior, a duração increases by 1 hour for each nível do espaço above 3rd.
material: Holy water or powdered silver and iron worth at least 100 gp, which the magia consumes.

name: Magic Circle
desc:
mágico energies surround the area and stop the type of designated criatura from willingly entering by não mágico means.

Designated criaturas have desvantagem when attacking criaturas within the area and are unable to charm, frighten, or possess criaturas within the area. When a designated criatura attempts to teleport or use interplanar travel to enter the area, it makes a teste de resistência de Carisma or its attempt fails.

You may also choose to reverse this spell, trapping a criatura of your chosen type within the area in order to protect alvos outside it.
higher_level: The spell's duration increases by 1 hora for every slot level above 3rd.

name: Magic Jar
desc: Your corpo falls into a catatonic state as your alma leaves it and enters the container you used for the magia's material componente. While your alma inhabits the container, Você está aware of your surroundings as if you were in the container's space. você pode't move or use reações. The only ação você pode take is to project your alma up to 30 metros out of the container, either returning to your living corpo (and ending the magia) or attempting to possess a humanoide corpo. você pode attempt to possess any humanoide a até 30 metros de you that você pode ver (criatura warded by a protection from evil and good or magia circle magia can't be possessed). o alvo deve fazer um teste de resistência de Carisma. On a failure, your alma moves into o alvo's corpo, and o alvo's alma becomes trapped in the container. On a success, o alvo resists your efforts to possess it, and você pode't attempt to possess it again por 24 horas. Once you possess uma criatura's corpo, you control it. Your game statistics are replaced by the statistics of a criatura, though you retain your alignment and your Inteligência, Sabedoria, and valor de Carismas. You retain the benefit of your own class features. If o alvo has any class levels, você pode't use any of its class features. Meanwhile, the possessed criatura's alma can perceive from the container using its own sentidos, but it can't move or take ações at all. While possessing a corpo, você pode use your ação to return from the host corpo to the container if it is a até 30 metros de you, returning the host criatura's alma to its corpo. If the host corpo morre while you're in it, a criatura morre, and you deve fazer um teste de resistência de Carisma against your own conjuração DC. On a success, you return to the container if it is a até 30 metros de you. Caso contrário, you morre. If the container is destroyed or a magia termina, your alma immediately returns to your corpo. If your corpo is more than 30 metros away from you or if your corpo is morto when Você tenta to return to it, you morre. If another criatura's alma is in the container when it is destroyed, a criatura's alma returns to its corpo if the corpo is alive and within 30 metros. Caso contrário, that criatura morre. When a magia termina, the container is destroyed.
material: A gema, cristal, reliquary, or some other ornamental container worth at least 500 gp.

name: Magic Jar
desc:
Your body becomes catatonic as your soul enters the vessel used as a componente material. While within this vessel, you're aware of your surroundings as if you physically occupied the same space.

The only action you can take is to project your soul within range, whether to return to your living body (and end the spell) or to possess a humanoid.

You may not alvo criaturas protected by protection from good and evil or magic circle spells. A criatura you try to possess makes a teste de resistência de Carisma or your soul moves from your vessel and into its body. The criatura's soul is now within the container. em um sucesso no teste, the criatura resists and you may not attempt to possess it again for 24 horas.

Once you possess a criatura, you have control of it. Replace your game statistics with the criatura's, except your Carisma, Inteligência and Sabedoria scores. Your own cultural traits and class features also remain, and you may not use the criatura's cultural traits or class features (if it has any).

During possession, you can use an action to return to the vessel if it is within range, returning the host criatura to its body. If the host body dies while you are possessing it, the criatura also dies and you deve fazer a Carisma save. em um sucesso you return to the container if it's within range. Otherwise, you die.

If the vessel is destroyed, the spell ends and your soul returns to your body if it's within range. If your body is out of range or dead when you try to return, you die.

The possessed criatura perceives the world as if it occupied the same space as the vessel, but may not take any actions or movement. If the vessel is destroyed while occupied by a criatura other than yourself, the criatura returns to its body if the body is alive and within range. Otherwise, the criatura dies.

The vessel is destroyed when the spell ends.

name: Magic Missile
desc: você cria three brilhante darts of mágico force. Each dart hits uma criatura of your choice that você pode ver dentro do alcance. A dart deals 1d4 + 1 dano de força to its alvo. The darts all strike simultaneously, and você pode direct them to hit one criatura or several.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 2° nível ou superior, the magia creates one more dart for each nível do espaço above 1st.

name: Magic Missile
desc: A trio of glowing darts of mágico força unerringly and simultaneously strike the alvos, each dealing 1d4+1 dano de força.
higher_level: Evoke one additional dart and alvo up to one additional criatura for each slot level above 1st.

name: Magic Mouth
desc: You implant a message within an objeto in range, a message that is uttered when a trigger condition is met. Escolha an objeto that você pode ver and that isn't being worn or carried by another criatura. Then speak the message, which must be 25 words or less, though it can be delivered over enquanto 10 minutes. Finally, determine the circumstance that will trigger the magia to deliver your message. When that circumstance occurs, a mágico mouth appears on the objeto and recites the message in your voice and at the same volume you spoke. If the objeto you chose has a mouth or something that looks like a mouth (Por exemplo, the mouth of a statue), the mágico mouth appears there so that the words appear to come from the objeto's mouth. quando você conjura esta magia, você pode have the magia end after it delivers its message, or it can remain and repeat its message whenever the trigger occurs. The triggering circumstance can be as general or as detailed as you like, though it must be based on visual or audible conditions that occur a até 9 metros de the objeto. Por exemplo, you could instruct the mouth to speak when any criatura moves a até 9 metros de the objeto or when a silver bell rings a até 9 metros de it.
material: A small bit of honeycomb and jade dust worth at least 10 gp, which the magia consumes

name: Magic Mouth
desc:
The alvo is imbued with a spoken message of 25 words or fewer which it speaks when a trigger condition you choose is met. The message may take up to 10 minutos to convey.

When your trigger condition is met, a mágico mouth appears on the object and recites the message in the same voice and volume as you used when instructing it. If the object chosen has a mouth (for example, a painted portrait) this is where the mouth appears.

You may choose upon casting whether the message is a single event, or whether it repeats every time the trigger condition is met.

The trigger condition must be based upon audio or visual cues within 30 pés of the object, and may be highly detailed or as broad as you choose.

For example, the trigger could be when any attack action is made within range, or when the first spring shoot breaks ground within range.

name: Magic Weapon
desc: Você toca a não mágico arma. Until a magia termina, that arma becomes a magia arma with a +1 bonus to rolagem de ataques and dano rolls.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 4° nível ou superior, the bonus increases to +2. When Você usa um espaço de magia of 6th level or higher, the bonus increases to +3.

name: Magic Weapon
desc: Until the spell ends, the alvo becomes +1 magic weapon.
higher_level: The bonus increases by +1 for every 2 slot levels above 2nd (maximum +3).

name: Magma Spray
desc:
A 5-pé-diameter, 5-pé-tall cylindrical fountain of magma erupts from the ground in a space of your choice within range. A criatura in that space recebe 3d8 dano de fogo, or half as much damage with a successful teste de resistência de Destreza. A criatura that enters the area on its turn or ends its turn there also recebe 3d8 dano de fogo, or half as much damage with a successful teste de resistência de Destreza. A criatura can take this damage only once per turn.
  A criatura killed by this spell is reduced to ash.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, o dano increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Magnificent Mansion
desc: You conjure an extradimensional dwelling in range that lasts for a duração. você escolhe where its one entrance is located. The entrance shimmers faintly and is 1.5 metros wide and 3 metros tall. You and any criatura you designate when you conjurar a magia can enter the extradimensional dwelling enquanto the portal remains open. você pode open or close the portal if Você está a até 9 metros de it. While closed, the portal is invisível. Beyond the portal is a magnificent foyer with numerous chambers beyond. The atmosphere is clean, fresh, and warm. você pode create any floor plan you like, but the space can't exceed 50 cubes, each cubo being 3 metros on each side. The place is furnished and decorated as você escolhe. It contains sufficient food to serve a nine course banquet for up to 100 people. A cajado of 100 near-transparent servants attends all who enter. You decide the visual appearance of these servants and their attire. They are completely obedient to your orders. Each servant can perform any task a normal human servant could perform, but they can't attack or take any ação that would directly harm another criatura. Thus the servants can fetch things, clean, mend, fold clothes, light fires, serve food, pour wine, and so on. The servants can go anywhere in the mansion but can't leave it. Furnishings and other objeto created by this magia dissipate into smoke if removed from the mansion. When a magia termina, any criatura inside the extradimensional space are expelled into the open spaces nearest to the entrance.
material: A miniature portal carved from ivory, a small piece of polished marble, and a tiny silver spoon, each item worth at least 5 gp.

name: Magnificent Mansion
desc:
You conjure an extradimensional residence within range. It has one entrance that is in a place of your choosing, has a faint luster to it, and is 5 pés wide and 10 pés tall. You and any designated criatura may enter your mansion while the portal is open. You may open and close the portal while you are within 30 pés of it. Once closed the entrance is invisível.

The entrance leads to an opulent entrance hall, with many doors and halls coming from it. The atmosphere is welcoming, warm, and comfortable, and the whole place is sparkling clean.

The floor plan of the residence is up to you, but it must be made up of fifty or fewer 10-pé cubes.

The furniture and decor are chosen by you. The residence contains enough food to provide Supply for a number of people equal to 5 × your proficiência bonus. A staff of translucent, lustrous servants dwell within the residence. They may otherwise look how you wish. These servants obey your commands without question, and can perform the same nonhostile actions as a human servant—they might carry objects, prepare and serve food and drinks, clean, make simple repairs, and so on. Servants have access to the entire mansion but may not leave.

All objects and furnishings belonging to the mansion evaporate into shimmering smoke when they leave it. Any criatura within the mansion when the spell ends is expelled into an unoccupied space near the entrance.

name: Maim
desc:
Your hands become claws bathed in necrótico energy. Make a melee ataque mágico against a criatura you can alcance. On a hit, the alvo recebe 4d6 dano necrótico and a section of its body of your choosing withers:
   ***Upper Limb.*** The alvo has desvantagem on Força checks, and, if it has the Ataque Múltiplo action, it has desvantagem on its first jogada de ataque each rodada.
   ***Lower Limb.*** The alvo's Deslocamento is reduced by 10 pés, and it has desvantagem on Destreza checks.
   ***Body.*** Choose one damage type: contundente, perfurante, or cortante. The alvo loses its resistance to that damage type. If the alvo doesn't have resistance to the chosen damage type, it is vulnerable to that damage type instead.
  The effect is permanent until removed by *remove curse*, *greater restoration*, or similar magic.

name: Major Image
desc: você cria the image of an objeto, uma criatura, or some other visible phenomenon that is no larger than a 6 metros cubo. The image appears at a spot that você pode ver dentro do alcance and lasts for a duração. It seems completely real, including sounds, smells, and temperature appropriate to the thing depicted. você pode't create sufficient heat or cold to cause dano, a sound loud enough to deal dano de trovão or deafen uma criatura, or a smell that might sicken uma criatura (like a troglodyte's stench). enquanto Você está dentro do alcance of the ilusão, você pode use your ação to cause the image to move to any other spot dentro do alcance. As the image changes location, você pode alter its appearance so that its movements appear natural for the image. Por exemplo, if você cria an image of uma criatura and move it, você pode alter the image so that it appears to be walking. Similarly, você pode cause the ilusão to make different sounds at different times, even making it carry on a conversation, Por exemplo. Physical interaction with the image reveals it to be an ilusão, because things can pass through it. uma criatura that uses its ação to examine the image can determine that it is an ilusão with a successful Inteligência (Investigation) check against your CD da magia. If uma criatura discerns the ilusão for what it is, a criatura pode ver through the image, and its other sensory qualities become faint to a criatura.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 6° nível ou superior, the magia lasts until dissipar, without requiring your concentração.
material: A bit of fleece.

name: Major Image
desc:
Until the spell ends, you create an image that appears completely real. The illusion includes sounds, smells, and temperature in addition to visual phenomena. None of the effects of the illusion are able to cause actual harm.

While within range you can use an action to move the illusion. As the image moves you may also change its appearance to make the movement seem natural (like a roc moving its wings to fly) and also change the nonvisual elements of the illusion for the same reason (like the sound of beating wings as the roc flies).

Any physical interaction immediately reveals the image is an illusion, as objects and criaturas alike pass through it. An Investigação check against your CD de resistência à magia also reveals the image is an illusion.

When a criatura realizes the image is an illusion, the effects become fainter for that criatura.
higher_level: When cast using a 6th-level espaço de magia the illusion lasts until dispelled without requiring Concentração.

name: Malevolent Waves
desc: You create an invisível miasma that fills the area within 30 pés of you. All your aliados have vantagem on Destreza (Furtividade) checks they make within 30 pés of you, and all your inimigos are envenenado while within that radius.
material: a profane object that has been bathed in blood

name: Mammon’s Due
desc:
You summon a cylindrical sinkhole filled with burning ash and grasping arms made of molten metal at a point on the ground you can see within range. The sinkhole is 20 pés deep and 50 pés in diameter, and is difficult terrain. A criatura that’s in the area when the spell is cast, or that begins its turn in the area or enters it during its turn, recebe 10d6 dano de fogo and deve fazer a Força or Destreza (criatura’s choice) teste de resistência. em uma falha no teste, the criatura is imobilizado by the molten arms, which try to drag it below the surface of the ash.

A criatura that’s imobilizado by the arms no início de your turn deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Força ou ficar pulled 5 pés farther down into the ash. A criatura pulled below the surface is cego, surdo, and can’t breathe. To escape, a criatura must use an action to make a successful Força or teste de Destreza against your CD de resistência à magia. On a successful check, the criatura is no longer imobilizado and can move through the difficult terrain of the ash pit. It doesn’t need to make a Força or teste de resistência de Destreza this turn to not be grabbed by the arms again, but it deve fazer the teste de resistência as normal if it’s still in the ash pit no início de its next turn.

The diameter of the ash pit increases by 10 pés no início de each of your turns for the duration of the spell. The ash pit remains after the spell ends, but the grasping arms disappear and imobilizado criaturas are freed automatically. As the ash slowly cools, it causa 1d6 less dano de fogo for each hora that passes after the spell ends.
material: 11 gilded human skulls worth 150 gp each, which are consumed by the spell

name: Mantle of the Brave
desc: You touch up to four individuals, bolstering their courage. The next time a criatura affected by this spell deve fazer a teste de resistência against a spell or effect that would cause the amedrontado condition, it has vantagem on the roll. Once a criatura has received this benefit, the spell ends for that criatura.

name: March of the Dead
desc: This spell animates the recently dead to remove them from a battlefield. Choose one corpse of a Medium or Small humanoid per level of the caster (within range). Your spell imbues the alvos with an animating spirit, raising them as construct criaturas similar in appearance to flesh golems, though with the Força and abilities of zombies. Dwarves use this to return the bodies of the fallen to clan tombs and to deny the corpses the foul attention of ghouls, necromancers, and similar foes. On each of your turns, you can use a ação bônus to mentally command all the criaturas you made with this spell if the criaturas are within 60 pés of you. You decide what action the criaturas will take and where they will move during the next dia; you cannot command them to guard. If you issue no commands, the criaturas only defend themselves against hostile criaturas. Once given an order and direction of march, the criaturas continue to follow it until they arrive at the destination you named or until 24 horas have elapsed when the spell ends and the corpses fall lifeless once more. To tell criaturas to move for another 24 horas, you must cast this spell on the criaturas again before the current 24-hora period ends. This use of the spell reasserts your control over up to 50 criaturas you have animated with this spell rather than animating a new one.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, you animate or reassert control over two additional construct criaturas for each slot level above 3rd (two criaturas/level at 4th, three criaturas/level at 5th). Each of the criaturas must come from a different corpse.

name: Mark Prey
desc: You choose a criatura you can see within range as your prey. Until the spell ends, you have vantagem on Sabedoria (Percepção) and Sabedoria (Sobrevivência) checks to find or track your prey. In addition, the alvo is outlined in leve that only you can see. Any jogada de ataque you make against your prey has vantagem if you can see it, and your prey can't benefit from being invisível against you. If the alvo drops to 0 pontos de vida before this spell ends, you can use a ação bônus on a subsequent turn to mark a new alvo as your prey.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level, you can maintain your Concentração on the spell for up to 8 horas. When you use a espaço de magia of 5th level or higher, you can maintain your Concentração on the spell for up to 24 horas.

name: Martyr's Rally
desc: With a hopeful rallying cry just as you fall inconsciente, you rouse your aliados to action. Each aliado within 60 pés of you that can see and hear you has vantagem on attack rolls for the duration. If you regain pontos de vida, the spell immediately ends.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when you are reduced to 0 hit points

name: Mass Blade Ward
desc: You make a protective gesture toward your aliados. Choose three criaturas that you can see within range. Until the end of your next turn, the alvos have resistance against contundente, perfurante, and dano cortante from weapon attacks. If a alvo moves farther than 30 pés from you, the effect ends for that criatura.

name: Mass Cure Wounds
desc: A wave of healing energy washes out from a point of your choice dentro do alcance. Escolha up to six criatura in a 9 metros esfera centered on that point. cada alvo recupera pontos de vida equal to 3d8 + your modificador de conjuração. This magia has no effect on morto-vivo or constructo.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 6° nível ou superior, the healing increases by 1d8 for each nível do espaço above 5th.

name: Mass Cure Wounds
desc: Glowing energy rushes through the air and each alvo regains pontos de vida equal to 3d8 + your spellcasting modifier.
higher_level: The pontos de vida regained increase by 1d8 for each slot level above 5th.

name: Mass Faerie Fire
desc:
You can place up to three 20-pé cubes each centered on a point you can see within range. Each object in a cube is outlined in blue, green, or violet leve (your choice). Any criatura in a cube when the spell is cast is also outlined in leve if it fails a teste de resistência de Destreza. A criatura in the area of more than one cube is affected only once. Each affected object and criatura sheds dim leve in a 10-pé radius for the duration.
  Any jogada de ataque against an affected object or criatura has vantagem if the attacker can see it, and the affected criatura or object can't benefit from being invisível.

name: Mass Heal
desc: A flood of healing energy flows from you into injured criatura around you. You restore up to 700 pontos de vida, divided as você escolhe among any number of criatura that você pode ver dentro do alcance. criatura healed by this magia are also cured of all diseases and any effect making them cego or ensurdecido. This magia has no effect on morto-vivo or constructo.

name: Mass Heal
desc:
Healing energy erupts from your steepled hands and restores up to 700 pontos de vida between the alvos.

criaturas healed in this way are also cured of any diseases, and any effect causing them to be cego or surdo. In addition, on subsequent turns within the next minuto you can use a ação bônus to distribute any unused pontos de vida.

name: Mass Healing Word
desc: As Você chama out words of restoration, up to six criatura of your choice that você pode ver dentro do alcance recupera pontos de vida equal to 1d4 + your modificador de conjuração. This magia has no effect on morto-vivo or constructo.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 4° nível ou superior, the healing increases by 1d4 for each nível do espaço above 3rd.

name: Mass Healing Word
desc: Healing energy flows from you in a wash of restorative power and each alvo regains pontos de vida equal to 1d4 + your spellcasting ability modifier.
higher_level: The pontos de vida regained increase by 1d4 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Mass Hobble Mount
desc:
When you cast **mass hobble mount**, you make separate ranged spell attacks against up to six horses, wolves, or other four-legged or two-legged beasts being ridden as mounts within 60 pés of you. The alvos can be different types of beasts and can have different numbers of legs. Each beast hit by your spell is disabled so that it can’t move at its normal Deslocamento without incurring injury. An affected criatura that moves more than half its base Deslocamento in a turn recebe 4d6 dano contundente.

This spell has no effect on a criatura that your GM deems to not be a mount.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, o dano increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 3rd.
dnd_class: Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Warlock, Wizard

name: Mass Repair Metal
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork As repair metal, but you can affect all metal within range. You repair 1d8 + 5 damage to a metal object or construct by sealing up rents and bending metal back into place.
higher_level: Casting mass repair metal as a 6th-level spell repairs 2d8 + 10 damage.

name: Mass Suggestion
desc: You suggest a course of activity (limited to a sentence or two) and magically influence up to twelve criatura of your choice that você pode ver dentro do alcance and that can hear and understand you. criatura that can't be enfeitiçado are imune a this effect. The suggestion must be worded in such a manner as to make the course of ação sound reasonable. Asking a criatura to stab itself, throw itself onto a lança, immolate itself, or do some other obviously harmful act automatically negates the effect of the magia. cada alvo deve fazer um teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em uma falha no teste, it pursues the course of ação you described to the best of its ability. The suggested course of ação can continue for the entire duration. If the suggested activity can be completed in a shorter time, a magia termina when the subject finishes what it was asked to do. você pode also specify conditions that will trigger a Especial activity during a duração. Por exemplo, you might suggest that a group of soldiers give all their money to the first beggar they meet. If the condition isn't met before a magia termina, the activity isn't performed. If you or any of your companions dano uma criatura affected by this magia, a magia termina for that criatura.
higher_level: quando você conjura esta magia using a 7th-level espaços de magia, a duração is 10 days. When Você usa an 8th-level espaços de magia, a duração is 30 days. When Você usa a 9th-level espaços de magia, a duração is a year and a day.
material: A snake's tongue and either a bit of honeycomb or a drop of sweet oil.

name: Mass Suggestion
desc:
criaturas that cannot be enfeitiçado are immune to this spell. Suggest an activity phrased in a sentence or two. The alvos are magically influenced to follow that course of activity. The suggestion must be worded to sound reasonable. Asking the alvos to perform an action that is obviously harmful to them ends the spell.

A alvo carries out the activity suggested by you as well as it can. The activity can last for the duration of the spell, and if it requires less time the spell ends after a alvo has carried out the activity.

You may specify trigger conditions that cause a alvo to perform a specific activity while the spell lasts. For example, you may suggest that the alvo recebe off its clothes and dives the next time it sees a body of water. If the alvo does not see a body of water before the spell ends, the specific activity isn't performed.

Any damage done to a alvo by you or an aliado ends the spell for that criatura.
higher_level: When cast using a 7th-level espaço de magia, the duration of the spell increases to 10 dias. When cast using an 8th-level espaço de magia, the duration increases to 30 dias. When cast using a 9th-level espaço de magia, the duration increases to a year and a dia.

name: Mass Surge Dampener
desc: Using your Força of will, you protect up to three criaturas other than yourself from the effect of a chaos magic surge. A protected criatura can make a CD 13 teste de resistência de Carisma to negate the effect of a chaos magic surge that does not normally allow a teste de resistência, or it gains vantagem on a teste de resistência that is normally allowed. Once a protected criatura makes a successful teste de resistência allowed by **mass surge dampener**, the spell’s effect ends for that criatura.

name: Maw of Needles
desc: A spiny array of needle-like fangs protrudes from your gums, giving you a spiny bite. For the duration, you can use your action to make a melee ataque mágico with the bite. On a hit, the alvo recebe 2d6 dano perfurante and deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Destreza or some of the spines in your mouth break off, sticking in the alvo. Until this spell ends, the alvo deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Constituição no início de cada um de seus turnos ou receber 1d6 dano perfurante from the spines. If you hit a alvo that has your spines stuck in it, your attack causa extra damage equal to your spellcasting ability modifier, and more spines don’t break off in the alvo. Your spines can stick in only um alvo at a time. If your spines stick into another alvo, the spines on the previous alvo crumble to dust, ending the effect on that alvo.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, o dano of the spiny bite and the spines increases by 1d6 for every two slot levels above 1st.

name: Maze
desc: You banish uma criatura that você pode ver dentro do alcance into a labyrinthine demiplane. o alvo remains there for a duração or until it escapes the maze. o alvo can use its ação to attempt to escape. When it does so, it makes a DC 20 Inteligência check. If it succeeds, it escapes, and a magia termina (a minotaur or goristro demon automatically succeeds). When a magia termina, o alvo reappears in the space it left or, if that space is occupied, in the nearest espaço desocupado.

name: Maze
desc:
The alvo is banished to a complex maze on its own demiplane, and remains there for the duration or until the alvo succeeds in escaping.

The alvo can use an action to attempt to escape, making an teste de resistência de Inteligência. em um sucesso no teste it escapes and the spell ends. A criatura with Labyrinthine Recall (or a similar trait) automatically succeeds on its save.

When the spell ends the alvo reappears in the space it occupied before the spell was cast, or the closest unoccupied space if that space is occupied.

name: Mechanical Union
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You can take control of a construct by voice or mental commands. The construct makes a teste de resistência de Sabedoria to resist the spell, and it gets vantagem on the teste de resistência if its CR equals or exceeds your level in the class used to cast this spell. Once a command is given, the construct does everything it can to complete the command. Giving a new command recebe an action. Constructs will risk harm, even go into combat, on your orders but will not self-destruct; giving such an order ends the spell.

name: Meld Into Stone
desc:
Until the spell ends, you meld yourself and your carried equipment into the alvo stone. Using your movement, you may enter the stone from any point you can touch. No trace of your presence is visible or detectable by não mágico senses.

Within the stone, you can't see outside it and have desvantagem on Percepção checks made to hear beyond it. You are aware of time passing, and may cast spells upon yourself. You may use your movement only to step out of the alvo where you entered it, ending the spell.

If the alvo is damaged such that its shape changes and you no longer fit within it, you are expelled and take 6d6 dano contundente. Complete destruction of the alvo, or its transmutation into another substance, expels you and you take 50 dano contundente. When expelled you fall prostrado into the closest unoccupied space near your entrance point.
higher_level: When using a 5th-level espaço de magia, you may alcance out of the alvo to make spell attacks or ranged weapon attacks without ending the spell. You make these attacks with desvantagem.

name: Meld into Stone
desc: You step into a stone objeto or superfície large enough to fully contain your corpo, melding yourself and all the equipment you carry with the stone for a duração. Using your movimento, you step into the stone at a point você pode Toque. Nothing of your presence remains visible or Caso contrário detectable by não mágico sentidos. While merged with the stone, você pode't see what occurs outside it, and any Sabedoria (Perception) checks você faz to hear sounds outside it are made with desvantagem. You remain aware of the passage of time and can cast magias on yourself while merged in the stone. você pode use your movimento to leave the stone where you entered it, which ends the magia. You Caso contrário can't move. Minor physical dano to the stone doesn't harm you, but its partial destruction or a change in its shape (to the extent that you no longer fit within it) expels you and deals 6d6 dano de concussão to you. The stone's complete destruction (or transmutação into a different substance) expels you and deals 50 dano de concussão to you. If expelled, you fall caído in an espaço desocupado closest to where you first entered.

name: Memento Mori
desc:
You transform yourself into a horrifying vision of death, rotted and crawling with maggots, exuding the stench of the grave. cada criatura that can see you deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Carisma ou ficar atordoado until the end of your next turn.

A criatura that succeeds on the teste de resistência is immune to further castings of this spell for 24 horas.

name: Mending
desc: This magia repairs a single break or tear in an objeto Você toca, such as a broken key, a torn capa, or a leaking wineskin. enquanto the break or tear is no longer than 0 metros in any dimension, you mend it, leaving no trace of the former dano. This magia can physically repair a item mágico or constructo, but the magia can't restore magia to such an objeto.
material: Two lodestones.

name: Mending
desc:
You repair a single rip or break in the alvo object (for example, a cracked goblet, torn page, or ripped robe). The break must be smaller than 1 pé in all dimensions. The spell leaves no trace that the object was damaged.

Magic items and constructs may be repaired in this way, but their magic is not restored. You gain an expertise die on maintenance checks if you are able to cast this spell on the item you are treating.
dnd_class: Artificer, Bard, Cleric, Druid, Herald, Sorcerer, Wizard

name: Mental Grip
desc:
You conjure extensions of your own mental fortitude to keep your foes at bay. For the spell's duration, you can use an action to attempt to grapple a criatura within range by making a Concentração check against its maneuver CD.

On its turn, a alvo agarrado in this way can use an action to attempt to escape the grapple, using your CD de resistência à magia instead of your maneuver CD.

Successful escape attempts do not break your Concentração on the spell.

name: Mephitic Croak
desc: You release an intensely loud burp of acidic gas in a 15-pé cone. criaturas in the area take 2d6 dano de ácido plus 2d6 dano de trovão, or half as much damage with a successful teste de resistência de Destreza. A criatura whose teste de resistência de Destreza fails must also make a successful teste de resistência de Constituição ou ficar atordoado and envenenado until the start of your next turn.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, both ácido and dano de trovão increase by 1d6 for each slot level above 2nd.
material: a dead toad and a dram of arsenic worth 10 gp

name: Message
desc: Você aponta your finger toward uma criatura dentro do alcance and whisper a message. o alvo (and only o alvo) hears the message and can reply in a whisper that only você pode hear. você pode conjurar esta magia through solid objeto if Você está familiar with o alvo and know it is beyond the barrier. mágico silêncio, 0 metros of stone, 1 inch of common metal, a thin sheet of lead, or 1.5 metros of wood blocks the magia. The magia doesn't have to follow a straight linha and can travel freely around corners or through openings.
material: A short piece of copper wire.

name: Message
desc:
You point and whisper your message at the alvo.

It alone hears the message and may reply in a whisper audible only to you.

You can cast this spell through solid objects if you are familiar with the alvo and are certain it is beyond the barrier. The message is blocked by 3 pés of wood, 1 pé of stone, 1 inch of Comum metals, or a thin sheet of lead.

The spell moves freely around corners or through openings.

name: Meteor Swarm
desc: Blazing orbs of fire plummet to the ground at four different points você pode ver dentro do alcance. cada criatura in a 12 metros esfera centered on each point você escolhe deve fazer um teste de resistência de Destreza. The esfera spreads around corners. uma criatura takes 20d6 dano de fogo and 20d6 dano de concussão em uma falha no teste, or half as much dano on a successful one. uma criatura in the área of more than one fiery burst is affected only once. The magia damages objeto in the área and ignites flammable objeto that aren't being worn or carried.

name: Meteor Swarm
desc: Scorching spheres of flame strike the ground at 4 different points within range. The effects of a sphere alcance around corners. criaturas and objects in the area take 14d6 dano de fogo and 14d6 dano contundente, and flammable unattended objects catch on fogo. If a criatura is in the area of more than one sphere, it is affected only once.

name: Mind Blank
desc: Until a magia termina, one criatura voluntária Você toca is imune a dano psíquico, any effect that would sense its emotions or read its thoughts, adivinhação magias, and the enfeitiçado condition. The magia even foils wish magias and magias or effects of similar power used to affect o alvo's mind or to gain information about o alvo.

name: Mind Blank
desc:
The alvo is immune to dano psíquico, any effect that would read its emotions or thoughts, divination spells, and the enfeitiçado condition.

This immunity extends even to the wish spell, and mágico effects or spells of similar power that would affect the alvo's mind or gain information about it.

name: Mind Exchange
desc:
One humanoid of your choice that you can see within range deve fazer a teste de resistência de Carisma. em uma falha no teste, you project your mind into the body of the alvo. You use the alvo’s statistics but don’t gain access to its knowledge, class features, or proficiencies, retaining your own instead. Meanwhile, the alvo’s mind is shunted into your body, where it uses your statistics but likewise retains its own knowledge, class features, and proficiencies.

The exchange lasts until either of the the two bodies drops to 0 pontos de vida, until you end it as a ação bônus, or until you are forced out of the alvo body by an effect such as a [dispel magic](https://api.open5e.com/spells/dispel-magic) or [dispel evil and good](https://api.open5e.com/spells/dispel-evil-and-good) spell (the latter spell defeats **mind exchange** even though possession by a humanoid isn’t usually affected by that spell). When the effect of this spell ends, both switched minds return to their original bodies. The alvo of the spell is immune to mind exchange for 24 horas after succeeding on the teste de resistência or after the exchange ends.
