The effects of the exchange can be made permanent with a [wish](https://api.open5e.com/spells/wish) spell or comparable magic.
material: a prism and silver coin
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Mind Maze
desc: Choose a criatura you can see within range. It deve ter sucesso em an teste de resistência de Inteligência ou ficar mentally trapped in an imagined maze of mirrors for the duration. While trapped in this way, the criatura is incapacitado, but it imagines itself alone and wandering through the maze. Externally, it appears dazed as it turns in place and reaches out at nonexistent barriers. Each time the alvo recebe damage, it makes another teste de resistência de Inteligência. em um sucesso, the spell ends.

name: Mindshield
desc: The alvo has resistance to dano psíquico and vantagem on saving throws made to resist being enfeitiçado or amedrontado.

name: Minor Illusion
desc: você cria a sound or an image of an objeto dentro do alcance that lasts for a duração. The ilusão also ends if you dismiss it as an ação or conjurar esta magia again. If você cria a sound, its volume can range from a whisper to a scream. It can be your voice, someone else's voice, a lion's roar, a beating of drums, or any other sound você escolhe. The sound continues unabated throughout a duração, or você pode make discrete sounds at different times before a magia termina. If você cria an image of an objeto-such as a chair, muddy footprints, or a small chest-it must be no larger than a 1.5 metros cubo. The image can't create sound, light, smell, or any other sensory effect. Physical interaction with the image reveals it to be an ilusão, because things can pass through it. If uma criatura uses its ação to examine the sound or image, a criatura can determine that it is an ilusão with a successful Inteligência (Investigation) check against your CD da magia. If uma criatura discerns the ilusão for what it is, the ilusão becomes faint to a criatura.
material: A bit of fleece.

name: Minor Illusion
desc:
This spell creates a sound or image of an object.

The illusion disappears if dismissed or you cast the spell again.

You may create any sound you choose, ranging in volume from a whisper to a scream. You may choose one sound for the duration or change them at varying points before the spell ends. Sounds are audible outside the spell's area.

Visual illusions may replicate any image and remain within the spell's area, but cannot create sound, leve, smell, or other sensory effects.

The image is revealed as an illusion with any physical interaction as physical objects and criaturas pass through it. An Investigação check against your CD de resistência à magia also reveals the image is an illusion. When a criatura realizes the image is an illusion, the effects become fainter for that criatura.

name: Mirage Arcane
desc: você faz terrain in an área up to 2 km quadrado look, sound, smell, and even feel like some other sort of terrain. The terrain's general shape remains the same, No entanto. Open fields or a road could be made to resemble a swamp, hill, crevasse, or some other difficult or impassable terrain. A pond can be made to seem like a grassy meadow, a precipice like a gentle slope, or a rock-strewn gully like a wide and smooth road. Similarly, você pode alter the appearance of structures, or add them where none are present. The magia doesn't disguise, conceal, or add criatura. The ilusão includes audible, visual, tactile, and olfactory elements, so it can turn clear ground into terreno difícil (or vice versa) or Caso contrário impede movimento through the área. Any piece of the illusory terrain (such as a rock or stick) that is removed from the magia's área disappears immediately. criatura with visão verdadeira pode ver through the ilusão to the terrain's true form; No entanto, all other elements of the ilusão remain, so while a criatura is aware of the ilusão's presence, a criatura can still physically interact with the ilusão.

name: Mirage Arcane
desc:
You make terrain within the spell's area appear as another kind of terrain, tricking all senses (including touch).

The general shape of the terrain remains the same, however. A small town could resemble a woodland, a smooth road could appear rocky and overgrown, a deep pit could resemble a shallow pond, and so on.

Structures may be altered in the similar way, or added where there are none. criaturas are not disguised, concealed, or added by the spell.

The illusion appears completely real in all aspects, including physical terrain, and can be physically interacted with. Clear terrain becomes difficult terrain, and vice versa. Any part of the illusory terrain such as a boulder, or water collected from an illusory stream, disappears immediately upon leaving the spell's area.

criaturas with visão verdadeira see through the illusion, but are not immune to its effects. They may know that the overgrown path is in fact a well maintained road, but are still impeded by illusory rocks and branches.

name: Mire
desc: When you cast mire, you create a 10-pé-diameter pit of quicksand, sticky mud, or a similar dangerous natural hazard suited to the region. A criatura that’s in the area when the spell is cast or that enters the affected area deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Força or sink up to its waist and be imobilizado by the mire. From that point on, the mire acts as quicksand, but the CD for Força checks to escape from the quicksand is equal to your CD de resistência à magia. A criatura outside the mire trying to pull another criatura free receives a +5 bonus on its teste de Força.
material: a vial of sand mixed with water

name: Mirror Image
desc: Three illusionary duplicates of yourself appear in your space. Until the end of the magia, duplicates move with you and imitate your ações, swapping their position so that it is impossible to determine which image is real. você pode use your ação to dissipar the illusory duplicates. Whenever uma criatura is targeting you with an attack during a duração of the magia, roll 1d20 to determine if the attack does not alvo rather one of your duplicates. If você tem three duplicates, you need 6 or more on your throw to lead o alvo of the attack to a duplicate. With two duplicates, you need 8 or more. With one duplicate, you need 11 or more. The CA of a duplicate is 10 + your modificador de Destreza. If an attack hits a duplicate, it is destroyed. A duplicate may be destroyed not just an attack on key. It ignores other dano and effects. a magia termina if the three duplicates are destroyed. uma criatura is unaffected by this fate if she can not see if it relies on a different meaning as vision, such as blind vision, or if it can perceive illusions as false, as with clear vision.

name: Mirror Image
desc:
A total of 3 illusory copies of yourself appear in your space. For the duration, these copies move with you and mimic your actions, creating confusion as to which is real.

You can use an action to dismiss them.

Each time you're targeted by a criatura's attack, roll a d20 to see if it alvos you or one of your copies.

With 3 copies, a roll of 6 or higher means a copy is targeted. With two copies, a roll of 8 or higher alvos a copy, and with 1 copy a roll of 11 or higher alvos the copy.

A copy's AC is 10 + your Destreza modifier, and when it is hit by an attack a copy is destroyed.

It may be destroyed only by an attack that hits it.

All other damage and effects have no impact.

Attacking criaturas that have visão verdadeira, cannot see, have visão cega, or rely on other nonvisual senses are unaffected by this spell.
higher_level: When using a 5th-level espaço de magia, the duration increases to Concentração (1 hora).

name: Mirror Realm
desc:
You transform a mirror into a mágico doorway to an extradimensional realm. You and any criaturas you designate when you cast the spell can move through the doorway into the realm beyond. For the spell's duration, the mirror remains anchored in the plane of origin, where it can't be broken or otherwise damaged by any mundane means. No criaturas other than those you designate can pass through the mirror or see into the mirror realm.
  The realm within the mirror is an exact reflection of the location you left. The temperature is comfortable, and any environmental threats (lava, poisonous gas, or similar) are inert, harmless facsimiles of the real thing. Likewise, magic items reflected in the mirror realm have no mágico properties, but those carried into it work normally. Food, drink, and other beneficial items within the mirror realm (reflections of originals in the real world) function as normal, real items; food can be eaten, wine can be drunk, and so on. Only items that were reflected in the mirror at the moment the spell was cast exist inside the mirror realm. Items placed in front of the mirror afterward don't appear in the mirror realm, and criaturas never do unless they are allowed in by you. Items found in the mirror realm dissolve into nothingness when they leave it, but the effects of food and drink remain.
  Sound passes through the mirror in both directions. criaturas in the mirror realm can see what's happening in the world, but criaturas in the world see only what the mirror reflects. Objects can cross the mirror boundary only while worn or carried by a criatura, and spells can't cross it at all. You can't stand in the mirror realm and shoot arrows or cast spells at alvos in the world or vice versa.
  The boundaries of the mirror realm are the same as the room or location in the plane of origin, but the mirror realm can't exceed 50,000 square pés (for simplicity, imagine 50 cubes, each cube being 10 pés on a side). If the original space is larger than this, such as an open field or a forest, the boundary is demarcated with an impenetrable, gray fog.
  Any criatura still inside the mirror realm when the spell ends is expelled through the mirror into the nearest empty space.
  If this spell is cast in the same spot every dia for a year, it becomes permanent. Once permanent, the mirror can't be moved or destroyed through mundane means. You can allow new criaturas into the mirror realm (and disallow previous criaturas) by recasting the spell within range of the permanent mirror. Casting the spell elsewhere doesn't affect the creation or the existence of a permanent mirror realm; a determined spellcaster could have multiple permanent mirror realms to use as storage spaces, hiding spots, and spy vantages.

name: Misdirection
desc: You create a brief flash of leve, loud sound, or other distraction that interrupts a criatura's attack. When a criatura you can see within range makes an attack, you can impose desvantagem on its jogada de ataque.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when you see a creature within 30 feet of you make an attack

name: Mislead
desc: Você se torna invisível at the same time that an illusory double of you appears where Você está standing. The double lasts for a duração, but the invisibilidade ends if you attack or cast a magia. você pode use your ação to move your illusory double up to twice your velocidade and make it gesture, speak, and behave in whatever way você escolhe. você pode ver through its eyes and hear through its ears as if you were located where it is. On cada um de seus turnos as a ação bônus, você pode switch from using its sentidos to using your own, or back again. While Você está using its sentidos, Você está cego and ensurdecido in regard to your own surroundings.

name: Mislead
desc:
You become invisível. At the same time, an illusory copy of you appears where you're standing.

This invisibility ends when you cast a spell but the copy lasts until the spell ends.

You can use an action to move your copy up to twice your Deslocamento, have it speak, make gestures, or behave however you'd like.

You may see and hear through your copy. Until the spell ends, you can use a ação bônus to switch between your copy's senses and your own, or back again. While using your copy's senses you are blind and deaf to your body's surroundings.

The copy is revealed as an illusion with any physical interaction, as solid objects and criaturas pass through it.

name: Misstep
desc: You gesture to a criatura within range that you can see. If the alvo fails a teste de resistência de Sabedoria, it uses its reação to move 5 pés in a direction you dictate. This movement does not provoke opportunity attacks. The spell automatically fails if you direct the alvo into a dangerous area such as a pit trap, a bonfire, or off the edge of a cliff, or if the alvo has already used its reação.

name: Mist of Wonders
desc:
A colorful mist surrounds you out to a radius of 30 pés. criaturas inside the mist see odd shapes in it and hear random sounds that don’t make sense. The very concepts of order and logic don’t seem to exist inside the mist.

Any 1st-level spell that’s cast in the mist by another caster or that travels through the mist is affected by its strange Natureza. The caster deve fazer a teste de resistência de Constituição when casting the spell. em uma falha no teste, the spell transforms into another 1st-level spell the caster knows (chosen by the GM from those available), even if that spell is not currently prepared. The altered spell’s slot level or its original alvo or targeted area can’t be changed. Cantrips are unaffected. If (in the GM’s judgment) none of the caster’s spells known of that level can be transformed, the spell being cast simply fails.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, it affects any spell cast using a espaço de magia of any lower level. For instance, using a 6th-level slot enables you to transform a spell of 5th level or lower into another spell of the same level.

name: Misty Step
desc: Briefly surrounded by silvery mist, you teletransporte up to 9 metros to an espaço desocupado that você pode ver.

name: Misty Step
desc: You teleport to an unoccupied space that you can see, disappearing and reappearing in a swirl of shimmering mist.

name: Modify Memory
desc: Você tenta to reshape another criatura's memories. One criatura that você pode ver deve fazer um teste de resistência de Sabedoria. If Você está fighting a criatura, it tem vantagem em the teste de resistência. em uma falha no teste, o alvo becomes enfeitiçado by you for a duração. The enfeitiçado alvo is incapacitado and unaware of its surroundings, though it can still hear you. If it takes any dano or is targeted by another magia, this magia ends, and none of o alvo's memories are modified. While this enfeitiçar lasts, você pode affect o alvo's memory of an event that it experienced within the last 24 hours and that lasted no more than 10 minutes. você pode permanently eliminate all memory of the event, allow o alvo to recall the event with perfect clarity and exacting detail, change its memory of the details of the event, or create a memory of some other event. você deve speak to o alvo to describe how its memories are affected, and it must be able to understand your language for the modified memories to take root. Its mind fills in any gaps in the details of your description. If a magia termina before você tem finished describing the modified memories, a criatura's memory isn't altered. Caso contrário, the modified memories take hold when a magia termina. A modified memory doesn't necessarily affect how uma criatura behaves, particularly if the memory contradicts a criatura's natural inclinations, alignment, or beliefs. An illogical modified memory, such as implanting a memory of how much a criatura enjoyed dousing itself in acid, is dismissed, perhaps as a bad dream. The DM might deem a modified memory too nonsensical to affect uma criatura in a significant manner. A remove curse or greater restoration magia cast on o alvo restores a criatura's true memory.
higher_level: Se você conjurar esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 6° nível ou superior, você pode alter o alvo's memories of an event that took place up to 7 days ago (6th level), 30 days ago (7th level), 1 year ago (8th level), or any time in a criatura's past (9th level).

name: Modify Memory
desc:
The alvo has vantagem on its teste de resistência if you are in combat with it. The alvo becomes enfeitiçado and incapacitado, though it can still hear you. Until the spell ends, any memories of an event that took place within the last 24 horas and lasted 10 minutos or less may be altered.

You may destroy the memory, have the alvo recall the event with perfect clarity, change the details, or create a new memory entirely with the same restrictions in time frame and length.

You must speak to the alvo in a language you both know to modify its memories and describe how the memory is changed. The alvo fills in the gaps in details based on your description.

The spell automatically ends if the alvo recebe any damage or if it is targeted by another spell. If the spell ends before you have finished modifying its memories, the alteration fails. Otherwise, the alteration is complete when the spell ends and only greater restoration or remove curse can restore the memory.

The Narrator may deem a modified memory too illogical or nonsensical to affect a criatura, in which case the modified memory is simply dismissed by the alvo. In addition, a modified memory doesn't specifically change the behavior of a criatura, especially if the memory conflicts with the criatura's personality, beliefs, or innate tendencies.

There may also be events that are practically unforgettable and after being modified can be remembered correctly when another criatura succeeds on a Persuasão check to stir the alvo's memories. This check is made with desvantagem if the criatura does not have indisputable proof on hand that is relevant to the altered memory.
higher_level: When using a 6th-level espaço de magia, the event can be from as far as 7 dias ago. When using a 7th-level espaço de magia, the event can be from as far as 30 dias ago. When using an 8th-level espaço de magia, the event can be from as far as 1 year ago. When using a 9th-level espaço de magia, any event can be altered.

name: Molech's Blessing
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork ritual You call upon the dark blessings of the furnace god Molech. In an hora-long ritual begun at midnight, you dedicate a living being to Molech by branding the deity's symbol onto the victim's forehead. If the ritual is completed and the victim fails to make a successful teste de resistência de Sabedoria (or the victim chooses not to make one), the being is transformed into an avatar of Molech under your control. The avatar is 8 pés tall and appears to be made of black iron wreathed in flames. Its eyes, mouth, and a portion of its torso are cut away to show the churning fogo inside that crackles with wailing voices. The avatar has all the statistics and abilities of an earth elemental, with the following differences: Alignment is Neutral Evil; Deslocamento is 50 pés and it cannot burrow or use earth glide; it gains the fogo form ability of a fogo elemental, but it cannot squeeze through small spaces; its Slam does an additional 1d10 dano de fogo. This transformation lasts for 24 horas. no final de that time, the subject returns to its normal state and recebe 77 (14d10) dano de fogo, or metade do dano with a successful CD 15 teste de resistência de Constituição.

name: Monstrous Empathy
desc: This spell lets you forge a connection with a monstrosity. Choose a monstrosity that you can see within range. It must see and hear you. If the monstrosity’s Inteligência is 4 or higher, the spell fails. Otherwise, the monstrosity deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar enfeitiçado by you for the spell’s duration. If you or one of your companions harms the alvo, the spell ends.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, you can affect one additional monstrosity for each slot level above 3rd.
material: a morsel of food

name: Moon Trap
desc:
While casting this spell under the leve of the moon, you inscribe a glyph that covers a 10-pé-square area on a flat, stationary surface such as a floor or a wall. Once the spell is complete, the glyph is invisível in moonlight but glows with a faint white leve in darkness.

Any criatura that touches the glyph, except those you designate during the casting of the spell, deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar drawn into an inescapable maze until the sun rises.

The glyph lasts until the next sunrise, at which time it flares with bright leve, and any criatura trapped inside returns to the space it last occupied, unharmed. If that space has become occupied or dangerous, the criatura appears in the nearest safe unoccupied space.
material: powdered silver worth 250 gp

name: Moon's Respite
desc: You touch a criatura who must be present for the entire casting. A beam of moonlight shines down from above, bathing the alvo in radiante leve. The spell fails if you can't see the open sky. If the alvo has any levels of shadow corruption, the moonlight burns away some of the Shadow tainting it. The criatura deve fazer a teste de resistência de Constituição against a CD of 10 + the number of shadow corruption levels it has. The criatura recebe 2d10 dano radiante per level of shadow corruption and removes 1 level of shadow corruption on a failed teste de resistência, or half as much damage and removes 2 levels of shadow corruption em um sucesso.

name: Moonbeam
desc: A silvery beam of pale light shines down in a 1.5 metros, 12 metros-high cilindro centered on a point dentro do alcance. Until a magia termina, luz fraca fills the cilindro. When uma criatura enters the magia's área for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it is engulfed in ghostly flames that cause searing pain, and it deve fazer um teste de resistência de Constituição. It takes 2d10 dano radiante em uma falha no teste, or half as much dano on a successful one. A metamorfo makes its teste de resistência with desvantagem. If it fails, it also instantly reverts to its original form and can't assume a different form until it leaves the magia's light. On cada um de seus turnos after Você conjura esta magia, você pode use an ação to move the beam 18 metros in any direction.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 3° nível ou superior, the dano increases by 1d10 for each nível do espaço above 2nd.
material: Several seeds of any moonseed planta and a piece of opalescent feldspar.

name: Moonbeam
desc:
A beam of moonlight fills the area with dim leve.

When a criatura enters the area for the first time on a turn or begins its turn in the area, it is struck by silver flames and makes a teste de resistência de Constituição, taking 2d10 dano radiante em uma falha no teste, or half as much em um sucesso.

Shapechangers have desvantagem on this teste de resistência. em uma falha no teste, a shapechanger is forced to take its original form while within the spell's leve.

On your turn, you may use an action to move the beam 60 pés in any direction.
higher_level: o dano increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Morphic Flux
desc: When you cast this spell, your body becomes highly mutable, your flesh constantly shifting and quivering, occasionally growing extra parts-limbs and eyes-only to reabsorb them soon afterward. While under the effect of this spell, you have resistance to cortante and dano perfurante and ignore the additional damage done by critical hits. You can squeeze through Tiny spaces without penalty. In addition, once per rodada, as a ação bônus, you can make an unarmed attack with a newly- grown limb. Treat it as a standard unarmed attack, but you choose whether it does contundente, perfurante, or dano cortante.

name: Mosquito Bane
desc: This spell kills any insects or swarms of insects within range that have a total of 25 pontos de vida or fewer.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 2nd level or higher, the number of pontos de vida affected increases by 15 for each slot level above 1st. Thus, a 2nd-level spell kills insects or swarms that have up to 40 pontos de vida, a 3rd-level spell kills those with 55 pontos de vida or fewer, and so forth, up to a maximum of 85 pontos de vida for a slot of 6th level or higher.

name: Move Earth
desc: Escolha an área of terrain no larger than 12 metros on a side dentro do alcance. você pode reshape dirt, sand, or clay in the área in any manner você escolhe for a duração. você pode raise or lower the área's elevation, create or fill in a trench, erect or flatten a parede, or form a pillar. The extent of any such changes can't exceed half the área's largest dimension. So, if you affect a 12 metros quadrado, você pode create a pillar up to 6 metros high, raise or lower the quadrado's elevation by up to 6 metros, dig a trench up to 6 metros deep, and so on. It takes 10 minutes for these changes to complete. At the end of every 10 minutes you spend concentrating on the magia, você pode Escolha a new área of terrain to affect. Because the terrain's transformation occurs slowly, criatura in the área can't usually be trapped or injured by the ground's movimento. This magia can't manipulate natural stone or stone construction. Rocks and structures shift to accommodate the new terrain. If the way you shape the terrain would make a structure unstable, it might collapse. Similarly, this magia doesn't directly affect planta growth. The moved earth carries any plants along with it.
material: An iron blade and a small bag containing a mixture of soils-clay, loam, and sand.

name: Move Earth
desc:
You reshape the area, changing its elevation or creating and eliminating holes, walls, and pillars.

The only limitation is that the elevation change may not exceed half the area's horizontal dimensions.

For example, affecting a 40-by-40 area allows you to include 20 pé high pillars, holes 20 pés deep, and changes in terrain elevation of 20 pés or less.

Changes that result in unstable terrain are subject to collapse.

Changes take 10 minutos to complete, after which you can choose another area to affect. Due to the slow Deslocamento of transformation, it is nearly impossible for criaturas to be hurt or captured by the spell.

This spell has no effect on stone, objects crafted from stone, or plants, though these objects will shift based on changes in the area.

name: Move the Cosmic Wheel
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You wind your music box and call forth a piece of another plane of existence with which you are familiar, either through personal experience or intense study. The magic creates a bubble of space with a 30-pé radius within range of you and at a spot you designate. The portion of your plane that's inside the bubble swaps places with a corresponding portion of the plane your music box is attuned with. There is a 10% chance that the portion of the plane you summon arrives with native criaturas on it. Inanimate objects and non-ambulatory life (like trees) are cut off at the edge of the bubble, while living criaturas that don't fit inside the bubble are shunted outside of it before the swap occurs. Otherwise, criaturas from both planes that are caught inside the bubble are sent along with their chunk of reality to the other plane for the duration of the spell unless they make a successful teste de resistência de Carisma when the spell is cast; with a successful save, a criatura can choose whether to shift planes with the bubble or leap outside of it a moment before the shift occurs. Any natural reação between the two planes occurs normally (fogo spreads, water flows, etc.) while energy (such as necrótico energy) leaks slowly across the edge of the sphere (no more than a pé or two per hora). Otherwise, criaturas and effects can move freely across the boundary of the sphere; for the duration of the spell, it becomes a part of its new location to the fullest extent possible, given the natures of the two planes. The two displaced bubbles shift back to their original places automatically after 24 horas. Note that the amount of preparation involved (acquiring and attuning the music box) precludes this spell from being cast on the spur of the moment. Because of its unpredictable and potentially wide-ranging effect, it's also advisable to discuss your interest in this spell with your GM before adding it to your character's repertoire.

name: Mud
desc: The ground in a 20-pé radius centered on a point within range becomes thick, viscous mud. The area becomes difficult terrain for the duration. When a criatura enters the affected area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, the criatura deve fazer a teste de resistência de Força. em uma falha no teste, its movement Deslocamento is reduced to 0 until the start of its next turn.

name: Mud Pack
desc:
This spell covers you or a willing criatura you touch in mud consistent with the surrounding terrain. For the duration, the spell protects the alvo from extreme frio and heat, allowing the alvo to automatically succeed on Constituição saving throws against environmental hazards related to temperature. In addition, the alvo has vantagem on Destreza (Furtividade) checks while traveling at a slow pace in the terrain related to the component for this spell.

If the alvo is subject to pesada precipitation for 1 minuto, the precipitation removes the mud, ending the spell.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, the duration is 8 horas and you can alvo up to ten willing criaturas within 30 pés of you.
material: a clump of mud

name: Muted Foe
desc: You touch a não mágico weapon. The next time a criatura hits with the affected weapon before the spell ends, the weapon booms with a thunderous peal as the weapon strikes. The attack causa an extra 1d6 dano de trovão to the alvo, and the alvo becomes surdo, immune to dano de trovão, and unable to cast spells with verbal components for 1 minuto. no final de cada um de seus turnos, the alvo can make a teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em um sucesso, the effect ends.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 2nd level or higher, the extra damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Negative Image
desc: You create a shadow-tunnel between your location and one other criatura you can see within range. You and that criatura instantly swap positions. If the alvo criatura is unwilling to exchange places with you, it can resist the effect by making a teste de resistência de Carisma. em um sucesso no teste, the spell has no effect.
material: a piece of reflective obsidian

name: Nether Weapon
desc: You whisper in Void Speech and touch a weapon. Until the spell ends, the weapon turns black, becomes mágico if it wasn’t before, and causa 2d6 dano necrótico (in addition to its normal damage) on a successful hit. A criatura that recebe dano necrótico from the enchanted weapon can’t regain pontos de vida until the start of your next turn.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 5th level or higher, o dano increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 4th.
material: ink, chalk, or some other writing medium

name: Never Surrender
desc: When the alvo is reduced to 0 pontos de vida, it can fight looming death to stay in the fight. The alvo doesn't fall inconsciente but must still make death saving throws, as normal. The alvo doesn't need to make a death teste de resistência até o final de seu próximo turno, but it has desvantagem on that first death teste de resistência. In addition, massive damage required to kill the alvo outright must equal or exceed twice the alvo's ponto de vida maximum instead. If the alvo regains 1 or more pontos de vida, this spell ends.
higher_level: If you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 6th level or higher, the alvo doesn't have desvantagem on its first death teste de resistência.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when you or a creature within 60 feet of you drops to 0 hit points.

name: Night Terrors
desc: You amplify the fear that lurks in the heart of todas as criaturas. Select a alvo point you can see within the spell’s range. Every criatura within 20 pés of that point becomes amedrontado until the start of your next turn and deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Sabedoria or become paralisado. A paralisado criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso. criaturas immune to being amedrontado are not affected by **night terrors**.
material: a crow’s eye

name: Nightfall
desc: You call upon night to arrive ahead of schedule. With a sharp word, you create a 30-pé-radius cylinder of night centered on a point on the ground within range. The cylinder extends vertically for 100 pés or until it reaches an obstruction, such as a ceiling. The area inside the cylinder is normal darkness, and thus heavily obscured. criaturas inside the darkened cylinder can see illuminated areas outside the cylinder normally.

name: Nip at the Heels
desc: You create an illusory pack of wild dogs that bark and nip at uma criatura you can see within range, which deve fazer a teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em uma falha no teste, the alvo has desvantagem on ability checks and attack rolls for the duration as it is distracted by the dogs. no final de cada um de seus turnos, the alvo can make a teste de resistência de Sabedoria, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso no teste. A alvo that is at least 10 pés off the ground (in a tree, voando, and so forth) has vantagem on the teste de resistência, staying just out of alcance of the jumping and barking dogs.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, you can alvo one additional criatura for each slot level above 2nd.
material: a dog’s tooth

name: Nondetection
desc: For a duração, you hide um alvo that Você toca from adivinhação magia. o alvo can be a criatura voluntária or a place or an objeto no larger than 3 metros in any dimension. o alvo can't be targeted by any adivinhação magia or perceived through mágico scrying sensors.
material: A pinch of diamond dust worth 25 gp sprinkled over o alvo, which the magia consumes.

name: Nondetection
desc:
The alvo is hidden from divination magic and cannot be perceived by mágico scrying sensors.

When used on a place or object, the spell only works if the alvo is no larger than 10 pés in any given dimension.

name: Not Dead Yet
desc:
You cast this spell while touching the cloth doll against the intact corpse of a Medium or smaller humanoid that died within the last hora. no final de the casting, the body reanimates as an undead criatura under your control. While the spell lasts, your consciousness resides in the animated body. You can use an action to manipulate the body’s limbs in order to make it move, and you can see and hear through the body’s eyes and ears, but your own body becomes inconsciente. The animated body can neither attack nor defend itself. This spell doesn’t change the appearance of the corpse, so further measures might be needed if the body is to be used in a way that involves fooling observers into believing it’s still alive. The spell ends instantly, and your consciousness returns to your body, if either your real body or the animated body recebe any damage.

You can’t use any of the alvo’s abilities except for não mágico movement and visão no escuro. You don’t have access to its knowledge, proficiencies, or anything else that was held in its now dead mind, and you can’t make it speak.
material: a cloth doll filled with herbs and diamond dust worth 100 gp

name: Not This Day!
desc: The criatura you touch gains protection against either a specific damage type (cortante, veneno, fogo, radiante, and the like) or a category of criatura (Gigante, beast, elemental, monstrosity, and so forth) that you name when the spell is cast. For the next 24 horas, the alvo has vantagem on saving throws involving that type of damage or kind of criatura, including death saving throws if the attack that dropped the alvo to 0 pontos de vida is affected by this spell. A character can be under the effect of only a single **not this dia!** spell at one time; a second casting on the same alvo cancels the preexisting protection.

name: Oathbound Implement
desc:
You place a mágico oath upon a criatura you can see within range, compelling it to complete a specific task or service that involves using a weapon as you decide. If the criatura can understand you, it deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Sabedoria or become bound by the task. When acting to complete the directed task, the alvo has vantagem on the first jogada de ataque it makes on cada um de seus turnos using a weapon. If the alvo attempts to use a weapon for a purpose other than completing the specific task or service, it has desvantagem on attack rolls with a weapon and must roll the weapon's damage dice twice, using the lower total.
  Completing the task ends the spell early. Should you issue a suicidal task, the spell ends. You can end the spell early by using an action to dismiss it. A *remove curse*, *greater restoration*, or *wish* spell also ends it.

name: Obfuscate Object
desc: While you are in dim leve, you cause an object in range to become unobtrusively obscured from the sight of other criaturas. For the duration, you have vantagem on Destreza (Prestidigitação) checks to hide the object. The object can't be larger than a shortsword, and it must be on your person, held in your hand, or otherwise unattended.
higher_level: You can affect two objects when you alcance 5th level, three objects at 11th level, and four objects at 17th level.

name: Open Red Portal
desc: You must tap the power of a titanic or strong ley line to cast this spell (see the Ley Initiate feat). You open a new two-way Red Portal on the shadow road, leading to a precise location of your choosing on any plane of existence. If located on the Prime Material Plane, this destination can be in the present dia or up to 1,000 years in the past. The portal lasts for the duration. Deities and other planar rulers can prevent portals from opening in their presence or anywhere within their domains.

name: Orb of Light
desc: An orb of leve the size of your hand shoots from your fingertips toward a criatura within range, which recebe 3d8 dano radiante and is cego for 1 rodada. A alvo that makes a successful teste de resistência de Destreza recebe half o dano and is not cego.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, o dano increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Order of Revenge
desc: You touch a weapon or a bundle of 30 munição, imbuing them with spell energy. Any criatura damaged by a touched, affected weapon leaves an invisibly glowing trail of their path until the spell expires. The caster may see this trail by casting revenge's eye or see invisível. Any other caster may see the trail by casting see invisível. Casting dispel magic on an affected criatura causes that criatura to stop generating a trail, and the trail fades over the next hora.
higher_level: When you cast the spell using a slot of 4th level or higher, you can alvo one additional weapon or bundle of munição for each slot level above fourth.

name: Outflanking Boon
desc: This spell alvos one inimigo, which deve fazer a teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em uma falha no teste, an illusory aliado of yours appears in a space from which it threatens to make a ataque corpo a corpo against the alvo. Your aliados gain vantagem on melee attacks against the alvo for the duration because of the distracting effect of the illusion. An affected alvo repeats the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, the spell alvos one additional inimigo for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Outmaneuver
desc: When a criatura provokes an ataque de oportunidade from an aliado you can see within range, you can força the criatura to make a teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em uma falha no teste, the criatura's movement is reduced to 0, and you can move up to your Deslocamento toward the criatura without provoking opportunity attacks. This spell doesn't interrupt your aliado's ataque de oportunidade, which happens before the effects of this spell.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when a creature within 30 feet of you provokes an opportunity attack
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Paladin, Sorceror, Warlock, Wizard

name: Overclock
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You cause a targeted piece of clockwork to Deslocamento up past the point of control for the duration of the spell. The targeted clockwork can't cast spells with verbal components or even communicate effectively (all its utterances sound like grinding gears). no início de cada um de seus turnos, the alvo deve fazer a teste de resistência de Sabedoria. If the teste de resistência fails, the clockwork moves at three times its normal Deslocamento in a random direction and its turn ends; it can't perform any other actions. If the teste de resistência succeeds, then until the end of its turn, the clockwork's Deslocamento is doubled and it gains an additional action, which must be Attack (one weapon attack only), Dash, Disengage, Hide, or Use an Object. When the spell ends, the clockwork recebe 2d8 dano de força. It also must be rewound or refueled and it needs to have its daily maintenance performed immediately, if it relies on any of those things.

name: Oversized Paws
desc: Until this spell ends, the hands and pés of one willing criatura within range become oversized and more powerful. For the duration, the criatura adds 1d4 to damage it causa with its unarmed strike.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, you can alvo one additional criatura for each espaço de magia above 2nd.

name: Paragon of Chaos
desc:
You become a humanoid-shaped swirling mass of color and sound. You gain resistance to contundente, perfurante, and dano cortante, and immunity to veneno and dano psíquico. You are also immune to the following conditions: exaustão, paralisado, petrificado, envenenado, and inconsciente. Finally, you gain visão verdadeira to 30 pés and can teleport 30 pés as a move.

Each rodada, as a ação bônus, you can cause an automatic chaos magic surge, choosing either yourself or another criatura you can see within 60 pés as the caster for the purpose of resolving the effect. You must choose the alvo before rolling percentile dice to determine the Natureza of the surge. The CD of any required teste de resistência is calculated as if you were the caster.

name: Pass Without Trace
desc: You and aliados within the area gain vantagem and an expertise die on Destreza (Furtividade) checks as an aura of secrecy enshrouds you. criaturas in the area leave behind no evidence of their passage.

name: Pass without Trace
desc: A veil of sombra and silêncio radiates from you, masking you and your companions from detection. For a duração, cada criatura você escolhe a até 9 metros de you (including you) has a +10 bonus to Destreza (Stealth) checks and can't be tracked except by mágico means. uma criatura that receives this bonus leaves behind no tracks or other traces of its passage.
material: Ashes from a burned leaf of mistletoe and a sprig of spruce.

name: Passwall
desc: A passage appears at a point of your choice that você pode ver on a wooden, plaster, or stone superfície (such as a parede, a ceiling, or a floor) dentro do alcance, and lasts for a duração. você escolhe the opening's dimensions: up to 1.5 metros wide, 3 metros tall, and 6 metros deep. The passage creates no instability in a structure surrounding it. When the opening disappears, any criatura or objeto still in the passage created by the magia are safely ejected to an espaço desocupado nearest to the superfície on which you conjurar a magia.
material: A pinch of sesame seeds.

name: Passwall
desc:
Until the spell ends, you create a passage extending into the alvo surface. When creating the passage you define its dimensions, as long as they do not exceed 5 pés in width, 8 pés in height, or 20 pés in depth.

The appearance of the passage has no effect on the stability of the surrounding environment.

Any criaturas or objects within the passage when the spell ends are expelled without harm into unoccupied spaces near where the spell was cast.

name: Pendulum
desc: You give the touched criatura an aspect of regularity in its motions and fortunes. If the alvo gets a failure on a teste de resistência de Sabedoria, then for the duration of the spell it doesn’t make d20 rolls—to determine the results of attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws it instead follows the sequence 20, 1, 19, 2, 18, 3, 17, 4, and so on.
material: a small pendulum or metronome made of brass and rosewood worth 10 gp

name: Perun's Doom
desc: Deep Magic: Rothenian A powerful wind swirls from your outstretched hand toward a point you choose within range, where it explodes with a low roar into vortex of air. cada criatura in a 20-pé-radius cylinder centered on that point deve fazer a teste de resistência de Força. em uma falha no teste, the criatura recebe 3d8 dano contundente, is pulled to the center of the cylinder, and arremesso 50 pés upward into the air. If a criatura hits a solid obstruction, such as a stone ceiling, when it's arremesso upward, it recebe dano contundente as if it had fallen (50 pés - the distance it's traveled upward). For example, if a criatura hits the ceiling after rising only 10 pés, it recebe dano contundente as if it had fallen (50 pés - 10 pés =) 40 pés, or 4d6 dano contundente.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, increase the distance affected criaturas are arremesso into the air by 10 pés for each slot above 3rd.

name: Pestilence
desc: A swarm of insects fills the area. criaturas that begin their turn within the spell's area or who enter the area for the first time on their turn deve fazer a teste de resistência de Constituição ou receber 1d4 dano perfurante. The pests also ravage any unattended organic material within their radius, such as plant, wood, or fabric.
higher_level: This spell's damage increases by 1d4 when you alcance 5th level (2d4), 10th level (3d4), and 15th level (4d4).

name: Phantasmal Killer
desc: You tap into the nightmares of uma criatura você pode ver dentro do alcance and create an illusory manifestation of its deepest fears, visible only to that criatura. o alvo deve fazer um teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em uma falha no teste, o alvo becomes amedrontado for a duração. At the start of each of o alvo's turns before a magia termina, o alvo deve ser bem-sucedido em um teste de resistência de Sabedoria or take 4d10 dano psíquico. em um sucesso no teste, a magia termina.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 5° nível ou superior, the dano increases by 1d10 for each nível do espaço above 4th.

name: Phantasmal Killer
desc:
You create an illusion that invokes the alvo's deepest fears. Only the alvo can see this illusion.

When the spell is cast and no final de cada um de seus turnos, the alvo makes a teste de resistência de Sabedoria or recebe 4d10 dano psíquico and becomes amedrontado.

The spell ends early when the alvo succeeds on its teste de resistência. A alvo that succeeds on its initial teste de resistência recebe metade do dano.
higher_level: o dano increases by 1d10 for each slot level above the 4th.

name: Phantasmal Talons
desc:
You silently clench your hand into a claw and invisível talons of pure will sprout from your fingers.

The talons do not interact with physical matter, but rip viciously at the psyche of any criatura struck by them. For the duration, your unarmed strikes gain the acuidade property and deal dano psíquico. In addition, if your unarmed strike normally causa less than 1d4 damage, it instead causa 1d4 damage.

name: Phantom Dragon
desc:
You tap your dragon magic to make an aliado appear as a Dracônico beast. The alvo of the spell appears to be a dragon of size Large or smaller. When seeing this illusion, observers make a teste de resistência de Sabedoria to see through it.

You can use an action to make the illusory dragon seem ferocious. Choose uma criatura within 30 pés of the illusory dragon to make a teste de resistência de Sabedoria. If it fails, the criatura is amedrontado. The criatura remains amedrontado until it uses an action to make a successful teste de resistência de Sabedoria or the spell’s duration expires.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, increase the number of alvos the illusion can affect by one for each slot level above 3rd.
material: a piece of dragon egg shell

name: Phantom Steed
desc: A Large quasi-real, horselike criatura appears on the ground in an espaço desocupado of your choice dentro do alcance. You decide a criatura's appearance, but it is equipped with a saddle, bit, and bridle. Any of the equipment created by the magia vanishes in a puff of smoke if it is carried more than 3 metros away from the steed. For a duração, you or uma criatura você escolhe can ride the steed. a criatura uses the statistics for a riding horse, except it has a velocidade of 30 metros and can travel 16 km in an hour, or 21 km at a fast pace. When a magia termina, the steed gradually fades, giving the rider 1 minute to dismount. a magia termina if Você usa an ação to dismiss it or if the steed takes any dano.

name: Phantom Steed
desc:
You create an illusory Large criatura with an appearance determined by you that comes into being with all the necessary equipment needed to use it as a mount. This equipment vanishes when more than 10 pés away from the criatura.

You or any criatura you allow may ride the steed, which uses the statistics for a riding horse but has a Deslocamento of 100 pés and travels at 10 milhas per hora at a steady pace (13 milhas per hora at a fast pace).

The steed vanishes if it recebe damage (disappearing instantly) or you use an action to dismiss it (fading away, giving the rider 1 minuto to dismount).

name: Pierce the Veil
desc:
By sketching a shimmering, ethereal doorway in the air and knocking three times, you call forth an otherworldly entity to provide Intuição or advice. The door swings open and the entity, wreathed in shadow or otherwise obscured, appears at the threshold. It answers up to five questions truthfully and to the best of its ability, but its answers aren't necessarily clear or direct. The entity can't pass through the doorway or interact with anything on your side of the doorway other than by speaking its responses.
  Likewise, criaturas on your side of the doorway can't pass through it to the other side or interact with the other side in any way other than asking questions. In addition, the spell allows you and the criatura to understand each other's words even if you have no language in Comum, the same as if you were both under the effects of the comprehend languages spell.
  When you cast this spell, you must request a specific, named entity, a specific type of criatura, or a criatura from a specific plane of existence. The alvo criatura can't be native to the plane you are on when you cast the spell. After making this request, make an teste de habilidade using your spellcasting ability. The CD is 12 if you request a criatura from a specific plane; 16 if you request a specific type of criatura; or 20 if you request a specific entity. (The GM can choose to make this check for you secretly.) If the spellcasting check fails, the criatura that responds to your summons is any entity of the GM's choosing, from any plane. No matter what, the criatura is always of a type with an Inteligência of at least 8 and the ability to speak and to hear.

name: Pincer
desc:
You força your inimigos into a tight spot. Choose two points you can see within range. The points must be at least 30 pés apart from each other. Each point then emits a thunderous boom in a 30-pé cone in the direction of the other point. The boom is audible out to 300 pés.
  cada criatura within a cone deve fazer a teste de resistência de Constituição. em uma falha no teste, a criatura recebe 5d10 dano de trovão and is pushed up to 10 pés away from the point that emitted the cone. em um sucesso no teste, the criatura recebe half as much damage and isn't pushed. Objects that aren't being worn or carried within each cone are automatically pushed.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 7th level or higher, o dano increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 6th.

name: Piper's Lure
desc:
You touch a não mágico pipe or horn instrument and imbue it with magic that lures criaturas toward it. cada criatura that enters or starts its turn within 150 pés of the affected object deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar enfeitiçado for 10 minutos. A criatura enfeitiçado by this spell must take the Dash action and move toward the affected object by the safest available route on cada um de seus turnos. Once a enfeitiçado criatura moves within 5 pés of the object, it is also incapacitado as it stares at the object and sways in place to a mesmerizing tune only it can hear. If the object is moved, the enfeitiçado criatura attempts to follow it.
  For every 10 minutos that elapse, the criatura can make a new teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em um sucesso, the spell ends on that criatura. If a enfeitiçado criatura is attacked, the spell ends immediately on that criatura. Once a criatura has been enfeitiçado by this spell, it can't be enfeitiçado by it again for 24 horas.

name: Pitfall
desc:
A pit opens under a Huge or smaller criatura you can see within range that does not have a voando Deslocamento. This pit isn’t a simple hole in the floor or ground, but a passage to an extradimensional space. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Destreza or fall into the pit, which closes over it. no final de your next turn, a new portal opens 20 pés above where the pit was located, and the criatura falls out. It lands prostrado and recebe 6d6 dano contundente.

If the original alvo makes a successful teste de resistência, you can use a ação bônus on your turn to reopen the pit in any location within range that you can see. The spell ends when a criatura has fallen through the pit and taken damage, or when the duration expires.

name: Planar Ally
desc: You beseech an otherworldly entity for aid. The being must be known to you: a god, a primordial, a demon prince, or some other being of cosmic power. That entity sends a celestial, an elemental, or a demônio loyal to it to aid you, making a criatura appear in an espaço desocupado dentro do alcance. If Você sabe a specific criatura's name, você pode speak that name quando você conjura esta magia to request that criatura, though you might get a different criatura anyway (DM's choice). When a criatura appears, it is under no compulsion to behave in any particular way. você pode ask a criatura to perform a service in exchange for payment, but it isn't obliged to do so. The requested task could range from simple (voar us across the chasm, or help us fight a battle) to complex (spy on our inimigos, or protect us during our foray into the dungeon). você deve be able to communicate with a criatura to bargain for its services. Payment can take a variety of forms. A celestial might require a sizable donation of gold or itens mágicos to an allied temple, while a demônio might demand a living sacrifice or a gift of treasure. Some criatura might exchange their service for a quest undertaken by you. As a rule of thumb, a task that can be measured in minutes requires a payment worth 100 gp per minute. A task measured in hours requires 1,000 gp per hour. And a task measured in days (up to 10 days) requires 10,000 gp per day. The DM can adjust these payments based on the circumstances under which you conjurar a magia. If the task is aligned with a criatura's ethos, the payment might be halved or even waived. Nonhazardous tasks typically require only half the suggested payment, while especially dangerous tasks might require a greater gift. criatura rarely accept tasks that seem suicidal. After a criatura completes the task, or when the agreed-upon duration of service expires, a criatura returns to its home plano after reporting back to you, if appropriate to the task and if possible. If Você está unable to agree on a price for a criatura's service, a criatura immediately returns to its home plano. uma criatura enlisted to join your group counts as a member of it, receiving a full share of experience points awarded.

name: Planar Ally
desc:
An entity from beyond the realm material answers your call for assistance. You must know this entity whether it is holy, unholy, or beyond the bounds of mortal comprehension. The entity sends forth a servant loyal to it to aid you in your endeavors. If you have a specific servant in mind you may speak its name during the casting, but ultimately who is sent to answer your call is the entity's decision.

The criatura that appears (a Celestial, elemental, fey, or fiend), is under no compulsion to behave in any particular way other than how its Natureza and personality direct it. Any request made of the criatura, simple or complex, requires an equal amount of payment which you must bargain with the criatura to ascertain. The criatura can request either items, sacrifices, or services in exchange for its assistance. A criatura that you cannot communicate with cannot be bargained with.

A task that can be completed in minutos is worth 100 gold per minuto, a task that requires horas is worth 1, 000 gold per hora, and a task requiring dias is worth 10, 000 gold per dia (the criatura can only accept tasks contained within a 10 dia timeframe). A criatura can often be persuaded to lower or raise prices depending on how a task aligns with its personality and the goals of its master —some require no payment at all if the task is deemed worthy. Additionally, a task that poses little or no risk only requires half the usual amount of payment, and an extremely dangerous task might call for double the usual payment. Still, only extreme circumstances will cause a criatura summoned this way to accept tasks with a near certain result of death.

A criatura returns to its place of origin when a task is completed or if you fail to negotiate an agreeable task and payment. Should a criatura join your party, it counts as a member of the group and receives a full portion of any experience gained.

name: Planar Binding
desc: With this magia, Você tenta to bind a celestial, an elemental, a fada, or a demônio to your service. a criatura must be dentro do alcance for the entire casting of the magia. (Typically, a criatura is first invocar into the center of an inverted magia circle in order to keep it trapped while this magia is cast.) At the completion of the casting, o alvo deve fazer um teste de resistência de Carisma. em uma falha no teste, it is bound to serve you for a duração. If a criatura was invocar or created by another magia, that magia's duration is extended to match a duração of this magia. A bound criatura must follow your instructions to the best of its ability. You might command a criatura to accompany you on an adventure, to guard a location, or to deliver a message. a criatura obeys the letter of your instructions, but if a criatura is hostile to you, it strives to twist your words to achieve its own objectives. If a criatura carries out your instructions completely before a magia termina, it travels to you to report this fact if Você está on the same plano of existence. If Você está on a different plano of existence, it returns to the place where you bound it and remains there until a magia termina.
higher_level: quando você conjura esta magia using um espaço de magia of a higher level, a duração increases to 10 days with a 6th-level slot, to 30 days with a 7th-level slot, to 180 days with an 8th-level slot, and to a year and a day with a 9th-level espaços de magia.
material: A jewel worth at least 1,000 gp, which the magia consumes.

name: Planar Binding
desc:
The alvo must remain within range for the entire casting of the spell (usually by means of a magic circle spell). Until the spell ends, you força the alvo to serve you. If the alvo was summoned through some other means, like a spell, the duration of the original spell is extended to match this spell's duration.

Once it is bound to you the alvo serves as best it can and follows your orders, but only to the letter of the instruction. A hostile or malevolent alvo actively seeks to take any vantagem of errant phrasing to suit its Natureza. When a alvo completes a task you've assigned to it, if you are on the same plane of existence the alvo travels back to you to report it has done so. Otherwise, it returns to where it was bound and remains there until the spell ends.
higher_level: When using a 6th-level espaço de magia, its duration increases to 10 dias. When using a 7th-level espaço de magia, its duration increases to 30 dias. When using an 8th-level espaço de magia, its duration increases to 180 dias. When using a 9th-level espaço de magia, its duration increases to a year and a dia.

name: Plane Shift
desc: You and up to eight criaturas voluntárias who link hands in a circle are transported to a different plano of existence. você pode specify um alvo destination in general terms, such as the City of Brass on the elemental plano of Fire or the palace of Dispater on the second level of the Nine Hells, and you appear in or near that destination. If Você está trying to reach the City of Brass, Por exemplo, you might arrive in its Street of Steel, before its portal of Ashes, or looking at the city from across the Sea of Fire, at the DM's discretion. Alternatively, if Você sabe the sigil sequence of a teletransporte circle on another plano of existence, this magia can take you to that circle. If the teletransporte circle is too small to hold all the criatura you transported, they appear in the closest espaços desocupados next to the circle. você pode use this magia to banish an unwilling criatura to another plano. Escolha uma criatura within your reach and faça um ataque de magia corpo a corpo against it. em um acerto, a criatura deve fazer um teste de resistência de Carisma. If a criatura fails this save, it is transported to a random location on the plano of existence you specify. uma criatura so transported must find its own way back to your current plano of existence.
material: A forked, metal bastão worth at least 250 gp, attuned to a particular plano of existence.

name: Plane Shift
desc:
Willing alvos are transported to a plane of existence that you choose. If the destination is generally described, alvos arrive near that destination in a location chosen by the Narrator. If you know the correct sequence of an existing teleportation circle (see teleportation circle), you can choose it as the destination (when the designated circle is too small for all alvos to fit, any additional alvos are shunted to the closest unoccupied spaces).

Alternatively this spell can be used offensively to banish an unwilling alvo. You make a melee ataque mágico and on a hit the alvo makes a teste de resistência de Carisma or is transported to a random location on a plane of existence that you choose. Once transported, you must spend 1 minuto concentrating on this spell or the alvo returns to the last space it occupied (otherwise it must find its own way back).

name: Plant Growth
desc: This magia channels vitality into plants within a specific área. There are two possible uses for the magia, granting either immediate or long-term benefits. If Você conjura esta magia using 1 ação, Escolha a point dentro do alcance. All normal plants in a 30 metros raio centered on that point become thick and overgrown. uma criatura moving through the área must spend 1.5 metros of movimento for every 0 metros it moves. você pode exclude one or more areas of any size within the magia's área from being affected. If Você conjura esta magia over 8 hours, you enrich the land. All plants in a half-mile raio centered on a point dentro do alcance become enriched for 1 year. The plants yield twice the normal amount of food when harvested.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Warlock
archetype: Cleric: Nature, Paladin: Ancients, Warlock: Archfey

name: Plant Growth
desc:
You channel vitality into vegetation to achieve one of the following effects, chosen when casting the spell.

Enlarged: Plants in the area are greatly enriched. Any harvests of the affected plants provide twice as much food as normal.

Rapid: All não mágico plants in the area surge with the power of life. A criatura that moves through the area must spend 4 pés of movement for every pé it moves. You can exclude one or more areas of any size from being affected.

name: Poison Skin
desc:
The alvo becomes poisonous to the touch. Until the spell ends, whenever a criatura within 5 pés of the alvo damages the alvo with a ataque corpo a corpo com arma, the criatura makes a teste de resistência de Constituição. em uma falha no teste, the criatura becomes envenenado and recebe 1d6 ongoing dano de veneno.

A envenenado criatura can make a teste de resistência de Constituição no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso.

The alvo of the spell also becomes bright and multicolored like a poisonous dart frog, giving it desvantagem on Destreza (Furtividade) checks.
higher_level: The alvo's skin is also covered in mucus, giving it vantagem on saving throws and checks made to resist being agarrado or imobilizado. In addition, o dano increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Poison Spray
desc: You extend your hand toward uma criatura você pode ver dentro do alcance and project a puff of noxious gas from your palm. a criatura deve ser bem-sucedido em um teste de resistência de Constituição or take 1d12 dano de veneno.
higher_level: This magia's dano increases by 1d12 when you reach 5th level (2d12), 11th level (3d12), and 17th level (4d12).

name: Poisoned Volley
desc: By drawing back and releasing an imaginary bowstring, you summon forth dozens of glowing green arrows. The arrows dissipate when they hit, but todas as criaturas in a 20-pé square within range take 3d8 dano de veneno and become envenenado. A criatura that makes a successful teste de resistência de Constituição recebe half as much damage and is not envenenado.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, o dano increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Polymorph
desc: This magia transforms uma criatura that você pode ver dentro do alcance into a new form. An unwilling criatura deve fazer um teste de resistência de Sabedoria to avoid the effect. A metamorfo automatically succeeds on this teste de resistência. The transformation lasts for a duração, or until o alvo drops to 0 pontos de vida or morre. The new form can be any besta whose nível de desafio is equal to or less than o alvo's (or o alvo's level, if it doesn't have a nível de desafio). o alvo's game statistics, including mental ability scores, are replaced by the statistics of the chosen besta. It retains its alignment and personality. o alvo assumes the pontos de vida of its new form. When it reverts to its normal form, a criatura returns to the number of pontos de vida it had before it transformed. If it reverts Como resultado of dropping to 0 pontos de vida, any excess dano carries over to its normal form. enquanto the excess dano doesn't reduce a criatura's normal form to 0 pontos de vida, it isn't derrubar inconsciente. a criatura is limited in the ações it can perform by the nature of its new form, and it can't speak, cast magias, or take any other ação that requires hands or speech. o alvo's gear melds into the new form. a criatura can't activate, use, wield, or Caso contrário benefit from any of its equipment.
material: A caterpillar cocoon.

name: Polymorph
desc:
The alvo's body is transformed into a beast with a Challenge Rating equal to or less than its own. If the alvo doesn't have a Challenge Rating, use its level.

Until the spell ends or it is dropped to 0 pontos de vida, the alvo's game statistics (including its pontos de vida and mental ability scores) are replaced by the statistics of the chosen beast. The alvo is limited to actions that it is physically capable of doing, and it can't speak or cast spells. The alvo's gear melds into the new form. Equipment that merges with a alvo's form has no effect until it leaves the form.

When the alvo reverts to its normal form, it returns to the number of pontos de vida it had before it transformed. If the spell's effects on the alvo end early from dropping to 0 pontos de vida, any excess damage carries over to its normal form and knocks it inconsciente if o dano reduces it to 0 pontos de vida.

name: Portal Jaunt
desc:
You touch a specially prepared key to a door or gate, turning it into a one-way portal to another such door within range. This spell works with any crafted door, doorway, archway, or any other artificial opening, but not natural or accidental openings such as cave entrances or cracks in walls. You must be aware of your destination ou ficar able to see it from where you cast the spell.
  On completing the spell, the touched door opens, revealing a shimmering image of the location beyond the destination door. You can move through the door, emerging instantly out of the destination door. You can also allow one other willing criatura to pass through the portal instead. Anything you carry moves through the door with you, including other criaturas, willing or unwilling.
  For the purpose of this spell, any locks, bars, or mágico effects such as arcane lock are ineffectual for the spell's duration. You can travel only to a side of the door you can see or have physically visited in the past (divinations such as clairvoyance count as seeing). Once you or a willing criatura passes through, both doors shut, ending the spell. If you or another criatura does not move through the portal within 1 rodada, the spell ends.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, the range increases by 100 pés and the duration increases by 1 rodada for each slot level above 3rd. Each rodada added to the duration allows one additional criatura to move through the portal before the spell ends.

name: Portal Trap
desc:
You create a mágico portal on a surface in an unoccupied space you can see within range. The portal occupies up to 5 square pés of the surface and is instantly covered with an illusion. The illusion looks like the surrounding terrain or surface features, such as mortared stone if the portal is placed on a stone wall, or a simple image of your choice like those created by the *minor illusion* spell. A criatura that touches, steps on, or otherwise interacts with or enters the portal deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar teleported to an unoccupied space up to 30 pés away in a random direction. To determine the direction, roll a d8 and assign a direction to each die face. The criatura can't be teleported into a solid object.
  Physical interaction with the illusion reveals it to be an illusion, but such touching triggers the portal's effect. A criatura that uses an action to examine the area where the portal is located can determine that it is an illusion with a successful Inteligência (Investigação) check against your CD de resistência à magia.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, you can create one additional portal for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Potency of the Pack
desc:
You bestow lupine traits on a group of living criaturas that you designate within range. Choose one of the following benefits to be gained by all alvos for the duration:

* ***Thick Fur.*** Each alvo sprouts fur over its entire body, giving it a +2 bonus to Classe de Armadura.
* ***Keen Hearing and Smell.*** Each alvo has vantagem on Sabedoria (Percepção) checks that rely on hearing or smell.
* ***Pack Tactics.*** Each affected criatura has vantagem on an jogada de ataque against a alvo if at least one of the attacker’s aliados (also under the effect of this spell) is within 5 pés of the alvo of the attack and the aliado isn’t incapacitado.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, the duration increases by 1 minuto for each slot level above 3rd.
material: a few hairs from a wolf

name: Power Word Fling
desc:
You mutter a word of power that causes a criatura you can see within range to be flung vertically or horizontally. The criatura deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Força ou ficar arremesso up to 15 pés vertically or horizontally. If the alvo impacts a surface, such as a ceiling or wall, it stops moving and recebe 3d6 dano contundente. If the alvo was arremesso vertically, it plummets to the ground, taking falling damage as normal, unless it has a voando Deslocamento or other method of preventing a fall. If the alvo impacts a criatura, the alvo stops moving and recebe 3d6 dano contundente, and the criatura the alvo hits deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Força ou ficar knocked prostrado. After the alvo is arremesso horizontally or it falls from being arremesso vertically, regardless of whether it impacted a surface, it is knocked prostrado.
  As a ação bônus on each of your subsequent turns, you can attempt to fling the same criatura again. The alvo deve ter sucesso em another teste de resistência de Força ou ficar arremesso.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, the distance you can fling the alvo increases by 5 pés, and o dano from impacting a surface or criatura increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Power Word Kill
desc: You utter a word of power that can compel one criatura você pode ver dentro do alcance to morre instantly. If a criatura você escolhe has 100 pontos de vida or fewer, it morre. Caso contrário, the magia has no effect.

name: Power Word Kill
desc: With but a word you snuff out the alvo's life and it immediately dies. If you cast this on a criatura with more than 100 pontos de vida, it recebe 50 pontos de vida of damage.

name: Power Word Kneel
desc: When you shout this word of power, criaturas within 20 pés of a point you specify are compelled to kneel down facing you. A kneeling criatura is treated as prostrado. Up to 55 pontos de vida of criaturas are affected, beginning with those that have the fewest pontos de vida. A kneeling criatura makes a teste de resistência de Sabedoria no final de its turn, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso no teste. The effect ends immediately on any criatura that recebe damage while kneeling.
material: an emerald worth at least 100 gp

name: Power Word Pain
desc: When you utter this word of power, uma criatura within 60 pés of you recebe 4d10 dano de força. no início de cada um de seus turnos, the criatura deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Constituição ou receber an extra 4d10 dano de força. The effect ends em um sucesso no teste.
material: a quill jabbed into your own body

name: Power Word Rend
desc: You speak a word of power that causes the internal organs of a criatura you can see within range to rupture. The alvo deve fazer a teste de resistência de Constituição. It recebe 4d6 + 20 dano de força em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one. If the alvo is below half its ponto de vida maximum, it has desvantagem on this teste de resistência. This spell has no effect on criaturas without vital internal organs, such as constructs, oozes, and undead.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 5th level or higher, you can alvo one additional criatura for each slot level above 4th. The criaturas must be within 30 pés of each other when you alvo them.

name: Power Word Restore
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You speak a word of power, and energy washes over a single construct you touch. The construct regains all of its lost pontos de vida, all negative conditions on the construct end, and it can use a reação to stand up, if it was prostrado.

name: Power Word Stun
desc: Você fala a word of power that can overwhelm the mind of one criatura você pode ver dentro do alcance, leaving it dumbfounded. If o alvo has 150 pontos de vida or fewer, it is atordoado. Caso contrário, the magia has no effect. The atordoado alvo deve fazer um teste de resistência de Constituição no final de cada um de seus turnos. em um sucesso no teste, this stunning effect ends.

name: Power Word Stun
desc: You utter a powerful word that stuns a alvo with 150 pontos de vida or less. no final de the alvo's turn, it makes a teste de resistência de Constituição to end the effect. If the alvo has more than 150 pontos de vida, it is instead rattled até o final de seu próximo turno.

name: Pratfall
desc: You cause a small bit of bad luck to befall a criatura, making it look humorously foolish. You create one of the following effects within range: A small, oily puddle appears under the pés of your alvo, causing it to lose balance. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Destreza ou ficar unable use a ação bônus on its next turn as it regains its footing. Tiny particles blow in your alvo's face, causing it to sneeze. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Constituição or have desvantagem on its first jogada de ataque on its next turn. Strobing lights flash briefly before your alvo's eyes, causing difficulties with its vision. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Constituição or its passive Percepção is halved até o final de seu próximo turno. The alvo feels the sensation of a quick, mild clap against its ears, briefly disorienting it. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Constituição to maintain its Concentração. An invisível força sharply tugs on the alvo's trousers, causing the clothing to slip down. The alvo deve fazer a teste de resistência de Destreza. em uma falha no teste, the alvo has desvantagem on its next jogada de ataque with a duas mãos weapon or loses its shield bonus to its Classe de Armadura até o final de seu próximo turno as it uses one hand to gather its slipping clothing. Only one of these effects can be used on a single criatura at a time.

name: Prayer of Healing
desc: Up to six criatura of your choice that você pode ver dentro do alcance each recupera pontos de vida equal to 2d8 + your modificador de conjuração. This magia has no effect on morto-vivo or constructo.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 3° nível ou superior, the healing increases by 1d8 for each nível do espaço above 2nd.

name: Prayer of Healing
desc: The alvos regain pontos de vida equal to 2d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier.
higher_level: The pontos de vida regained increase by 1d8 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Prestidigitation
desc:
