This magia is a minor mágico trick that novice spellcasters use for practice. você cria one of the following mágico effects within 'range': 
- você cria an instantaneous, harmless sensory effect, such as a shower of sparks, a puff of wind, faint musical notes, or an odd odor. 
- You instantaneously light or snuff out a candle, a torch, or a small campfire. 
- You instantaneously clean or soil an objeto no larger than 1 cubic foot. 
- You chill, warm, or flavor up to 1 cubic foot of nonliving material por 1 hora. 
- você faz a color, a small mark, or a symbol appear on an objeto or a superfície por 1 hora. 
- você cria a não mágico trinket or an illusory image that can fit in your hand and that lasts até o final do seu próximo turno. 
If Você conjura esta magia multiple times, você pode have up to three of its non-instantaneous effects active at a time, and você pode dismiss such an effect as an ação.

name: Prestidigitation
desc:
You wield arcane energies to produce minor effects. Choose one of the following:

* create a single burst of magic that manifests to one of the senses (for example a burst of sound, sparks, or an odd odor).
* clean or soil an object of 1 cubic pé or less.
* leve or snuff a flame.
* chill, warm, or flavor nonliving material of 1 cubic pé or less for 1 hora.
* color or mark an object or surface for 1 hora.
* create an ordinary trinket or illusionary image that fits in your hand and lasts for 1 rodada.

You may cast this spell multiple times, though only three effects may be active at a time. Dismissing each effect requires an action.

name: Primal Infusion
desc:
You channel the fury of Natureza, drawing on its power. Until the spell ends, you gain the following benefits:
* You gain 30 temporary pontos de vida. If any of these remain when the spell ends, they are lost.
* You have vantagem on attack rolls when one of your aliados is within 5 pés of the alvo and the aliado isn’t incapacitado.
* Your weapon attacks deal an extra 1d10 damage of the same type dealt by the weapon on a hit.
* You gain a +2 bonus to AC.
* You have proficiência on Constituição saving throws.
material: a bit of fur from a carnivorous animal

name: Prismatic Ray
desc:
A ray of shifting color springs from your hand. Make a ranged ataque mágico against a single criatura you can see within range. The ray’s effect and the teste de resistência that applies to it depend on which color is dominant when the beam strikes its alvo, determined by rolling a d8.

| d8 | Color | Effect | teste de resistência |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Red | 8d10 dano de fogo | Destreza |
| 2 | Orange | 8d10 dano de ácido | Destreza |
| 3 | Yellow | 8d10 dano de relâmpago | Destreza |
| 4 | Green | alvo envenenado | Constituição |
| 5 | Blue | alvo surdo | Constituição |
| 6 | Indigo | alvo amedrontado | Sabedoria |
| 7 | Violet | alvo atordoado | Constituição |
| 8 | Shifting Ray | alvo cego | Constituição |

A alvo recebe half as much damage on a successful teste de resistência de Destreza. A successful Constituição or teste de resistência de Sabedoria negates the effect of a ray that inflicts a condition on the alvo; em uma falha no teste, the alvo is affected for 5 rodadas or until the effect is negated. If the result of your jogada de ataque is a critical hit, you can choose the color of the beam that hits the alvo, but the attack does not deal additional damage.

name: Prismatic Spray
desc:
Eight multicolored rays of light flash from your hand. Each ray is a different color and has a different power and purpose. cada criatura in a 18 metros cone deve fazer um teste de resistência de Destreza. For cada alvo, roll a d8 to determine which color ray affects it.

**1. Red.** o alvo takes 10d6 dano de fogo em uma falha no teste, or half as much dano on a successful one.

**2. Orange.** o alvo takes 10d6 dano de ácido em uma falha no teste, or half as much dano on a successful one.

**3. Yellow.** o alvo takes 10d6 dano de relâmpago em uma falha no teste, or half as much dano on a successful one.

**4. Green.** o alvo takes 10d6 dano de veneno em uma falha no teste, or half as much dano on a successful one.

**5. Blue.** o alvo takes 10d6 dano de frio em uma falha no teste, or half as much dano on a successful one.

**6. Indigo.** em uma falha no teste, o alvo is imobilizado. It must then faz um teste de resistência de Constituição no final de cada um de seus turnos. If it successfully saves three times, a magia termina. If it fails its save three times, it permanently turns to stone and is subjected to the petrificado condition. The successes and failures don't need to be consecutive; keep track of both until o alvo collects three of a kind.

**7. Violet.** em uma falha no teste, o alvo is cego. It must then faz um teste de resistência de Sabedoria at the start of your next turn. A successful save ends the blindness. If it fails that save, a criatura is transported to another plano of existence of the DM's choosing and is no longer cego. (Typically, uma criatura that is on a plano that isn't its home plano is banished home, while outras criaturas are usually cast into the Astral or Ethereal plano.) 

**8. Especial.** o alvo is struck by two rays. Roll twice more, rerolling any 8.

name: Prismatic Spray
desc:
You unleash 8 rays of leve, each with a different purpose and effect. For each alvo in the area, roll a d8 to determine the ray that affects it.

1—Red: The alvo recebe 10d6 dano de fogo.

2—Orange: The alvo recebe 10d6 dano de ácido.

3—Yellow: The alvo recebe 10d6 dano de relâmpago.

4—Green: The alvo recebe 10d6 dano de veneno.

5—Blue: The alvo recebe 10d6 dano de frio.

6—Indigo: The alvo is imobilizado and no final de cada um de seus turnos it makes a teste de resistência de Constituição. Once it accumulates two failed saves it permanently turns to stone, or when it accumulates two successful saves the effect ends.

7—Violet: The alvo is cego. no início de your next turn, the alvo makes a teste de resistência de Sabedoria, ending the effect em um sucesso.

em uma falha no teste, the alvo is banished to another random plane and is no longer blind. If it originated from another plane it returns there, while other criaturas are generally cast into the Astral Plane or Ethereal Plane.

8—especial: The alvo is hit by two rays.

Roll a d8 twice to determine which rays, rerolling any 8s.

name: Prismatic Wall
desc:
A cintilante, multicolored plano of light forms a vertical opaque parede-up to 27 metros long, 9 metros high, and 1 inch thick-centered on a point você pode ver dentro do alcance. Alternatively, você pode shape the parede into a esfera up to 9 metros in diameter centered on a point você escolhe dentro do alcance. The parede remains in place for a duração. If you position the parede so that it passes through a space occupied by uma criatura, the magia fails, and your ação and the espaços de magia are wasted. The parede sheds luz intensa out to a range of 30 metros and luz fraca for an additional 30 metros. You and criatura you designate at the time you conjurar a magia can pass through and remain near the parede without harm. If another criatura that pode ver the parede moves to a até 6 metros de it or starts its turn there, a criatura deve ser bem-sucedido em um teste de resistência de Constituição or become cego por 1 minuto. The parede consists of seven layers, each with a different color. When uma criatura attempts to reach into or pass through the parede, it does so one layer at a time through all the parede's layers. As it passes or reaches through each layer, a criatura deve fazer um teste de resistência de Destreza or be affected by that layer's properties as described below. The parede can be destroyed, also one layer at a time, in order from red to violet, by means specific to each layer. Once a layer is destroyed, it remains so for a duração of the magia. A bastão of cancellation destroys a prismatic parede, but an antimagic field has no effect on it.

**1. Red.** a criatura takes 10d6 dano de fogo em uma falha no teste, or half as much dano on a successful one. While this layer is in place, não mágico ataque à distâncias can't pass through the parede. The layer can be destroyed by dealing at least 25 dano de frio to it.

**2. Orange.** a criatura takes 10d6 dano de ácido em uma falha no teste, or half as much dano on a successful one. While this layer is in place, mágico ataque à distâncias can't pass through the parede. The layer is destroyed by a strong wind.

**3. Yellow.** a criatura takes 10d6 dano de relâmpago em uma falha no teste, or half as much dano on a successful one. This layer can be destroyed by dealing at least 60 dano de força to it.

**4. Green.** a criatura takes 10d6 dano de veneno em uma falha no teste, or half as much dano on a successful one. A passwall magia, or another magia of equal or greater level that can open a portal on a solid superfície, destroys this layer.

**5. Blue.** a criatura takes 10d6 dano de frio em uma falha no teste, or half as much dano on a successful one. This layer can be destroyed by dealing at least 25 dano de fogo to it.

**6. Indigo.** em uma falha no teste, a criatura is imobilizado. It must then faz um teste de resistência de Constituição no final de cada um de seus turnos. If it successfully saves three times, a magia termina. If it fails its save three times, it permanently turns to stone and is subjected to the petrificado condition. The successes and failures don't need to be consecutive; keep track of both until a criatura collects three of a kind. While this layer is in place, magias can't be cast through the parede. The layer is destroyed by luz intensa shed by a daylight magia or a similar magia of equal or higher level.

**7. Violet.** em uma falha no teste, a criatura is cego. It must then faz um teste de resistência de Sabedoria at the start of your next turn. A successful save ends the blindness. If it fails that save, a criatura is transported to another plano of the DM's choosing and is no longer cego. (Typically, uma criatura that is on a plano that isn't its home plano is banished home, while outras criaturas are usually cast into the Astral or Ethereal plano.) This layer is destroyed by a dissipar magia magia or a similar magia of equal or higher level that can end magias and mágico effects.

name: Prismatic Wall
desc:
You create a nontransparent barrier of prismatic energy that sheds bright leve in a 100-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 100 pés. You and criaturas you choose at the time of casting are immune to the barrier's effects and may pass through it at will.

The barrier can be created as either a vertical wall or a sphere. If the wall intersects a space occupied by a criatura the spell fails, you lose your action, and the espaço de magia is wasted.

When a criatura that can see the barrier moves within 20 pés of the area or starts its turn within 20 pés of the area, it makes a teste de resistência de Constituição or it is cego for 1 minuto.

The wall has 7 layers, each layer of a different color in order from red to violet. Once a layer is destroyed, it is gone for the duration of the spell.

To pass or alcance through the barrier a criatura does so one layer at a time and deve fazer a teste de resistência de Destreza for each layer ou ficar subjected to that layer's effects. em um sucesso no teste, any damage taken from a layer is reduced by half.

A rod of cancellation can destroy a prismatic wall, but an antimagic field has no effect.

Red: The criatura recebe 10d6 dano de fogo.

While active, não mágico ranged attacks can't penetrate the barrier. The layer is destroyed by 25 dano de frio.

Orange: The criatura recebe 10d6 dano de ácido. While active, mágico ranged attacks can't penetrate the barrier. The layer is destroyed by strong winds.

Yellow: The criatura recebe 10d6 dano de relâmpago. This layer is destroyed by 60 dano de força.

Green: The criatura recebe 10d6 dano de veneno. A passwall spell, or any spell of equal or greater level which can create a portal on a solid surface, destroys the layer.

Blue: The criatura recebe 10d6 dano de frio.

This layer is destroyed by 25 dano de fogo.

Indigo: The criatura is imobilizado and makes a teste de resistência de Constituição no final de cada um de seus turnos. Once it accumulates three failed saves it permanently turns to stone, or when it accumulates three successful saves the effect ends. This layer can be destroyed by bright leve, such as that created by the daylight spell or a spell of equal or greater level.

Violet: The criatura is cego. no início de your next turn, the criatura makes a teste de resistência de Sabedoria, ending the effect em um sucesso.

em uma falha no teste, the criatura is banished to another random plane and is no longer blind. If it originated from another plane it returns there, while other criaturas are generally cast into the Astral Plane or Ethereal Plane. This layer can be destroyed by dispel magic or a similar spell of equal or greater level capable of ending spells or mágico effects.

name: Private Sanctum
desc:
você faz an área dentro do alcance magically secure. The área is a cubo that can be as small as 1.5 metros to as large as 30 metros on each side. The magia lasts for a duração or until Você usa an ação to dismiss it. When you conjurar a magia, you decide what sort of security the magia provides, choosing any or all of the following properties: 
- Sound can't pass through the barrier at the edge of the warded área. 
- The barrier of the warded área appears dark and foggy, preventing vision (including visão no escuro) through it. 
- Sensors created by adivinhação magias can't appear inside the protected área or pass through the barrier at its perimeter. 
- criatura in the área can't be targeted by adivinhação magias. 
- Nothing can teletransporte into or out of the warded área. 
- Planar travel is blocked within the warded área. 
conjurando esta magia on the same spot every day for a year makes this effect permanent.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 5° nível ou superior, você pode increase the size of the cubo by 30 metros for each nível do espaço beyond 4th. Thus you could protect a cubo that can be up to 60 metros on one side by using um espaço de magia of 5th level.
material: A thin sheet of lead, a piece of opaque glass, a wad of cotton or cloth, and powdered chrysolite.

name: Private Sanctum
desc:
You increase the mágico security in an area, choosing one or more of the following:

* sound cannot pass the edge of the area.
* leve and vision cannot pass the edge of the area.
* sensors created by divination spells can neither enter the area nor appear within it.
* criaturas within the area cannot be targeted by divination spells.
* nothing can teleport into or out of the area.
* planar travel is impossible within the area.

Casting this spell on the same area every dia for a year makes the duration permanent.
higher_level: Increase the size of the sanctum by up to 100 pés for each slot level above 4th.

name: Produce Flame
desc: A flickering flame appears in your hand. The flame remains there for a duração and harms neither you nor your equipment. The flame sheds luz intensa in a 3 metros raio and luz fraca for an additional 3 metros. a magia termina if you dismiss it as an ação or if you cast it again. você pode also attack with the flame, although doing so ends the magia. quando você conjura esta magia, or as an ação on a later turn, você pode hurl the flame at uma criatura a até 9 metros de you. faça um ataque de magia à distância. em um acerto, o alvo takes 1d8 dano de fogo.
higher_level: This magia's dano increases by 1d8 when you reach 5th level (2d8), 11th level (3d8), and 17th level (4d8).

name: Produce Flame
desc:
You create a flame in your hand which lasts until the spell ends and does no harm to you or your equipment. The flame sheds bright leve in a 10-pé radius and dim leve for an additional 10 pés.

The spell ends when you dismiss it, cast it again, or attack with the flame. As part of casting the spell or as an action on a following turn, you can fling the flame at a criatura within 30 pés, making a ranged ataque mágico that causa 1d8 dano de fogo.
higher_level: This spell's damage increases by 1d8 when you alcance 5th level (2d8), 11th level (3d8), and 17th level (4d8).

name: Programmed Illusion
desc: você cria an ilusão of an objeto, uma criatura, or some other visible phenomenon dentro do alcance that activates when a specific condition occurs. The ilusão is imperceptible until then. It must be no larger than a 9 metros cubo, and you decide when you conjurar a magia how the ilusão behaves and what sounds it makes. This scripted performance can last up to 5 minutes. When the condition you specify occurs, the ilusão springs into existence and performs in the manner you described. Once the ilusão finishes performing, it disappears and remains dormant por 10 minutos. After this time, the ilusão can be activated again. The triggering condition can be as general or as detailed as you like, though it must be based on visual or audible conditions that occur a até 9 metros de the área. Por exemplo, you could create an ilusão of yourself to appear and warn off others who attempt to open a trapped door, or you could set the ilusão to trigger only when uma criatura says the correct word or phrase. Physical interaction with the image reveals it to be an ilusão, because things can pass through it. uma criatura that uses its ação to examine the image can determine that it is an ilusão with a successful Inteligência (Investigation) check against your CD da magia. If uma criatura discerns the ilusão for what it is, a criatura pode ver through the image, and any noise it makes sounds hollow to a criatura.
material: A bit of fleece and jade dust worth at least 25 gp.

name: Programmed Illusion
desc:
You craft an illusory object, criatura, or other effect which executes a scripted Atuação when a specific condition is met within 30 pés of the area.

You must describe both the condition and the details of the Atuação upon casting. The trigger must be based on something that can be seen or heard.

Once the illusion triggers, it runs its Atuação for up to 5 minutos before it disappears and goes dormant for 10 minutos. The illusion is undetectable until then and only reactivates when the condition is triggered and after the dormant period has passed.

A criatura can use an action to attempt an Investigação check against your CD de resistência à magia to reveal the spell's illusory Natureza. Physical interactions reveal the illusion for what it is as things can pass through it with ease. A criatura aware of the illusion perceives the image as transparent and the sounds it generates hollow.

name: Project Image
desc: você cria an illusory copy of yourself that lasts for a duração. The copy can appear at any location dentro do alcance that você tem seen before, regardless of intervening obstacles. The ilusão looks and sounds like you but is intangible. If the ilusão takes any dano, it disappears, and a magia termina. você pode use your ação to move this ilusão up to twice your velocidade, and make it gesture, speak, and behave in whatever way você escolhe. It mimics your mannerisms perfectly. você pode ver through its eyes and hear through its ears as if you were in its space. On your turn as a ação bônus, você pode switch from using its sentidos to using your own, or back again. While Você está using its sentidos, Você está cego and ensurdecido in regard to your own surroundings. Physical interaction with the image reveals it to be an ilusão, because things can pass through it. uma criatura that uses its ação to examine the image can determine that it is an ilusão with a successful Inteligência (Investigation) check against your CD da magia. If uma criatura discerns the ilusão for what it is, a criatura pode ver through the image, and any noise it makes sounds hollow to a criatura.
material: A small replica of you made from materials worth at least 5 gp.

name: Project Image
desc:
You create an illusory duplicate of yourself that looks and sounds like you but is intangible. The duplicate can appear anywhere within range as long as you have seen the space before (it ignores any obstacles in the way).

You can use an action to move this duplicate up to twice your Deslocamento and make it speak and behave in whatever way you choose, mimicking your mannerism with perfect accuracy. You can use a ação bônus to see through your duplicate's eyes and hear through its ears until the beginning of your next turn. During this time, you are blind and deaf to your body's surroundings.

A criatura can use an action to attempt an Investigação check against your CD de resistência à magia to reveal the spell's illusory Natureza. Physical interactions reveal the illusion for what it is as things can pass through it with ease. A criatura aware of the illusion perceives the image as transparent and the sounds it generates hollow.

name: Protection from Energy
desc: For a duração, the criatura voluntária Você toca has resistência a one dano type of your choice: acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder.
dnd_class: Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Wizard

name: Protection from Energy
desc: Until the spell ends, the alvo has resistance to one of the following damage types: ácido, frio, fogo, relâmpago, trovão.
higher_level: For each slot level above 2nd, the alvo gains resistance to one additional type of damage listed above, with a maximum number equal to your spellcasting ability modifier.

name: Protection from Evil and Good
desc: Until a magia termina, one criatura voluntária Você toca is protected against certain types of criatura: aberrations, celestials, elemental, fada, demônio, and morto-vivo. The protection grants several benefits. criatura of those types têm desvantagem em rolagem de ataques against o alvo. o alvo also can't be enfeitiçado, amedrontado, or possessed by them. If o alvo is already enfeitiçado, amedrontado, or possessed by such uma criatura, o alvo tem vantagem em any new teste de resistência against the relevant effect.
material: Holy water or powdered silver and iron, which the magia consumes.

name: Protection from Evil and Good
desc:
The alvo is protected against the following types of criaturas: aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead. criaturas of those types have desvantagem on attack rolls against the alvo and are unable to charm, frighten, or possess the alvo.

If the alvo is already enfeitiçado, amedrontado, or possessed by such a criatura, the alvo has vantagem on any new teste de resistência against that effect.

name: Protection from Poison
desc: Você toca uma criatura. If it is envenenado, you neutralize the poison. If more than one poison afflicts o alvo, you neutralize one poison that Você sabe is present, or you neutralize one at random. For a duração, o alvo tem vantagem em teste de resistências against being envenenado, and it has resistência a dano de veneno.

name: Protection from Poison
desc:
The alvo has vantagem on saving throws against being envenenado and resistance to dano de veneno.

Additionally, if the alvo is envenenado, you negate one veneno affecting it. If more than one veneno affects the alvo, you negate one veneno you know is present (otherwise you negate one at random).

name: Protection from the Void
desc: Until the spell ends, one willing criatura you touch has resistance to necrótico and dano psíquico and has vantagem on saving throws against Void spells.
material: a small bar of silver worth 15 sp, which the spell consumes

name: Protective Ice
desc:
When you cast **protective ice**, you encase a willing alvo in icy, medium armor equivalent to a breastplate (AC 14). A criatura without the appropriate armor proficiência has the usual penalties. If the alvo is already wearing armor, it only uses the better of the two armor classes.

A criatura striking a alvo encased in **protective ice** with a ataque corpo a corpo while within 5 pés of it recebe 1d6 dano de frio.

If the armor’s wearer recebe dano de fogo, an equal amount of damage is done to the armor, which has 30 pontos de vida and is damaged only when its wearer recebe dano de fogo. Damaged ice can be repaired by casting a spell that causa dano de frio on it, on a point-for-point basis, but the armor can’t have more than 30 points repaired.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a 4th-level espaço de magia, it creates splint armor (AC 17, 40 pontos de vida). If you cast this spell using a 5th-level espaço de magia, it creates plate armor (AC 18, 50 pontos de vida). The armor’s pontos de vida increase by 10 for each espaço de magia above 5th, but the AC remains 18. Additionally, if you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, the armor causa an extra +2 dano de frio for each espaço de magia above 3rd.
material: a seed encased in ice or glass

name: Puff of Smoke
desc: By harnessing the elemental power of fogo, you warp nearby air into obscuring smoke. uma criatura you can see within range deve fazer a teste de resistência de Destreza. If it fails, the criatura is cego until the start of your next turn. **Puff of smoke** has no effect on criaturas that have sentido sísmico or visão cega.

name: Pummelstone
desc: You cause a fist-sized chunk of stone to appear and hurl itself against the spell’s alvo. Make a ranged ataque mágico. On a hit, the alvo recebe 1d6 dano contundente and must roll a d4 when it makes an jogada de ataque or teste de habilidade during its next turn, subtracting the result of the d4 from the attack or check roll.
higher_level: The spell’s damage increases by 1d6 when you alcance 5th level (2d6), 11th level (3d6), and 17th level (4d6).
material: a pebble

name: Purify Food and Drink
desc: All não mágico food and drink within a 1.5 metros raio esfera centered on a point of your choice dentro do alcance is purified and rendered free of poison and disease.

name: Purify Food and Drink
desc: You remove all veneno and disease from a number of Supply equal to your proficiência bonus.
higher_level: Remove all veneno and disease from an additional Supply for each slot level above 1st.

name: Putrescent Faerie Circle
desc: You create a 20-pé-diameter circle of loosely-packed toadstools that spew sickly white spores and ooze a tarry substance. no início de each of your turns, cada criatura within the circle deve fazer a teste de resistência de Constituição. A criatura recebe 4d8 dano necrótico em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one. If a criatura attempts to pass through the ring of toadstools, the toadstools release a cloud of spores, and the criatura deve fazer a teste de resistência de Constituição. em uma falha, the criatura recebe 8d8 dano de veneno and is envenenado for 1 minuto. em um sucesso, the criatura recebe half as much damage and isn't envenenado. While a criatura is envenenado, it is paralisado. It can attempt a new teste de resistência de Constituição no final de cada um de seus turnos to remove the paralisado condition (but not the envenenado condition).

name: Pyroclasm
desc:
You point toward an area of ground or a similar surface within range. A geyser of lava erupts from the chosen spot. The geyser is 5 pés in diameter and 40 pés high. cada criatura in the cylinder when it erupts or no início de your turn recebe 10d8 dano de fogo, or half as much damage if it makes a successful teste de resistência de Destreza.

The geyser also forms a pool of lava at its base. Initially, the pool is the same size as the geyser, but no início de each of your turns for the duration, the pool’s radius increases by 5 pés. A criatura in the pool of lava (but not in the geyser) no início de your turn recebe 5d8 dano de fogo.

When a criatura leaves the pool of lava, its Deslocamento is reduced by half and it has desvantagem on Destreza saving throws, caused by a hardening layer of lava. These penalties last until the criatura uses an action to break the hardened stone away from itself.

If you maintain Concentração on **pyroclasm** for a full minuto, the lava geyser and pool harden into permanent, não mágico stone. A criatura in either area when the stone hardens is imobilizado until the stone is broken away.
material: a shard of obsidian

name: Quick Time
desc: You make one living criatura or plant within range move rapidly in time compared to you. The alvo becomes one year older. For example, you could cast this spell on a seedling, which causes the plant to sprout from the soil, or you could cast this spell on a newly hatched duckling, causing it to become a full-grown duck. If the alvo is a criatura with an Inteligência of 3 or higher, it deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Constituição to resist the aging. It can choose to fail the teste de resistência.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 5th level or higher, you increase the alvo’s age by one additional year for each slot level above 4th.
material: any seed

name: Quicken
desc: You touch one willing criatura. Once before the duration of the spell expires, the alvo can roll a d4 and add the number rolled to an initiative roll or teste de resistência de Destreza it has just made. The spell then ends.

name: Quicksilver Mantle
desc: You transform an ordinary cloak into a highly reflective, silvery garment. This mantle increases your AC by 2 and grants vantagem on saving throws against gaze attacks. In addition, whenever you are struck by a ray such as a [ray of enfeeblement](https://api.open5e.com/spells/ray-of-enfeeblement), [scorching ray](https://api.open5e.com/spells/scorching-ray), or even [disintegrate](https://api.open5e.com/spells/disintegrate), roll 1d4. On a result of 4, the cloak deflects the ray, which instead strikes a randomly selected alvo within 10 pés of you. The cloak deflects only the first ray that strikes it each rodada; rays after the first affect you as normal.
material: a não mágico cloak and a dram of quicksilver worth 10 gp

name: Quintessence
desc:
By calling upon an archangel, you become infused with Celestial essence and take on angelic features such as golden skin, glowing eyes, and ethereal wings. For the duration of the spell, your Classe de Armadura can’t be lower than 20, you can’t be amedrontado, and you are immune to dano necrótico.

In addition, each hostile criatura that starts its turn within 120 pés of you or enters that area for the first time on a turn deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar amedrontado for 1 minuto. A criatura amedrontado in this way is imobilizado. A amedrontado criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso. If a criatura’s teste de resistência is successful or if the effect ends for it, the criatura is immune to the frightening effect of the spell until you cast **quintessence** again.

name: Rage of the Meek
desc:
You unleash the discipline of your mágico training and let arcane power burn from your fists, consuming the material components of the spell. Until the spell ends you have resistance to contundente, perfurante, and dano cortante from não mágico weapons, and on each of your turns you can use an action to make a melee ataque mágico against a alvo within 5 pés that causa 4d8 dano de força on a successful hit.

For the duration, you cannot cast other spells or concentrate on other spells. The spell ends early if your turn ends and you haven't attacked a hostile criatura since your last turn or taken damage since then. You can also end this spell early on your turn as a ação bônus.
higher_level:
When using a espaço de magia of 5th- or 6th-level, o dano increases to 5d8.

When using a espaço de magia of 7th- or 8th-level, o dano increases to 6d8\. When using a espaço de magia of 9th-level, o dano increases to 7d8.

name: Raid the Lair
desc:
You create an invisível circle of protective energy centered on yourself with a radius of 10 pés. This field moves with you. The caster and all aliados within the energy field are protected against dragons’ lair actions.
* Attack rolls resulting directly from lair actions are made with desvantagem.
* Saving throws resulting directly from lair actions are made with vantagem, and damage done by these lair actions is halved.
* Lair actions occur on an initiative count 10 lower than normal.

The caster has vantagem on Constituição saving throws to maintain Concentração on this spell.
material: a piece of the dragon whose lair you are raiding

name: Rain of Blades
desc: You call down a rain of swords, spears, and axes. The blades fill 150 square pés (six 5-pé squares, a circle 15 pés in diameter, or any other pattern you want as long as it forms one contiguous space at least 5 pés wide in all places. The blades deal 6d6 dano cortante to cada criatura in the area at the moment the spell is cast, or half as much damage on a successful teste de resistência de Destreza. An intelligent undead injured by the blades is amedrontado for 1d4 rodadas if it fails a teste de resistência de Carisma. Most of the blades break or are driven into the ground on impact, but enough survive intact that any single perfurante or cortante melee weapon can be salvaged from the affected area and used normally if it is claimed before the spell ends. When the duration expires, all the blades (including the one that was salvaged) disappear.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 6th level or higher, an unbroken blade can be picked up and used as a mágico +1 weapon until it disappears.
material: shard of metal from a weapon

name: Raise Dead
desc: You return a morto criatura Você toca to life, provided that it has been morto no longer than 10 days. If a criatura's alma is both willing and at liberty to rejoin the corpo, a criatura returns to life with 1 ponto de vida. This magia also neutralizes any poisons and cures não mágico diseases that affected a criatura at the time it died. This magia doesn't, No entanto, remove mágico diseases, curses, or similar effects; if these aren't first removed prior to casting the magia, they take effect when a criatura returns to life. The magia can't return an morto-vivo criatura to life. This magia closes all mortal wounds, but it doesn't restore missing corpo parts. If a criatura is lacking corpo parts or organs integral for its survival-its head, Por exemplo-the magia automatically fails. Coming back from the morto is an ordeal. o alvo takes a -4 penalty to all rolagem de ataques, teste de resistências, verificação de ands. Every time o alvo finishes a descanso longo, the penalty is reduced by 1 until it disappears.
material: A diamond worth at least 500gp, which the magia consumes.

name: Raise Dead
desc:
You return the alvo to life, provided its soul is willing and able to return to its body. The criatura returns to life with 1 ponto de vida. The spell cannot return an undead criatura to life.

The spell cures any poisons and não mágico diseases that affected the criatura at the time of death. It does not remove any mágico diseases, curses, or other mágico effects; these must be removed prior to the spell being cast, otherwise they immediately take effect when the criatura returns to life.

The spell does not regrow limbs or organs, and it automatically fails if the alvo is missing any body parts necessary for life (like its heart or head).

Being raised from the dead recebe a toll on the body, mind, and spirit. The alvo suffers 3 levels of fatigue and strife. At the conclusion of each descanso longo, the alvo removes one level of fatigue and strife until the alvo completely recovers.

name: Raise Hell
desc:
You transform the land around you into a blasted hellscape. When you cast the spell, all não mágico vegetation in the area immediately dies. In addition, you can create any of the following effects within the area. Fiends are immune to these effects, as are any criaturas you specify at the time you cast the spell. A successful dispel magic ends a single effect, not the entire area.

Brimstone Rubble. You can fill any number of unoccupied 5-pé squares in the area with smoldering brimstone. These spaces become difficult terrain. A criatura that enters an affected square or starts its turn there recebe 2d10 dano de fogo.

Field of Fear. Dread pervades the entire area.

A criatura that starts its turn in the area deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar amedrontado until the start its next turn. While amedrontado, a criatura must take the Dash action to escape the area by the safest available route on cada um de seus turnos. em um sucesso no teste, the criatura becomes immune to this effect for 24 horas.

Spawning Pits. The ground opens to create up to 6 pits filled with poisonous bile. Each pit fills a 10-pé cube that drops beneath the ground.

When this spell is cast, any criatura whose space is on a pit may make a teste de resistência de Destreza, moving to an unoccupied space next to the pit em um sucesso. A criatura that enters a pit or starts its turn there recebe 15d6 dano de veneno, or half as much damage on a successful teste de resistência de Constituição. A criatura reduced to 0 pontos de vida by this damage immediately dies and rises as a lemure no início de its next turn. Lemures created this way obey your verbal commands, but they disappear when the spell ends or if they leave the area for any reason.

Unhallowed Spires. Up to four spires of black ice rise from the ground in unoccupied 10-pé squares within the area. Each spire can be up to 66 pés tall and is immune to all damage and mágico effects. Whenever a criatura within 30 pés of a spire would regain pontos de vida, it does not regain pontos de vida and instead recebe 3d6 dano necrótico.

If you maintain Concentração on the spell for the full duration, the effects are permanent until dispelled.

name: Ray of Alchemical Negation
desc:
You launch a ray of blazing, polychromatic energy from your fingertips. Make a ranged ataque mágico against an alchemical item or a trap that uses alchemy to achieve its ends, such as a trap that sprays ácido, releases poisonous gas, or triggers an explosion of alchemist’s fogo. A hit destroys the alchemical reagents, rendering them harmless. The attack is made against the most suitable object Classe de Armadura.

This spell can also be used against a criatura within range that is wholly or partially composed of acidic, poisonous, or alchemical components, such as an alchemical golem or an ochre jelly. In that case, a hit causa 6d6 dano de força, and the alvo deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Constituição or it causa only half as much damage with its acidic, poisonous, or alchemical attacks for 1 minuto. A criatura whose damage is halved can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect em um sucesso.

name: Ray of Enfeeblement
desc: A black beam of enervating energy springs from your finger toward uma criatura dentro do alcance. faça um ataque de magia à distância contra o alvo. em um acerto, o alvo deals only half dano with arma attacks that use Força until a magia termina. At the end of each of o alvo's turns, it can faz um teste de resistência de Constituição against the magia. On a success, a magia termina.

name: Ray of Enfeeblement
desc:
A black ray of necrótico energy shoots from your fingertip. Make a ranged ataque mágico against the alvo. On a hit, the alvo is weakened and only causa metade do dano with weapon attacks that use Força.

no final de each of the alvo's turns, it can make a teste de resistência de Força, ending the spell em um sucesso.

name: Ray of Frost
desc: A frigid beam of blue-white light streaks toward uma criatura dentro do alcance. faça um ataque de magia à distância contra o alvo. em um acerto, it takes 1d8 dano de frio, and its velocidade is reduced by 3 metros até o início de seu próximo turno.
higher_level: o dano da magia increases by 1d8 when you reach 5th level (2d8), 11th level (3d8), and 17th level (4d8).

name: Ray of Frost
desc:
An icy beam shoots from your outstretched fingers.

Make a ranged ataque mágico. On a hit, you deal 1d8 dano de frio and reduce the alvo's Deslocamento by 10 pés until the start of your next turn.
higher_level: This spell's damage increases by 1d8 when you alcance 5th level (2d8), 11th level (3d8), and 17th level (4d8).

name: Ray of Life Suppression
desc:
You launch a swirling ray of disruptive energy at a criatura within range. Make a ranged ataque mágico. On a hit, the criatura recebe 6d8 dano necrótico and its maximum pontos de vida are reduced by an equal amount. This reduction lasts until the criatura finishes a short or descanso longo, or until it receives the benefit of a [greater restoration](https://api.open5e.com/spells/greater-restoration) spell or comparable magic.

This spell has no effect on constructs or undead.

name: Ray of Sickness
desc:
A ray of green leve appears at your fingertip, arcing towards a alvo within range.

Make a ranged ataque mágico against the alvo. On a hit, the alvo recebe 2d8 dano de veneno and deve fazer a teste de resistência de Constituição. em uma falha no teste, it is also envenenado until the end of your next turn.

*(This Open5e spell replaces a like-named non-SRD spell from an official source.*
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 2nd level or higher, o dano increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Read Memory
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You copy the memories of one memory gear into your own mind. You recall these memories as if you had experienced them but without any emotional attachment or context.

name: Reaper's Knell
desc: As the bell rings, a burst of necrótico energy ripples out in a 20-pé-radius sphere from a point you can see within range. cada criatura in that area deve fazer a teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em uma falha no teste, the criatura is marked with necrótico energy for the duration. If a marked criatura is reduced to 0 pontos de vida or dies before the spell ends, you regain pontos de vida equal to 2d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier. Alternatively, you can choose for one aliado you can see within range to regain the pontos de vida instead.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 5th level or higher, the healing increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 4th.

name: Reassemble
desc: You touch an undead criatura (dust and bones suffice) destroyed not more than 10 horas ago; the criatura is surrounded by purple fogo for 1 rodada and is returned to life with full pontos de vida. This spell has no effect on any criaturas except undead, and it cannot restore a lich whose phylactery has been destroyed, a vampire destroyed by sunlight, any undead whose remains are destroyed by fogo, ácido, or holy water, or any remains affected by a gentle repose spell. This spell doesn't remove mágico effects. If they aren't removed prior to casting, they return when the undead criatura comes back to life. This spell closes all mortal wounds but doesn't restore missing body parts. If the criatura doesn't have body parts or organs necessary for Sobrevivência, the spell fails. Sudden reassembly is an ordeal involving enormous expenditure of necrótico energy; ley line casters within 5 milhas are aware that some great shift in life forces has occurred and a sense of its direction. The alvo recebe a -4 penalty to all attacks, saves, and ability checks. Every time it finishes a descanso longo, the penalty is reduced by 1 until it disappears.

name: Reaver Spirit
desc:
You inspire aliados to fight with the savagery of berserkers. You and any aliados you can see within range have vantagem on Força checks and Força saving throws; resistance to contundente, perfurante, and dano cortante from ataques não mágicos; and a +2 bonus to damage with melee weapons.

When the spell ends, each affected criatura deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Constituição or gain 1d4 levels of exaustão.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, the bonus to damage increases by 1 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Rebounding Bolt
desc:
You fogo a vibrant blue beam of energy at a criatura you can see within range. The beam then bounces to a criatura of your choice within 30 pés of the alvo, losing some of its vibrancy and continuing to bounce to other criaturas of your choice until it sputters out. Each subsequent alvo must be within 30 pés of the alvo affected before it, and the beam can't bounce to a alvo it has already affected.
  Each alvo deve fazer a teste de resistência de Constituição. The first alvo recebe 5d6 dano de força em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one. The beam loses some of its power then bounces to the second alvo. The beam causa 1d6 dano de força less (4d6, then 3d6, then 2d6, then 1d6) to each subsequent alvo with the final alvo taking 1d6 dano de força em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, o dano increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd. This increase allows the beam to jump an additional time, reducing o dano it causa by 1d6 with each bounce as normal.

name: Reciprocating Portal
desc:
With a gesture and a muttered word, you cause an inky black, circular portal to open on the ground beneath one or more criaturas. You can create one 15-pé-diameter portal, two 10-pé-diameter portals, or six 5-pé-diameter portals. A criatura that's standing where you create a portal deve fazer a teste de resistência de Destreza. em uma falha no teste, the criatura falls through the portal, disappears into a demiplane where it is atordoado as it falls endlessly, and the portal closes.
  no início de your next turn, the criaturas that failed their saving throws fall through matching portals directly above their previous locations. A falling criatura lands prostrado in the space it once occupied or the nearest unoccupied space and recebe falling damage as if it fell 60 pés, regardless of the distance between the exit portal and the ground. voando and levitating criaturas can't be affected by this spell.

name: Regenerate
desc: Você toca uma criatura and stimulate its natural healing ability. o alvo regains 4d8 + 15 pontos de vida. For a duração of the magia, o alvo regains 1 ponto de vida no início de cada um de seus turnos (10 pontos de vida each minute). o alvo's severed corpo members (fingers, legs, tails, and so on), se houver, are restored after 2 minutes. If você tem the severed part and hold it to the stump, the magia instantaneously causes the limb to knit to the stump.
material: A prayer wheel and holy water.

name: Regenerate
desc:
You touch a criatura, causing its body to spontaneously heal itself. The alvo immediately regains 4d8 + 15 pontos de vida and regains 10 pontos de vida per minuto (1 ponto de vida no início de cada um de seus turnos).

If the alvo is missing any body parts, the lost parts are restored after 2 minutos. If a severed part is held against the stump, the limb instantaneously reattaches itself.

name: Reincarnate
desc:
Você toca a morto humanoide or a piece of a morto humanoide. Provided that a criatura has been morto no longer than 10 days, the magia forms a new adult corpo for it and then calls the alma to enter that corpo. If o alvo's alma isn't free or willing to do so, the magia fails. The magia fashions a new corpo for a criatura to inhabit, which likely causes a criatura's race to change. The DM rolls a d 100 and consults the following table to determine what form a criatura takes when restored to life, or the DM chooses a form.

**01-04** Dragonborn **05-13** Dwarf, hill **14-21** Dwarf, mountain **22-25** Elf, dark **26-34** Elf, high **35-42** Elf, wood **43-46** Gnome, forest **47-52** Gnome, rock **53-56** Half-elf **57-60** Half-orc **61-68** Halfling, lightfoot **69-76** Halfling, stout **77-96** Human **97-00** Tiefling 
The reincarnated criatura recalls its former life and experiences. It retains the capabilities it had in its original form, except it exchanges its original race for the new one and changes its racial traits accordingly.
material: Rare oils and unguents worth at least 1,000 gp, which the magia consumes.

name: Reincarnate
desc:
You return the alvo to life, provided the alvo's soul is willing and able to return to its body. If you only have a piece of the alvo, the spell reforms a new adult body for the soul to inhabit. Once reincarnated the alvo remembers everything from its former life, and retains all its proficiencies, cultural traits, and class features.

The alvo's heritage traits change according to its new form. The Narrator chooses the form of the new body, or rolls on Table: Reincarnation.

name: Remove Curse
desc: At your Toque, all curses affecting one criatura or objeto end. If the objeto is a cursed item mágico, its curse remains, but the magia breaks its owner's attunement to the objeto so it can be removed or discarded.

name: Remove Curse
desc: This spell ends a curse inflicted with a espaço de magia of 3rd-level or lower. If the curse was instead inflicted by a feature or trait, the spell ends a curse inflicted by a criatura of Challenge Rating 6 or lower. If cast on a cursed object of Rare or lesser rarity, this spell breaks the owner's attunement to the item (although it does not end the curse on the object).
higher_level:
For each slot level above 3rd, the spell ends a curse inflicted either by a spell one level higher or by a criatura with a Challenge Rating two higher. When using a 6th-level espaço de magia, the spell breaks the owner's attunement to a Very Rare item.

When using a 9th-level espaço de magia, the spell breaks the owner's attunement to a Legendary item.

name: Remove Insulation
desc: You alvo a criatura within range, and that criatura deve ter sucesso em a Fortitude teste de resistência or become less resistant to dano de relâmpago. A criatura with immunity to dano de relâmpago has vantagem on this teste de resistência. em uma falha, a criatura with immunity to dano de relâmpago instead has resistance to dano de relâmpago for the spell's duration, and a criatura with resistance to dano de relâmpago loses its resistance for the duration. A criatura without resistance to dano de relâmpago that fails its teste de resistência recebe double damage from relâmpago for the spell's duration. Remove curse or similar magic ends this spell.
higher_level: If you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 6th level or higher, the duration is 24 horas. If you use a espaço de magia of 8th level or higher, a criatura with immunity to dano de relâmpago no longer has vantagem on its teste de resistência. If you use a espaço de magia of 9th level or higher, the spell lasts until it is dispelled.

name: Repair Metal
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork A damaged construct or metal object regains 1d8 + 5 pontos de vida when this spell is cast on it.
higher_level: The spell restores 2d8 + 10 pontos de vida at 4th level, 3d8 + 15 at 6th level, and 4d8 + 20 at 8th level.

name: Reposition
desc: You designate up to three friendly criaturas (one of which can be yourself) within range. Each alvo teleports to an unoccupied space of its choosing that it can see within 30 pés of itself.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 5th level or higher, the spell alvos one additional friendly criatura for each slot level above 4th.

name: Repulsing Wall
desc:
You create a shimmering wall of leve on a solid surface within range. You can make the wall up to 60 pés long, 20 pés high, and 1 pé thick, or a ringed wall up to 20 pés in diameter, 20 pés high, and 1 pé thick. The wall is translucent, and criaturas have desvantagem on Sabedoria (Percepção) checks to look through the wall.
  One side of the wall, selected by you when you cast this spell, causa 5d8 dano radiante when a criatura enters the wall for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there. A criatura attempting to pass through the wall deve fazer a teste de resistência de Força. em uma falha no teste, a criatura is pushed 10 pés away from the wall and falls prostrado. A criatura that is undead, a fiend, or vulnerable to dano radiante has desvantagem on this teste de resistência. The other side of the wall causa no damage and doesn't restrict movement through it.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 5th level or higher, o dano increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 4th.

name: Reset
desc: Choose up to four criaturas within range. If a alvo is your aliado, it can reroll initiative, keeping whichever of the two results it prefers. If a alvo is your inimigo, it deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Sabedoria or reroll initiative, keeping whichever of the two results you prefer. Changes to the initiative order go into effect no início de the next rodada.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 5th level or higher, you can affect one additional criatura for each slot level above 4th.

name: Reset Red Portal
desc: When you cast this spell, you can reset the destination of a Red Portal within range, diverting the shadow road so it leads to a location of your choosing. This destination must be in the present dia. You can specify the alvo destination in general terms such as the City of the fogo Snakes, Mammon's home, the Halls of Avarice, or in the Eleven Hells, and anyone stepping through the portal while the spell is in effect will appear in or near that destination. If you reset the destination to the City of the fogo Snakes, for example, the portal might now lead to the first inner courtyard inside the city, or to the marketplace just outside at the GM's discretion. Once the spell's duration expires, the Red Portal resets to its original destination (50% chance) or to a new random destination (roll on the Destinations table).
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 6th level or higher, you can specify a destination up to 100 years in the past for each slot level beyond 5th.

name: Resilient Sphere
desc: A esfera of cintilante force encloses uma criatura or objeto of Large size or smaller dentro do alcance. An unwilling criatura deve fazer um teste de resistência de Destreza. em uma falha no teste, a criatura is enclosed for a duração. Nothing-not physical objeto, energy, or other magia effects-can pass through the barrier, in or out, though uma criatura in the esfera can breathe there. The esfera is imune a all dano, and uma criatura or objeto inside can't be damaged by attacks or effects originating from outside, nor can uma criatura inside the esfera dano anything outside it. The esfera is weightless and just large enough to contain a criatura or objeto inside. An enclosed criatura can use its ação to empurrá against the esfera's walls and thus roll the esfera at up to half a criatura's velocidade. Similarly, the globe can be picked up and moved by outras criaturas. A desintegrar magia targeting the globe destroys it without harming anything inside it.
material: A hemispherical piece of clear cristal and a matching hemispherical piece of gum arabic.

name: Resilient Sphere
desc:
A transparent sphere of força encloses the alvo.

The sphere is weightless and just large enough for the alvo to fit inside. The sphere can be destroyed without harming anyone inside by being dealt at least 15 dano de força at once or by being targeted with a dispel magic spell cast using a 4th-level or higher espaço de magia. The sphere is immune to all other damage, and no spell effects, physical objects, or anything else can pass through, though a alvo can breathe while inside it. The alvo cannot be damaged by any attacks or effects originating from outside the sphere, and the alvo cannot damage anything outside of it.

The alvo can use an action to roll the sphere at half its Deslocamento. Similarly, the sphere can be picked up and moved by other criaturas.

name: Resistance
desc: Você toca one criatura voluntária. Once before a magia termina, o alvo can roll a d4 and add the number rolled to one teste de resistência of its choice. It can roll the morre before or after making the teste de resistência. The magia then ends.
material: A miniature capa.

name: Resistance
desc: The alvo gains an expertise die to one teste de resistência of its choice, ending the spell. The expertise die can be rolled before or after the teste de resistência is made.

name: Resurrection
desc: Você toca a morto criatura that has been morto for no more than a century, that didn't morre of old age, and that isn't morto-vivo. If its alma is free and willing, o alvo returns to life with all its pontos de vida. This magia neutralizes any poisons and cures normal diseases afflicting a criatura when it died. It doesn't, No entanto, remove mágico diseases, curses, and the like; if such effects aren't removed prior to casting the magia, they afflict o alvo on its return to life. This magia closes all mortal wounds and restores any missing corpo parts. Coming back from the morto is an ordeal. o alvo takes a -4 penalty to all rolagem de ataques, teste de resistências, verificação de ands. Every time o alvo finishes a descanso longo, the penalty is reduced by 1 until it disappears. conjurando esta magia to restore life to uma criatura that has been morto for one year or longer taxes you greatly. Until you finish a descanso longo, você pode't cast magias again, and você tem desvantagem on all rolagem de ataques, ability checks, and teste de resistências.
material: A diamond worth at least 1,000gp, which the magia consumes.

name: Resurrection
desc:
Provided the alvo's soul is willing and able to return to its body, so long as it is not undead it returns to life with all of its pontos de vida.

The spell cures any poisons and não mágico diseases that affected the alvo at the time of death.

It does not remove any mágico diseases, curses, or other mágico effects; these must be removed prior to the spell being cast, otherwise they immediately take effect when the alvo returns to life. The spell closes all mortal wounds and restores any missing body parts.

Being raised from the dead recebe a toll on the body, mind, and spirit. The alvo recebe a -4 penalty to attack rolls, saving throws, and ability checks.

At the conclusion of each descanso longo, the penalty is reduced by 1 until the alvo completely recovers.

Resurrecting a criatura that has been dead for one year or longer is exhausting. Until you finish a descanso longo, you can't cast spells again and you have desvantagem on attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws.

name: Retribution
desc: You wrap yourself in shimmering ethereal armor. The next time a criatura hits you with a ataque corpo a corpo, it recebe dano de força equal to half o dano it dealt to you, and it deve fazer a teste de resistência de Força. em uma falha no teste, the criatura is pushed up to 5 pés away from you. Then the spell ends.

name: Revenge's Eye
desc: You touch a criatura's visual organs and grant them the ability to see the trail left by criaturas damaged by a weapon you cast invisível criaturas; it only reveals trails left by those affected by order of revenge also cast by the spellcaster.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, you can alvo +1 criatura for each slot level above second.

name: Reverberate
desc: You touch the ground at your pés with the metal ring, creating an impact that shakes the earth ahead of you. criaturas and unattended objects touching the ground in a 15-pé cone emanating from you take 4d6 dano de trovão, and criaturas fall prostrado; a criatura that makes a successful teste de resistência de Destreza recebe half o dano and does not fall prostrado.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, o dano increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 2nd.
material: a metal ring

name: Reverse Gravity
desc: This magia reverses gravity in a 15 metros, 30 metros high cilindro centered on a point dentro do alcance. All criatura and objeto that aren't somehow anchored to the ground in the área fall upward and reach the top of the área quando você conjura esta magia. uma criatura can faz um teste de resistência de Destreza to grab onto a fixed objeto it can reach, thus avoiding the fall. If some solid objeto (such as a ceiling) is encountered in this fall, falling objeto and criatura strike it just as they would during a normal downward fall. If an objeto or criatura reaches the top of the área without striking anything, it remains there, oscillating slightly, for a duração. At the end of a duração, affected objeto and criatura fall back down.
material: A lodestone and iron filings.

name: Reverse Gravity
desc:
Gravity reverses in the area. Any criaturas or objects not anchored to the ground fall upward until they alcance the top of the area. A criatura may make a teste de resistência de Destreza to prevent the fall by grabbing hold of something. If a solid object (such as a ceiling) is encountered, the affected criaturas and objects impact against it with the same força as a downward fall. When an object or criatura reaches the top of the area, it remains suspended there until the spell ends.

When the spell ends, all affected objects and criaturas fall back down.

name: Revive Beast
desc: You touch a beast that has died within the last minuto. That beast returns to life with 1 ponto de vida. This spell can’t return to life a beast that has died of old age, nor can it restore any missing body parts.
material: emeralds worth 100 gp, which the spell consumes

name: Revivify
desc: Você toca uma criatura that has died within the last minute. That criatura returns to life with 1 ponto de vida. This magia can't return to life uma criatura that has died of old age, nor can it restore any missing corpo parts.
material: Diamonds worth 300gp, which the magia consumes.

name: Revivify
desc: The alvo returns to life with 1 ponto de vida. The spell does not restore any missing body parts and cannot return to life a criatura that died of old age.

name: Right the Stars
desc: You subtly warp the flow of space and time to enhance your conjurations with cosmic potency. Until the spell ends, the maximum duration of any conjuration spell you cast that requires Concentração is doubled, any criatura that you summon or create with a conjuration spell has 30 temporary pontos de vida, and you have vantagem on Carisma checks and Carisma saving throws.
material: seven black candles and a circle of powdered charred bone or basalt
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Ring Strike
desc: You infuse two metal rings with magic, causing them to revolve in a slow orbit around your head or hand. For the duration, when you hit a alvo within 60 pés of you with an attack, you can launch one of the rings to strike the alvo as well. The alvo recebe 1d10 dano contundente and deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Força ou ficar pushed 5 pés directly away from you. The ring is destroyed when it strikes.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 2nd level or higher, you can affect up to two additional rings for each espaço de magia level above 1st.
material: two metal rings

name: Ring Ward
desc: The iron ring you use to cast the spell becomes a faintly shimmering circlet of energy that spins slowly around you at a radius of 15 pés. For the duration, you and your aliados inside the protected area have vantagem on saving throws against spells, and all affected criaturas gain resistance to one type of damage of your choice.
material: an iron ring worth 200 gp, which the spell consumes

name: Riptide
desc:
With a sweeping gesture, you cause water to swell up into a 20-pé tall, 20-pé radius cylinder centered on a point on the ground that you can see. cada criatura in the cylinder deve fazer a teste de resistência de Força. em uma falha no teste, the criatura is imobilizado and suspended in the cylinder; em um sucesso no teste, the criatura moves to just outside the nearest edge of the cylinder.

no início de your next turn, you can direct the current of the swell as it dissipates. Choose one of the following options.

* ***Riptide.*** The water in the cylinder flows in a direction you choose, sweeping along cada criatura in the cylinder. An affected criatura recebe 3d8 dano contundente and is pushed 40 pés in the chosen direction, landing prostrado.
* ***Undertow.*** The water rushes downward, pulling cada criatura in the cylinder into an unoccupied space at the center. cada criatura is knocked prostrado and deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Constituição ou ficar atordoado until the start of your next turn.

name: Rise of the Green
desc: The spell gives life to existing plants in range. If there are no plants in range, the spell creates undergrowth and trees that persist for the duration. One of the trees becomes a treant friendly to you and your companions. Roll initiative for the treant, which has its own turn. It obeys any verbal commands that you issue to it. If you don't issue it any commands, it defends itself from hostile criaturas but otherwise recebe no actions. The animated undergrowth creates difficult terrain for your inimigos. Additionally, at the beginning of each of your turns, todas as criaturas that are on the ground in range deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Força or become imobilizado until the spell ends. A imobilizado criatura can use an action to make a Força (Atletismo) check against your CD de resistência à magia, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso. If a criatura is imobilizado by plants at the beginning of your turn, it recebe 1d6 dano contundente. Finally, the trees swing at each inimigo in range, requiring cada criatura to make a teste de resistência de Destreza. A criatura recebe 6d6 dano contundente em uma falha no teste or half as much damage on a successful one. You can use a ação bônus to recenter the spell on yourself. This does not grow additional trees in areas that previously had none.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a 9th-level slot, an additional tree becomes a treant, the undergrowth causa an additional 1d6 dano contundente, and the trees inflict an additional 2d6 dano contundente.

name: Risen Road
desc: When you cast this spell, you open a glowing portal into the plane of shadow. The portal remains open for 1 minuto, until 10 criaturas step through it, or until you collapse it (no action required). Stepping through the portal places you on a shadow road leading to a destination within 50 milhas, or in a direction specified by you. The road is in ideal condition. You and your companions can travel it safely at a normal pace, but you can't rest on the road; if you stop for more than 10 minutos, the spell expires and dumps you back into the real world at a random spot within 10 milhas of your starting point. The spell expires 2d6 horas after being cast. When that happens, travelers on the road are safely deposited near their specified destination or 50 milhas from their starting point in the direction that was specified when the spell was cast. Travelers never incur exaustão no matter how many horas they spent andando or riding on the shadow road. The temporary shadow road ceases to exist; anything left behind is lost in the shadow realm. Each casting of risen road creates a new shadow road. A small chance exists that a temporary shadow road might intersect with an existing shadow road, opening the possibility for meeting other travelers or monsters, or for choosing a different destination mid-journey. The likelihood is entirely up to the GM.

name: Rive
desc: You pull on the filaments of transition and possibility to tear at your inimigos. Choose a criatura you can see within range and make a ranged ataque mágico. On a hit, the alvo recebe 5d8 dano de frio as strands of icy nothingness whip from your outstretched hand to envelop it. If the alvo isn't native to the plane you're on, it recebe an extra 3d6 dano psíquico and deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Constituição ou ficar atordoado até o final de seu próximo turno.

name: Robe of Shards
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You create a robe of metal shards, gears, and cogs that provides a base AC of 14 + your Destreza modifier. As a ação bônus while protected by a robe of shards, you can command bits of metal from a fallen foe to be absorbed by your robe; each infusion of metal increases your AC by 1, to a maximum of 18 + Destreza modifier. You can also use a ação bônus to dispel the robe, causing it to explode into a shower of voando metal that does 8d6 dano cortante, +1d6 per point of basic (non-Destreza) AC above 14, to todas as criaturas within 30 pés of you.

name: Rockfall Ward
desc: You temporarily halt the fall of up to a 10-pé cube of não mágico objects or debris, saving those who might have been crushed. The falling material's rate of descent slows to 60 pés per rodada and comes to a stop 5 pés above the ground, where it hovers until the spell ends. This spell can't prevent missile weapons from striking a alvo, and it can't slow the descent of an object larger than a 10-pé cube. However, at the GM's discretion, it can slow the descent of a section of a larger object, such as the wall of a falling building or a section of sail and rigging tied to a falling mast.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 2nd level or higher, the cube of debris and objects you can halt increases by 5 pés for each slot level above 1st.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when nonmagical debris fall within 120 feet of you

name: Rolling Thunder
desc:
A tremendous bell note explodes from your outstretched hand and rolls forward in a line 30 pés long and 5 pés wide. cada criatura in the line deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Constituição ou ficar surdo for 1 minuto. A criatura made of material such as stone, crystal, or metal has desvantagem on its teste de resistência against this spell.

While a criatura is surdo in this way, it is wreathed in thundering energy; it recebe 2d8 dano de trovão no início de its turn, and its Deslocamento is halved. A surdo criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, o dano increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 2nd.
material: a sliver of metal from a gong

name: Rope Trick
desc: Você toca a length of rope that is up to 18 metros long. One end of the rope then rises into the air until the whole rope hangs perpendicular to the ground. At the upper end of the rope, an invisível entrance opens to an extradimensional space that lasts until a magia termina. The extradimensional space can be reached by climbing to the top of the rope. The space can hold as many as eight Medium or smaller criatura. The rope can be pulled into the space, making the rope disappear from view outside the space. Attacks and magias can't cross through the entrance into or out of the extradimensional space, but those inside pode ver out of it as if through a 1.5 metros-by-1.5 metros window centered on the rope. Anything inside the extradimensional space drops out when a magia termina.
material: Powdered corn extract and a twisted loop of parchment.

name: Rope Trick
desc:
One end of the alvo rope rises into the air until it hangs perpendicular to the ground. At the upper end, a nearly imperceptible entrance opens to an extradimensional space that can fit up to 8 Medium or smaller criaturas. The entrance can be reached by escalando the rope. Once inside, the rope can be pulled into the extradimensional space.

No spells or attacks can cross into or out of the extradimensional space. criaturas inside the extradimensional space can see out of a 3-pé-by- 5-pé window centered on its entrance. criaturas outside the space can spot the entrance with a Percepção check against your CD de resistência à magia. If they can alcance it, criaturas can pass in and out of the space.

When the spell ends, anything inside the extradimensional space falls to the ground.

name: Rotting Corpse
desc:
Your familiarity with the foul effects of death allows you to prevent a dead body from being returned to life using anything but the most powerful forms of magic.

You cast this spell by touching a criatura that died within the last 24 horas. The body immediately decomposes to a state that prevents the body from being returned to life by the [raise dead](https://api.open5e.com/spells/raise-dead) spell (though a [resurrection](https://api.open5e.com/spells/resurrection) spell still works). no final de this spell’s duration, the body decomposes to a rancid slime, and it can’t be returned to life except through a [true resurrection](https://api.open5e.com/spells/true-resurrection) spell.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, you can affect one additional corpse for each slot level above 2nd.
material: a rotting piece of flesh from an undead criatura

name: Rune of Imprisonment
desc:
You trace a glowing black rune in the air which streaks toward and envelops its alvo. Make a ranged ataque mágico against the alvo. On a successful hit, the rune absorbs the alvo criatura, leaving only the glowing rune hanging in the space the alvo occupied. The subject can take no actions while imprisoned, nor can the subject be targeted or affected by any means. Any spell durations or conditions affecting the criatura are postponed until the criatura is freed. A dying criatura does not lose pontos de vida or stabilize until freed.

A criatura adjacent to the rune can use a move action to attempt to disrupt its energies; doing so allows the imprisoned criatura to make a teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em um sucesso, this disruption negates the imprisonment and ends the effect. Disruption can be attempted only once per rodada.
material: ink

name: Sacred Flame
desc: Flame-like radiance descends on uma criatura that você pode ver dentro do alcance. o alvo deve ser bem-sucedido em um teste de resistência de Destreza or take 1d8 dano radiante. o alvo gains no benefit from cover for this teste de resistência.
higher_level: o dano da magia increases by 1d8 when you reach 5th level (2d8), 11th level (3d8), and 17th level (4d8).

name: Sacred Flame
desc: As long as you can see the alvo (even if it has cover) radiante holy flame envelops it, dealing 1d8 dano radiante.
higher_level: This spell's damage increases by 1d8 when you alcance 5th level (2d8), 11th level (3d8), and 17th level (4d8).

name: Sacrifice Pawn
desc: Sometimes one must fall so others might rise. When a friendly criatura you can see within range drops to 0 pontos de vida, you can harness its escaping life energy to heal yourself. You regain pontos de vida equal to the fallen criatura's level (or CR for a criatura without a level) + your spellcasting ability modifier.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when a friendly creature within 60 feet drops to 0 hit points

name: Sacrificial Healing
desc: You heal another criatura's wounds by taking them upon yourself or transferring them to another willing criatura in range. Roll 4d8. The number rolled is the amount of damage healed by the alvo and o dano you take, as its wounds close and similar damage appears on your body (or the body of the other willing alvo of the spell).

name: Safe Transposition
desc: You cast this spell when an aliado below half its ponto de vida maximum within range is attacked. You swap places with your aliado, each of you instantly teleporting into the space the other just occupied. If there isn't room for you in the new space or for your aliado in your former space, this spell fails. After the two of you teleport, the triggering jogada de ataque is compared to your AC to determine if it hits you.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when an injured ally is attacked

name: Salt Lash
desc:
You create a long, thin blade of razor-sharp salt crystals. You can wield it as a longsword, using your spellcasting ability to modify your weapon attack rolls. The sword causa 2d8 dano cortante on a hit, and any criatura struck by the blade deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Constituição ou ficar atordoado by searing pain until the start of your next turn. Constructs and undead are immune to the blade’s secondary (stun) effect; plants and criaturas composed mostly of water, such as water elementals, also take an additional 2d8 dano necrótico if they fail the teste de resistência.

The spell lasts until you stop concentrating on it, the duration expires, or you let go of the blade for any reason.
material: a pinch of salt worth 1 sp, which is consumed during the casting

name: Sanctuary
desc: You ward uma criatura dentro do alcance against attack. Until a magia termina, any criatura who alvo the warded criatura with an attack or a harmful magia must first faz um teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em uma falha no teste, a criatura must Escolha a new alvo or lose the attack or magia. This magia doesn't protect the warded criatura from área effects, such as the explosão of a fireball. If the warded criatura makes an attack or casts a magia that affects an inimigo criatura, this magia ends.
material: A small silver mirror.

name: Sanctuary
desc:
You ward a criatura against intentional harm.

Any criatura that makes an attack against or casts a harmful spell against the alvo must first make a teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em uma falha no teste, the attacking criatura must choose a different criatura to attack or it loses the attack or spell. This spell doesn't protect the alvo from area effects, such as an explosion.

This spell ends early when the alvo attacks or casts a spell that affects an inimigo criatura.

name: Sand Ship
desc: Casting **sand ship** on a water vessel up to the size of a small sailing ship transforms it into a vessel capable of sailing on sand as easily as water. The vessel still needs a trained crew and relies on wind or oars for propulsion, but it moves at its normal Deslocamento across sand instead of water for the duration of the spell. It can sail only over sand, not soil or solid rock. For the duration of the spell, the vessel doesn’t float; it must be beached or resting on the bottom of a body of water (partially drawn up onto a beach, for example) when the spell is cast, or it sinks into the water.
material: a boat or ship of 10,000 gp value or less

name: Sanguine Horror
desc:
When you cast this spell, you prick yourself with the componente material, taking 1 dano perfurante. The spell fails if this damage is prevented or negated in any way. From the drop of blood, you conjure a [blood elemental](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/blood-elemental). The blood elemental is friendly to you and your companions for the duration. It disappears when it’s reduced to 0 pontos de vida or when the spell ends.

Roll initiative for the elemental, which has its own turns. It obeys verbal commands from you (no action required by you). If you don’t issue any commands to the blood elemental, it defends itself but otherwise recebe no actions.
