If your Concentração is broken, the blood elemental doesn’t disappear, but you lose control of it and it becomes hostile to you and your companions. An uncontrolled blood elemental cannot be dismissed by you, and it disappears 1 hora after you summoned it.
material: a miniature dagger

name: Sanguine Spear
desc: You draw blood from the corpse of a criatura that has been dead for no more than 24 horas and magically fashion it into a spear of frozen blood. This functions as a +1 spear that does dano de frio instead of dano perfurante. If the spear leaves your hand for more than 1 rodada, it melts and the spell ends.
higher_level: If the spell is cast with a 4th-level espaço de magia, it creates a +2 spear. A 6th-level espaço de magia creates a +3 spear.

name: Scale Rot
desc:
You summon death and decay to plague your inimigos. For dragons, this act often recebe the form of attacking a foe’s armor and scales, as a way of weakening an inimigo dragon and leaving it plagued by self-doubt and fear. (This enchantment is useful against any armored criatura, not just dragons.)

uma criatura of your choice within range that has natural armor deve fazer a teste de resistência de Constituição. If it fails, attacks against that criatura’s Classe de Armadura are made with vantagem, and the criatura can’t regain pontos de vida through any means while the spell remains in effect. An affected criatura can end the spell by making a successful teste de resistência de Constituição, which also makes the criatura immune to further castings of **scale rot** for 24 horas.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 5th level or higher, the number of affected alvos increases by one for each slot level above 4th.
material: a piece of rotten meat
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Scattered Images
desc: When you cast this spell, you create illusory doubles that move when you move but in different directions, distracting and misdirecting your opponents. When scattered images is cast, 1d4 + 2 images are created. Images behave exactly as those created with mirror image, with the exceptions described here. These images remain in your space, acting as invisível or the attacker is blind, the spell has no effect.

name: Scentless
desc: You touch a willing criatura or object that is not being worn or carried. For the duration, the alvo gives off no odor. A criatura that relies on smell has desvantagem on Sabedoria (Percepção) checks to detect the alvo and Sabedoria (Sobrevivência) checks to track the alvo. The alvo is invisível to a criatura that relies solely on smell to sense its surroundings. This spell has no effect on alvos with unusually strong scents, such as ghasts.
material: 1 ounce of pure water

name: Scorching Ray
desc: você cria three rays of fire and hurl them at alvo dentro do alcance. você pode hurl them at um alvo or several. faça um ataque de magia à distância for each ray. em um acerto, o alvo takes 2d6 dano de fogo.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 3° nível ou superior, você cria one additional ray for each nível do espaço above 2nd.

name: Scorching Ray
desc:
Three rays of blazing orange fogo shoot from your fingertips. Make a ranged ataque mágico for each ray.

On a hit, the alvo recebe 2d6 dano de fogo.
higher_level: Create an additional ray for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Screaming Ray
desc: You create a ray of psíquico energy to attack your inimigos. Make a ranged ataque mágico against a criatura. On a hit, the alvo recebe 1d4 dano psíquico and is surdo until the end of your next turn. If the alvo succeeds on a teste de resistência de Constituição, it is not surdo.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 2nd level or higher, you create one additional ray for each slot level above 1st. You can direct the rays at um alvo or several.

name: Scribe
desc: This spell enables you to create a copy of a one-page written work by placing a blank piece of paper or parchment near the work that you are copying. All the writing, illustrations, and other elements in the original are reproduced in the new document, in your handwriting or drawing style. The new medium must be large enough to accommodate the original source. Any mágico properties of the original aren’t reproduced, so you can’t use scribe to make copies of spell scrolls or magic books.

name: Scry Ambush
desc:
You foresee your foe’s strike a split second before it occurs. When you cast this spell successfully, you also designate a number of your aliados that can see or hear you equal to your spellcasting ability modifier + your proficiência bonus. Those aliados are also not surprised by the attack and can act normally in the first rodada of combat.

If you would be surprised, you deve fazer a check using your spellcasting ability at the moment your reação would be triggered. The check CD is equal to the current initiative count. On a failed check, you are surprised and can’t use your reação to cast this spell until after your next turn. On a successful check, you can use your reação to cast this spell immediately.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when an enemy tries to make a surprise attack against you
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Scrying
desc:
você pode ver and hear a particular criatura você escolhe that is on the same plano of existence as you. o alvo deve fazer um teste de resistência de Sabedoria, which is modified by how well Você sabe o alvo and the sort of physical connection você tem to it. If um alvo knows you're conjurando esta magia, it can falha no teste de resistência voluntarily if it wants to be observed.

**Knowledge & Save Modifier** Secondhand (você tem heard of o alvo) +5 Firsthand (você tem met o alvo) +0 Familiar (Você sabe o alvo well) -5 **Connection & Save Modifier** Likeness or picture -2 Possession or garment -4 corpo part, lock of hair, bit of nail, or the like -10 
em um sucesso no teste, o alvo isn't affected, and você pode't use this magia against it again por 24 horas. em uma falha no teste, the magia creates an invisível sensor a até 3 metros de o alvo. você pode ver and hear through the sensor as if you were there. The sensor moves with o alvo, remaining a até 3 metros de it for a duração. uma criatura that pode ver invisível objeto sees the sensor as a luminous orb about the size of your fist. Em vez disso of targeting uma criatura, você pode Escolha a location você tem seen before as o alvo of this magia. When you do, the sensor appears at that location and doesn't move.
material: A foco worth at least 1,000 gp, such as a cristal ball, a silver mirror, or a font filled with holy water.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Warlock, Wizard

name: Scrying
desc:
You can see and hear a specific criatura that you choose. The difficulty of the teste de resistência for this spell is modified by your knowledge of the alvo and whether you possess a physical item with a connection to the alvo.

em uma falha no teste, you can see and hear the alvo through an invisível sensor that appears within 10 pés of it and moves with the alvo. Any criatura who can see invisibility or rolls a critical success on its teste de resistência perceives the sensor as a fist-sized glowing orb hovering in the air. criaturas cannot see or hear you through the sensor.

If you choose to alvo a location, the sensor appears at that location and is immobile.

name: Sculpt Snow
desc:
When you **cast sculpt** snow in an area filled with snow, you can create one Large object, two Medium objects, or four smaller objects from snow. With a casting time of 1 action, your sculptings bear only a crude resemblance to generic criaturas or objects. If you increase the casting time to 1 minuto, your creations take on a more realistic appearance and can even vaguely resemble specific criaturas; the resemblance isn’t strong enough to fool anyone, but the criatura can be recognized. The sculptures are as durable as a typical snowman.

Sculptures created by this spell can be animated with [animate objects](https://api.open5e.com/spells/animate-objects) or comparable magic. Animated sculptures gain the AC, pontos de vida, and other attributes provided by that spell. When they attack, they deal normal damage plus a similar amount of dano de frio; an animated Medium sculpture, for example, causa 2d6 + 1 dano contundente plus 2d6 + 1 dano de frio.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, you can sculpt one additional Large object for each slot level above 2nd. Two Large objects can be replaced with one Huge object.

name: Seal Red Portal
desc: You seal a Red Portal or other dimensional gate within range, rendering it inoperable until this spell is dispelled. While the portal remains sealed in this way, it cannot be found with the locate Red Portal spell.

name: Seal of Sanctuary
desc:
You inscribe an angelic seal on the ground, the floor, or other solid surface of a structure. The seal creates a spherical sanctuary with a radius of 50 pés, centered on the seal. For the duration, aberrations, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead that approach to within 5 pés of the boundary know they are about to come into contact with a deadly barrier. If such a criatura moves so as to touch the boundary, or tries to cross the boundary by any means, including teleportation and extradimensional travel, it deve fazer a teste de resistência de Carisma. em uma falha no teste, it recebe 10d8 dano radiante, is repelled to 5 pés outside the boundary, and can’t alvo anything inside the boundary with attacks, spells, or abilities until the spell ends. em um sucesso no teste, the criatura recebe half as much dano radiante and can cross the boundary. If the criatura is a fiend that isn’t on its home plane, it is immediately destroyed (no teste de resistência) instead of taking damage.

Aberrations, elementals, fey, and undead that are within 50 pés of the seal (inside the boundary) have desvantagem on ability checks, attack rolls, and saving throws, and each such criatura recebe 2d8 dano radiante no início de its turn.

criaturas other than aberrations, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead can’t be enfeitiçado or amedrontado while within 50 pés of the seal.

The seal has AC 18, 50 pontos de vida, resistance to contundente, perfurante, and dano cortante, and immunity to psíquico and dano de veneno. Ranged attacks against the seal are made with desvantagem. If it is scribed on the surface of an object that is later destroyed (such as a wooden door), the seal is not damaged and remains in place, perhaps suspended in midair. The spell ends only if the seal is reduced to 0 pontos de vida.
material: incense and especial inks worth 250 gp, which the spell consumes

name: Searing Equation
desc:
You briefly go into a mágico trance and whisper an alien equation which you never fully remember once the spell is complete. cada criatura in the area recebe 3d4 dano psíquico and is surdo for 1 rodada.

criaturas who are unable to hear the equation, immune to dano psíquico, or who have an Inteligência score lower than 4 are immune to this spell.
higher_level: criaturas are surdo for 1 additional rodada for each slot level above 1st.

name: Searing Sun
desc: This spell intensifies the leve and heat of the sun, so that it burns exposed flesh. You must be able to see the sun when you cast the spell. The searing sunlight affects a cylindrical area 50 pés in radius and 200 pés high, centered on the a point within range. cada criatura that starts its turn in that area recebe 5d8 dano de fogo, or half o dano with a successful teste de resistência de Constituição. A criatura that’s shaded by a solid object —such as an awning, a building, or an overhanging boulder— has vantagem on the teste de resistência. On your turn, you can use an action to move the center of the cylinder up to 20 pés along the ground in any direction.
material: a magnifying lens

name: Secret Blind
desc:
A 5-pé-radius immobile sphere springs into existence around you and remains stationary for the duration. You and up to four Medium or smaller criaturas can occupy the sphere. If its area includes a larger criatura or more than five criaturas, each larger criatura and excess criatura is pushed to an unoccupied space outside of the sphere.
  criaturas and objects within the sphere when you cast this spell may move through it freely. All other criaturas and objects are barred from passing through the sphere after it forms. Spells and other mágico effects can't extend through the sphere, with the exception of transmutation or conjuration spells and mágico effects that allow you or the criaturas inside the sphere to willingly leave it, such as the *dimension door* and *teleport* spells. The atmosphere inside the sphere is cool, dry, and filled with air, regardless of the conditions outside.
  Until the effect ends, you can command the interior to be dimly lit or dark. The sphere is opaque from the outside and covered in an illusion that makes it appear as the surrounding terrain, but it is transparent from the inside. Physical interaction with the illusion reveals it to be an illusion as the criatura touches the cool, firm surface of the sphere. A criatura that uses an action to examine the sphere can determine it is covered by an illusion with a successful Inteligência (Investigação) check against your CD de resistência à magia.
  The effect ends if you leave its area, or if the sphere is hit with the *disintegration* spell or a successful *dispel magic* spell.

name: Secret Chest
desc: You hide a chest, and all its contents, on the Ethereal plano. você deve Toque the chest and the miniature replica that serves as a material componente for the magia. The chest can contain up to 12 cubic feet of nonliving material (1.5 metros by 0 metros by 0 metros). While the chest remains on the Ethereal plano, você pode use an ação and Toque the replica to recall the chest. It appears in an espaço desocupado on the ground within 1.5 metros of you. você pode send the chest back to the Ethereal plano by using an ação and touching both the chest and the replica. After 60 days, there is a cumulative 5 percent chance per day that the magia's effect ends. This effect ends if Você conjura esta magia again, if the smaller replica chest is destroyed, or if você escolhe to end the magia as an ação. If a magia termina and the larger chest is on the Ethereal plano, it is irretrievably lost.
material: An exquisite chest, 1.5 metros by 0 metros by 0 metros, constructed from rare materials worth at least 5,000 gp, and a Tiny replica made from the same materials worth at least 50 gp.

name: Secret Chest
desc:
You stash a chest and its contents on the Ethereal Plane. To do so, you must touch the chest and its Tiny replica. The chest can hold up to 12 cubic pés of nonliving matter. Food stored in the chest spoils after 1 dia.

While the chest is in the Ethereal Plane, you can recall it to you at any point by using an action to touch the Tiny replica. The chest reappears in an unoccupied space on the ground within 5 pés of you. You can use an action at any time to return the chest to the Ethereal Plane so long as you are touching both the chest and its Tiny replica.

This effect ends if you cast the spell again on a different chest, if the replica is destroyed, or if you use an action to end the spell. After 60 dias without being recalled, there is a cumulative 5% chance per dia that the spell effect will end. If for whatever reason the spell ends while the chest is still in the Ethereal Plane, the chest and all of its contents are lost.

name: See Beyond
desc:
This spell enables a willing criatura you touch to see through any obstructions as if they were transparent. For the duration, the alvo can see into and through opaque objects, criaturas, spells, and effects that obstruct line of sight to a range of 30 pés. Inside that distance, the criatura can choose what it perceives as opaque and what it perceives as transparent as freely and as naturally as it can shift its focus from nearby to distant objects.

Although the criatura can see any alvo within 30 pés of itself, all other requirements must still be satisfied before casting a spell or making an attack against that alvo. For example, the criatura can see an inimigo that has total cover but can’t shoot that inimigo with an arrow because the cover physically prevents it. That inimigo could be targeted by a [geas](https://api.open5e.com/spells/geas) spell, however, because [geas](https://api.open5e.com/spells/geas) needs only a visible alvo.
material: a transparent crystal

name: See Invisibility
desc: For a duração of the magia, você vê invisível criatura and objeto as if they were visible, and você pode ver through Ethereal. The ethereal objeto and criatura appear ghostly translucent.
material: A dash of talc and a small amount of silver powder.

name: See Invisibility
desc: You can see invisível criaturas and objects, and you can see into the Ethereal Plane. Ethereal criaturas and objects appear translucent.

name: Seed Bomb
desc:
Up to four seeds appear in your hand and are infused with magic for the duration. As an action, a criatura can throw one of these seeds at a point up to 60 pés away. cada criatura within 5 pés of that point makes a teste de resistência de Destreza or recebe 4d6 dano perfurante. Depending on the componente material used, a seed bomb also causes one of the following additional effects: Pinecone. Seed shrapnel explodes outward.

A criatura in the area of the exploding seed bomb makes a teste de resistência de Constituição or it is cego até o final de seu próximo turno.

Sunflower. Seeds enlarge into a blanket of pointy needles. The area affected by the exploding seed bomb becomes difficult terrain for the next minuto.

Tumbleweed. The weeds unravel to latch around criaturas. A criatura in the area of the exploding seed bomb makes a teste de resistência de Destreza or it becomes agarrado até o final de seu próximo turno.
higher_level: o dano increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Seed of Destruction
desc:
This spell impregnates a living criatura with a rapidly gestating [hydra](https://api.open5e.com/spells/hydra) that consumes the alvo from within before emerging to wreak havoc on the world. Make a ranged ataque mágico against a living criatura within range that you can see. On a hit, you implant a five‑headed embryonic growth into the criatura. Roll 1d3 + 1 to determine how many rodadas it recebe the embryo to mature.

During the rodadas when the embryo is gestating, the affected criatura recebe 5d4 dano cortante no início de its turn, or half o dano with a successful teste de resistência de Constituição.

When the gestation period has elapsed, a tiny hydra erupts from the alvo’s abdomen no início de your turn. The hydra appears in an unoccupied space adjacent to the alvo and immediately grows into a full-size Huge aberration. Nearby criaturas are pushed away to clear a sufficient space as the hydra grows. This criatura is a standard hydra, but with the ability to cast [bane](https://api.open5e.com/spells/bane) as an action (CD de resistência à magia 11) requiring no spell components. Roll initiative for the hydra, which recebe its own turns. It obeys verbal commands that you issue to it (no action required by you). If you don’t give it a command or it can’t follow your command, the hydra attacks the nearest living criatura.

no final de each of the hydra’s turns, you deve fazer a CD 15 teste de resistência de Carisma. em um sucesso no teste, the hydra remains under your control and friendly to you and your companions. em uma falha no teste, your control ends, the hydra becomes hostile to todas as criaturas, and it attacks the nearest criatura to the best of its ability.

The hydra disappears no final de the spell’s duration, or its existence can be cut short with a [wish](https://api.open5e.com/spells/wish) spell or comparable magic, but nothing less. The embryo can be destroyed before it reaches maturity by using a [dispel magic](https://api.open5e.com/spells/dispel-magic) spell under the normal rules for dispelling high-level magic.
material: five teeth from a still-living humanoid and a vial of the caster’s blood
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Seeming
desc: This magia allows you to change the appearance of any number of criatura that você pode ver dentro do alcance. You give cada alvo você escolhe a new, illusory appearance. An unwilling alvo can faz um teste de resistência de Carisma, and if it succeeds, it is unaffected by this magia. The magia disguises physical appearance também as clothing, armadura, arma, and equipment. você pode make cada criatura seem 0 metros shorter or taller and appear thin, fat, or in between. você pode't change um alvo's corpo type, so você deve Escolha a form that has the same basic arrangement of limbs. Caso contrário, the extent of the ilusão is up to you. The magia lasts for a duração, unless Você usa your ação to dismiss it sooner. The changes wrought by this magia fail to hold up to physical inspection. Por exemplo, if Você usa this magia to add a hat to uma criatura's outfit, objeto pass through the hat, and anyone who touches it would feel nothing or would feel a criatura's head and hair. If Você usa this magia to appear thinner than Você está, the hand of someone who reaches out to Toque you would bump into you while it was seemingly still in midair. uma criatura can use its ação to inspect um alvo and make an Inteligência (Investigation) check against your CD da magia. If it succeeds, it becomes aware that o alvo is disguised.

name: Seeming
desc:
Until the spell ends or you use an action to dispel it, you can change the appearance of the alvos. The spell disguises their clothing, weapons, and items as well as changes to their physical appearance. An unwilling alvo can make a teste de resistência de Carisma to avoid being affected by the spell.

You can alter the appearance of the alvo as you see fit, including but not limited to: its heritage, 1 pé of height, weight, clothing, tattoos, piercings, facial features, hair style and length, skin and eye coloration, sex and any other distinguishing features.

You cannot disguise the alvo as a criatura of a different size category, and its limb structure remains the same; for example if it's bipedal, you can't use this spell to make it appear as a quadruped.

The disguise does not hold up to physical inspection. A criatura that tries to grab an illusory hat, for example, finds its hand passes straight through the figment. To see through your disguise without such an inspection, a criatura must use its action to make an Investigação check against your CD de resistência à magia.

name: Seeping Death
desc:
Your touch inflicts a virulent, flesh-eating disease. Make a melee ataque mágico against a criatura within your alcance. On a hit, the criatura’s Destreza score is reduced by 1d4, and it is afflicted with the seeping death disease for the duration.

Since this spell induces a natural disease in its alvo, any effect that removes a disease or otherwise ameliorates a disease’s effects apply to it and can end the spell early.

***Seeping Death.*** The criatura’s flesh is slowly liquefied by a lingering necrótico pestilence. no final de each descanso longo, the diseased criatura deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Constituição or its Destreza score is reduced by 1d4. The reduction lasts until the alvo finishes a descanso longo after the disease is cured. If the disease reduces the criatura’s Destreza to 0, the criatura dies.

name: Seer’s Reaction
desc: Your foreknowledge allows you to act before others, because you knew what was going to happen. When you cast this spell, make a new initiative roll with a +5 bonus. If the result is higher than your current initiative, your place in the initiative order changes accordingly. If the result is also higher than the current place in the initiative order, you take your next turn immediately and then use the higher number starting in the next rodada.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take at the start of another creature’s turn
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Ranger, Sorcerer, Wizard

name: Selfish Wish
desc: The selfish wish grants the desires of a supplicant in exchange for power. Like a wish for a great increase in Força may come with an equal reduction in Inteligência). In exchange for casting the selfish wish, the caster also receives an influx of power. The caster receives the following bonuses for 2 minutos: Doubled Deslocamento one extra action each rodada (as haste) Classe de Armadura increases by 3

name: Semblance of Dread
desc:
You adopt the visage of the faceless god Nyarlathotep. For the duration, any criatura within 10 pés of you and able to see you can’t willingly move closer to you unless it makes a successful teste de resistência de Sabedoria no início de its turn. Constructs and undead are immune to this effect.

For the duration of the spell, you also gain vulnerability to dano radiante and have vantagem on saving throws against effects that cause the amedrontado condition.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Sending
desc: You send a short message of twenty-five words or less to uma criatura with which Você está familiar. a criatura hears the message in its mind, recognizes you as the sender if it knows you, and can answer in a like manner immediately. The magia enables criatura with valor de Inteligências of at least 1 to understand the meaning of your message. você pode send the message across any distance and even to other plano of existence, but if o alvo is on a different plano than you, there is a 5 percent chance that the message doesn't arrive.
material: A short piece of fine copper wire.

name: Sending
desc: You send a message of 25 words or less to the alvo. It recognizes you as the sender and can reply immediately in kind. The message travels across any distance and into other planes of existence. If the alvo is on a different plane of existence than you, there is a 5% chance it doesn't receive your message. A alvo with an Inteligência score of at least 1 entende your message as you intend it (whether you share a language or not).

name: Sequester
desc: By means of this magia, a criatura voluntária or an objeto can be hidden away, safe from detection for a duração. When you conjurar a magia and Toque o alvo, it becomes invisível and can't be targeted by adivinhação magias or perceived through scrying sensors created by adivinhação magias. If o alvo is uma criatura, it falls into a state of suspended animation. Time ceases to flow for it, and it doesn't grow older. você pode set a condition for the magia to end early. The condition can be anything você escolhe, but it must occur or be visible within 2 km of o alvo. Examples include "after 1,000 years" or "when the tarrasque awakens." This magia also ends if o alvo takes any dano.
material: A powder composed of diamond, emerald, ruby, and sapphire dust worth at least 5,000 gp, which the magia consumes.

name: Sequester
desc:
You magically hide away a willing criatura or object. The alvo becomes invisível, and it cannot be traced or detected by divination or scrying sensors. If the alvo is a living criatura, it falls into a state of suspended animation and stops aging.

The spell ends when the alvo recebe damage or a condition you set occurs. The condition can be anything you choose, like a set amount of time or a specific event, but it must occur within ou ficar visible within 1 milha of the alvo.

name: Shade
desc: You create a mágico screen across your eyes. While the screen remains, you are immune to blindness caused by visible effects, such as [color spray](https://api.open5e.com/spells/color-spray). The spell doesn’t alleviate blindness that’s already been inflicted on you. If you normally suffer penalties on attacks or ability checks while in sunlight, those penalties don’t apply while you’re under the effect of this spell.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, the duration of the spell increases by 10 minutos for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Shadow Adaptation
desc: Your flesh and clothing pale and become faded as your body recebe on a tiny fragment of the Shadow Realm. For the duration of this spell, you are immune to shadow corruption and have resistance to dano necrótico. In addition, you have vantagem on saving throws against effects that reduce your Força score or ponto de vida maximum, such as a shadow's Força Drain or the harm spell.

name: Shadow Armor
desc: You can siphon energy from the plane of shadow to protect yourself from an immediate threat. As a reação, you pull shadows around yourself to distort reality. The attack against you is made with desvantagem, and you have resistance to dano radiante until the start of your next turn.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when you are targeted by an attack but before the roll is made

name: Shadow Bite
desc: You create a momentary needle of frio, sharp pain in a criatura within range. The alvo deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Constituição ou receber 1d6 dano necrótico immediately and have its Deslocamento halved until the start of your next turn.
higher_level: This spell’s damage increases to 2d6 when you alcance 5th level, 3d6 when you alcance 11th level, and 4d6 when you alcance 17th level.

name: Shadow Blindness
desc: You make a melee ataque mágico against a criatura you touch that has visão no escuro as an innate ability; on a hit, the alvo’s visão no escuro is negated until the spell ends. This spell has no effect against visão no escuro that derives from a spell or a magic item. The alvo retains all of its other senses.

name: Shadow Hands
desc: A freezing blast of shadow explodes out from you in a 10-pé cone. Any criatura caught in the shadow recebe 2d4 dano necrótico and is amedrontado; a successful teste de resistência de Sabedoria halves o dano and negates the amedrontado condition.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 2nd level or higher, o dano dealt by the attack increases by 2d4 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Shadow Monsters
desc: You choose up to two criaturas within range. cada criatura deve fazer a teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em uma falha no teste, the criatura perceives its aliados as hostile, shadowy monsters, and it must attack its nearest aliado. An affected criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 5th level or higher, you can alvo one additional criatura for each slot level above 4th.
material: a doll

name: Shadow Puppets
desc: You animate the shadow of a criatura within range, causing it to attack that criatura. As a ação bônus when you cast the spell, or as an action on subsequent rodadas while you maintain Concentração, make a melee ataque mágico against the criatura. If it hits, the alvo recebe 2d8 dano psíquico and deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Inteligência ou ficar incapacitado until the start of your next turn.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, o dano increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 2nd.
material: a pinch of powdered lead

name: Shadow Realm Gateway
desc: By drawing a circle of black chalk up to 15 pés in diameter and chanting for one minuto, you open a portal directly into the Shadow Realm. The portal fills the chalk circle and appears as a vortex of inky blackness; nothing can be seen through it. Any object or criatura that passes through the portal instantly arrives safely in the Shadow Realm. The portal remains open for one minuto or until you lose Concentração on it, and it can be used to travel between the Shadow Realm and the chalk circle, in both directions, as many times as desired during the spell's duration. This spell can only be cast as a ritual.

name: Shadow Spawn
desc: Casting this spell consumes the corpse of a criatura and creates a shadowy duplicate of it. The criatura returns as a shadow beast. The shadow beast has dim memories of its former life and retains free will; casters are advised to be ready to make an attractive offer to the newly-risen shadow beast, to gain its cooperation.

name: Shadow Tree
desc:
This spell temporarily draws a willow tree from the Shadow Realm to the location you designate within range. The tree is 5 pés in diameter and 20 pés tall.
  When you cast the spell, you can specify individuals who can interact with the tree. All other criaturas see the tree as a shadow version of itself and can't grasp or climb it, passing through its shadowy substance. A criatura that can interact with the tree and that has Sunlight Sensitivity or Sunlight Hypersensitivity is protected from sunlight while within 20 pés of the tree. A criatura that can interact with the tree can climb into its branches, giving the criatura half cover.

name: Shadow Trove
desc: You paint a small door approximately 2 pés square on a hard surface to create a portal into the void of space. The portal “peels off” the surface you painted it on and follows you when you move, always floating in the air within 5 pés of you. An icy chill flows out from the portal. You can place up to 750 pounds of nonliving matter in the portal, where it stays suspended in the frigid void until you withdraw it. Items that are still inside the shadow trove when the duration ends spill out onto the ground. You can designate a number of criaturas up to your Inteligência modifier who have access to the shadow trove; only you and those criaturas can move objects into the portal.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, the duration increases by 2 horas for each slot level above 3rd.
material: ink made from the blood of a raven

name: Shadow's Brand
desc:
You draw a rune or inscription no larger than your hand on the alvo. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Constituição ou ficar branded with the mark on a location of your choosing. The brand appears as an unintelligible mark to most criaturas. Those who understand the Umbral language recognize it as a mark indicating the alvo is an inimigo of the shadow fey. Shadow fey who view the brand see it outlined in a faint glow. The brand can be hidden by mundane means, such as clothing, but it can be removed only by the *remove curse* spell.
  While branded, the alvo has desvantagem on ability checks when interacting socially with shadow fey.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Ranger, Sorceror, Warlock, Wizard

name: Shadows Brought to Light
desc:
If a criatura you designate within range fails a teste de resistência de Carisma, you cause the alvo’s shadow to come to life and reveal one of the criatura’s most scandalous secrets: some fact that the alvo would not want widely known (GM’s choice). When casting the spell, you choose whether everyone present will hear the secret, in which case the shadow speaks loudly in a twisted version of the alvo’s voice, or if the secret is whispered only to you. The shadow speaks in the alvo’s native language.

If the alvo does not have a scandalous secret or does not have a spoken language, the spell fails as if the criatura’s teste de resistência had succeeded.

If the secret was spoken aloud, the alvo recebe a −2 penalty to Carisma checks involving anyone who was present when it was revealed. This penalty lasts until you finish a descanso longo.

***ritual Focus.*** If you expend your ritual focus, the alvo has desvantagem on Carisma checks instead of taking the −2 penalty.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Warlock, Wizard

name: Shadowy Retribution
desc:
You fill a small silver cup with your own blood (taking 1d4 dano perfurante) while chanting vile curses in the dark. Once the chant is completed, you consume the blood and swear an oath of vengeance against any who harm you.

If you are reduced to 0 pontos de vida, your oath is invoked; a shadow materializes within 5 pés of you. The shadow attacks the criatura that reduced you to 0 pontos de vida, ignoring all other alvos, until it or the alvo is slain, at which point the shadow dissipates into nothing.
higher_level:
When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 5th level or higher, an additional shadow is conjured for each slot level above 4th.

***ritual Focus.*** If you expend your ritual focus, the spell summons a banshee instead of a shadow. If you also use a higher-level espaço de magia, additional undead are still shadows.
material: a small silver cup filled with the caster’s blood

name: Shapechange
desc: You assume the form of a different criatura for a duração. The new form can be of any criatura with a nível de desafio equal to your level or lower. a criatura can't be a constructo or an morto-vivo, and você deve have seen the sort of criatura at least once. You transform into an average example of that criatura, one without any class levels or the conjuração trait. Your game statistics are replaced by the statistics of the chosen criatura, though you retain your alignment and Inteligência, Sabedoria, and valor de Carismas. You also retain all of your skill and teste de resistência proficiencies, Além disso to gaining those of a criatura. If a criatura has the same proficiência as you and the bonus listed in its statistics is higher than yours, use a criatura's bonus in place of yours. você pode't use any legendary ações or lair ações of the new form. You assume the pontos de vida and Hit Dice of the new form. When you revert to your normal form, you return to the number of pontos de vida you had before you transformed. If you revert Como resultado of dropping to 0 pontos de vida, any excess dano carries over to your normal form. enquanto the excess dano doesn't reduce your normal form to 0 pontos de vida, you aren't derrubar inconsciente. You retain the benefit of any features from your class, race, or other source and can use them, provided that your new form is physically capable of doing so. você pode't use any Especial sentidos você tem (Por exemplo, visão no escuro) unless your new form also has that sense. você pode only speak if a criatura can normally speak. When you transform, você escolhe whether your equipment falls to the ground, merges into the new form, or is worn by it. Worn equipment functions as normal. The DM determines whether it is practical for the new form to wear a piece of equipment, based on a criatura's shape and size. Your equipment doesn't change shape or size to match the new form, and any equipment that the new form can't wear must either fall to the ground or merge into your new form. Equipment that merges has no effect in that state. During this magia's duration, você pode use your ação to assume a different form following the same restrictions and rules for the original form, with one exception: if your new form has more pontos de vida than your current one, your pontos de vida remain at their current value.
material: A jade circlet worth at least 1,500 gp, which você deve place on your head before you conjurar a magia.

name: Shapechange
desc:
You assume the form of a criatura of a Challenge Rating equal to or lower than your level. The criatura cannot be an undead or a construct, and it must be a criatura you have seen. You change into the average version of that criatura, and do not gain any class levels or the Spellcasting trait.

Until the spell ends or you are dropped to 0 pontos de vida, your game statistics (including your pontos de vida) are replaced by the statistics of the chosen criatura, though you keep your Carisma, Inteligência, and Sabedoria scores. You also keep your skill and teste de resistência proficiencies as well as gaining the criatura's. However, if you share a proficiência with the criatura, and the criatura's bonus is higher than yours, you use the criatura's bonus. You keep all of your features, skills, and traits gained from your class, heritage, culture, background, or other sources, and can use them as long as the criatura is physically capable of doing so. You do not keep any especial senses, such as visão no escuro, unless the criatura also has them. You can only speak if the criatura is typically capable of speech. You cannot use legendary actions or lair actions. Your gear melds into the new form. Equipment that merges with your form has no effect until you leave the form.

When you revert to your normal form, you return to the number of pontos de vida you had before you transformed. If the spell's effect on you ends early from dropping to 0 pontos de vida, any excess damage carries over to your normal form and knocks you inconsciente if o dano reduces you to 0 pontos de vida.

Until the spell ends, you can use an action to change into another form of your choice. The new form follows all the rules as the previous form, with one exception: if the new form has more pontos de vida than your previous form, your pontos de vida remain at their previous value.

name: Shared Frenzy
desc: You yell defiantly as part of casting this spell to encourage a battle fury among your aliados. Each friendly criatura in range deve fazer a teste de resistência de Carisma; a criatura can choose to fail this teste de resistência if it wishes. If a criatura fails its teste de resistência, it has resistance to contundente, perfurante, and dano cortante and has vantagem on attack rolls for the duration. However, attack rolls made against an affected criatura have vantagem.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, this spell no longer causes criaturas to have vantagem against the spell's alvos.

name: Shared Sacrifice
desc: You and up to five of your aliados within range contribute part of your life força to create a pool that can be used for healing. Each alvo recebe 5 dano necrótico (which can’t be reduced but can be healed normally), and those donated pontos de vida are channeled into a reservoir of life essence. As an action, any criatura who contributed to the pool of pontos de vida can heal another criatura by touching it and drawing pontos de vida from the pool into the injured criatura. The injured criatura heals a number of pontos de vida equal to your spellcasting ability modifier, and the pontos de vida in the pool decrease by the same amount. This process can be repeated until the pool is exhausted or the spell’s duration expires.

name: Shatter
desc: A sudden loud ringing noise, painfully intense, erupts from a point of your choice dentro do alcance. cada criatura in a 10-­--foot-­--raio esfera centered on that point deve fazer um teste de resistência de Constituição. uma criatura takes 3d8 dano de trovão em uma falha no teste, or half as much dano on a successful one. uma criatura made of inorganic material such as stone,cristal, or metal tem desvantagem em this teste de resistência. A não mágico objeto that isn't being worn or carried also takes the dano if it's in the magia's área.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 3° nível ou superior, the dano increases by 1d8 for each nível do espaço above 2nd.
material: A burst of mica.

name: Shatter
desc:
An ear-splitting ringing sound emanates through the area. criaturas in the area take 3d8 dano de trovão. A criatura made of stone, metal, or other inorganic material has desvantagem on its teste de resistência.

Any não mágico items within the area that are not worn or carried also take damage.
higher_level: o dano increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Shattering Barrage
desc:
You create three orbs of jagged broken glass and hurl them at alvos within range. You can hurl them at um alvo or several.

Make a ranged ataque mágico for each orb. On a hit, the alvo recebe 2d4 dano cortante and the shards of broken glass remain suspended in midair, filling the area they occupy (or 5 pés of the space they occupy if the criatura is Large-sized or larger) with shards of suspended broken glass. Whenever a criatura enters an area of broken glass for the first time or starts its turn there, it deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Destreza ou receber 2d4 dano cortante.

The shards of broken glass dissolve into harmless wisps of sand and blow away after 1 minuto.
higher_level: You create one additional orb for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Sheen of Ice
desc: A small icy globe shoots from your finger to a point within range and then explodes in a spray of ice. cada criatura within 20 pés of that point deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Destreza or become coated in ice for 1 minuto. Ice-coated criaturas move at half Deslocamento. An invisível criatura becomes outlined by the ice so that it loses the benefits of invisibility while the ice remains. The spell ends for a specific criatura if that criatura recebe 5 or more dano de fogo.
material: water within a glass globe

name: Shield
desc: An invisível barrier of mágico force appears and protects you. até o início de seu próximo turno, você tem a +5 bonus to CA, including against the triggering attack, and Você sofre no dano from magia missile.

name: Shield
desc: You create a shimmering arcane barrier between yourself and an oncoming attack. Until the spell ends, you gain a +5 bonus to your AC (including against the triggering attack) and any magic missile targeting you is harmlessly deflected.

name: Shield of Faith
desc: A cintilante field appears and surrounds uma criatura of your choice dentro do alcance, granting it a +2 bonus to CA for a duração.
material: A small parchment with a bit of holy text written on it.

name: Shield of Faith
desc: Until the spell ends, a barrier of divine energy envelops the alvo and increases its AC by +2.
higher_level: The bonus to AC increases by +1 for every three slot levels above 1st.

name: Shield of Star and Shadow
desc: You wrap yourself in a protective shroud of the night sky made from swirling shadows punctuated with twinkling motes of leve. The shroud grants you resistance against either radiante or dano necrótico (choose when the spell is cast). You also shed dim leve in a 10-pé radius. You can end the spell early by using an action to dismiss it.

name: Shifting the Odds
desc: By wrapping yourself in strands of chaotic energy, you gain vantagem on the next jogada de ataque or teste de habilidade that you make. Fate is a cruel mistress, however, and her scales must always be balanced. The second jogada de ataque or teste de habilidade (whichever occurs first) that you make after casting **shifting the odds** is made with desvantagem.

name: Shillelagh
desc: The wood of a clava or a quarterstaff Você está holding is imbued with nature's power. For a duração, você pode use your conjuração ability Em vez disso of Força for the attack and dano rolls of ataque corpo a corpos using that arma, and the arma's dano morre becomes a d8. The arma also becomes mágico, if it isn't already. a magia termina if you cast it again or if you let go of the arma.
material: Mistletoe, a shamrock leaf, and a clava or quarterstaff.

name: Shillelagh
desc: You imbue the alvo with Natureza's mágico energy. Until the spell ends, the alvo becomes a mágico weapon (if it wasn't already), its damage becomes 1d8, and you can use your spellcasting ability instead of Força for ataque corpo a corpo and damage rolls made using it. The spell ends if you cast it again or let go of the alvo.

name: Shiver
desc: You fill a humanoid criatura with such frio that its teeth begin to chatter and its body shakes uncontrollably. Roll 5d8; the total is the maximum pontos de vida of a criatura this spell can affect. The affected criatura deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Constituição, or it cannot cast a spell or load a missile weapon until the end of your next turn. Once a criatura has been affected by this spell, it is immune to further castings of this spell for 24 horas.
higher_level: The maximum pontos de vida you can affect increases by 4d8 when you alcance 5th level (9d8), 11th level (13d8), and 17th level (17d8).
material: humanoid tooth

name: Shocking Grasp
desc: Lightning springs from your hand to deliver a shock to uma criatura you try to Toque. faça um ataque de magia corpo a corpo contra o alvo. você tem vantagem on the rolagem de ataque if o alvo is wearing armadura made of metal. em um acerto, o alvo takes 1d8 dano de relâmpago, and it can't take reações até o início de seu próximo turno.
higher_level: o dano da magia increases by 1d8 when you reach 5th level (2d8), 11th level (3d8), and 17th level (4d8).

name: Shocking Grasp
desc: Electricity arcs from your hand to shock the alvo. Make a melee ataque mágico (with vantagem if the alvo is wearing armor made of metal). On a hit, you deal 1d8 dano de relâmpago, and the alvo can't take reactions until the start of its next turn as the electricity courses through its body.
higher_level: This spell's damage increases by 1d8 when you alcance 5th level (2d8), 11th level (3d8), and 17th level (4d8).

name: Shocking Volley
desc: You draw back and release an imaginary bowstring while aiming at a point you can see within range. Bolts of arrow-shaped relâmpago shoot from the imaginary bow, and cada criatura within 20 pés of that point deve fazer a teste de resistência de Destreza. em uma falha no teste, a criatura recebe 2d8 dano de relâmpago and is incapacitado até o final de seu próximo turno. em um sucesso no teste, a criatura recebe half as much damage.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, o dano increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Shroud of Death
desc: You call up a black veil of necrótico energy that devours the living. You draw on the life energy of all living criaturas within 30 pés of you that you can see. When you cast the spell, every living criatura within 30 pés of you that you can see recebe 1 dano necrótico, and all those pontos de vida transfer to you as temporary pontos de vida. o dano and the temporary pontos de vida increase to 2 per criatura no início de your second turn concentrating on the spell, 3 per criatura no início de your third turn, and so on. All living criaturas you can see within 30 pés of you no início de each of your turns are affected. A criatura can avoid the effect by moving more than 30 pés away from you or by getting out of your line of sight, but it becomes susceptible again if the necessary conditions are met. The temporary pontos de vida last until the spell ends.
material: a piece of ice

name: Sidestep Arrow
desc: With a few perfectly timed steps, you interpose a foe between you and danger. You cast this spell when an inimigo makes a ataque à distância or a ranged ataque mágico against you but before the attack is resolved. At least one other foe must be within 10 pés of you when you cast **sidestep arrow**. As part of casting the spell, you can move up to 15 pés to a place where an inimigo lies between you and the attacker. If no such location is available, the spell has no effect. You must be able to move (not imobilizado or agarrado or prevented from moving for any other reason), and this move does not provoke opportunity attacks. After you move, the ataque à distância is resolved with the intervening foe as the alvo instead of you.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when an enemy targets you with a ranged attack
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Sightburst
desc: A wave of echoing sound emanates from you. Until the start of your next turn, you have visão cega out to a range of 100 pés, and you know the location of any natural hazards within that area. You have vantagem on saving throws made against hazards detected with this spell.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, the duration is Concentração, up to 1 minuto. When you use a espaço de magia of 5th level or higher, the duration is Concentração, up to 10 minutos. When you use a espaço de magia of 7th level or higher, the duration is Concentração, up to 1 hora.

name: Sign of Koth
desc:
You invoke the twilight citadels of Koth to create a field of mágico energy in the shape of a 60-pé-radius, 60-pé‑tall cylinder centered on you. The only visible evidence of this field is a black rune that appears on every doorway, window, or other portal inside the area.

Choose one of the following criatura types: aberration, beast, Celestial, dragon, elemental, fey, fiend, Gigante, humanoid, monstrosity, ooze, plant, or undead. The sign affects criaturas of the chosen type (including you, if applicable) in the following ways:
* The criaturas can’t willingly enter the cylinder’s area by não mágico means; the cylinder acts as an invisível, impenetrable wall of força. If an affected criatura tries to enter the cylinder’s area by using teleportation, a dimensional shortcut, or other mágico means, it deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Carisma or the attempt fails.
* They cannot hear any sounds that originate inside the cylinder.
* They have desvantagem on attack rolls against alvos inside the cylinder.
* They can’t charm, frighten, or possess criaturas inside the cylinder.
criaturas that aren’t affected by the field and that take a descanso curto inside it regain twice the usual number of pontos de vida for each Hit Die spent no final de the rest.

When you cast this spell, you can choose to reverse its magic; doing this will prevent affected criaturas from leaving the area instead of from entering it, make them unable to hear sounds that originate outside the cylinder, and so forth. In this case, the field provides no benefit for taking a descanso curto.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 8th level or higher, the radius increases by 30 pés for each slot level above 7th.
material: a platinum dagger and a powdered black pearl worth 500 gp, which the spell consumes
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Silence
desc: For a duração, no sound can be created within or pass through a 6 metros esfera centered on a point você escolhe dentro do alcance. Any criatura or objeto entirely inside the esfera is imune a dano de trovão, and criatura are ensurdecido while entirely inside it. Casting a magia that includes a verbal componente is impossible there.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Ranger, Ritual Caster

name: Silence
desc:
Until the spell ends, a bubble of silence envelops the area, and no sound can travel in or out of it.

While in the area a criatura is surdo and immune to dano de trovão. Casting a spell that requires a vocalized component is impossible while within the area.

name: Silent Image
desc: você cria the image of an objeto, uma criatura, or some other visible phenomenon that is no larger than a 4.5 metros cubo. The image appears at a spot dentro do alcance and lasts for a duração. The image is purely visual; it isn't accompanied by sound, smell, or other sensory effects. você pode use your ação to cause the image to move to any spot dentro do alcance. As the image changes location, você pode alter its appearance so that its movements appear natural for the image. Por exemplo, if você cria an image of uma criatura and move it, você pode alter the image so that it appears to be walking. Physical interaction with the image reveals it to be an ilusão, because things can pass through it. uma criatura that uses its ação to examine the image can determine that it is an ilusão with a successful Inteligência (Investigation) check against your CD da magia. If uma criatura discerns the ilusão for what it is, a criatura pode ver through the image.
material: A bit of fleece.

name: Silent Image
desc:
You create an illusory image of a criatura, object, or other visible effect within the area. The illusion is purely visual, it cannot produce sound or smell, and items and other criaturas pass through it.

As an action, you can move the image to any point within range. The image's movement can be natural and lifelike (for example, a ball will roll and a bird will fly).

A criatura can spend an action to make an Investigação check against your CD de resistência à magia to determine if the image is an illusion. em um sucesso, it is able to see through the image.

name: Silhouette
desc: You create a shadow play against a screen or wall. The surface can encompass up to 100 square pés. The number of criaturas that can see the shadow play equals your Inteligência score. The shadowy figures make no sound but they can dance, run, move, kiss, fight, and so forth. Most of the figures are generic types—a rabbit, a dwarf—but a number of them equal to your Inteligência modifier can be recognizable as specific individuals.

name: Silvershout
desc: You unleash a shout that coats todas as criaturas in a 30'pé cone in silver dust. If a criatura in that area is a shapeshifter, the dust covering it glows. In addition, cada criatura in the area deve fazer a teste de resistência de Constituição. em uma falha no teste, weapon attacks against that criatura are considered to be silvered for the purposes of overcoming resistance and immunity to ataques não mágicos that aren't silvered for 1 minuto.

name: Simulacrum
desc: You shape an illusory duplicate of one besta or humanoide that is dentro do alcance for the entire casting time of the magia. The duplicate is uma criatura, partially real and formed from ice or snow, and it can take ações and Caso contrário be affected as a normal criatura. It appears to be the same as the original, but it has half a criatura's máximo de pontos de vida and is formed without any equipment. Caso contrário, the ilusão uses all the statistics of a criatura it duplicates. The simulacrum is friendly to you and criatura you designate. It obeys your spoken commands, moving and acting in accordance with your wishes and acting on your turn in combat. The simulacrum lacks the ability to learn or become more powerful, so it never increases its level or other abilities, nor can it regain expended espaços de magia. If the simulacrum is damaged, você pode repair it in an alchemical laboratory, using rare herbs and minerals worth 100 gp per ponto de vida it regains. The simulacrum lasts until it drops to 0 pontos de vida, at which point it reverts to snow and melts instantly. If Você conjura esta magia again, any currently active duplicates you created with this magia are instantly destroyed.
material: Snow or ice in quantities sufficient to made a life-size copy of the duplicated criatura; some hair, fingernail clippings, or other piece of that criatura's corpo placed inside the snow or ice; and powdered ruby worth 1,500 gp, sprinkled over the duplicate and consumed by the magia.

name: Simulacrum
desc:
You sculpt an illusory duplicate of the alvo from ice and snow. The duplicate looks exactly like the alvo and uses all the statistics of the original, though it is formed without any gear, and has only half of the alvo's ponto de vida maximum. The duplicate is a criatura, can take actions, and be affected like any other criatura. If the alvo is able to cast spells, the duplicate cannot cast spells of 7th-level or higher.

The duplicate is friendly to you and criaturas you designate. It follows your spoken commands, and moves and acts on your turn in combat. It is a static criatura and it does not learn, age, or grow, so it never increases in levels and cannot regain any spent espaços de magia.

When the simulacrum is damaged you can repair it in an alchemy lab using components worth 100 gold per ponto de vida it regains. The simulacrum remains until it is reduced to 0 pontos de vida, at which point it crumbles into snow and melts away immediately.

If you cast this spell again, any existing simulacrum you have created with this spell is instantly destroyed.

name: Sir Mittinz’s Move Curse
desc: When you are within range of a cursed criatura or object, you can transfer the curse to a different criatura or object that’s also within range. The curse must be transferred from object to object or from criatura to criatura.
material: a finely crafted hollow glass sphere and incense worth 50 gp, which the spell consumes

name: Skull Road
desc: You conjure a portal linking an unoccupied space you can see within range to an imprecise location on the plane of Evermaw. The portal is a circular opening, which you can make 5-20 pés in diameter. You can orient the portal in any direction you choose. The portal lasts for the duration. If your casting is at 5th level, this opens a pathway to the River of Tears, to the Vitreous Mire, or to the Plains of Bone-travel to a settlement can take up to 7 dias (1d6+1). If cast at 7th level, the skull road spell opens a portal to a small settlement of gnolls, ghouls, or shadows on the plane near the Eternal Palace of Mot or a similar settlement. Undead casters can use this spell in the reverse direction, opening a portal from Evermaw to the mortal world, though with similar restrictions. At 5th level, the portal opens in a dark forest, cavern, or ruins far from habitation. At 7th level, the skull road leads directly to a tomb, cemetery, or mass grave near a humanoid settlement of some kind.

name: Sleep
desc: This magia sends criatura into a mágico slumber. Roll 5d8; the total is how many pontos de vida of criatura this magia can affect. criatura a até 6 metros de a point você escolhe dentro do alcance are affected in ascending order of their pontos de vida atuais (ignoring inconsciente criatura). Starting with a criatura that has the lowest pontos de vida atuais, cada criatura affected by this magia falls inconsciente until a magia termina, the sleeper sofre dano, or someone uses an ação to shake or slap the sleeper awake. Subtract cada criatura's pontos de vida from the total before moving on to a criatura with the next lowest pontos de vida. uma criatura's pontos de vida must be equal to or less than the remaining total for that criatura to be affected. morto-vivo and criatura imune a being enfeitiçado aren't affected by this magia.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 2° nível ou superior, roll an additional 2d8 for each nível do espaço above 1st.
material: A pinch of fine sand, rose petals, or a cricket.

name: Sleep
desc:
You send your inimigos into a mágico slumber.

Starting with the alvo with the lowest pontos de vida (ignoring inconsciente criaturas), alvos within the area fall inconsciente in ascending order according to their pontos de vida. Slumbering criaturas stay asleep until the spell ends, they take damage, or someone uses an action to physically wake them.

As each alvo falls asleep, subtract its pontos de vida from the total before moving on to the next alvo.

A alvo's pontos de vida must be equal to or less than the total remaining for the spell to have any effect.

If the spell puts no criaturas to sleep, the criatura in the area with the lowest ponto de vida total is rattled until the beginning of its next turn.

Constructs and undead are not affected by this spell.
higher_level: The spell affects an additional 2d10 pontos de vida worth of criaturas for each slot level above 1st.

name: Sleep of the Deep
desc: Your magic haunts the dreams of others. Choose a sleeping criatura that you are aware of within range. criaturas that don’t sleep, such as elves, can’t be targeted. The criatura deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Sabedoria or it garners no benefit from the rest, and when it awakens, it gains one level of exaustão and is afflicted with short‑term madness.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, you can affect one additional criatura for each slot level above 3rd.
material: a pinch of black sand, a tallow candle, and a drop of cephalopod ink
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Sleet Storm
desc: Until a magia termina, congelante rain and sleet fall in a 6 metros-tall cilindro with a 12 metros raio centered on a point você escolhe dentro do alcance. The área is heavily obscured, and exposed flames in the área are doused. The ground in the área is covered with slick ice, making it terreno difícil. When uma criatura enters the magia's área for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it deve fazer um teste de resistência de Destreza. em uma falha no teste, it falls caído. If uma criatura is concentrating in the magia's área, a criatura must make um teste de resistência de Constituição bem-sucedido against your CD da magia or lose concentração.
material: A pinch of dust and a few drops of water.

name: Sleet Storm
desc:
You conjure a storm of freezing rain and sleet in the area. The ground in the area is covered with slick ice that makes it difficult terrain, exposed flames in the area are doused, and the area is heavily obscured.

When a criatura enters the area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it makes a teste de resistência de Destreza or falls prostrado.

When a criatura concentrating on a spell starts its turn in the area or first enters into the area on a turn, it makes a teste de resistência de Constituição or loses Concentração.

name: Slippery Fingers
desc: You set a series of small events in motion that cause the targeted criatura to drop one não mágico item of your choice that it’s currently holding, unless it makes a successful teste de resistência de Carisma.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Slither
desc:
You momentarily become a shadow (a humanoid-shaped absence of leve, not the undead criatura of that name). You can slide under a door, through a keyhole, or through any other tiny opening. All of your equipment is transformed with you, and you can move up to your full Deslocamento during the spell’s duration. While in this form, you have vantagem on Destreza (Furtividade) checks made in darkness or dim leve and you are immune to não mágico contundente, perfurante, and dano cortante. You can dismiss this spell by using an action to do so.

If you return to your normal form while in a space too small for you (such as a mouse hole, sewer pipe, or the like), you take 4d6 dano de força and are pushed to the nearest space within 50 pés big enough to hold you. If the distance is greater than 50 pés, you take an extra 1d6 dano de força for every additional 10 pés traveled.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, you can alvo an additional willing criatura that you touch for each slot level above 2nd.
material: ashes from a wooden statue of you, made into ink and used to draw your portrait, worth 50 gp

name: Slow
desc: You alter time around up to six criatura of your choice in a 12 metros cubo dentro do alcance. cada alvo deve ser bem-sucedido em um teste de resistência de Sabedoria or be affected by this magia for a duração. An affected alvo's velocidade is halved, it takes a -2 penalty to CA and Destreza teste de resistências, and it can't use reações. On its turn, it can use either an ação or a ação bônus, not both. Regardless of a criatura's abilities or itens mágicos, it can't make more than one melee or ataque à distância during its turn. If a criatura attempts to cast a magia with a casting time of 1 ação, roll a d20. On an 11 or higher, the magia doesn't take effect until a criatura's next turn, and a criatura must use its ação on that turn to complete the magia. If it can't, the magia is wasted. uma criatura affected by this magia makes another Sabedoria teste de resistência no final de seu turno. em um sucesso no teste, the effect ends for it.
material: A drop of molasses.

name: Slow
desc:
You alter the flow of time around your alvos and they become slowed. On a successful teste de resistência, a alvo is rattled até o final de seu próximo turno.

In addition, if a slowed alvo casts a spell with a casting time of 1 action, roll a d20\. On an 11 or higher, the alvo doesn't finish casting the spell until its next turn. The alvo must use its action on that turn to complete the spell or the spell fails.

no final de cada um de seus turnos, a slowed alvo repeats the teste de resistência to end the spell's effect on it.

name: Smelting Blast
desc: You unleash a bolt of red-hot liquid metal at a criatura or object within range. Make a ranged ataque mágico against the alvo. On a hit, the alvo recebe 2d8 dano de fogo and deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Constituição ou ficar coated in cooling, liquid metal for the duration. A criatura coated in liquid metal recebe 1d8 dano de fogo no início de cada um de seus turnos as the metal scorches while it cools. no final de cada um de seus turnos, the criatura can make another teste de resistência de Constituição. em um sucesso, the spell ends and the liquid metal disappears.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, o dano (both initial and later) increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Sneer
desc: You curl your lip in disgust at a criatura you can see within range. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Carisma ou receber dano psíquico equal to 2d4 + your spellcasting ability modifier.

name: Snow Boulder
desc:
A ball of snow forms 5 pés away from you and rolls in the direction you point at a Deslocamento of 30 pés, growing larger as it moves. To roll the boulder into a criatura, you deve fazer a successful ranged ataque mágico. If the boulder hits, the criatura deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Destreza ou ficar knocked prostrado and take o dano indicated below. Hitting a criatura doesn’t stop the snow boulder’s movement or impede its growth, as long as you continue to maintain Concentração on the effect. When the spell ends, the boulder stops moving.

| rodada | Size | Damage |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | Small | 1d6 contundente |
| 2 | Medium | 2d6 contundente |
| 3 | Large | 4d6 contundente |
| 4 | Huge | 6d6 contundente |
material: a handful of snow

name: Snow Fort
desc:
This spell creates a simple “fort” from packed snow. The snow fort springs from the ground in an unoccupied space within range. It encircles a 10-pé area with sloping walls 4 pés high. The fort provides half cover (+2 AC) against ranged and melee attacks coming from outside the fort. The walls have AC 12, 30 pontos de vida per side, are immune to frio, necrótico, veneno, and dano psíquico, and are vulnerable to dano de fogo. A damaged wall can be repaired by casting a spell that causa dano de frio on it, on a point-for-point basis, up to a maximum of 30 points.

The spell also creates a dozen snowballs that can be arremesso (range 20/60) and that deal 1d4 dano contundente plus 1d4 dano de frio on a hit.
material: a ring carved from chalk or white stone

name: Snowblind Stare
desc: Your eyes burn with a bright, frio leve that inflicts snow blindness on a criatura you alvo within 30 pés of you. If the alvo fails a teste de resistência de Constituição, it suffers the first stage of snow blindness (see [Conditions](https://api.open5e.com/sections/conditions)), or the second stage of snow blindness if it already has the first stage. The alvo recovers as described in [Conditions](https://api.open5e.com/sections/conditions).

name: Snowy Coat
desc: This spell makes a slight alteration to a alvo criatura’s appearance that gives it vantagem on Destreza (Furtividade) checks to hide in snowy terrain. In addition, the alvo can use a ação bônus to make itself invisível in snowy terrain for 1 minuto. The spell ends no final de the minuto or when the criatura attacks or casts a spell.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 2nd level or higher, you can alvo one additional criatura for each slot level above 1st.

name: Song of the Forest
desc:
You attune your senses to the natural world, so that you detect every sound that occurs within 60 pés: wind blowing through branches, falling leaves, grazing deer, trickling streams, and more. You can clearly picture the source of each sound in your mind. The spell gives you sentido sísmico out to a range of 10 pés. In addition, you have vantagem on Sabedoria (Percepção) checks that rely on hearing. criaturas that make no noise or that are magically silent cannot be detected by this spell’s effect.

**Song of the forest** functions only in natural environments; it fails if cast underground, in a city, or in a building that isolates the caster from Natureza (GM’s discretion).

***ritual Focus.*** If you expend your ritual focus, the spell also gives you visão cega out to a range of 30 pés.
material: a dried leaf, crumpled and released

name: Soothsayer's Shield
desc: This spell can be cast when you are hit by an inimigo's attack. Until the start of your next turn, you have a +4 bonus to AC, including against the triggering attack.

name: Soul of the Machine
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork One willing criatura you touch becomes immune to mind-altering effects and dano psíquico for the spell's duration.

name: Soulwrought Fists
desc:
The alvo's hands harden with inner power, turning dexterous fingers into mágico iron cudgels.

Until the spell ends, the alvo drops anything it is holding and cannot use its hands to grasp objects or perform complex tasks. A alvo can still cast any spell that does not specifically require its hands.

When making unarmed strikes, the alvo can use its spellcasting ability or Destreza (its choice) instead of Força for the attack and damage rolls of unarmed strikes. In addition, the alvo's unarmed strikes deal 1d8 dano contundente and count as mágico for the purpose of overcoming resistance and immunity to ataques não mágicos and damage.

name: Spare the Dying
desc: Você toca a living criatura that has 0 pontos de vida. a criatura becomes stable. This magia has no effect on morto-vivo or constructo.

name: Spare the Dying
desc: A jolt of healing energy flows through the alvo and it becomes stable.

name: Speak with Animals
desc: Você ganha the ability to comprehend and verbally communicate with besta for a duração. The knowledge and awareness of many besta is limited by their Inteligência, but at a minimum, besta can give you information about nearby locations and monstro, including whatever they can perceive or have perceived within the past day. You might be able to persuade a besta to perform a small favor for you, at the DM's discretion.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Ritual Caster

name: Speak with Animals
desc: You call upon the secret lore of beasts and gain the ability to speak with them. Beasts have a different perspective of the world, and their knowledge and awareness is filtered through that perspective. At a minimum, beasts can tell you about nearby locations and monsters, including things they have recently perceived. At the Narrator's discretion, you might be able to persuade a beast to perform a small favor for you.

name: Speak with Dead
desc: You grant the semblance of life and Inteligência to a cadáver of your choice dentro do alcance, allowing it to answer the questions you pose. The cadáver must still have a mouth and can't be morto-vivo. The magia fails if the cadáver was o alvo of this magia within the last 10 days. Until a magia termina, você pode ask the cadáver up to five questions. The cadáver knows only what it knew in life, including the languages it knew. Answers are usually brief, cryptic, or repetitive, and the cadáver is under no compulsion to offer a truthful answer if Você está hostile to it or it recognizes you as an inimigo. This magia doesn't return a criatura's alma to its corpo, only its animating espírito. Thus, the cadáver can't learn new information, doesn't comprehend anything that has happened since it died, and can't speculate about future events.
material: ardente incense.

name: Speak with Dead
desc:
You call forth the alvo's memories, animating it enough to answer 5 questions. The corpse's knowledge is limited: it knows only what it knew in life and cannot learn new information or speak about anything that has occurred since its death. It speaks only in the languages it knew, and is under no compulsion to offer a truthful answer if it has reason not to. Answers might be brief, cryptic, or repetitive.

This spell does not return a departed soul, nor does it have any effect on an undead corpse, or one without a mouth.

name: Speak with Inanimate Object
desc: You awaken a spirit that resides inside an inanimate object such as a rock, a sign, or a table, and can ask it up to three yes-or-no questions. The spirit is indifferent toward you unless you have done something to harm or help it. The spirit can give you information about its environment and about things it has observed (with its limited senses), and it can act as a spy for you in certain situations. The spell ends when its duration expires or after you have received answers to three questions.

name: Speak with Plants
desc: Você imbuí plants a até 9 metros de you with limited sentience and animation, giving them the ability to communicate with you and follow your simple commands. você pode question plants about events in the magia's área within the past day, gaining information about criatura that have passed, weather, and other circumstances. você pode also turn terreno difícil caused by planta growth (such as thickets and undergrowth) into ordinary terrain that lasts for a duração. Or você pode turn ordinary terrain where plants are present into terreno difícil that lasts for a duração, causing vines and branches to hinder pursuers, Por exemplo. Plants might be able to perform other tasks on your behalf, at the DM's discretion. The magia doesn't enable plants to uproot themselves and move about, but they can freely move branches, tendrils, and stalks. If a planta criatura is in the área, você pode communicate with it as if you shared a common language, but Você ganha no mágico ability to influence it. This magia can cause the plants created by the entangle magia to release a imobilizado criatura.

name: Speak with Plants
desc:
Your voice recebe on a mágico timbre, awakening the alvos to limited sentience. Until the spell ends, the alvos can communicate with you and follow simple commands, telling you about recent events including criaturas that have passed, weather, and nearby locations.

The alvos have a limited mobility: they can move their branches, tendrils, and stalks freely. This allows them to turn ordinary terrain into difficult terrain, or make difficult terrain caused by vegetation into ordinary terrain for the duration as vines and branches move at your request. This spell can also release a criatura imobilizado by an entangle spell.

At the Narrator's discretion the alvos may be able to perform other tasks, though each must remain rooted in place. If a plant criatura is in the area, you can communicate with it but it is not compelled to follow your requests.

name: Sphere of Order
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You surround yourself with the perfect order of clockwork. Chaotic criaturas that start their turn in the area or enter it on their turn take 5d8 dano psíquico. o dano is 8d8 for Chaotic aberrations, celestials, elementals, and fiends.
