A successful teste de resistência de Sabedoria halves o dano, but Chaotic criaturas (the only ones affected by the spell) make the teste de resistência with desvantagem.

name: Spider Climb
desc: Until a magia termina, one criatura voluntária Você toca gains the ability to move up, down, and across vertical surfaces and upside down along ceilings, while leaving its hands free. o alvo also gains a velocidade de escalada equal to its velocidade de caminhada.
material: A drop of bitumen and a spider.

name: Spider Climb
desc: The alvo gains the ability to walk on walls and upside down on ceilings, as well as a escalando Deslocamento equal to its base Deslocamento.
higher_level: You can affect one additional alvo for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Spike Growth
desc: The ground in a 6 metros raio centered on a point dentro do alcance twists and sprouts hard spikes and thorns. The área becomes terreno difícil for a duração. When uma criatura moves into or within the área, it takes 2d4 dano perfurante for every 1.5 metros it travels. The development of land is camouflaged to look natural. Any criatura that does not see the área when the magia is magia casts must make a Sabedoria (Perception) check against your CD da magia to recognize the terrain as hazardous before entering it.
material: Seven sharp spines or seven twigs cut peak.

name: Spike Growth
desc:
You cause sharp spikes and thorns to sprout in the area, making it difficult terrain. When a criatura enters or moves within the area, it recebe 2d4 dano perfurante for every 5 pés it travels.

Your magic causes the ground to look natural. A criatura that can't see the area when the spell is cast can spot the hazardous terrain just before entering it by making a Percepção check against your CD de resistência à magia.

name: Spiked Barricade
desc:
With a word, you create a barricade of pointed, wooden poles, also known as a cheval de frise, to block your inimigos' progress. The barricade is composed of six 5-pé cube barriers made of wooden spikes mounted on central, horizontal beams.
  Each barrier doesn't need to be contiguous with another barrier, but each barrier must appear in an unoccupied space within range. Each barrier is difficult terrain, and a barrier provides half cover to a criatura behind it. When a criatura enters a barrier's area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, the criatura deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Força ou receber 3d6 dano perfurante.
  The barriers are objects made of wood that can be damaged and destroyed. Each barrier has AC 13, 20 pontos de vida, and is vulnerable to contundente and dano de fogo. Reducing a barrier to 0 pontos de vida destroys it.
  If you maintain your Concentração on this spell for its whole duration, the barriers become permanent and can't be dispelled. Otherwise, the barriers disappear when the spell ends.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, the number of barriers you create increases by two for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Spin
desc: You designate a criatura you can see within range and tell it to spin. The criatura can resist this command with a successful teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em uma falha no teste, the criatura spins in place for the duration of the spell. A spinning criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso. A criatura that has spun for 1 rodada or longer becomes dizzy and has desvantagem on attack rolls and ability checks until 1 rodada after it stops spinning.

name: Spinning Axes
desc: Spinning axes made of luminous força burst out from you to strike todas as criaturas within 10 pés of you. Each of those criaturas recebe 5d8 dano de força, or half o dano with a successful teste de resistência de Destreza. criaturas damaged by this spell that aren’t undead or constructs begin bleeding. A bleeding criatura recebe 2d6 dano necrótico no final de cada um de seus turnos for 1 minuto. A criatura can stop the bleeding for itself or another criatura by using an action to make a successful Sabedoria (Medicina) check against your CD de resistência à magia or by applying any amount of mágico healing.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 5th level or higher, o dano increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 4th.
material: an iron ring

name: Spire of Stone
desc: You cause a spire of rock to burst out of the ground, floor, or another surface beneath your pés. The spire is as wide as your space, and lifting you, it can rise up to 20 pés in height. When the spire appears, a criatura within 5 pés of you deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Destreza or fall prostrado. As a ação bônus on your turn, you can cause the spire to rise or descend up to 20 pés to a maximum height of 40 pés. If you move off of the spire, it immediately collapses back into the ground. When the spire disappears, it leaves the surface from which it sprang unharmed. You can create a new spire as a ação bônus for the duration of the spell.

name: Spirit Guardians
desc: Você chama forth espírito to protect you. They flit around you to a distance of 4.5 metros for a duração. If Você está good or neutral, their spectral form appears angelic or fada (your choice). If Você está evil, they appear fiendish. quando você conjura esta magia, você pode designate any number of criatura você pode ver to be unaffected by it. An affected criatura's velocidade is halved in the área, and when a criatura enters the área for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it deve fazer um teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em uma falha no teste, a criatura takes 3d8 dano radiante (if Você está good or neutral) or 3d8 dano necrótico (if Você está evil). em um sucesso no teste, a criatura takes half as much dano.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 4° nível ou superior, the dano increases by 1d8 for each nível do espaço above 3rd.
material: A símbolo sagrado.

name: Spirit Guardians
desc:
You call down spirits of divine fury, filling the area with flitting spectral forms. You choose the form taken by the spirits.

criaturas of your choice halve their Deslocamento while in the area. When a criatura enters the area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it recebe 3d6 radiante or dano necrótico (your choice).
higher_level: o dano increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Spiritual Weapon
desc: você cria a floating, spectral arma dentro do alcance that lasts for a duração or until Você conjura esta magia again. When you conjurar a magia, você pode faça um ataque de magia corpo a corpo against uma criatura within 1.5 metros of the arma. em um acerto, o alvo takes dano de força equal to 1d8 + your modificador de conjuração. As a ação bônus on your turn, você pode move the arma up to 6 metros and repeat the attack against uma criatura within 1.5 metros of it. The arma can take whatever form você escolhe. Clerics of deities who are associated with a particular arma (as St. Cuthbert is known for his maça and Thor for his martelo) make this magia's effect resemble that arma.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 3° nível ou superior, the dano increases by 1d8 for every two slot levels above the 2nd.

name: Spiritual Weapon
desc:
You create a floating, incandescent weapon with an appearance of your choosing and use it to attack your inimigos. On the rodada you cast it, you can make a melee ataque mágico against a criatura within 5 pés of the weapon that causa dano de força equal to 1d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier.

As a ação bônus on subsequent turns until the spell ends, you can move the weapon up to 20 pés and make another attack against a criatura within 5 pés of it.
higher_level: o dano increases by 1d8 for every two slot levels above 2nd.

name: Spite
desc: You prick your finger and anoint your forehead with your own blood, taking 1 dano perfurante and warding yourself against hostile attacks. The first time a criatura hits you with an attack during this spell's duration, it recebe 3d6 dano psíquico. Then the spell ends.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, o dano increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Spiteful Weapon
desc:
You create a connection between the alvo of the spell, an attacker that injured the alvo during the last 24 horas, and the melee weapon that caused the injury, all of which must be within range when the spell is cast.

For the duration of the spell, whenever the attacker recebe damage while holding the weapon, the alvo deve fazer a teste de resistência de Carisma. em uma falha no teste, the alvo recebe the same amount and type of damage, or half as much damage on a successful one. The attacker can use the weapon on itself and thus cause the alvo to take identical damage. A self-inflicted wound hits automatically, but damage is still rolled randomly.

Once the connection is established, it lasts for the duration of the spell regardless of range, so long as all three elements remain on the same plane. The spell ends immediately if the attacker receives any healing.
higher_level: The alvo has desvantagem on its Carisma saving throws if **spiteful weapon** is cast using a espaço de magia of 5th level or higher.
material: a melee weapon that has been used to injure the alvo

name: Sporesight
desc:
You throw a mushroom at a point within range and detonate it, creating a cloud of spores that fills the area. The cloud of spores travels around corners, and the area is considered lightly obscured for everyone except you. criaturas and objects within the area are covered in spores.

Until the spell ends, you know the exact location of all affected objects and criaturas. Any jogada de ataque you make against an affected criatura or object has vantagem, and the affected criaturas and objects can't benefit from being invisível.

name: Spur Mount
desc: You urge your mount to a sudden burst of Deslocamento. Until the end of your next turn, you can direct your mount to use the Dash or Disengage action as a ação bônus. This spell has no effect on a criatura that you are not riding.
material: an apple or a sugar cube

name: Staff of Violet Fire
desc:
You create a quarterstaff of pure necrótico energy that blazes with intense purple leve; it appears in your chosen hand. If you let it go, it disappears, though you can evoke it again as a ação bônus if you have maintained Concentração on the spell.

This staff is an extremely unstable and impermanent magic item; it has 10 charges and does not require attunement. The wielder can use one of three effects:

* By using your action to make a ataque corpo a corpo and expending 1 charge, you can attack with it. On a hit, the alvo recebe 5d10 dano necrótico.
* By expending 2 charges, you can release bolts of necrótico fogo against up to 3 alvos as ranged attacks for 1d8+4 dano necrótico each.

The staff disappears and the spell ends when all the staff's charges have been expended or if you stop concentrating on the spell.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 6th level or higher, the melee damage increases by 1d10 for every two slot levels above 4th, or you add one additional ranged bolt for every two slot levels above 4th.
material: mummy dust

name: Stanch
desc: The alvo’s blood coagulates rapidly, so that a dying alvo stabilizes and any ongoing bleeding or wounding effect on the alvo ends. The alvo can't be the source of blood for any spell or effect that requires even a drop of blood.
dnd_class: Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Star's Heart
desc:
This spell increases gravity tenfold in a 50-pé radius centered on you. cada criatura in the area other than you drops whatever it’s holding, falls prostrado, becomes incapacitado, and can’t move. If a solid object (such as the ground) is encountered when a voando or levitating criatura falls, the criatura recebe three times the normal falling damage. Any criatura except you that enters the area or starts its turn there deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Força or fall prostrado and become incapacitado and unable to move. A criatura that starts its turn prostrado and incapacitado makes a teste de resistência de Força. em uma falha no teste, the criatura recebe 8d6 dano contundente; em um sucesso no teste, it recebe 4d6 dano contundente, it’s no longer incapacitado, and it can move at half Deslocamento.

All ranged weapon attacks inside the area have a normal range of 5 pés and a maximum range of 10 pés. The same applies to spells that create missiles that have mass, such as [flaming sphere](https://api.open5e.com/spells/flaming-sphere). A criatura under the influence of a [freedom of movement](https://api.open5e.com/spells/freedom-of-movement) spell or comparable magic has vantagem on the Força saving throws required by this spell, and its Deslocamento isn’t reduced once it recovers from being incapacitado.
material: an ioun stone

name: Starburst
desc: You cause a mote of starlight to appear and explode in a 5-pé cube you can see within range. If a criatura is in the cube, it deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Carisma ou receber 1d8 dano radiante.
higher_level: This spell’s damage increases to 2d8 when you alcance 5th level, 3d8 when you alcance 11th level, and 4d8 when you alcance 17th level.

name: Starfall
desc: You cause bolts of shimmering starlight to fall from the heavens, striking up to five criaturas that you can see within range. Each bolt strikes um alvo, dealing 6d6 dano radiante, knocking the alvo prostrado, and blinding it until the start of your next turn. A criatura that makes a successful teste de resistência de Destreza recebe half o dano, is not knocked prostrado, and is not cego. If you name fewer than five alvos, excess bolts strike the ground harmlessly.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 6th level or higher, you can create one additional bolt for each slot level above 5th.

name: Starry Vision
desc: This spell acts as [compelling fate](https://api.open5e.com/spells/compelling-fate), except as noted above (**starry** vision can be cast as a reação, has twice the range of [compelling fate](https://api.open5e.com/spells/compelling-fate), and lasts up to 1 minuto). no final de cada um de seus turnos, the alvo repeats the teste de resistência de Carisma, ending the effect em um sucesso.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 8th level or higher, the bonus to AC increases by 1 for each slot level above 7th.
material: a sprinkle of gold dust worth 400 gp
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when an enemy starts its turn

name: Steal Warmth
desc: When you cast **steal warmth** after taking dano de frio, you select a living criatura within 5 pés of you. That criatura recebe the dano de frio instead, or half o dano with a successful teste de resistência de Constituição. You regain pontos de vida equal to the amount of dano de frio taken by the alvo.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, the distance to the alvo you can affect with this spell increases by 5 pés for each slot level above 3rd.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when you take cold damage from magic

name: Steam Blast
desc: You unleash a burst of superheated steam in a 15-pé radius around you. All other criaturas in the area take 5d8 dano de fogo, or half as much damage on a successful teste de resistência de Destreza. não mágico fires smaller than a bonfire are extinguished, and everything becomes wet.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 5th level or higher, o dano increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 4th.
material: a tiny copper kettle or boiler

name: Steam Gout
desc:
You create a gout of billowing steam in a 40-foottall cylinder with a 5-pé radius centered on a point on the ground you can see within range. Exposed flames in the area are doused. cada criatura in the area when the gout first appears deve fazer a teste de resistência de Destreza. em uma falha no teste, the criatura recebe 2d8 dano de fogo and falls prostrado. em um sucesso no teste, the criatura recebe half as much damage and doesn't fall prostrado.
  The gout then covers the area in a sheen of slippery water. When a criatura enters the spell's area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it deve fazer a teste de resistência de Destreza. em uma falha no teste, it falls prostrado.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, o dano increases by 1d8, and you can create one additional gout of steam for each slot level above 3rd. A criatura in the area of more than one gout of steam is affected only once.

name: Steam Whistle
desc: You open your mouth and unleash a shattering scream. All other criaturas in a 30-pé radius around you take 10d10 dano de trovão and are surdo for 1d8 horas. A successful teste de resistência de Constituição halves o dano and reduces the deafness to 1 rodada.
material: a small brass whistle

name: Stench of Rot
desc: Choose uma criatura you can see within range that isn’t a construct or an undead. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Carisma or become cursed for the duration of the spell. While cursed, the alvo reeks of death and rot, and nothing short of magic can mask or remove the smell. The alvo has desvantagem on all Carisma checks and on Constituição saving throws to maintain Concentração on spells. A criatura with the Keen Smell trait, or a similar trait indicating the criatura has a strong sense of smell, can add your spellcasting ability modifier to its Sabedoria (Percepção) or Sabedoria (Sobrevivência) checks to find the alvo. A [remove curse](https://api.open5e.com/spells/remove-curse) spell or similar magic ends the spell early.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, the duration increases by 1 hora for each slot level above 2nd.
material: a live maggot
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Stigmata of the Red Goddess
desc: You cut yourself and bleed as tribute to Marena, gaining power as long as the blood continues flowing. The stigmata typically appears as blood running from the eyes or ears, or from wounds manifesting on the neck or chest. You take 1 dano perfurante at the beginning of each turn and gain a +2 bonus on damage rolls. Any healing received by you, mágico or otherwise, ends the spell.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, o dano you take no início de each of your turns and the bonus damage you do both increase by 1 for each slot level above 2nd, and the duration increases by 1 rodada for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Stinking Cloud
desc: você cria a 6 metros esfera of yellow, nauseating gas centered on a point dentro do alcance. The cloud spreads around corners, and its área is heavily obscured. The cloud lingers in the air for a duração. cada criatura that is completely within the cloud no início de seu turno deve fazer um teste de resistência de Constituição against poison. em uma falha no teste, a criatura spends its ação that turn retching and reeling. criatura that don't need to breathe or are imune a poison automatically succeed on this teste de resistência. A moderate wind (at least 16 km per hour) disperses the cloud after 4 rounds. A strong wind (at least 32 km per hour) disperses it after 1 round.
material: A rotten egg or several skunk cabbage leaves.

name: Stinking Cloud
desc:
You create a roiling, noxious cloud that hinders criaturas and leaves them retching. The cloud spreads around corners and lingers in the air until the spell ends.

The area is heavily obscured. A criatura in the area no início de its turn makes a teste de resistência de Constituição or uses its action to retch and reel.

criaturas that don't need to breathe or are immune to veneno automatically succeed on the save.

A moderate wind (10 milhas per hora) disperses the cloud after 4 rodadas, a strong wind (20 milhas per hora) after 1 rodada.
higher_level: The spell's area increases by 5 pés for every 2 slot levels above 3rd.

name: Stone Aegis
desc:
A rocky coating covers your body, protecting you. Until the start of your next turn, you gain 5 temporary pontos de vida and a +2 bonus to Classe de Armadura, including against the triggering attack.
  no início de each of your subsequent turns, you can use a ação bônus to extend the duration of the AC bonus until the start of your following turn, for up to 1 minuto.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when you are hit by an attack

name: Stone Fetch
desc:
You create a stony duplicate of yourself, which rises out of the ground and appears next to you. The duplicate looks like a stone carving of you, including the clothing you're wearing and equipment you're carrying at the time of the casting. It uses the statistics of an earth elemental.
  For the duration, you have a telepathic link with the duplicate. You can use this telepathic link to issue commands to the duplicate while you are conscious (no action required), which it does its best to obey. You can specify a simple and general course of action, such as “Run over there” or “Fetch that object.” If the duplicate completes the order and doesn't receive further direction from you, it recebe the Dodge or Hide action (your choice) on its turn. The duplicate can't attack, but it can speak in a gravelly version of your voice and mimic your mannerisms with exact detail.
  As a ação bônus, you can see through the duplicate's eyes and hear what it hears as if you were in the duplicate's space, gaining the benefits of the earth elemental's visão no escuro and sentido sísmico until the start of your next turn. During this time, you are deaf and blind with regard to your own senses. As an action while sharing the duplicate's senses, you can make the duplicate explode in a shower of jagged chunks of rock, destroying the duplicate and ending the spell. cada criatura within 10 pés of the duplicate deve fazer a teste de resistência de Destreza. A criatura recebe 4d10 dano cortante em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one.
  The duplicate explodes no final de the duration, if you didn't cause it to explode before then. If the duplicate is killed before it explodes, you suffer one level of exaustão.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 5th level or higher, the explosion damage increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 4th. In addition, when you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 6th level or higher, the duration is 1 hora. When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 8th level or higher, the duration is 8 horas. Using a espaço de magia of 6th level or higher grants a duration that doesn't require Concentração.

name: Stone Shape
desc: Você toca a stone objeto of Medium size or smaller or a section of stone no more than 1.5 metros in any dimension and form it into any shape that suits your purpose. So, Por exemplo, you could shape a large rock into a arma, idol, or coffer, or make a small passage through a parede, enquanto the parede is less than 1.5 metros thick. You could also shape a stone door or its frame to seal the door shut. The objeto você cria can have up to two hinges and a latch, but finer mechanical detail isn't possible.
material: Soft clay, to be crudely worked into the desired shape for the stone objeto.

name: Stone Shape
desc:
You reshape the alvo into any form you choose.

For example, you could shape a large rock into a weapon, statue, or chest, make a small passage through a wall (as long as it isn't more than 5 pés thick), seal a stone door shut, or create a hiding place. The alvo can have up to two hinges and a latch, but finer mechanical detail isn't possible.
higher_level: You may select one additional alvo for every slot level above 4th.

name: Stoneskin
desc: This magia turns the flesh of a criatura voluntária Você toca as hard as stone. Until a magia termina, o alvo has resistência a não mágico bludgeoning, piercing, and dano cortante.
material: Diamond dust worth 100 gp, which the magia consumes.
dnd_class: Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Wizard

name: Stoneskin
desc: Until the spell ends, the alvo's flesh becomes as hard as stone and it gains resistance to não mágico contundente, perfurante, and dano cortante.
higher_level: When using a 7th-level espaço de magia, the alvo gains resistance to mágico contundente, perfurante, and dano cortante.

name: Storm Kick
desc:
You must be able to move in order to cast this spell.

You leap into the air and flash across the battlefield, arriving pés-first with the força of a thunderbolt. As part of casting this spell, make a ranged ataque mágico against a criatura you can see within range. If you hit, you instantly flash to an open space of your choosing adjacent to the alvo, dealing dano contundente equal to 1d6 + your spellcasting modifier plus 3d8 dano de trovão and 6d8 dano de relâmpago. If your unarmed strike normally uses a larger die, use that instead of a d6\. If you miss, you may still choose to teleport next to the alvo.
higher_level: When using a 6th-level espaço de magia or higher, if you are able to make more than one attack when you take the Attack action, you may make an additional ataque corpo a corpo com arma against the alvo. When using a 7th-level espaço de magia, you may choose an additional alvo within 30 pés of the alvo for each espaço de magia level above 6th, forcing each additional alvo to make a teste de resistência de Destreza ou receber 6d8 dano de relâmpago.

name: Storm of Axes
desc: Deep Magic: battle You conjure up dozens of axes and direct them in a pattern in chopping, whirling mayhem. The blades fill eight 5-pé squares in a line 40 pés long or in a double-Força line 20 pés long and 10 deep. The axes cause 6d8 dano cortante to criaturas in the area at the moment the spell is cast or metade do dano with a successful teste de resistência de Destreza. By maintaining Concentração, you can move the swarm of axes up to 20 pés per rodada in any direction you wish. If the storm of axes moves into spaces containing criaturas, they immediately deve fazer another teste de resistência de Destreza or suffer damage again.

name: Storm of Vengeance
desc:
A churning storm cloud forms, centered on a point você pode ver and spreading to a raio of 108 metros. Lightning flashes in the área, thunder booms, and strong winds roar. cada criatura under the cloud (no more than 5,0 metros beneath the cloud) when it appears deve fazer um teste de resistência de Constituição. em uma falha no teste, uma criatura takes 2d6 dano de trovão and becomes ensurdecido por 5 minutos. Each round you maintain concentração on this magia, the storm produces additional effects on your turn.

**Round 2.** Acidic rain falls from the cloud. cada criatura and objeto under the cloud takes 1d6 dano de ácido.

**Round 3.** Você chama six bolts of lightning from the cloud to strike six criatura or objeto of your choice beneath the cloud. A given criatura or objeto can't be struck by more than one bolt. A struck criatura deve fazer um teste de resistência de Destreza. a criatura takes 10d6 dano de relâmpago em uma falha no teste, or half as much dano on a successful one.

**Round 4.** Hailstones rain down from the cloud. cada criatura under the cloud takes 2d6 dano de concussão.

**Round 5-10.** Gusts and congelante rain assail the área under the cloud. The área becomes terreno difícil and is heavily obscured. cada criatura there takes 1d6 dano de frio. ataque à distância com armas in the área are impossible. The wind and rain count as a severe distraction for the purposes of maintaining concentração on magias. Finally, gusts of strong wind (ranging from 20 to 80 km per hour) automatically disperse fog, mists, and similar phenomena in the área, whether mundane or mágico.

name: Storm of Vengeance
desc:
You conjure a churning storm cloud that spreads to cover the alvo area. As it forms, relâmpago and trovão mix with howling winds, and cada criatura beneath the cloud makes a teste de resistência de Constituição or recebe 2d6 dano de trovão and becomes surdo for 5 minutos.

Until the spell ends, no início de your turn the cloud produces additional effects: rodada 2\. Acidic rain falls throughout the area dealing 1d6 dano de ácido to cada criatura and object beneath the cloud.

rodada 3\. relâmpago bolts strike up to 6 criaturas or objects of your choosing that are beneath the cloud (no more than one bolt per criatura or object). A criatura struck by this relâmpago makes a teste de resistência de Destreza, taking 10d6 dano de relâmpago em uma falha no teste, or metade do dano em um sucesso no teste.

rodada 4\. Hailstones fall throughout the area dealing 2d6 dano contundente to cada criatura beneath the cloud.

rodada 5�10\. Gusts and freezing rain turn the area beneath the cloud into difficult terrain that is heavily obscured. Ranged weapon attacks are impossible while a criatura or its alvo are beneath the cloud. When a criatura concentrating on a spell starts its turn beneath the cloud or enters into the area, it makes a teste de resistência de Constituição or loses Concentração. Gusts of strong winds between 20�50 milhas per hora automatically disperse fog, mists, and similar effects (whether mundane or mágico). Finally, cada criatura beneath the cloud recebe 1d6 dano de frio.

name: Storm of Wings
desc:
You create a storm of spectral birds, bats, or voando insects in a 15-pé-radius sphere on a point you can see within range. The storm spreads around corners, and its area is lightly obscured. cada criatura in the storm when it appears and each a criatura that starts its turn in the storm is affected by the storm.
  As a ação bônus on your turn, you can move the storm up to 30 pés. As an action on your turn, you can change the storm from one type to another, such as from a storm of bats to a storm of insects.
  ***Bats.*** The criatura recebe 4d6 dano necrótico, and its Deslocamento is halved while within the storm as the bats cling to it and drain its blood.
  ***Birds.*** The criatura recebe 4d6 dano cortante, and has desvantagem on attack rolls while within the storm as the birds fly in the way of the criatura's attacks.
  ***Insects.*** The criatura recebe 4d6 dano de veneno, and it deve fazer a teste de resistência de Constituição each time it casts a spell while within the storm. em uma falha no teste, the criatura fails to cast the spell, losing the action but not the espaço de magia.
material: a drop of honey

name: Strength of the Underworld
desc: You call on the power of the dark gods of the afterlife to strengthen the alvo's undead energy. The spell's alvo has vantagem on saving throws against Turn Undead while the spell lasts. If this spell is cast on a corpse that died from darakhul fever, the corpse gains a +5 bonus on its roll to determine whether it rises as a darakhul.

name: Subliminal Aversion
desc: You ward a criatura within range against attacks by making the choice para acertar them painful. When the warded criatura is hit with a ataque corpo a corpo from within 5 pés of it, the attacker recebe 1d4 dano psíquico.

name: Sudden Dawn
desc: You call upon morning to arrive ahead of schedule. With a sharp word, you create a 30-pé-radius cylinder of leve centered on a point on the ground within range. The cylinder extends vertically for 100 pés or until it reaches an obstruction, such as a ceiling. The area inside the cylinder is brightly lit.

name: Sudden Slue
desc: With a growl, you call forth dozens of bears to overrun todas as criaturas in a 20-pé cube within range. cada criatura in the area deve fazer a teste de resistência de Destreza. em uma falha no teste, a criatura recebe 6d6 dano contundente and is knocked prostrado. em um sucesso no teste, a criatura recebe half o dano and isn't knocked prostrado. The bears disappear after making their charge.

name: Sudden Stampede
desc: You conjure up a multitude of fey spirits that manifest as galloping horses. These horses run in a 10-pé'wide, 60-pé-long line, in a given direction starting from a point within range, trampling todas as criaturas in their path, before vanishing again. cada criatura in the line recebe 6d10 dano contundente and is knocked prostrado. A successful teste de resistência de Destreza reduces o dano by half, and the criatura is not knocked prostrado.

name: Suggestion
desc: You suggest a course of activity (limited to a sentence or two) and magically influence uma criatura você pode ver dentro do alcance that can hear and understand you. criatura that can't be enfeitiçado are imune a this effect. The suggestion must be worded in such a manner as to make the course of ação sound reasonable. Asking a criatura to stab itself, throw itself onto a lança, immolate itself, or do some other obviously harmful act ends the magia. o alvo deve fazer um teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em uma falha no teste, it pursues the course of ação you described to the best of its ability. The suggested course of ação can continue for the entire duration. If the suggested activity can be completed in a shorter time, a magia termina when the subject finishes what it was asked to do. você pode also specify conditions that will trigger a Especial activity during a duração. Por exemplo, you might suggest that a knight give her warhorse to the first beggar she meets. If the condition isn't met before the magia expires, the activity isn't performed. If you or any of your companions dano o alvo, a magia termina.
material: A snake's tongue and either a bit of honeycomb or a drop of sweet oil.

name: Suggestion
desc:
criaturas that cannot be enfeitiçado are immune to this spell. Suggest an activity phrased in a sentence or two. The alvo is magically influenced to follow that course of activity. The suggestion must be worded to sound reasonable. Asking the alvo to perform an action that is obviously harmful to it ends the spell.

The alvo carries out the activity suggested by you as well as it can. The activity can last for the duration of the spell, and if it requires less time the spell ends after the alvo has carried out the activity.

You may specify trigger conditions that cause the alvo to perform a specific activity while the spell lasts. For example, you may suggest that the alvo recebe off its clothes and dives the next time it sees a body of water. If the alvo does not see a body of water before the spell ends, the specific activity isn't performed.

Any damage done to the alvo by you or an aliado ends the spell for that criatura.
higher_level:
When using a 4th-level espaço de magia, the duration is Concentração, up to 24 horas. When using a 5th-level espaço de magia, the duration is 7 dias. When using a 7th-level espaço de magia, the duration is 1 year. When using a 9th-level espaço de magia, the suggestion lasts until it is dispelled.

Any use of a 5th-level or higher espaço de magia grants a duration that doesn't require Concentração.

name: Summon Clockwork Beast
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork Once per dia, you can cast this ritual to summon a Tiny clockwork beast doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep. When its pontos de vida are reduced to 0, it crumbles into a heap of gears and springs.

name: Summon Eldritch Servitor
desc:
You summon eldritch aberrations that appear in unoccupied spaces you can see within range. Choose one of the following options for what appears:
* Two [ghasts of Leng](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/ghast-of-leng)
* One [shantak](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/shantak)

When the summoned criaturas appear, you deve fazer a teste de resistência de Carisma. em um sucesso, the criaturas are friendly to you and your aliados. em uma falha, the criaturas are friendly to no one and attack the nearest criaturas, pursuing and fighting for as long as possible.

Roll initiative for the summoned criaturas, which take their own turns as a group. If friendly to you, they obey your verbal commands (no action required by you to issue a command), or they attack the nearest living criatura if they are not commanded otherwise.

Each rodada when you maintain Concentração on the spell, you deve fazer a successful CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria no final de your turn ou receber 1d4 dano psíquico. If the total of this damage exceeds your Sabedoria score, you gain 1 point of Void taint and you are afflicted with a form of short-term madness. The same penalty applies when o dano exceeds twice your Sabedoria score, three times your Sabedoria score, and so forth, if you maintain Concentração for that long.

A summoned criatura disappears when it drops to 0 pontos de vida or when the spell ends. If you stop concentrating on the spell before 1 hora has elapsed, the criaturas become uncontrolled and hostile until they disappear 1d6 rodadas later or until they are killed.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a 7th- or 8th-level espaço de magia, you can summon four [ghasts of Leng](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/ghast-of-leng) or a [hound of Tindalos](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/hound-of-tindalos). When you cast it with a 9th-level espaço de magia, you can summon five [ghasts of Leng](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/ghast-of-leng) or a [nightgaunt](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/nightgaunt).
material: a vial of the caster’s blood and a silver dagger
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Summon Old One's Avatar
desc: Deep Magic: void magic You summon a worldly incarnation of a Great Old One, which appears in an unoccupied space you can see within range. This avatar manifests as a Void speaker (criatura Codex NPC) augmented by boons from the Void. Choose one of the following options for the type of avatar that appears (other options might be available if the GM allows): Avatar of Cthulhu. The Void speaker is a goat-man with the ability to cast black goat's blessing and unseen strangler at will. Avatar of Yog-Sothoth. The Void speaker is a human with 1d4 + 1 flesh warps and the ability to cast gift of Azathoth and thunderwave at will. When the avatar appears, you deve fazer a teste de resistência de Carisma. If it succeeds, the avatar is friendly to you and your aliados. If it fails, the avatar is friendly to no one and attacks the nearest criatura to it, pursuing and fighting for as long as possible. Roll initiative for the avatar, which recebe its own turn. If friendly to you, it obeys verbal commands you issue to it (no action required by you). If the avatar has no command, it attacks the nearest criatura. Each rodada you maintain Concentração on the spell, you deve fazer a successful CD 15 teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou receber 1d6 dano psíquico. If the cumulative total of this damage exceeds your Sabedoria score, you gain one point of Void taint and you are afflicted with a short-term madness. The same penalty recurs when o dano exceeds twice your Sabedoria, three times your Sabedoria, etc. The avatar disappears when it drops to 0 pontos de vida or when the spell ends. If you stop concentrating on the spell before an hora has elapsed, the avatar becomes uncontrolled and hostile and doesn't disappear until 1d6 rodadas later or it's killed.
dnd_class: Wizard, Warlock, Sorceror, Druid, Cleric, Bard

name: Summon Star
desc: You summon a friendly star from the heavens to do your bidding. It appears in an unoccupied space you can see within range and recebe the form of a glowing humanoid with long white hair. todas as criaturas other than you who view the star deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar enfeitiçado for the duration of the spell. A criatura enfeitiçado in this way can repeat the teste de resistência de Sabedoria no final de cada um de seus turnos. em um sucesso, the criatura is no longer enfeitiçado and is immune to the effect of this casting of the spell. In all other ways, the star is equivalent to a [deva](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/deva). It entende and obeys verbal commands you give it. If you do not give the star a command, it defends itself and attacks the last criatura that attacked it. The star disappears when it drops to 0 pontos de vida or when the spell ends.

name: Sunbeam
desc: A beam of brilliant light flashes out from your hand in a 1.5 metros-wide, 18 metros-long linha. cada criatura in the linha deve fazer um teste de resistência de Constituição. em uma falha no teste, uma criatura takes 6d8 dano radiante and is cego until your next turn. em um sucesso no teste, it takes half as much dano and isn't cego by this magia. morto-vivo and oozes têm desvantagem em this teste de resistência. você pode create a new linha of radiance as your ação on any turn until a magia termina. For a duração, a mote of brilliant radiance shines in your hand. It sheds luz intensa in a 9 metros raio and luz fraca for an additional 9 metros. This light is luz solar.
material: A magnifying glass.

name: Sunbeam
desc:
Oozes and undead have desvantagem on saving throws made to resist this spell. A beam of radiante sunlight streaks from your hand. cada criatura in the area recebe 6d8 dano radiante and is cego for 1 rodada.

Until the spell ends, you can use an action on subsequent turns to create a new beam of sunlight and a mote of brilliant radiance lingers on your hand, shedding bright leve in a 30-pé radius and dim leve an additional 30 pés. This leve is sunlight.
higher_level: When using an 8th-level espaço de magia o dano increases by 1d8.

name: Sunburst
desc: Brilliant luz solar flashes in a 18 metros raio centered on a point você escolhe dentro do alcance. cada criatura in that light deve fazer um teste de resistência de Constituição. em uma falha no teste, uma criatura takes 12d6 dano radiante and is cego por 1 minuto. em um sucesso no teste, it takes half as much dano and isn't cego by this magia. morto-vivo and oozes têm desvantagem em this teste de resistência. uma criatura cego by this magia makes another Constituição teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos. em um sucesso no teste, it is no longer cego. This magia dissipar any escuridão in its área that was created by a magia.
material: Fire and a piece of sunstone.

name: Sunburst
desc:
Oozes and undead have desvantagem on saving throws made to resist this spell. You create a burst of radiante sunlight that fills the area. cada criatura in the area recebe 12d6 dano radiante and is cego for 1 minuto. A criatura cego by this spell repeats its teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the blindness em um sucesso no teste.

This spell dispels any mágico darkness in its area.
higher_level: When using a 9th-level espaço de magia o dano increases by 2d6.

name: Suppress Regeneration
desc: You temporarily remove the ability to regenerate from a criatura you can see within range. The alvo deve fazer a teste de resistência de Constituição. em uma falha no teste, the alvo can't regain pontos de vida from the Regeneration trait or similar spell or trait for the duration. The alvo can receive mágico healing or regain pontos de vida from other traits, spells, or actions, as normal. no final de cada um de seus turnos, the alvo can make another teste de resistência de Constituição. em um sucesso, the spell ends on the alvo.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 2nd level or higher, you can alvo one additional criatura for each slot level above 1st. The criaturas must be within 30 pés of each other when you alvo them.

name: Surge Dampener
desc: Using your Força of will, you cause uma criatura other than yourself that you touch to become so firmly entrenched within reality that it is protected from the effects of a chaos magic surge. The protected criatura can make a CD 13 teste de resistência de Carisma to negate the effect of a chaos magic surge that does not normally allow a teste de resistência, or it gains vantagem on a teste de resistência that is normally allowed. Once the protected criatura makes a successful teste de resistência allowed by **surge dampener**, the spell ends.

name: Surprise Blessing
desc:
You touch a willing criatura and choose one of the conditions listed below that the criatura is currently subjected to. The condition’s normal effect on the alvo is suspended, and the indicated effect applies instead. This spell’s effect on the alvo lasts for the duration of the original condition or until the spell ends. If this spell ends before the original condition’s duration expires, you become affected by the condition for as long as it lasts, even if you were not the original recipient of the condition.

***cego:*** The alvo gains visão verdadeira out to a range of 10 pés and can see 10 pés into the Ethereal Plane.

***enfeitiçado:*** The alvo’s Carisma score becomes 19, unless it is already higher than 19, and it gains immunity to charm effects.

***amedrontado:*** The alvo emits a 10-pé-radius aura of dread. cada criatura the alvo designates that starts its turn in the aura deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar amedrontado of the alvo. A criatura amedrontado in this way that starts its turn outside the aura repeats the teste de resistência, ending the condition on itself em um sucesso.

***paralisado:*** The alvo can use one extra ação bônus or reação per rodada.

***petrificado:*** The alvo gains a +2 bonus to AC.

***envenenado:*** The alvo heals 2d6 pontos de vida no início de its next turn, and it gains immunity to dano de veneno and the envenenado condition.

***atordoado:*** The alvo has vantagem on Inteligência, Sabedoria, and Carisma saving throws.

name: Symbol
desc:
quando você conjura esta magia, you inscribe a harmful glyph either on a superfície (such as a section of floor, a parede, or a table) or within an objeto that can be closed to conceal the glyph (such as a book, a pergaminho, or a treasure chest). If você escolhe a superfície, the glyph can cover an área of the superfície no larger than 3 metros in diameter. If você escolhe an objeto, that objeto must remain in its place; if the objeto is moved more than 3 metros from where Você conjura esta magia, the glyph is broken, and a magia termina without being triggered. The glyph is nearly invisível, requiring an Inteligência (Investigation) check against your CD da magia to find it. You decide what triggers the glyph when you conjurar a magia. For glyphs inscribed on a superfície, the most typical triggers include touching or stepping on the glyph, removing another objeto covering it, approaching within a certain distance of it, or manipulating the objeto that holds it. For glyphs inscribed within an objeto, the most common triggers are opening the objeto, approaching within a certain distance of it, or seeing or reading the glyph. você pode further refine the trigger so the magia is activated only under certain circumstances or according to uma criatura's physical characteristics (such as height or weight), or physical kind (Por exemplo, the ward could be set to affect hags or shapechangers). você pode also specify criatura that don't trigger the glyph, such as those who say a certain password. When you inscribe the glyph, Escolha one of the options below for its effect. Once triggered, the glyph glows, filling a 18 metros esfera with luz fraca por 10 minutos, after which time a magia termina. cada criatura in the esfera when the glyph activates is targeted by its effect, as is uma criatura that enters the esfera for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there.

**morte.** cada alvo deve fazer um teste de resistência de Constituição, taking 10d 10 dano necrótico em uma falha no teste, or half as much dano em um sucesso no teste

 **Discord.** cada alvo deve fazer um teste de resistência de Constituição. em uma falha no teste, um alvo bickers and argues with outras criaturas por 1 minuto. During this time, it is incapable of meaningful communication and tem desvantagem em rolagem de ataques verificação de ands.

**medo.** cada alvo deve fazer um teste de resistência de Sabedoria and becomes amedrontado por 1 minuto em uma falha no teste. While amedrontado, o alvo drops whatever it is holding and must move at least 9 metros away from the glyph on cada um de seus turnos, if able.

**Hopelessness.** cada alvo deve fazer um teste de resistência de Carisma. em uma falha no teste, o alvo is overwhelmed with despair por 1 minuto. During this time, it can't attack or alvo any criatura with harmful abilities, magias, or other mágico effects.

**Insanity.** cada alvo deve fazer um teste de resistência de Inteligência. em uma falha no teste, o alvo is driven insane por 1 minuto. An insane criatura can't take ações, can't understand what outras criaturas say, can't read, and speaks only in gibberish. The DM controls its movimento, which is erratic.

**Pain.** cada alvo deve fazer um teste de resistência de Constituição and becomes incapacitado with excruciating pain por 1 minuto em uma falha no teste.

**Sleep.** cada alvo deve fazer um teste de resistência de Sabedoria and falls inconsciente por 10 minutos em uma falha no teste. uma criatura awakens if it sofre dano or if someone uses an ação to shake or slap it awake.

**Stunning.** cada alvo deve fazer um teste de resistência de Sabedoria and becomes atordoado por 1 minuto em uma falha no teste.
material: Mercury, phosphorus, and powdered diamond and opal with a total value of at least 1,000 gp, which the magia consumes.

name: Symbol
desc:
You inscribe a potent glyph on the alvo, setting a mágico trap for your inimigos. If the glyph is moved more than 10 pés from its original position, or if it comes within 20 pés of another glyph that you have cast, the spell ends. Finding the Tiny glyph requires an Investigação check against your CD de resistência à magia.

Describe the actions a criatura must perform to trigger the spell, such as approaching within a certain distance, opening or touching the object the glyph is inscribed on, or seeing or reading the glyph. The criatura must have a clear path to the glyph to trigger it. You can specify certain criaturas which don't trigger the spell, such as those with a certain appearance or those who speak a certain phrase. Once the glyph is triggered, the spell ends.

When triggered, the glyph sheds dim leve in a 60-pé radius for 10 minutos, after which the spell ends. cada criatura within the sphere's area is targeted by the glyph, as are criaturas that enter the sphere for the first time on a turn.

When you cast the spell, choose one of the following effects.

Death: criaturas in the area make a teste de resistência de Constituição, taking 10d10 dano necrótico em uma falha no teste, or half as much em um sucesso no teste.

Discord: criaturas in the area make a teste de resistência de Constituição or bicker and argue with other criaturas for 1 minuto. While bickering, a criatura cannot meaningfully communicate and it has desvantagem on attack rolls and ability checks.

Confused: criaturas in the area make an teste de resistência de Inteligência or become confused for 1 minuto.

Fear: criaturas in the area make a teste de resistência de Sabedoria or are amedrontado for 1 minuto.

While amedrontado, a criatura drops whatever it is holding and must move at least 30 pés away from the glyph on cada um de seus turnos.

Hopelessness: criaturas in the area make a teste de resistência de Carisma or become overwhelmed with despair for 1 minuto. While despairing, a criatura can't attack or alvo any criatura with harmful features, spells, traits, or other mágico effects.

Pain: criaturas in the area make a teste de resistência de Constituição or become incapacitado for 1 minuto.

Sleep: criaturas in the area make a teste de resistência de Sabedoria or fall inconsciente for 10 minutos.

A sleeping criatura awakens if it recebe damage or an action is used to wake it.

Stunning: criaturas in the area make a teste de resistência de Sabedoria or become atordoado for 1 minuto.

name: Symbol of Sorcery
desc: You draw an arcane symbol on an object, wall, or other surface at least 5 pés wide. When a criatura other than you approaches within 5 pés of the symbol, that act triggers an arcane explosion. cada criatura in a 60-pé cone deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar atordoado. A atordoado criatura repeats the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso no teste. After this symbol explodes or when the duration expires, its power is spent and the spell ends.
material: a stick of incense worth 20 gp

name: Talons of a Hungry Land
desc:
You cause three parallel lines of thick, flared obsidian spikes to erupt from the ground. They appear within range on a solid surface, last for the duration, and provide three‐quarters cover to criaturas behind them. You can make lines (up to 60 pés long, 10 pés high, and 5 pés thick) or form a circle (20 pés in diameter, up to 15 pés high and 5 pés thick).

When the lines appear, cada criatura in their area deve fazer a teste de resistência de Destreza. criaturas recebe 8d8 dano cortante, or half as much damage em um sucesso no teste.

A criatura can move through the lines at the risk of cutting itself on the exposed edges. For every 1 pé a criatura moves through the lines, it must spend 4 pés of movement. Furthermore, the first time a criatura enters the lines on a turn or ends its turn there, the criatura deve fazer a teste de resistência de Destreza. It recebe 8d8 dano cortante em uma falha, or half as much damage em um sucesso.

When you stop concentrating on the spell, you can cause the obsidian spikes to explode, dealing 5d8 dano cortante to any criatura within 15 pés, or half as much damage on a successful Destreza save.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 8th level or higher, o dano from all effects of the lines increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 7th.

name: Targeting Foreknowledge
desc: Twisting the knife, slapping with the butt of the spear, cortante out again as you recover from a lunge, and countless other double-strike maneuvers are skillful ways to get more from your weapon. By casting this spell as a ação bônus after making a successful ataque corpo a corpo com arma, you deal an extra 2d6 damage of the weapon’s type to the alvo. In addition, if your weapon jogada de ataque was a 19 or higher, it is a critical hit and increases the weapon’s damage dice as normal. The extra damage from this spell is not increased on a critical hit.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Ranger, Sorcerer, Wizard

name: Tearful Sonnet
desc:
You quietly play a tragedy, a song that fills those around you with mágico sorrow. cada criatura in the area makes a teste de resistência de Carisma no início de its turn. em uma falha no teste, a criatura recebe 2d4 dano psíquico, it spends its action that turn crying, and it can't take reactions until the start of its next turn. criaturas that are immune to the enfeitiçado condition automatically succeed on this teste de resistência.

If a criatura other than you hears the entire song (remaining within the spell's area from the casting through the duration) it is so wracked with sadness that it is atordoado for 1d4 rodadas.

You cannot cast another spell through your spellcasting focus while concentrating on this spell.
higher_level: o dano increases by 2d4 for each slot level above 4th.

name: Telekinesis
desc:
Você ganha the ability to move or manipulate criatura or objeto by thought. When you conjurar a magia, and as your ação each round for a duração, você pode exert your will on one criatura or objeto that você pode ver dentro do alcance, causing the appropriate effect below. você pode affect the same alvo round after round, or Escolha a new one at any time. If you switch alvo, the prior alvo is no longer affected by the magia.

**criatura.** você pode try to move a Huge or smaller criatura. Make uma verificação de ability with your conjuração ability contested by a criatura's Força check. If you win the contest, Você se move a criatura up to 9 metros in any direction, including upward but not beyond o alcance desta magia. até o final do seu próximo turno, a criatura is imobilizado in your telekinetic grip. uma criatura lifted upward is suspended in mid-air. On subsequent rounds, você pode use your ação to attempt to maintain your telekinetic grip on a criatura by repeating the contest.

**objeto.** você pode try to move an objeto that weighs up to 1,0 kg. If the objeto isn't being worn or carried, you automatically move it up to 9 metros in any direction, but not beyond o alcance desta magia. If the objeto is worn or carried by uma criatura, você deve make uma verificação de ability with your conjuração ability contested by that criatura's Força check. If you succeed, you pull the objeto away from that criatura and can move it up to 9 metros in any direction but not beyond o alcance desta magia. você pode exert fine control on objeto with your telekinetic grip, such as manipulating a simple tool, opening a door or a container, stowing or retrieving an item from an open container, or pouring the contents from a vial.

name: Telekinesis
desc:
You move the alvo with the power of your mind.

Until the spell ends you can use an action on subsequent turns to pick a new alvo or continue to affect the same alvo. Depending on whether you alvo a criatura or an object, the spell has the following effects:

**criatura.** The alvo makes a teste de Força against your CD de resistência à magia or it is moved up to 30 pés in any direction and imobilizado (even in mid-air) until the end of your next turn. You cannot move a alvo beyond the range of the spell.

**Object.** You move the alvo 30 pés in any direction. If the object is worn or carried by a criatura, that criatura can make a teste de Força against your CD de resistência à magia. If the alvo fails, you pull the object away from that criatura and can move it up to 30 pés in any direction, but not beyond the range of the spell.

You can use telekinesis to finely manipulate objects as though you were using them yourself—you can open doors and unscrew lids, dip a quill in ink and make it write, and so on.
higher_level: When using an 8th-level espaço de magia, this spell does not require your Concentração.

name: Telepathic Bond
desc: You forge a telepathic link among up to eight criaturas voluntárias of your choice dentro do alcance, psychically linking cada criatura to all the others for a duração. criatura with valor de Inteligências of 2 or less aren't affected by this magia. Until a magia termina, the alvo can communicate telepathically through the bond whether or not they have a common language. The communication is possible over any distance, though it can't extend to other plano of existence.
material: Pieces of eggshell from two different kinds of criatura

name: Telepathic Bond
desc: Until the spell ends, a telepathic link connects the minds of the alvos. So long as they remain on the same plane of existence, alvos may communicate telepathically with each other regardless of language and across any distance.
higher_level: The spell's duration increases by 1d4 horas for each slot level above 5th.

name: Teleport
desc:
This magia instantly transports you and up to eight criaturas voluntárias of your choice that você pode ver dentro do alcance, or a single objeto that você pode ver dentro do alcance, to a destination you select. If Você mira an objeto, it must be able to fit entirely inside a 3 metros cubo, and it can't be held or carried by an unwilling criatura. The destination você escolhe must be known to you, and it must be on the same plano of existence as you. Your familiarity with the destination determines whether you arrive there successfully. The DM rolls d100 and consults the table.

**Familiarity.** "Permanent circle" means a permanent teletransporte circle whose sigil sequence Você sabe. "Associated objeto" means that you possess an objeto taken from the desired destination within the last six months, such as a book from a Mago's library, bed linen from a royal suite, or a chunk of marble from a lich's secret tomb. "Very familiar" is a place você tem been very often, a place você tem carefully studied, or a place você pode ver when you conjurar a magia. "Seen casually" is someplace você tem seen more than once but with which you aren't very familiar. "Viewed once" is a place você tem seen once, possibly using magia. "Description" is a place whose location and appearance Você sabe through someone else's description, perhaps from a map. "False destination" is a place that doesn't exist. Perhaps you tried to scry an inimigo's sanctum but Em vez disso viewed an ilusão, or Você está attempting to teletransporte to a familiar location that no longer exists.

**On alvo.** You and your group (or o alvo objeto) appear where you want to.

**Off alvo.** You and your group (or o alvo objeto) appear a random distance away from the destination in a random direction. Distance off alvo is 1d10 × 1d10 percent of the distance that was to be traveled. Por exemplo, if you tried to travel 192 km, landed off alvo, and rolled a 5 and 3 on the two d10s, then you would be off alvo by 15 percent, or 29 km. The GM determines the direction off alvo randomly by rolling a d8 and designating 1 as north, 2 as northeast, 3 as east, and so on around the points of the compass. If you were teleporting to a coastal city and wound up 29 km out at sea, you could be in trouble.

**Similar área.** You and your group (or o alvo objeto) wind up in a different área that's visually or thematically similar to o alvo área. If Você está heading for your home laboratory, Por exemplo, you might wind up in another Mago's laboratory or in an alchemical supply shop that has many of the same tools and implements as your laboratory. Generally, you appear in the closest similar place, but since the magia has no range limit, you could conceivably wind up anywhere on the plano.

**Mishap.** The magia's unpredictable magia results in a difficult journey. Each teleporting criatura (or o alvo objeto) takes 3d10 dano de força, and the GM rerolls on the table to see where you wind up (multiple mishaps can occur, dealing dano each time).

name: Teleport
desc:
You teleport the alvos instantly across vast distances. When you cast this spell, choose a destination. You must know the location you're teleporting to, and it must be on the same plane of existence.

Teleportation is difficult magic and you may arrive off-alvo or somewhere else entirely depending on how familiar you are with the location you're teleporting to. When you teleport, the Narrator rolls 1d100 and consults Table: Teleport Familiarity.

Familiarity is determined as follows: Permanent Circle: A permanent teleportation circle whose sigil sequence you know (see teleportation circle).

Associated Object: You have an object taken from the alvo location within the last 6 months, such as a piece of wood from the pew in a grand temple or a pinch of grave dust from a vampire's hidden redoubt.

Very Familiar: A place you have frequented, carefully studied, or can see at the time you cast the spell.

Seen Casually: A place you have seen more than once but don't know well. This could be a castle you've passed by but never visited, or the farms you look down on from your tower of ivory.

Viewed Once: A place you have seen once, either in person or via magic.

Description: A place you only know from someone else's description (whether spoken, written, or even marked on a map).

False Destination: A place that doesn't actually exist. This typically happens when someone deceives you, either intentionally (like a wizard creating an illusion to hide their actual tower) or unintentionally (such as when the location you attempt to teleport to no longer exists).

Your arrival is determined as follows: On alvo: You and your alvos arrive exactly where you mean to.

Off alvo: You and your alvos arrive some distance away from the alvo in a random direction. The further you travel, the further away you are likely to arrive. You arrive off alvo by a number of milhas equal to 1d10 × 1d10 percent of the total distance of your trip.

If you tried to travel 1, 000 milhas and roll a 2 and 4 on the d10s, you land 6 percent off alvo and arrive 60 milhas away from your intended destination in a random direction. Roll 1d8 to randomly determine the direction: 1—north, 2 —northeast, 3 —east, 4 —southeast, 5—south, 6 —southwest, 7—west, 8—northwest.

Similar Location: You and your alvos arrive in a different location that somehow resembles the alvo area. If you tried to teleport to your favorite inn, you might end up at a different inn, or in a room with much of the same decor.

Typically you appear at the closest similar location, but that is not always the case.

Mishap: The spell's magic goes awry, and each teleporting criatura or object recebe 3d10 dano de força. The Narrator rerolls on the table to determine where you arrive. When multiple mishaps occur alvos take damage each time.

name: Teleportation Circle
desc: As you conjurar a magia, you draw a 3 metros-diameter circle on the ground inscribed with sigils that link your location to a permanent teletransporte circle of your choice whose sigil sequence Você sabe and that is on the same plano of existence as you. A cintilante portal opens within the circle you drew and remains open até o final do seu próximo turno. Any criatura that enters the portal instantly appears within 1.5 metros of the destination circle or in the nearest espaço desocupado if that space is occupied. Many major temples, guilds, and other important places have permanent teletransporte circles inscribed somewhere within their confines. Each such circle includes a unique sigil sequence-a string of mágico runes arranged in a particular pattern. When you first gain the ability to conjurar esta magia, Você aprende the sigil sequences for two destinations on the Material plano, determined by the DM. você pode learn additional sigil sequences during your adventures. você pode commit a new sigil sequence to memory after studying it por 1 minuto. você pode create a permanent teletransporte circle by conjurando esta magia in the same location every day for one year. You need not use the circle to teletransporte when you conjurar a magia in this way.
material: Rare chalks and inks infused with precious gema with 50 gp, which the magia consumes.

name: Teleportation Circle
desc:
You draw a 10-pé diameter circle on the ground and open within it a shimmering portal to a permanent teleportation circle elsewhere in the world. The portal remains open until the end of your next turn. Any criatura that enters the portal instantly travels to the destination circle.

Permanent teleportation circles are commonly found within major temples, guilds, and other important locations. Each circle has a unique sequence of mágico runes inscribed in a certain pattern called a sigil sequence.

When you cast teleportation circle, you inscribe runes that match the sigil sequence of a teleportation circle you know. When you first gain the ability to cast this spell, you learn the sigil sequences for 2 destinations on the Material Plane, determined by the Narrator. You can learn a new sigil sequence with 1 minuto of observation and study.

Casting the spell in the same location every dia for a year creates a permanent teleportation circle with its own unique sigil sequence. You do not need to teleport when casting the spell to make a permanent destination.

name: Thaumaturgy
desc:
You manifest a minor wonder, a sign of supernatural power, dentro do alcance. você cria one of the following mágico effects dentro do alcance. 
- Your voice booms up to three times as loud as normal por 1 minuto. 
- Você causa flames to flicker, brighten, dim, or change color por 1 minuto. 
- Você causa harmless tremors in the ground por 1 minuto. 
- você cria an instantaneous sound that originates from a point of your choice dentro do alcance, such as a rumble of thunder, the cry of a raven, or ominous whispers. 
- You instantaneously cause an unlocked door or window to voar open or slam shut. 
- You alter the appearance of your eyes por 1 minuto. 
If Você conjura esta magia multiple times, você pode have up to three of its 1-minute effects active at a time, and você pode dismiss such an effect as an ação.

name: Thaumaturgy
desc:
You draw upon divine power and create a minor divine effect. When you cast the spell, choose one of the following:

* Your voice booms up to three times louder than normal
* You cause flames to flicker, brighten, dim, or change color
* You send harmless tremors throughout the ground.
* You create an Instantâneo sound, like ethereal chimes, sinister laughter, or a dragon's roar at a point of your choosing within range.
* You instantaneously cause an unlocked door or window to fly open or slam shut.
* You alter the appearance of your eyes.

Lingering effects last until the spell ends. If you cast this spell multiple times, you can have up to 3 of the lingering effects active at a time, and can dismiss an effect at any time on your turn.

name: The Black God's Blessing
desc: Chernobog doesn't care that the Night Cauldron only focuses on one aspect of his dominion. After all, eternal night leads perfectly well to destruction and murder, especially by the desperate fools seeking to survive in the new, lightless world. Having devotees at the forefront of the mayhem suits him, so he allows a small measure of his power to infuse worthy souls. After contacting the Black God, the ritual caster makes a respectful yet forceful demand for him to deposit some of his power into the criatura that is the alvo of the ritual. For Chernobog to comply with this demand, the caster deve fazer a successful CD 20 spellcasting check. If the check fails, the spell fails and the caster and the spell's alvo become permanently vulnerable to fogo; this vulnerability can be ended with remove curse or comparable magic. If the spell succeeds, the alvo criatura gains visão no escuro (60 pés) and immunity to frio. Chernobog retains the privilege of revoking these gifts if the recipient ever wavers in devotion to him.

name: Thin the Ice
desc: You alvo a point within range. That point becomes the top center of a cylinder 10 pés in radius and 40 pés deep. All ice inside that area melts immediately. The uppermost layer of ice seems to remain intact and sturdy, but it covers a 40-pé-deep pit filled with ice water. A successful Sabedoria (Sobrevivência) check or passive Percepção check against your CD de resistência à magia notices the thin ice. If a criatura weighing more than 20 pounds (or a greater weight specified by you when casting the spell) treads over the cylinder or is already standing on it, the ice gives way. Unless the criatura makes a successful teste de resistência de Destreza, it falls into the icy water, taking 2d6 dano de frio plus whatever other problems are caused by water, by armor, or by being drenched in a freezing environment. The water gradually refreezes normally.
material: a piece of sunstone

name: Thousand Darts
desc: You launch thousands of needlelike darts in a 5-pé‐wide line that is 120 pés long. cada criatura in the line recebe 6d6 dano perfurante, or half as much damage if it makes a successful teste de resistência de Destreza. The first criatura struck by the darts makes the teste de resistência with desvantagem.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, o dano increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd.
material: a set of mithral darts worth 25 gp

name: Threshold Slip
desc:
The threshold of a doorway, the sill of a window, the junction where the floor meets the wall, the intersection of two walls—these are all points of travel for you. When you cast this spell, you can step into the junction of two surfaces, slip through the boundary of the Material Plane, and reappear in an unoccupied space with another junction you can see within 60 pés.
  You can take one willing criatura of your size or smaller that you're touching with you. The alvo junction must have unoccupied spaces for both of you to enter when you reappear or the spell fails.

name: Throes of Ecstasy
desc: Choose a humanoid that you can see within range. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Constituição or become overcome with euphoria, rendering it incapacitado for the duration. The alvo automatically fails Sabedoria saving throws, and attack rolls against the alvo have vantagem. no final de cada um de seus turnos, the alvo can make another teste de resistência de Constituição. em um sucesso no teste, the spell ends on the alvo and it gains one level of exaustão. If the spell continues for its maximum duration, the alvo gains three levels of exaustão when the spell ends.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, you can alvo one additional humanoid for each slot level above 3rd. The humanoids must be within 30 pés of each other when you alvo them.
material: a hazel or oak wand

name: Thunder Bolt
desc: You cast a knot of trovão at one inimigo. Make a ranged ataque mágico against the alvo. If it hits, the alvo recebe 1d8 dano de trovão and can’t use reactions until the start of your next turn.

name: Thunderclap
desc:
You clap your hands, emitting a peal of trovão. cada criatura within 20 pés of you recebe 8d4 dano de trovão and is surdo for 1d8 rodadas, or it recebe half as much damage and isn’t surdo if it makes a successful teste de resistência de Constituição. On a teste de resistência that fails by 5 or more, the criatura is also atordoado for 1 rodada.

This spell doesn’t function in an area affected by a [silence](https://api.open5e.com/spells/silence) spell. Very brittle material such as crystal might be shattered if it’s within range, at the GM’s discretion; a character holding such an object can protect it from harm by making a successful teste de resistência de Destreza.

name: Thunderous Charge
desc: With a thunderous battle cry, you move up to 10 pés in a straight line and make a ataque corpo a corpo com arma. If it hits, you can choose to either gain a +5 bonus on the attack’s damage or shove the alvo 10 pés.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 2nd level or higher, the distance you can move increases by 10 pés, and the attack causa an additional 1d6 dano de trovão, for each slot level above 1st.

name: Thunderous Stampede
desc: This spell acts as [thunderous charge](https://api.open5e.com/spells/thunderous-charge), but affecting up to three alvos within range, including yourself. A alvo other than you must use its reação to move and attack under the effect of thunderous stampede.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, the distance your alvos can move increases by 10 pés, and the attack causa an additional 1d6 dano de trovão, for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Thunderous Wave
desc: You initiate a shock wave centered at a point you designate within range. The wave explodes outward into a 30-pé-radius sphere. This força causa no damage directly, but every criatura the wave passes through deve fazer a teste de resistência de Força. em uma falha no teste, a criatura is pushed 30 pés and knocked prostrado; if it strikes a solid obstruction, it also recebe 5d6 dano contundente. em um sucesso no teste, a criatura is pushed 15 pés and not knocked prostrado, and it recebe 2d6 dano contundente if it strikes an obstruction. The spell also emits a thunderous boom that can be heard within 400 pés.

name: Thunderstorm
desc: You touch a willing criatura, and it becomes surrounded by a roiling storm cloud 30 pés in diameter, erupting with (harmless) trovão and relâmpago. The criatura gains a voando Deslocamento of 60 pés. The cloud heavily obscures the criatura inside it from view, though it is transparent to the criatura itself.
material: a piece of relâmpago-fused glass

name: Thunderwave
desc: A wave of thunderous force sweeps out from you. cada criatura in a 4.5 metros cubo originating from you deve fazer um teste de resistência de Constituição. em uma falha no teste, uma criatura takes 2d8 dano de trovão and is empurrá 3 metros away from you. em um sucesso no teste, a criatura takes half as much dano and isn't empurrá. Além disso, unsecured objeto that are completely within the área of effect are automatically empurrá 3 metros away from you by the magia's effect, and the magia emits a thunderous boom audible out to 90 metros.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 2° nível ou superior, the dano increases by 1d8 for each nível do espaço above 1st.

name: Thunderwave
desc:
You create a wave of thunderous força, damaging criaturas and pushing them back. criaturas in the area take 2d8 dano de trovão and are pushed 10 pés away from you.

Unsecured objects completely within the area are also pushed 10 pés away from you. The thunderous boom of the spell is audible out to 300 pés.
higher_level: o dano increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Tick Stop
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You speak a word and the alvo construct can take one action or ação bônus on its next turn, but not both. The construct is immune to further tick stops from the same caster for 24 horas.

name: Tidal Barrier
desc: A swirling wave of seawater surrounds you, crashing and rolling in a 10-pé radius around your space. The area is difficult terrain, and a criatura that starts its turn there or that enters it for the first time on a turn deve fazer a teste de resistência de Força. em uma falha no teste, the criatura is pushed 10 pés away from you and its Deslocamento is reduced to 0 until the start of its next turn.
material: a piece of driftwood

name: Time Jump
desc: You touch a construct and throw it forward in time if it fails a teste de resistência de Constituição. The construct disappears for 1d4 + 1 rodadas, during which time it cannot act ou ficar acted upon in any way. When the construct returns, it is unaware that any time has passed.

name: Time Loop
desc:
You capture a criatura within range in a loop of time. The alvo is teleported to the space where it began its most recent turn. The alvo then makes a teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em um sucesso no teste, the spell ends. em uma falha no teste, the criatura must repeat the activities it undertook on its previous turn, following the sequence of moves and actions to the best of its ability. It doesn’t need to move along the same path or attack the same alvo, but if it moved and then attacked on its previous turn, its only option is to move and then attack on this turn. If the space where the alvo began its previous turn is occupied or if it’s impossible for the alvo to take the same action (if it cast a spell but is now unable to do so, for example), the alvo becomes incapacitado.

An affected alvo can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso. For as long as the spell lasts, the alvo teleports back to its starting point no início de cada um de seus turnos, and it must repeat the same sequence of moves and actions.
material: a metal loop
