desc: You draw forth the ebbing life força of a criatura and use its arcane power. Upon casting this spell, you must touch a criatura that dropped to 0 pontos de vida since your last turn. If it fails a teste de resistência de Sabedoria, you gain knowledge of spells, innate spells, and similar abilities it could have used today were it still alive. Expended spells and abilities aren't revealed. Choose one of these spells or abilities with a casting time no longer than 1 action. Until you complete a descanso longo, you can use this spell or ability once, as a ação bônus, using the criatura's CD de resistência à magia or spellcasting ability bonus.

name: Wild Hunt
desc:
While casting this spell, you must chant and drum, calling forth the spirit of the hunt. Up to nine other criaturas can join you in the chant.
  For the duration, cada criatura that participated in the chant is filled with the fervent bloodlust of the wild hunt and gains several benefits. The criatura is immune to being enfeitiçado and amedrontado, it causa one extra die of damage on the first weapon or ataque mágico it makes on cada um de seus turnos, it has vantagem on Força or Destreza saving throws (the criatura's choice), and its Classe de Armadura increases by 1.
  When this spell ends, a criatura affected by it suffers one level of exaustão.

name: Wild Shield
desc:
You surround yourself with the forces of chaos. Wild lights and strange sounds engulf you, making Furtividade impossible. While **wild shield** is active, you can use a reação to repel a spell of 4th level or lower that alvos you or whose area you are within. A repelled spell has no effect on you, but doing this causes the chance of a chaos magic surge as if you had cast a spell, with you considered the caster for any effect of the surge.

**Wild shield** ends when the duration expires or when it absorbs 4 levels of spells. If you try to repel a spell whose level exceeds the number of levels remaining, make an teste de habilidade using your spellcasting ability. The CD equals 10 + the spell’s level – the number of levels **wild shield** can still repel. If the check succeeds, the spell is repelled; if the check fails, the spell has its full effect. The chance of a chaos magic surge exists regardless of whether the spell is repelled.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 5th level or higher, you can repel one additional spell level for each slot level above 4th.

name: Wind Lash
desc: Your swift gesture creates a solid lash of howling wind. Make a melee ataque mágico against the alvo. On a hit, the alvo recebe 1d8 dano cortante from the shearing wind and is pushed 5 pés away from you.
higher_level: The spell’s damage increases by 1d8 when you alcance 5th level (2d8), 11th level (3d8), and 17th level (4d8).

name: Wind Tunnel
desc:
You create a swirling tunnel of strong wind extending from yourself in a direction you choose. The tunnel is a line 60 pés long and 10 pés wide. The wind blows from you toward the end of the line, which is stationary once created. A criatura in the line moving with the wind (away from you) adds 10 pés to its Deslocamento, and ranged weapon attacks launched with the wind don’t have desvantagem because of long range. criaturas in the line moving against the wind (toward you) spend 2 pés of movement for every 1 pé they move, and ranged weapon attacks launched along the line against the wind are made with desvantagem.

The wind tunnel immediately disperses gas or vapor, and it extinguishes candles, torches, and similar unprotected flames in the line. It causes protected flames, such as those of lanterns, to dance wildly and has a 50 percent chance of extinguishing them.
material: a paper straw

name: Wind Up
desc: You wind your power up like a spring. You gain vantagem on the next ataque corpo a corpo roll you make before the end of the spell's duration, after which the spell ends.

name: Wind Walk
desc: You and up to ten criaturas voluntárias você pode ver dentro do alcance assume a gaseous form for a duração, appearing as wisps of cloud. While in this cloud form, uma criatura has a velocidade de voo of 90 metros and has resistência a dano from não mágico arma. The only ações uma criatura can take in this form are the Dash ação or to revert to its normal form. Reverting takes 1 minute, during which time uma criatura is incapacitado and can't move. Until a magia termina, uma criatura can revert to cloud form, which also requires the 1-minute transformation. If uma criatura is in cloud form and voando when the effect ends, a criatura descends 18 metros per round por 1 minuto until it lands, which it does safely. If it can't land after 1 minute, a criatura falls the remaining distance.
material: Fire and holy water.

name: Wind Walk
desc:
The alvos assume a gaseous form and appear as wisps of cloud. Each alvo has a voando Deslocamento of 300 pés and resistance to damage from não mágico weapons, but the only action it can take is the Dash action or to revert to its normal form (a process that recebe 1 minuto during which it is incapacitado and can't move).

Until the spell ends, a alvo can change again to cloud form (in an identical transformation process).

When the effect ends for a alvo voando in cloud form, it descends 60 pés each rodada for up to 1 minuto or until it safely lands. If the alvo can't land after 1 minuto, the criatura falls the rest of the way normally.

name: Wind Wall
desc: A parede of strong wind rises from the ground at a point você escolhe dentro do alcance. você pode make the parede up to 15 metros long, 4.5 metros high, and 0 metros thick. você pode shape the parede in any way você escolhe so long as it makes one continuous path along the ground. The parede lasts for a duração. When the parede appears, cada criatura within its área deve fazer um teste de resistência de Força. uma criatura takes 3d8 dano de concussão em uma falha no teste, or half as much dano on a successful one. The strong wind keeps fog, smoke, and other gases at bay. Small or smaller voando criatura or objeto can't pass through the parede. Loose, lightweight materials brought into the parede voar upward. Arrows, bolts, and other ordinary projectiles launched at alvo behind the parede are deflected upward and automatically miss. (Boulders hurled by giants or siege engines, and similar projectiles, are unaffected.) criatura in gaseous form can't pass through it.
material: A tiny fan and a feather of exotic origin.

name: Wind Wall
desc:
A wall of strong wind rises from the ground at a point you choose. You can make the wall up to 50 pés long, 15 pés high, and 1 pé thick. You can shape the wall in any way you choose so long as it makes one continuous path along the ground.

When the wall appears, cada criatura within its area makes a teste de resistência de Força, taking 3d8 dano contundente em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one.

The wall keeps fog, smoke, and other gases (including criaturas in gaseous form) at bay. Small or smaller voando criaturas or objects can't pass through. Loose, lightweight materials brought into the area fly upward. Arrows, bolts, and other ordinary projectiles launched at alvos behind the wall are deflected upward and automatically miss (larger projectiles such as boulders and siege engine attacks are unaffected).
higher_level: o dano increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Wind of the Hereafter
desc:
You create a 30-pé-radius sphere of roiling wind that carries the choking stench of death. The sphere is centered on a point you choose within range. The wind blows around corners. When a criatura starts its turn in the sphere, it recebe 8d8 dano necrótico, or half as much damage if it makes a successful teste de resistência de Constituição. criaturas are affected even if they hold their breath or don’t need to breathe.

The sphere moves 10 pés away from you no início de each of your turns, drifting along the surface of the ground. It is not heavier than air but drifts in a straight line for the duration of the spell, even if that carries it over a cliff or gully. If the sphere meets a wall or other impassable obstacle, it turns to the left or right (select randomly).
material: a vial of air from a tomb

name: Winding Key
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You alvo a construct, giving it an extra action or move on cada um de seus turnos.

name: Winged Spies
desc: This spell summons a swarm of ravens or other birds-or a swarm of bats if cast at night or underground-to serve you as spies. The swarm moves out as you direct, but it won't patrol farther away than the spell's range. Commands must be simple, such as “search the valley to the east for travelers” or “search everywhere for humans on horses.” The GM can judge how clear and effective your instructions are and use that estimation in determining what the spies report. You can recall the spies at any time by whispering into the air, but the spell ends when the swarm returns to you and reports. You must receive the swarm's report before the spell expires, or you gain nothing. The swarm doesn't fight for you; it avoids danger if possible but defends itself if it must. You know if the swarm is destroyed, and the spell ends.

name: Winter's Radiance
desc: When you cast this spell, the perfurante rays of a dia’s worth of sunlight reflecting off fresh snow blankets the area. A criatura caught in the spell’s area deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Constituição or have desvantagem on ranged attacks and Sabedoria (Percepção) checks for the duration of the spell. In addition, an affected criatura’s vision is hampered such that foes it alvos are treated as having three-quarters cover.
material: a piece of polished glass

name: Winterdark
desc:
This spell invokes the deepest part of night on the winter solstice. You alvo a 40-pé-radius, 60-pé-high cylinder centered on a point within range, which is plunged into darkness and unbearable frio. cada criatura in the area when you cast the spell and no início de its turn deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Constituição ou receber 1d6 dano de frio and gain one level of exaustão. criaturas immune to dano de frio are also immune to the exaustão effect, as are criaturas wearing frio weather gear or otherwise adapted for a frio environment.

As a ação bônus, you can move the center of the effect 20 pés.

name: Wintry Glide
desc:
Upon casting wintry glide, you can travel via ice or snow without crossing the intervening space. If you are adjacent to a mass of ice or snow, you can enter it by expending 5 pés of movement. By expending another 5 pés of movement, you can immediately exit from that mass at any point—within 500 pés—that’s part of the contiguous mass of ice or snow. When you enter the ice or snow, you instantly know the extent of the material within 500 pés. You must have at least 10 pés of movement available when you cast the spell, or it fails.

If the mass of ice or snow is destroyed while you are transiting it, you deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Constituição against your CD de resistência à magia to avoid taking 4d6 dano contundente and falling prostrado at the midpoint of a line between your entrance point and your intended exit point.

name: Wish
desc:
Wish is the mightiest magia a mortal criatura can cast. By simply speaking aloud, você pode alter the very foundations of reality in accord with your desires. The basic use of this magia is to duplicate any other magia of 8th level or lower. You don't need to meet any requirements in that magia, including costly componente. The magia simply takes effect. Alternatively, você pode create one of the following effects of your choice: 
- você cria one objeto of up to 25,000 gp in value that isn't a item mágico. The objeto can be no more than 90 metros in any dimension, and it appears in an espaço desocupado você pode ver on the ground. 
- You allow up to twenty criatura that você pode ver to regain all pontos de vida, and you end all effects on them described in the greater restoration magia. 
- You grant up to ten criatura você pode ver resistência a a dano type você escolhe. 
- You grant up to ten criatura você pode ver imunidade a a single magia or other mágico effect por 8 horas. Por exemplo, you could make yourself and all your companions imune a a lich's life drain attack. 
- You undo a single recent event by forcing a reroll of any roll made within the last round (including your last turn). Reality reshapes itself to accommodate the new result. Por exemplo, a wish magia could undo an opponent's successful save, a inimigo's critical hit, or a friend's failed save. você pode force the reroll to be made with vantagem or desvantagem, and você pode Escolha whether to use the reroll or the original roll. 
You might be able to achieve something beyond the scope of the above examples. State your wish to the DM as precisely as possible. The DM has great latitude in ruling what occurs in such an instance; the greater the wish, the greater the likelihood that something goes wrong. This magia might simply fail, the effect you desire might only be partly achieved, or you might suffer some unforeseen consequence Como resultado of how you worded the wish. Por exemplo, wishing that a villain were morto might propel you forward in time to a period when that villain is no longer alive, effectively removing you from the game. Similarly, wishing for a legendary item mágico or artifact might instantly transport you to the presence of the item's current owner. The stress of conjurando esta magia to produce any effect other than duplicating another magia weakens you. After enduring that stress, each time you cast a magia until you finish a descanso longo, Você sofre 1d10 dano necrótico per level of that magia. This dano can't be reduced or prevented in any way. Além disso, your Força drops to 3, if it isn't 3 or lower already, for 2d4 days. For each of those days that you spend resting and doing nothing more than light activity, your remaining recovery time decreases by 2 days. Finally, there is a 33 percent chance that Você está unable to cast wish ever again if you suffer this stress.

name: Wish
desc:
This is the mightiest of mortal magics and alters reality itself.

The safest use of this spell is the duplication of any other spell of 8th-level or lower without needing to meet its requirements (including components).

You may instead choose one of the following:

* One não mágico object of your choice that is worth up to 25, 000 gold and no more than 300 pés in any dimension appears in an unoccupied space you can see on the ground.
* Up to 20 criaturas that you can see to regain all their pontos de vida, and each is further healed as per the greater restoration spell.
* Up to 10 criaturas that you can see gain resistance to a damage type you choose.
* Up to 10 criaturas you can see gain immunity to a single spell or other mágico effect for 8 horas.
* You força a reroll of any roll made within the last rodada (including your last turn). You can força the reroll to be made with vantagem or desvantagem, and you can choose whether to use the reroll or the original roll.

You might be able to achieve something beyond the scope of the above examples. State your wish to the Narrator as precisely as possible, being very careful in your wording. Be aware that the greater the wish, the greater the chance for an unexpected result. This spell might simply fizzle, your desired outcome might only be partly achieved, or you might suffer some unforeseen consequence as a result of how you worded the wish. The Narrator has the final authority in ruling what occurs—and reality is not tampered with lightly.

**_Multiple Wishes:_** The stress of casting this spell to produce any effect other than duplicating another spell weakens you. Until finishing a descanso longo, each time you cast a spell you take 1d10 dano necrótico per level of that spell. This damage can't be reduced or prevented. In addition, your Força drops to 3 for 2d4 dias (if it isn't 3 or lower already). For each of those dias that you spend resting and doing nothing more than leve activity, your remaining recovery time decreases by 2 dias. Finally, there is a 33% chance that you are unable to cast wish ever again.

name: Withered Sight
desc: You cause the eyes of a criatura you can see within range to lose acuity. The alvo deve fazer a teste de resistência de Constituição. em uma falha no teste, the criatura has desvantagem on Sabedoria (Percepção) checks and all attack rolls for the duration of the spell. An affected criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso. This spell has no effect on a criatura that is blind or that doesn’t use its eyes to see.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 2nd level or higher, you can alvo one additional criatura for each slot level above 1st.
material: a dried lizard's eye
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Ranger, Warlock, Wizard

name: Wolfsong
desc:
You emit a howl that can be heard clearly from 300 pés away outdoors. The howl can convey a message of up to nine words, which can be understood by all dogs and wolves in that area, as well as (if you choose) one specific criatura of any kind that you name when casting the spell.

If you cast the spell indoors and aboveground, the howl can be heard out to 200 pés from you. If you cast the spell underground, the howl can be heard from 100 pés away. A criatura that entende the message is not compelled to act in a particular way, though the Natureza of the message might suggest or even dictate a course of action.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 2nd level or higher, you can name another specific recipient for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Word of Misfortune
desc: You hiss a word of Void Speech. Choose uma criatura you can see within range. The next time the alvo makes a teste de resistência during the spell’s duration, it must roll a d4 and subtract the result from the total of the teste de resistência. The spell then ends.

name: Word of Recall
desc: You and up to five criaturas voluntárias within 1.5 metros of you instantly teletransporte to a previously designated sanctuary. You and any criatura that teletransporte with you appear in the nearest espaço desocupado to the spot you designated when you prepared your sanctuary (see below). If Você conjura esta magia without first preparing a sanctuary, the magia has no effect. você deve designate a sanctuary by conjurando esta magia within a location, such as a temple, dedicated to or strongly linked to your deity. If Você tenta to conjurar a magia in this manner in an área that isn't dedicated to your deity, the magia has no effect.

name: Word of Recall
desc:
The alvos instantly teleport to a previously designated sanctuary, appearing in the nearest unoccupied space to the spot you designated when you prepared your sanctuary.

You must first designate a sanctuary by casting this spell within a location aligned with your faith, such as a temple dedicated to or strongly linked to your deity.

name: Wormway
desc:
You call a Gargantuan monstrosity from the depths of the world to carry you and your aliados across great distances. When you cast this spell, the nearest purple worm within range is enfeitiçado by you and begins moving toward a point on the ground that you can see. If there are no purple worms within range, the spell fails. The earth rumbles slightly as it approaches and breaks through the surface. Any criaturas within 20 pés of that point deve fazer a teste de resistência de Destreza ou ficar knocked prostrado and pushed 10 pés away from it.

Upon emerging, the purple worm lays down before you and opens its maw. alvos can climb inside where they are enclosed in an impervious hemispherical dome of força.

Once alvos are loaded into the purple worm, nothing—not physical objects, energy, or other spell effects —can pass through the barrier, in or out, though alvos in the sphere can breathe there. The hemisphere is immune to all damage, and criaturas and objects inside can't be damaged by attacks or effects originating from outside, nor can a alvo inside the hemisphere damage anything outside it.

The atmosphere inside the dome is comfortable and dry regardless of conditions outside it.

The purple worm waits until you give it a mental command to depart, at which point it dives back into the ground and travels, without need for rest or food, as directly as possible while avoiding obstacles to a destination known to you. It travels 150 milhas per dia.

When the purple worm reaches its destination it surfaces, the dome vanishes, and it disgorges the alvos in its mouth before diving back into the depths again.

The purple worm remains enfeitiçado by you until it has delivered you to your destination and returned to the depths, or until it is attacked at which point the charm ends, it vomits its alvos in the nearest unoccupied space as soon as possible, and then retreats to safety.

name: Wotan's Rede
desc: You recite a poem in the Northern tongue, sent to your lips by Wotan himself, to gain supernatural Intuição or advice. Your next Inteligência or teste de Carisma within 1 minuto is made with vantagem, and you can include twice your proficiência bonus. At the GM's discretion, this spell can instead provide a piece of general advice equivalent to an contact other plane.

name: Wresting Wind
desc: By blowing a pinch of confetti from your cupped hand, you create a burst of air that can rip weapons and other items out of the hands of your inimigos. Each inimigo in a 20-pé radius centered on a point you alvo within range deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Força or drop anything held in its hands. The objects land 10 pés away from the criaturas that dropped them, in random directions.
material: a handful of paper confetti

name: Write Memory
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You copy your memories, or those learned from the spell read memory, onto an empty memory gear.

name: Writhing Arms
desc:
Your arms become constantly writhing tentacles. You can use your action to make a melee ataque mágico against any alvo within range. The alvo recebe 1d10 dano necrótico and is agarrado (escape CD is your CD de resistência à magia). If the alvo does not escape your grapple, you can use your action on each subsequent turn to deal 1d10 dano necrótico to the alvo automatically.

Although you control the tentacles, they make it difficult to manipulate items. You cannot wield weapons or hold objects, including material components, while under the effects of this spell.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 2nd level or higher, o dano you deal with your tentacle attack increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Writhing Transformation
desc:
As part of the casting of this spell, you lay down in the coffin on a patch of bare earth and it buries itself. Over the following week, you are incapacitado and do not need air, food, or sleep. Your insides are eaten by worms, but you do not die and your skin remains intact. If you are exhumed during this time, or if the spell is otherwise interrupted, you die.

no final de the week, the transformation is complete and your true form is permanently changed. Your appearance is unchanged but underneath your skin is a sentient mass of worms. Any criatura that makes a Medicina check against your CD de resistência à magia realizes that there is something moving underneath your skin.

Your statistics change in the following ways:

* Your type changes to aberration, and you do not age or require sleep.
* You cannot be healed by normal means, but you can spend an action or ação bônus to consume 2d6 live worms, regaining an equal amount of pontos de vida by adding them to your body.
* You can sense and telepathically control all worms that have the beast type and are within 60 pés of you.

In addition, you are able to discard your shell of skin and travel as a writhing mass of worms. As an action, you can abandon your skin and pour out onto the ground. In this form you have the statistics of **swarm of insects** with the following exceptions: you keep your pontos de vida, Sabedoria, Inteligência, and Carisma scores, and proficiencies. You know but cannot cast spells in this form. You also gain a burrow Deslocamento of 10 pés. Any worms touching you instantly join with your swarm, granting you a number of temporary pontos de vida equal to the number of worms that join with your form (maximum 40 temporary pontos de vida). These temporary pontos de vida last until you are no longer in this form.

If you spend an hora in the same space as a dead criatura of your original form's size, you can eat its insides and inhabit its skin in the same way you once inhabited your own. While you are in your swarm form, the most recent skin you inhabited remains intact and you can move back into a previously inhabited skin in 1 minuto. You have vantagem on checks made to impersonate a criatura while wearing its skin.

name: Yellow Sign
desc:
You attempt to afflict a humanoid you can see within range with memories of distant, alien realms and their peculiar inhabitants. The alvo deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar afflicted with a form of long-term madness and be enfeitiçado by you for the duration of the spell or until you or one of your aliados harms it in any way. While enfeitiçado in this way, the criatura regards you as a sacred monarch. If you or an aliado of yours is fighting the criatura, it has vantagem on its teste de resistência.

A successful [remove curse](https://api.open5e.com/spells/remove-curse) spell ends both effects.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Zone of Truth
desc: você cria a mágico zone that guards against deception in a 4.5 metros esfera centered on a point of your choice dentro do alcance. Until a magia termina, uma criatura that enters the magia's área for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there deve fazer um teste de resistência de Carisma. em uma falha no teste, uma criatura can't speak a deliberate lie while in the raio. Você sabe whether cada criatura succeeds or fails on its teste de resistência. An affected criatura is aware of the fate and can avoid answering questions she would normally have responded with a lie. Such uma criatura can remain evasive in his answers as they remain within the limits of truth.

name: Zone of Truth
desc:
You create a zone that minimizes Enganação. Any criatura that is able to be enfeitiçado can't speak a deliberate lie while in the area.

An affected criatura is aware of the spell and can choose not to speak, or it might be evasive in its communications. A criatura that enters the zone for the first time on its turn or starts its turn there deve fazer a teste de resistência de Carisma. em uma falha no teste, the criatura recebe 2d4 dano psíquico when it intentionally tries to mislead or occlude important information. Each time the spell damages a criatura, it makes a Enganação check (CD 8 + o dano dealt) or its suffering is obvious. You know whether a criatura succeeds on its teste de resistência

name: Zymurgic Aura
desc: A wave of putrefaction surges from you, targeting criaturas of your choice within a 30-pé radius around you, speeding the rate of decay in those it touches. The alvo deve fazer a teste de resistência de Constituição. It recebe 10d6 dano necrótico em uma falha no teste or half as much em um sucesso no teste. Its ponto de vida maximum is reduced by an amount equal to o dano taken. This reduction lasts until the criatura recebe a descanso longo.
